116const IMAGE_SPECTRUM_RENDER_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;

120const IMAGE_MOVIE_PROTOCOL_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY: usize = 8;

123const IMAGE_SPECTRUM_TARGET_PIXELS_PER_SAMPLE: u32 = 12;
124const IMAGE_SPECTRUM_MIN_TARGET_PLOT_WIDTH: u32 = 256;
125const IMAGE_SPECTRUM_TARGET_PLOT_HEIGHT: u32 = 192;

260    },

262        name: String,
263    },
264    SetImageDefaultMask {
265        name: String,
266    },
267    UnsetImageDefaultMask,
268    DeleteImageMask {
269        name: String,
270    },
271    WriteImageRegionMask,
272    SetImagePlaneContentMode {
273        mode: ImagePlaneContentMode,
274    },
275    SetImageViewParameters {
276        parameters: ImageBrowserParameters,
277    },
278    PageUp {
279        pages: usize,
280    },
281    PageDown {
282        pages: usize,
283    },
284    Activate,
285    Back,
286    Escape,
287}

359#[allow(dead_code)]
360#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
361pub(crate) enum ResultTab {
362    Overview,
363    Data,
364    Structure,
365    Content,
366    Inspector,
367    Products,
368    Diagnostics,
369    History,
370    Observations,
371    Scans,
372    Fields,
373    Spws,
374    Sources,
375    Antennas,
376    Plots,
377    Stdout,
378    Stderr,
379}
380
381impl ResultTab {
382    pub(crate) fn label(self) -> &'static str {
383        match self {
384            Self::Overview => "Overview",
385            Self::Data => "Data",
386            Self::Structure => "Structure",
387            Self::Content => "Content",
388            Self::Inspector => "Inspector",
389            Self::Products => "Products",
390            Self::Diagnostics => "Diagnostics",
391            Self::History => "History",
392            Self::Observations => "Observations",
393            Self::Scans => "Scans",
394            Self::Fields => "Fields",
395            Self::Spws => "SPWs",
396            Self::Sources => "Sources",
397            Self::Antennas => "Antennas",
398            Self::Plots => "Plots",
399            Self::Stdout => "Stdout",
400            Self::Stderr => "Stderr",
401        }
402    }
403
404    fn index(self) -> usize {
405        match self {
406            Self::Overview => 0,
407            Self::Data => 1,
408            Self::Structure => 2,
409            Self::Content => 3,
410            Self::Inspector => 4,
411            Self::Products => 5,
412            Self::Diagnostics => 6,
413            Self::History => 7,
414            Self::Observations => 8,
415            Self::Scans => 9,
416            Self::Fields => 10,
417            Self::Spws => 11,
418            Self::Sources => 12,
419            Self::Antennas => 13,
420            Self::Plots => 14,
421            Self::Stdout => 15,
422            Self::Stderr => 16,
423        }
424    }
425}
426
427#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
428pub(crate) enum SummaryDataView {
429    Observations,
430    Scans,
431    Fields,
432    Spws,
433    Sources,
434    Antennas,
435}
436
437impl SummaryDataView {
438    const ALL: [Self; 6] = [
439        Self::Observations,
440        Self::Scans,
441        Self::Fields,
442        Self::Spws,
443        Self::Sources,
444        Self::Antennas,
445    ];
446
447    fn label(self) -> &'static str {
448        match self {
449            Self::Observations => "Observations",
450            Self::Scans => "Scans",
451            Self::Fields => "Fields",
452            Self::Spws => "SPWs",
453            Self::Sources => "Sources",
454            Self::Antennas => "Antennas",
455        }
456    }
457
458    fn cycle(self, forward: bool) -> Self {
459        let position = Self::ALL
460            .iter()
461            .position(|candidate| *candidate == self)
462            .unwrap_or(0);
463        if forward {
464            Self::ALL[(position + 1) % Self::ALL.len()]
465        } else if position == 0 {
466            Self::ALL[Self::ALL.len() - 1]
467        } else {
468            Self::ALL[position - 1]
469        }
470    }
471}
472
473#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
474pub(crate) struct FormRowView {
475    pub target: FormSelection,
476    pub text: String,
477    pub kind: FormRowKind,
478    pub selected: bool,

485    Field,

488#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
489pub(crate) struct TableView {
490    pub header: String,
491    pub rows: Vec<String>,
492}
493
494impl TableView {
495    pub(crate) fn content_width(&self) -> usize {
496        std::iter::once(self.header.chars().count())
497            .chain(self.rows.iter().map(|row| row.chars().count()))
498            .max()
499            .unwrap_or(0)
500    }
501}
502
503#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
504pub(crate) enum ResultContent {
505    Lines(Vec<String>),
506    Table(TableView),
507    Graphic(String),
508}

559#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
560pub(crate) enum BrowserTab {
561    Overview,
562    Columns,
563    Keywords,
564    Cells,
565    Subtables,
566    Plane,
567    Spectrum,
568    Metadata,
569    Coordinates,
570}
571
572impl BrowserTab {
573    pub(crate) const TABLE_ALL: [Self; 5] = [
574        Self::Overview,
575        Self::Columns,
576        Self::Keywords,
577        Self::Cells,
578        Self::Subtables,
579    ];
580
581    pub(crate) const IMAGE_ALL: [Self; 4] = [
582        Self::Metadata,
583        Self::Coordinates,
584        Self::Plane,
585        Self::Spectrum,
586    ];
587
588    pub(crate) fn label(self) -> &'static str {
589        match self {
590            Self::Overview => "Overview",
591            Self::Columns => "Columns",
592            Self::Keywords => "Keywords",
593            Self::Cells => "Cells",
594            Self::Subtables => "Subtables",
595            Self::Plane => "Plane",
596            Self::Spectrum => "Spectrum",
597            Self::Metadata => "Metadata",
598            Self::Coordinates => "Coordinates",
599        }
600    }
601
602    fn shell_result_tab(self) -> ResultTab {
603        match self {
604            Self::Overview | Self::Columns | Self::Keywords | Self::Subtables => {
605                ResultTab::Structure
606            }
607            Self::Cells | Self::Plane | Self::Spectrum => ResultTab::Content,
608            Self::Metadata | Self::Coordinates => ResultTab::Structure,
609        }
610    }
611
612    fn from_view(view: TableBrowserView) -> Self {
613        match view {
614            TableBrowserView::Overview => Self::Overview,
615            TableBrowserView::Columns => Self::Columns,
616            TableBrowserView::Keywords => Self::Keywords,
617            TableBrowserView::Cells => Self::Cells,
618            TableBrowserView::Subtables => Self::Subtables,
619        }
620    }
621
622    fn from_image_view(view: ImageBrowserView) -> Self {
623        match view {
624            ImageBrowserView::Plane => Self::Plane,
625            ImageBrowserView::Spectrum => Self::Spectrum,
626            ImageBrowserView::Metadata => Self::Metadata,
627            ImageBrowserView::Coordinates => Self::Coordinates,
628        }
629    }
630}
631

678#[derive(Debug)]
679pub(crate) struct AppState {
680    app: RegistryApp,
681    config_store: ConfigStore,
682    schema: Option<UiCommandSchema>,
683    schema_error: Option<String>,
684    fields: Vec<FormField>,
685    sections: Vec<FormSection>,
686    selected_form: FormSelection,
687    show_advanced: bool,
688    pane_focus: PaneFocus,
689    edit_state: Option<EditState>,
690    result: ResultState,
691    active_result_tab: ResultTab,
692    result_scrolls: [u16; RESULT_TAB_COUNT],
693    result_hscrolls: [u16; RESULT_TAB_COUNT],
694    selected_summary_view: SummaryDataView,
695    history_entries: Vec<HistoryEntry>,
696    workflow_products: Vec<WorkflowProductRecord>,
697    running: Option<RunningState>,
698    plot_workspace: PlotWorkspaceState,
699    path_chooser: Option<PathChooserState>,
700    choice_picker: Option<ChoicePickerState>,
701    browser_mode_picker: Option<ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode>,
702    browser_session: Option<BrowserSession>,
703    spinner_frame: usize,
704    dragging_divider: bool,
705    dragging_image_workspace_divider: bool,
706    dragging_image_cursor: bool,
707    dragging_image_profile: bool,
708    dragging_result_scrollbar: bool,
709    dragging_result_hscrollbar: bool,
710    dragging_result_hscrollbar_grab: u16,
711    output_selection: Option<OutputSelection>,
712    show_help: bool,
713    cached_result_text_area: Option<Rect>,
714    cached_left_output_area: Option<Rect>,
715    cached_browser_viewport_cells: Option<(u16, u16, u16)>,
716    kitty_response_capture: Option<String>,
717    kitty_movie_store_invalidated: bool,
718    last_click: Option<ClickState>,
719    pending_run_confirmation: bool,
720    movie_perf: MoviePerfTracer,
721    quit: bool,
722    return_to_launcher: bool,
723}

758    left_pane_mode: ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode,
759    selected_saved_region_index: usize,
760    selected_mask_index: usize,
761    selected_non_display_axis: usize,
762    pinned_probes: Vec<ImagePinnedProbe>,
763    selected_pinned_probe_id: Option<u64>,
764    next_pinned_probe_id: u64,
765    restoring_selected_pinned_probe: bool,
766    show_live_reticle: bool,
767    plane_mode: ImagePlaneMode,
768    plane_colormap: ImagePlaneColormap,
769    plane_invert: bool,
770    panel: Option<ImagePlanePanelState>,
771    spectrum_panel: Option<ImageSpectrumPanelState>,
772    snapshot_generation: u64,
773    movie: ImageMovieState,
774    movie_scheduler: Option<ImageMovieSchedulerState>,
775    movie_frame_seq: Option<u64>,
776    direct_movie_engine: ImageMovieBundleEngine,
777}
778
779#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
780struct ImagePinnedProbe {
781    id: u64,
782    label: String,
783    plane_pixel: (usize, usize),
784    probe: ImageBrowserProbe,
785    profile: Option<ImageProfilePayload>,
786    non_display_axis_indices: Vec<(usize, usize)>,
787}
788
789#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
790enum ImagePlaneMode {
791    Raster,
792    Spreadsheet,
793}
794
795impl ImagePlaneMode {
796    fn label(self) -> &'static str {
797        match self {
798            Self::Raster => "raster",
799            Self::Spreadsheet => "spreadsheet",
800        }
801    }
802}
803
804#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
805pub(crate) enum ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode {
806    Live,
807    Regions,
808    Masks,
809}
810
811impl ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode {
812    pub(crate) fn label(self) -> &'static str {
813        match self {
814            Self::Live => "Live",
815            Self::Regions => "Regions",
816            Self::Masks => "Masks",
817        }
818    }
819
820    pub(crate) fn all() -> [Self; 3] {
821        [Self::Live, Self::Regions, Self::Masks]
822    }
823
824    pub(crate) fn cycle(self, forward: bool) -> Self {
825        let all = Self::all();
826        let index = all.iter().position(|mode| *mode == self).unwrap_or(0);
827        if forward {
828            all[(index + 1) % all.len()]
829        } else {
830            all[(index + all.len() - 1) % all.len()]
831        }
832    }
833}
834
835#[derive(Debug)]
836struct ImageMovieState {
837    playing: bool,
838    fps: f64,
839    frame_interval: Duration,
840    last_advanced_at: Option<Instant>,
841    direct_overlay: bool,
842    terminal_looping: bool,
843}
844
845impl Default for ImageMovieState {
846    fn default() -> Self {
847        Self::with_fps(IMAGE_MOVIE_DEFAULT_FPS)
848    }
849}
850
851impl ImageMovieState {
852    fn with_fps(fps: f64) -> Self {
853        Self {
854            playing: false,
855            fps,
856            frame_interval: Duration::from_secs_f64(1.0 / fps),
857            last_advanced_at: None,
858            direct_overlay: false,
859            terminal_looping: false,
860        }
861    }
862
863    fn set_fps(&mut self, fps: f64) {
864        self.fps = fps;
865        self.frame_interval = Duration::from_secs_f64(1.0 / fps);
866    }
867}
868

876    last_error: Option<String>,

879    movie_display_key: Option<ImagePlaneRequestKey>,
880    movie_image_size: Option<(u32, u32)>,
881}

883struct ImageSpectrumPanelState {

888    pending_request_key: Option<ImageSpectrumRequestKey>,
889    last_error: Option<String>,
890    image_size: Option<(u32, u32)>,
891    movie_protocol: Option<PanelProtocol>,

1084}
1085
1086#[derive(Debug)]
1087struct RenderImageCache<K> {
1088    capacity: usize,
1089    values: HashMap<K, RgbImage>,
1090    order: VecDeque<K>,
1091}
1092
1093impl<K> RenderImageCache<K>
1094where
1095    K: Clone + Eq + Hash,
1096{
1097    fn new(capacity: usize) -> Self {
1098        Self {
1099            capacity: capacity.max(1),
1100            values: HashMap::new(),
1101            order: VecDeque::new(),
1102        }
1103    }
1104
1105    fn get(&mut self, key: &K) -> Option<RgbImage> {
1106        let value = self.values.get(key).cloned()?;
1107        self.touch(key);
1108        Some(value)
1109    }
1110
1111    fn contains_key(&self, key: &K) -> bool {
1112        self.values.contains_key(key)
1113    }
1114
1115    fn insert(&mut self, key: K, value: RgbImage) {
1116        if self.values.contains_key(&key) {
1117            self.values.insert(key.clone(), value);
1118            self.touch(&key);
1119            return;
1120        }
1121        self.values.insert(key.clone(), value);
1122        self.order.push_back(key);
1123        self.evict_if_needed();
1124    }
1125
1126    fn touch(&mut self, key: &K) {
1127        if let Some(index) = self.order.iter().position(|existing| existing == key)
1128            && let Some(existing) = self.order.remove(index)
1129        {
1130            self.order.push_back(existing);
1131        }
1132    }
1133
1134    fn evict_if_needed(&mut self) {
1135        while self.values.len() > self.capacity {
1136            let Some(oldest) = self.order.pop_front() else {
1137                break;
1138            };
1139            self.values.remove(&oldest);
1140        }
1141    }
1142}
1143
1144impl ImageMovieSchedulerState {
1145    fn new(
1146        content_signature: u64,
1147        movie_axis: usize,
1148        next_due_index: usize,
1149        fps: f64,
1150        session_indices: Vec<(usize, usize)>,
1151    ) -> Self {
1152        Self {
1153            generation: 1,
1154            content_signature,
1155            movie_axis,
1156            session_indices,
1157            presentations: ImageMoviePresentationCoordinator::new(next_due_index, fps),
1158            protocol_pool: PanelRenderPool::new(
1159                image_movie_render_worker_count(),
1160                IMAGE_MOVIE_PROTOCOL_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY,
1161                |job| render_movie_presentation(&job.input),
1162            )
1163            .expect("image movie protocol pool"),
1164            queue_capacity: IMAGE_MOVIE_PROTOCOL_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY,
1165        }
1166    }
1167
1168    fn invalidate(
1169        &mut self,
1170        content_signature: u64,
1171        movie_axis: usize,
1172        next_due_index: usize,
1173        fps: f64,
1174        session_indices: Vec<(usize, usize)>,
1175    ) {
1176        self.generation = self.generation.saturating_add(1);
1177        self.content_signature = content_signature;
1178        self.movie_axis = movie_axis;
1179        self.session_indices = session_indices;
1180        self.presentations.invalidate(next_due_index, fps);
1181    }
1182}
1183
1184fn image_movie_render_worker_count() -> usize {
1185    std::thread::available_parallelism()
1186        .map(|count| {
1187            let count = count.get();
1188            if count >= 8 { 3 } else { 2 }
1189        })
1190        .unwrap_or(2)
1191}
1192
1193fn image_movie_pipeline_state(scheduler: &ImageMovieSchedulerState) -> MoviePipelineState {
1194    MoviePipelineState {
1195        render_queue_depth: 0,
1196        render_active_jobs: 0,
1197        protocol_queue_depth: scheduler.protocol_pool.queue_depth(),
1198        protocol_active_jobs: scheduler.protocol_pool.active_job_count(),
1199        ready_bundle_count: 0,
1200        ready_presentation_count: scheduler.presentations.ready_len(),
1201        bitmap_cache_bytes: 0,
1202    }
1203}
1204
1205fn new_direct_image_movie_engine() -> ImageMovieBundleEngine {
1206    ImageMovieBundleEngine::new(
1207        configured_image_movie_target_resident_bytes(),
1208        IMAGE_MOVIE_MIN_RENDER_SCALE,
1209    )
1210}
1211
1212fn render_movie_presentation(
1213    job: &MovieProtocolRenderJob,
1214) -> Result<PreparedMoviePresentation, String> {
1215    let bundle = job.bundle.clone();
1216    let PreparedMovieBundle {
1217        occurrence,
1218        snapshot,
1219        plane_request,
1220        spectrum_request,
1221        rendered,
1222        cache_hit: _,
1223    } = bundle;
1224    let plane_bitmap = rendered
1225        .surfaces
1226        .iter()
1227        .find(|surface| surface.spec.kind == ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Plane)
1228        .map(|surface| DynamicImage::ImageRgb8(surface.bitmap.clone()).to_rgba8())
1229        .ok_or_else(|| "movie bundle missing plane surface".to_string())?;
1230    let plane_prepared = build_panel_protocol_from_rgba_owned(
1231        &job.plane_picker,
1232        Resize::Scale(None),
1233        plane_request.request_key.area,
1234        plane_bitmap,
1235    )
1236    .map_err(|error| error.to_string())?;
1237    let (spectrum_request, spectrum_protocol, spectrum_image_size) =
1238        if let (Some(request), Some(bitmap), Some(picker)) = (
1239            spectrum_request.as_ref(),
1240            rendered
1241                .surfaces
1242                .iter()
1243                .find(|surface| surface.spec.kind == ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum)
1244                .map(|surface| DynamicImage::ImageRgb8(surface.bitmap.clone()).to_rgba8()),
1245            job.spectrum_picker.as_ref(),
1246        ) {
1247            let prepared = build_panel_protocol_from_rgba_owned(
1248                picker,
1249                Resize::Fit(None),
1250                request.request_key.area,
1251                bitmap,
1252            )
1253            .map_err(|error| error.to_string())?;
1254            (
1255                Some(request.clone()),
1256                Some(prepared.protocol),
1257                Some((prepared.image_width, prepared.image_height)),
1258            )
1259        } else {
1260            (None, None, None)
1261        };
1262    Ok(PreparedMoviePresentation {
1263        occurrence,
1264        snapshot,
1265        plane_request,
1266        plane_protocol: plane_prepared.protocol,
1267        plane_image_size: (plane_prepared.image_width, plane_prepared.image_height),
1268        spectrum_request,
1269        spectrum_protocol,
1270        spectrum_image_size,
1271    })
1272}
1273
1274fn new_image_plane_panel_state() -> ImagePlanePanelState {
1275    let picker = terminal_picker();
1276    let font_size = picker.font_size();
1277    let render_image_cache = Arc::new(Mutex::new(RenderImageCache::new(
1278        IMAGE_PLANE_RENDER_CACHE_CAPACITY,
1279    )));
1280    let worker_cache = Arc::clone(&render_image_cache);
1281    let renderer = PanelRenderer::<ImagePlaneRenderInput, String>::new(
1282        picker.clone(),
1283        Resize::Scale(None),
1284        move |job| {
1285            if let Ok(mut cache) = worker_cache.lock()
1286                && let Some(image) = cache.get(&job.input.cache_key)
1287            {
1288                return Ok(image::DynamicImage::ImageRgb8(image));
1289            }
1290            let image =
1291                render_image_plane_image(job.max_pixel_width, job.max_pixel_height, &job.input)?;
1292            if let Ok(mut cache) = worker_cache.lock() {
1293                cache.insert(job.input.cache_key, image.to_rgb8());
1294            }
1295            Ok(image)
1296        },
1297    )
1298    .expect("image plane panel renderer");
1299    ImagePlanePanelState {
1300        picker,
1301        renderer,
1302        render_cache: render_image_cache,
1303        font_size,
1304        display_key: None,
1305        pending_request_key: None,
1306        last_error: None,
1307        image_size: None,
1308        movie_protocol: None,
1309        movie_display_key: None,
1310        movie_image_size: None,
1311    }
1312}
1313
1314fn new_image_spectrum_panel_state() -> ImageSpectrumPanelState {
1315    let picker = terminal_picker();
1316    let font_size = picker.font_size();
1317    let render_image_cache = Arc::new(Mutex::new(RenderImageCache::new(
1318        IMAGE_SPECTRUM_RENDER_CACHE_CAPACITY,
1319    )));
1320    let worker_cache = Arc::clone(&render_image_cache);
1321    let renderer = PanelRenderer::<ImageSpectrumRenderInput, String>::new(
1322        picker.clone(),
1323        Resize::Scale(None),
1324        move |job| {
1325            if let Ok(mut cache) = worker_cache.lock()
1326                && let Some(image) = cache.get(&job.input.cache_key)
1327            {
1328                return Ok(image::DynamicImage::ImageRgb8(image));
1329            }
1330            let image =
1331                render_image_spectrum_image(job.max_pixel_width, job.max_pixel_height, &job.input)?;
1332            if let Ok(mut cache) = worker_cache.lock() {
1333                cache.insert(job.input.cache_key, image.to_rgb8());
1334            }
1335            Ok(image)
1336        },
1337    )
1338    .expect("image spectrum panel renderer");
1339    ImageSpectrumPanelState {
1340        picker,
1341        renderer,
1342        font_size,
1343        display_key: None,
1344        pending_request_key: None,
1345        last_error: None,
1346        image_size: None,
1347        movie_protocol: None,
1348        movie_display_key: None,
1349        movie_image_size: None,
1350    }
1351}
1352
1353impl fmt::Debug for ImageMovieSchedulerState {
1354    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
1355        f.debug_struct("ImageMovieSchedulerState")
1356            .field("generation", &self.generation)
1357            .field("content_signature", &self.content_signature)
1358            .field("movie_axis", &self.movie_axis)
1359            .field("next_due_index", &self.presentations.next_due_index())
1360            .field("session_indices", &self.session_indices)
1361            .field("ready_presentation_count", &self.presentations.ready_len())
1362            .field(
1363                "in_flight_presentations",
1364                &self.presentations.in_flight_len(),
1365            )
1366            .field("queue_capacity", &self.queue_capacity)
1367            .finish()
1368    }
1369}
1370
1371impl fmt::Debug for ImagePlanePanelState {
1372    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
1373        f.debug_struct("ImagePlanePanelState")
1374            .field("font_size", &self.font_size)
1375            .field("display_key", &self.display_key)
1376            .field("pending_request_key", &self.pending_request_key)
1377            .field("last_error", &self.last_error)
1378            .field("image_size", &self.image_size)
1379            .finish()
1380    }
1381}
1382
1383impl fmt::Debug for ImageSpectrumPanelState {
1384    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
1385        f.debug_struct("ImageSpectrumPanelState")
1386            .field("font_size", &self.font_size)
1387            .field("display_key", &self.display_key)
1388            .field("pending_request_key", &self.pending_request_key)
1389            .field("last_error", &self.last_error)
1390            .field("image_size", &self.image_size)
1391            .finish()
1392    }
1393}
1394
1395impl ImageSpectrumPanelState {
1396    fn has_visible_content(&self) -> bool {
1397        self.movie_protocol.is_some()
1398            || self.renderer.protocol().is_some()
1399            || self.image_size.is_some()
1400            || self.movie_image_size.is_some()
1401            || self.display_key.is_some()
1402            || self.pending_request_key.is_some()
1403    }
1404}
1405
1406#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
1407pub(crate) enum BrowserPaneFocus {
1408    Main,
1409    Inspector,
1410}
1411
1412impl ImageBrowserSessionState {
1413    fn clamp_left_pane_selection(&mut self) {
1414        if let Some(active_name) = self.active_region_definition_name()
1415            && let Some(index) = self
1416                .snapshot
1417                .saved_region_names
1418                .iter()
1419                .position(|name| name == active_name)
1420        {
1421            self.selected_saved_region_index = index;
1422        } else {
1423            self.selected_saved_region_index = self
1424                .selected_saved_region_index
1425                .min(self.snapshot.saved_region_names.len().saturating_sub(1));
1426        }
1427
1428        if let Some(default_mask_name) = self.snapshot.default_mask_name.as_deref()
1429            && let Some(index) = self
1430                .snapshot
1431                .mask_names
1432                .iter()
1433                .position(|name| name == default_mask_name)
1434        {
1435            self.selected_mask_index = index;
1436        } else {
1437            self.selected_mask_index = self
1438                .selected_mask_index
1439                .min(self.snapshot.mask_names.len().saturating_sub(1));
1440        }
1441    }
1442
1443    fn selected_saved_region_name(&self) -> Option<&str> {
1444        self.snapshot
1445            .saved_region_names
1446            .get(self.selected_saved_region_index)
1447            .map(String::as_str)
1448    }
1449
1450    fn selected_mask_name(&self) -> Option<&str> {
1451        self.snapshot
1452            .mask_names
1453            .get(self.selected_mask_index)
1454            .map(String::as_str)
1455    }
1456
1457    fn raster_plane_active(&self) -> bool {
1458        self.snapshot.active_view == ImageBrowserView::Plane
1459            && self.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Raster
1460            && self.snapshot.plane.is_some()
1461    }
1462
1463    fn spreadsheet_plane_active(&self) -> bool {
1464        self.snapshot.active_view == ImageBrowserView::Plane
1465            && self.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Spreadsheet
1466    }
1467
1468    fn movie_available(&self) -> bool {
1469        self.snapshot.active_view == ImageBrowserView::Plane
1470            && self.selected_non_display_axis_state().is_some()
1471    }
1472
1473    fn linked_profile_active(&self) -> bool {
1474        self.raster_plane_active() && self.snapshot.profile.is_some()
1475    }
1476
1477    fn spectrum_workspace_visible(&self) -> bool {
1478        self.snapshot.active_view == ImageBrowserView::Plane
1479            && self.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Raster
1480            && (self.snapshot.profile.is_some()
1481                || self
1482                    .spectrum_panel
1483                    .as_ref()
1484                    .is_some_and(ImageSpectrumPanelState::has_visible_content))
1485    }
1486
1487    fn region_active(&self) -> bool {
1488        self.snapshot.region.is_some()
1489    }
1490
1491    fn region_editing_active(&self) -> bool {
1492        self.snapshot
1493            .region
1494            .as_ref()
1495            .is_some_and(|region| region.editing)
1496    }
1497
1498    fn active_region_definition_name(&self) -> Option<&str> {
1499        self.snapshot.active_region_definition_name.as_deref()
1500    }
1501
1502    fn selected_non_display_axis_state(
1503        &self,
1504    ) -> Option<&casars_imagebrowser_protocol::ImageNonDisplayAxisState> {
1505        self.snapshot
1506            .non_display_axes
1507            .get(self.selected_non_display_axis)
1508            .or_else(|| self.snapshot.non_display_axes.first())
1509    }
1510
1511    fn clamp_selected_non_display_axis(&mut self) {
1512        if self.snapshot.non_display_axes.is_empty() {
1513            self.selected_non_display_axis = 0;
1514        } else {
1515            self.selected_non_display_axis = self
1516                .selected_non_display_axis
1517                .min(self.snapshot.non_display_axes.len().saturating_sub(1));
1518        }
1519    }
1520
1521    fn selected_pinned_probe_index(&self) -> Option<usize> {
1522        let selected_id = self.selected_pinned_probe_id?;
1523        self.pinned_probes
1524            .iter()
1525            .position(|probe| probe.id == selected_id)
1526    }
1527
1528    fn selected_pinned_probe(&self) -> Option<&ImagePinnedProbe> {
1529        self.selected_pinned_probe_index()
1530            .and_then(|index| self.pinned_probes.get(index))
1531    }
1532
1533    fn selected_pinned_probe_mut(&mut self) -> Option<&mut ImagePinnedProbe> {
1534        let index = self.selected_pinned_probe_index()?;
1535        self.pinned_probes.get_mut(index)
1536    }
1537
1538    fn pin_from_snapshot(&mut self) -> bool {
1539        let Some(probe) = self.snapshot.probe.clone() else {
1540            return false;
1541        };
1542        let Some(cursor) = self.snapshot.plane_cursor.as_ref() else {
1543            return false;
1544        };
1545        let pinned = ImagePinnedProbe {
1546            id: self.next_pinned_probe_id,
1547            label: format!("P{}", self.next_pinned_probe_id),
1548            plane_pixel: (cursor.pixel_x, cursor.pixel_y),
1549            probe,
1550            profile: self.snapshot.profile.clone(),
1551            non_display_axis_indices: self
1552                .snapshot
1553                .non_display_axes
1554                .iter()
1555                .map(|axis| (axis.axis, axis.index))
1556                .collect(),
1557        };
1558        self.next_pinned_probe_id = self.next_pinned_probe_id.saturating_add(1);
1559        self.pinned_probes.push(pinned);
1560        true
1561    }
1562
1563    fn remove_selected_pinned_probe(&mut self) -> bool {
1564        let Some(index) = self.selected_pinned_probe_index() else {
1565            return false;
1566        };
1567        self.pinned_probes.remove(index);
1568        self.selected_pinned_probe_id = None;
1569        true
1570    }
1571
1572    fn cycle_selected_pinned_probe(&mut self, forward: bool) -> bool {
1573        if self.pinned_probes.is_empty() {
1574            return false;
1575        }
1576        let next_index = match self.selected_pinned_probe_index() {
1577            Some(index) if forward => (index + 1) % self.pinned_probes.len(),
1578            Some(0) => self.pinned_probes.len() - 1,
1579            Some(index) => index - 1,
1580            None => {
1581                if forward {
1582                    0
1583                } else {
1584                    self.pinned_probes.len() - 1
1585                }
1586            }
1587        };
1588        self.selected_pinned_probe_id = self.pinned_probes.get(next_index).map(|probe| probe.id);
1589        true
1590    }
1591
1592    fn clear_selected_pinned_probe(&mut self) -> bool {
1593        self.selected_pinned_probe_id.take().is_some()
1594    }
1595
1596    fn sync_selected_pinned_probe_from_snapshot(&mut self) {
1597        let snapshot_probe = self.snapshot.probe.clone();
1598        let snapshot_cursor = self.snapshot.plane_cursor.clone();
1599        let snapshot_profile = self.snapshot.profile.clone();
1600        let snapshot_axis_indices = self
1601            .snapshot
1602            .non_display_axes
1603            .iter()
1604            .map(|axis| (axis.axis, axis.index))
1605            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1606        let Some(probe) = self.selected_pinned_probe_mut() else {
1607            return;
1608        };
1609        if let Some(snapshot_probe) = snapshot_probe {
1610            probe.probe = snapshot_probe;
1611        }
1612        if let Some(cursor) = snapshot_cursor.as_ref() {
1613            probe.plane_pixel = (cursor.pixel_x, cursor.pixel_y);
1614        }
1615        if snapshot_profile.is_some() {
1616            probe.profile = snapshot_profile;
1617        }
1618        probe.non_display_axis_indices = snapshot_axis_indices;
1619    }
1620}
1621
1622impl BrowserSession {
1623    fn kind(&self) -> BrowserAppKind {
1624        match self.kind {
1625            BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => BrowserAppKind::Table,
1626            BrowserSessionKind::Image(_) => BrowserAppKind::Image,
1627        }
1628    }
1629
1630    fn focus(&self) -> BrowserPaneFocus {
1631        match &self.kind {
1632            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => match session.snapshot.focus {
1633                BrowserFocus::Inspector => BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector,
1634                BrowserFocus::Main => BrowserPaneFocus::Main,
1635            },
1636            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => match session.snapshot.focus {
1637                ImageBrowserFocus::Inspector => BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector,
1638                ImageBrowserFocus::Content => BrowserPaneFocus::Main,
1639            },
1640        }
1641    }
1642
1643    fn has_inspector(&self) -> bool {
1644        match &self.kind {
1645            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session.snapshot.inspector.is_some(),
1646            BrowserSessionKind::Image(_) => true,
1647        }
1648    }
1649
1650    fn active_tab(&self) -> BrowserTab {
1651        match &self.kind {
1652            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => BrowserTab::from_view(session.snapshot.view),
1653            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => {
1654                BrowserTab::from_image_view(session.snapshot.active_view)
1655            }
1656        }
1657    }
1658
1659    fn tabs(&self) -> &'static [BrowserTab] {
1660        match self.kind() {
1661            BrowserAppKind::Table => &BrowserTab::TABLE_ALL,
1662            BrowserAppKind::Image => &BrowserTab::IMAGE_ALL,
1663        }
1664    }
1665
1666    fn status_line(&self) -> &str {
1667        match &self.kind {
1668            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => &session.snapshot.status_line,
1669            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => &session.snapshot.status_line,
1670        }
1671    }
1672
1673    fn image_parameters(&self) -> Option<ImageBrowserParameters> {
1674        match &self.kind {
1675            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => Some(session.snapshot.parameters.clone()),
1676            BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => None,
1677        }
1678    }
1679
1680    fn image_snapshot(&self) -> Option<&ImageBrowserSnapshot> {
1681        match &self.kind {
1682            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => Some(&session.snapshot),
1683            BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => None,
1684        }
1685    }
1686
1687    fn vertical_metrics(&self) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
1688        match &self.kind {
1689            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session
1690                .snapshot
1691                .vertical_metrics
1692                .map(|metrics| (metrics.total_items, metrics.viewport_items.max(1))),
1693            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => (!session.raster_plane_active()).then_some((
1694                session.snapshot.navigation.total_items,
1695                session.snapshot.navigation.viewport_items.max(1),
1696            )),
1697        }
1698    }
1699
1700    fn horizontal_metrics(&self, viewport_width: u16) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
1701        match &self.kind {
1702            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session
1703                .snapshot
1704                .horizontal_metrics
1705                .map(|metrics| (metrics.total_items, metrics.viewport_items.max(1))),
1706            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => {
1707                if session.raster_plane_active() {
1708                    return None;
1709                }
1710                let viewport_width = viewport_width as usize;
1711                if viewport_width == 0 {
1712                    return None;
1713                }
1714                Some((
1715                    image_browser_content_width(&session.snapshot),
1716                    viewport_width,
1717                ))
1718            }
1719        }
1720    }
1721
1722    fn active_scroll(&self) -> u16 {
1723        match &self.kind {
1724            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session
1725                .snapshot
1726                .vertical_metrics
1727                .map(|metrics| metrics.selected_index.min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16)
1728                .unwrap_or(0),
1729            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => {
1730                if session.raster_plane_active() {
1731                    0
1732                } else {
1733                    session
1734                        .snapshot
1735                        .navigation
1736                        .selected_index
1737                        .min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16
1738                }
1739            }
1740        }
1741    }
1742
1743    fn active_hscroll(&self) -> u16 {
1744        match &self.kind {
1745            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session
1746                .snapshot
1747                .horizontal_metrics
1748                .map(|metrics| metrics.selected_index.min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16)
1749                .unwrap_or(0),
1750            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => {
1751                if session.raster_plane_active() {
1752                    0
1753                } else {
1754                    session.hscroll
1755                }
1756            }
1757        }
1758    }
1759
1760    fn inspector_lines(&self) -> Option<Vec<String>> {
1761        match &self.kind {
1762            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session
1763                .snapshot
1764                .inspector
1765                .as_ref()
1766                .map(browser_inspector_lines),
1767            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => {
1768                let mut lines = session.snapshot.inspector_lines.clone();
1769                if !session.snapshot.non_display_axes.is_empty() {
1770                    lines.push("Non-display axes:".to_string());
1771                    for (index, axis) in session.snapshot.non_display_axes.iter().enumerate() {
1772                        let marker = if index == session.selected_non_display_axis {
1773                            ">"
1774                        } else {
1775                            " "
1776                        };
1777                        lines.push(format!(
1778                            "{marker} {} ({}): pixel {} [{}/{}]",
1779                            axis.label,
1780                            axis.axis,
1781                            axis.pixel,
1782                            axis.index,
1783                            axis.length.saturating_sub(1)
1784                        ));
1785                    }
1786                }
1787                if !session.pinned_probes.is_empty() {
1788                    lines.push(format!("Pinned probes: {}", session.pinned_probes.len()));
1789                    for probe in &session.pinned_probes {
1790                        let marker = if session.selected_pinned_probe_id == Some(probe.id) {
1791                            "*"
1792                        } else {
1793                            " "
1794                        };
1795                        lines.push(format!(
1796                            "{marker} {} x={} y={}",
1797                            probe.label, probe.plane_pixel.0, probe.plane_pixel.1
1798                        ));
1799                    }
1800                }
1801                lines.push(format!("Plane mode: {}", session.plane_mode.label()));
1802                lines.push(format!("Colormap: {}", session.plane_colormap.label()));
1803                lines.push(format!(
1804                    "Invert: {}",
1805                    if session.plane_invert { "on" } else { "off" }
1806                ));
1807                lines.push(format!(
1808                    "Reticle: {}",
1809                    if session.show_live_reticle {
1810                        "visible"
1811                    } else {
1812                        "hidden"
1813                    }
1814                ));
1815                if session.movie_available() {
1816                    lines.push(format!(
1817                        "Movie: {}",
1818                        if session.movie.playing {
1819                            "playing"
1820                        } else {
1821                            "paused"
1822                        }
1823                    ));
1824                    lines.push(format!(
1825                        "Movie FPS: {}",
1826                        trim_float_text(format!("{:.3}", session.movie.fps))
1827                    ));
1828                }
1829                Some(lines)
1830            }
1831        }
1832    }
1833
1834    fn main_content_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
1835        match &self.kind {
1836            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => browser_main_content_lines(&session.snapshot),
1837            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => session.snapshot.content_lines.clone(),
1838        }
1839    }
1840
1841    fn cells_view_active(&self) -> bool {
1842        matches!(
1843            &self.kind,
1844            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) if session.snapshot.view == TableBrowserView::Cells
1845        )
1846    }
1847
1848    fn clipboard_payload(&self) -> Option<(String, &'static str)> {
1849        match &self.kind {
1850            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session
1851                .snapshot
1852                .inspector
1853                .as_ref()
1854                .map(copyable_browser_text),
1855            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => {
1856                let probe = session.snapshot.probe.as_ref()?;
1857                Some((render_image_probe(probe), "probe"))
1858            }
1859        }
1860    }
1861
1862    fn cancel(self) -> Result<(), String> {
1863        match self.kind {
1864            BrowserSessionKind::Table(session) => session.client.cancel(),
1865            BrowserSessionKind::Image(session) => session.client.cancel(),
1866        }
1867    }
1868}
1869
1870struct PlotPanelState {
1871    renderer: PanelRenderer<PlotRenderInput, String>,
1872    font_size: (u16, u16),
1873    request_key: Option<PlotRequestKey>,
1874    last_error: Option<String>,
1875    image_size: Option<(u32, u32)>,
1876}
1877
1878#[derive(Debug)]
1879struct PathChooserState {
1880    target: PathChooserTarget,
1881    explorer: FileExplorer,
1882    last_error: Option<String>,
1883}
1884
1885#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
1886enum PathChooserTarget {
1887    Field(usize),
1888    WorkflowImportChainTable,
1889    WorkflowChooseCallibrary,
1890}
1891
1892#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
1893struct PlotRequestKey {
1894    area: Rect,
1895    theme_mode: ThemeMode,
1896    snapshot_generation: u64,
1897    plot_signature: String,
1898    spec_key: String,
1899}
1900
1901impl fmt::Debug for PlotPanelState {
1902    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
1903        f.debug_struct("PlotPanelState")
1904            .field("request_key", &self.request_key)
1905            .field("last_error", &self.last_error)
1906            .field("image_size", &self.image_size)
1907            .finish()
1908    }
1909}
1910
1911#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
1912struct MeasurementSetRunSnapshot {
1913    generation: u64,
1914    summary: MeasurementSetSummary,
1915    path: Option<PathBuf>,
1916    options: MeasurementSetSummaryOptions,
1917    dirty: bool,
1918}
1919
1920#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
1921enum CurrentPlotPayload {
1922    MsPlot(MsPlotPayload),
1923    Imaging(ImagingPlotPayload),
1924}
1925
1926#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
1927enum EditTarget {
1928    FormField(usize),
1929    RenameImageRegionDefinition,
1930}
1931
1932struct PlotWorkspaceState {
1933    focus: PlotPaneFocus,
1934    selected_control: usize,
1935    selected_catalog_target: Option<PlotCatalogTarget>,
1936    snapshot: Option<MeasurementSetRunSnapshot>,
1937    next_generation: u64,
1938    preview_invalidated: bool,
1939    placeholder_protocol: Option<PanelProtocol>,
1940    panel: Option<PlotPanelState>,
1941}
1942
1943impl PlotWorkspaceState {
1944    fn new() -> Self {
1945        Self {
1946            focus: PlotPaneFocus::Catalog,
1947            selected_control: 0,
1948            selected_catalog_target: None,
1949            snapshot: None,
1950            next_generation: 1,
1951            preview_invalidated: false,
1952            placeholder_protocol: None,
1953            panel: None,
1954        }
1955    }
1956}
1957
1958impl fmt::Debug for PlotWorkspaceState {
1959    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
1960        f.debug_struct("PlotWorkspaceState")
1961            .field("focus", &self.focus)
1962            .field("selected_control", &self.selected_control)
1963            .field("selected_catalog_target", &self.selected_catalog_target)
1964            .field("snapshot", &self.snapshot)
1965            .field("next_generation", &self.next_generation)
1966            .field("preview_invalidated", &self.preview_invalidated)
1967            .field(
1968                "has_placeholder_protocol",
1969                &self.placeholder_protocol.is_some(),
1970            )
1971            .field("panel", &self.panel)
1972            .finish()
1973    }
1974}
1975
1976#[derive(Debug, Default)]
1977struct ResultState {
1978    status_line: String,
1979    status_kind: StatusKind,
1980    stdout: String,
1981    stderr: String,
1982    structured: Option<StructuredResult>,
1983    structured_error: Option<String>,
1984    file_output_path: Option<String>,
1985    exit_code: Option<i32>,
1986}
1987
1988#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
1989enum StructuredResult {
1990    MeasurementSetSummary(Box<MeasurementSetSummary>),
1991    Calibration(Box<ManagedCalibrationOutput>),
1992    Imaging(Box<ManagedImagingOutput>),
1993}
1994
1995#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Default)]
1996enum StatusKind {
1997    #[default]
1998    Info,
1999    Running,
2000    Ok,
2001    Error,
2002    Warning,
2003}
2004
2005impl StatusKind {
2006    fn label(self) -> &'static str {
2007        match self {
2008            Self::Info => "info",
2009            Self::Running => "running",
2010            Self::Ok => "ok",
2011            Self::Error => "error",
2012            Self::Warning => "warning",
2013        }
2014    }
2015}
2016
2017#[derive(Debug)]
2018struct EditState {
2019    target: EditTarget,
2020    buffer: String,
2021}
2022
2023#[derive(Debug)]
2024struct FormField {
2025    schema: UiArgumentSchema,
2026    value: FormValue,
2027}
2028
2029#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
2030enum StaticFormItem {
2031    Field(usize),
2032    SummaryView(SummaryDataView),
2033    BrowserView(BrowserTab),
2034    WorkflowStage(WorkflowStageId),
2035}
2036
2037#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
2038struct ChoicePickerEntry {
2039    value: String,
2040    label: String,
2041}
2042
2043#[derive(Debug)]
2044struct ChoicePickerState {
2045    target: ChoicePickerTarget,
2046    title: String,
2047    entries: Vec<ChoicePickerEntry>,
2048    selected_filtered_index: usize,
2049    filter: String,
2050}
2051
2052#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
2053enum ChoicePickerTarget {
2054    Field(usize),
2055    WorkflowContextSetting(WorkflowContextSettingKind),
2056    WorkflowProductAction(WorkflowProductActionKind),
2057    WorkflowChainSetting(usize, WorkflowChainSettingKind),
2058}
2059
2060impl ChoicePickerState {
2061    fn filtered_entries(&self) -> Vec<(usize, &ChoicePickerEntry)> {
2062        let needle = self.filter.trim();
2063        if needle.is_empty() {
2064            return self.entries.iter().enumerate().collect();
2065        }
2066        let needle_lower = needle.to_ascii_lowercase();
2067        self.entries
2068            .iter()
2069            .enumerate()
2070            .filter(|(_, entry)| {
2071                entry.label.to_ascii_lowercase().contains(&needle_lower)
2072                    || entry.value.to_ascii_lowercase().contains(&needle_lower)
2073            })
2074            .collect()
2075    }
2076
2077    fn clamp_selection(&mut self) {
2078        let visible = self.filtered_entries();
2079        if visible.is_empty() {
2080            self.selected_filtered_index = 0;
2081        } else {
2082            self.selected_filtered_index = self.selected_filtered_index.min(visible.len() - 1);
2083        }
2084    }
2085
2086    fn selected_entry(&self) -> Option<&ChoicePickerEntry> {
2087        let visible = self.filtered_entries();
2088        let (_, entry) = visible.get(self.selected_filtered_index)?;
2089        Some(*entry)
2090    }
2091}
2092
2093#[derive(Debug)]
2094enum FormValue {
2095    Text(String),
2096    Toggle(bool),
2097    Choice { value: String, choices: Vec<String> },
2098}
2099
2100#[derive(Debug)]
2101struct FormSection {
2102    name: String,
2103    content: FormSectionContent,
2104    collapsed: bool,
2105}
2106
2107#[derive(Debug)]
2108enum FormSectionContent {
2109    Items(Vec<StaticFormItem>),
2110}
2111
2112#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
2113struct HistoryEntry {
2114    sequence: usize,
2115    stage: Option<WorkflowStageId>,
2116    title: String,
2117    status_kind: StatusKind,
2118    details: Vec<String>,
2119}
2120
2121#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
2122enum ClickTarget {
2123    DividerToggle,
2124    Divider,
2125    ResultScrollbar,
2126    ResultHorizontalScrollbar,
2127    Pane(PaneFocus),
2128    Section(usize),
2129    Field(usize),
2130    WorkflowContextSetting(WorkflowContextSettingKind),
2131    WorkflowProductAction(WorkflowProductActionKind),
2132    WorkflowChainEntry(usize),
2133    WorkflowChainSetting(usize, WorkflowChainSettingKind),
2134    WorkflowProduct(usize),
2135    ResultTabs,
2136    PlotCatalog(PlotCatalogTarget),
2137    PlotControl(PlotControlTarget),
2138    PlotCanvas,
2139    PathChooserEntry(usize),
2140}
2141
2142#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
2143struct ClickState {
2144    target: ClickTarget,
2145    at: Instant,
2146}
2147
2148fn imager_summary_correlation_selector(value: Option<String>) -> Option<String> {
2149    let value = value?;
2150    let mut parts = Vec::new();
2151    for raw_part in value.split(',') {
2152        let part = raw_part.trim();
2153        if part.is_empty() {
2154            continue;
2155        }
2156        let normalized = part
2157            .trim_matches('\'')
2158            .trim_matches('"')
2159            .to_ascii_uppercase();
2160        if !matches!(
2161            normalized.as_str(),
2162            "RR" | "RL" | "LR" | "LL" | "XX" | "XY" | "YX" | "YY"
2163        ) {
2164            return None;
2165        }
2166        parts.push(normalized);
2167    }
2168    (!parts.is_empty()).then(|| parts.join(","))
2169}
2170
2171impl AppState {
2172    pub(crate) fn from_schema(app: RegistryApp, schema: UiCommandSchema) -> Self {
2173        Self::from_schema_with_config(app, schema, ConfigStore::load_default())
2174    }
2175
2176    pub(crate) fn from_schema_with_config(
2177        app: RegistryApp,
2178        schema: UiCommandSchema,
2179        config_store: ConfigStore,
2180    ) -> Self {
2181        let default_summary_view = default_summary_view_for_app(&app.id);
2182        let ready_status_line = if app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
2183            && app.id == "calibrate"
2184        {
2185            "Ready. Choose a stage, review Context and Products, then run the stage action or press r."
2186                .to_string()
2187        } else {
2188            app.ready_status_line().to_string()
2189        };
2190        let mut fields = schema
2191            .arguments
2192            .iter()
2193            .filter_map(FormField::from_schema)
2194            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2195        seed_app_field_defaults(&app.id, &mut fields);
2196        let sections = build_sections(&app, &fields);
2197        let selected_form = initial_form_selection(&sections, &fields, false);
2198
2199        let mut app_state = Self {
2200            app,
2201            config_store,
2202            schema: Some(schema),
2203            schema_error: None,
2204            fields,
2205            sections,
2206            selected_form,
2207            show_advanced: false,
2208            pane_focus: PaneFocus::Parameters,
2209            edit_state: None,
2210            result: ResultState {
2211                status_line: ready_status_line,
2212                status_kind: StatusKind::Info,
2213                ..ResultState::default()
2214            },
2215            active_result_tab: ResultTab::Overview,
2216            result_scrolls: [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT],
2217            result_hscrolls: [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT],
2218            selected_summary_view: default_summary_view,
2219            history_entries: Vec::new(),
2220            workflow_products: Vec::new(),
2221            running: None,
2222            plot_workspace: PlotWorkspaceState::new(),
2223            path_chooser: None,
2224            choice_picker: None,
2225            browser_mode_picker: None,
2226            browser_session: None,
2227            spinner_frame: 0,
2228            dragging_divider: false,
2229            dragging_image_workspace_divider: false,
2230            dragging_image_cursor: false,
2231            dragging_image_profile: false,
2232            dragging_result_scrollbar: false,
2233            dragging_result_hscrollbar: false,
2234            dragging_result_hscrollbar_grab: 0,
2235            output_selection: None,
2236            show_help: false,
2237            cached_result_text_area: None,
2238            cached_left_output_area: None,
2239            cached_browser_viewport_cells: None,
2240            kitty_response_capture: None,
2241            kitty_movie_store_invalidated: false,
2242            last_click: None,
2243            pending_run_confirmation: false,
2244            movie_perf: MoviePerfTracer::from_env(),
2245            quit: false,
2246            return_to_launcher: false,
2247        };
2248        if app_state.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow && app_state.app.id == "calibrate" {
2249            if matches!(
2250                app_state.field_text("mode").as_deref(),
2251                None | Some("apply")
2252            ) {
2253                app_state.set_current_workflow_stage(WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset);
2254            }
2255            let stage = app_state.current_workflow_stage();
2256            app_state.ensure_workflow_stage_defaults(None, stage);
2257        }
2258        app_state
2259    }
2260
2261    pub(crate) fn schema_error(app: RegistryApp, error: String) -> Self {
2262        Self::schema_error_with_config(app, error, ConfigStore::load_default())
2263    }
2264
2265    pub(crate) fn schema_error_with_config(
2266        app: RegistryApp,
2267        error: String,
2268        config_store: ConfigStore,
2269    ) -> Self {
2270        Self {
2271            app,
2272            config_store,
2273            schema: None,
2274            schema_error: Some(error.clone()),
2275            fields: Vec::new(),
2276            sections: Vec::new(),
2277            selected_form: FormSelection::Section(0),
2278            show_advanced: false,
2279            pane_focus: PaneFocus::Result,
2280            edit_state: None,
2281            result: ResultState {
2282                status_line: "Failed to load UI schema.".to_string(),
2283                status_kind: StatusKind::Error,
2284                stderr: format!("{error}\n"),
2285                structured_error: Some(error),
2286                ..ResultState::default()
2287            },
2288            active_result_tab: ResultTab::Stderr,
2289            result_scrolls: [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT],
2290            result_hscrolls: [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT],
2291            selected_summary_view: SummaryDataView::Fields,
2292            history_entries: Vec::new(),
2293            workflow_products: Vec::new(),
2294            running: None,
2295            plot_workspace: PlotWorkspaceState::new(),
2296            path_chooser: None,
2297            choice_picker: None,
2298            browser_mode_picker: None,
2299            browser_session: None,
2300            spinner_frame: 0,
2301            dragging_divider: false,
2302            dragging_image_workspace_divider: false,
2303            dragging_image_cursor: false,
2304            dragging_image_profile: false,
2305            dragging_result_scrollbar: false,
2306            dragging_result_hscrollbar: false,
2307            dragging_result_hscrollbar_grab: 0,
2308            output_selection: None,
2309            show_help: false,
2310            cached_result_text_area: None,
2311            cached_left_output_area: None,
2312            cached_browser_viewport_cells: None,
2313            kitty_response_capture: None,
2314            kitty_movie_store_invalidated: false,
2315            last_click: None,
2316            pending_run_confirmation: false,
2317            movie_perf: MoviePerfTracer::from_env(),
2318            quit: false,
2319            return_to_launcher: false,
2320        }
2321    }
2322
2323    pub(crate) fn should_quit(&self) -> bool {
2324        self.quit
2325    }
2326
2327    pub(crate) fn should_return_to_launcher(&self) -> bool {
2328        self.return_to_launcher
2329    }
2330
2331    fn has_active_session(&self) -> bool {
2332        self.running.is_some() || self.browser_session.is_some()
2333    }
2334
2335    fn browser_session(&self) -> Option<&BrowserSession> {
2336        self.browser_session.as_ref()
2337    }
2338
2339    pub(crate) fn path_chooser_active(&self) -> bool {
2340        self.path_chooser.is_some()
2341    }
2342
2343    pub(crate) fn path_chooser_title(&self) -> Option<String> {
2344        let chooser = self.path_chooser.as_ref()?;
2345        Some(match chooser.target {
2346            PathChooserTarget::Field(field_index) => {
2347                let field = self.fields.get(field_index)?;
2348                format!("Browse {}", field.schema.label)
2349            }
2350            PathChooserTarget::WorkflowImportChainTable => {
2351                "Import Calibration Table Into Chain".to_string()
2352            }
2353            PathChooserTarget::WorkflowChooseCallibrary => "Choose Callibrary File".to_string(),
2354        })
2355    }
2356
2357    pub(crate) fn path_chooser_cwd(&self) -> Option<String> {
2358        self.path_chooser
2359            .as_ref()
2360            .map(|chooser| chooser.explorer.cwd().display().to_string())
2361    }
2362
2363    pub(crate) fn path_chooser_error(&self) -> Option<&str> {
2364        self.path_chooser
2365            .as_ref()
2366            .and_then(|chooser| chooser.last_error.as_deref())
2367    }
2368
2369    pub(crate) fn path_chooser_entries(&self) -> Option<Vec<(String, bool)>> {
2370        let chooser = self.path_chooser.as_ref()?;
2371        let selected = chooser.explorer.selected_idx();
2372        Some(
2373            chooser
2374                .explorer
2375                .files()
2376                .iter()
2377                .enumerate()
2378                .map(|(index, file)| {
2379                    let icon = if file.is_dir { "▸" } else { " " };
2380                    (format!("{icon} {}", file.name), index == selected)
2381                })
2382                .collect(),
2383        )
2384    }
2385
2386    pub(crate) fn choice_picker_active(&self) -> bool {
2387        self.choice_picker.is_some()
2388    }
2389
2390    pub(crate) fn choice_picker_title(&self) -> Option<&str> {
2391        self.choice_picker
2392            .as_ref()
2393            .map(|picker| picker.title.as_str())
2394    }
2395
2396    pub(crate) fn choice_picker_filter(&self) -> Option<&str> {
2397        self.choice_picker
2398            .as_ref()
2399            .map(|picker| picker.filter.as_str())
2400    }
2401
2402    pub(crate) fn choice_picker_entries(&self) -> Option<Vec<(String, bool)>> {
2403        let picker = self.choice_picker.as_ref()?;
2404        Some(
2405            picker
2406                .filtered_entries()
2407                .into_iter()
2408                .enumerate()
2409                .map(|(offset, (_, entry))| {
2410                    (
2411                        entry.label.clone(),
2412                        offset == picker.selected_filtered_index,
2413                    )
2414                })
2415                .collect(),
2416        )
2417    }
2418
2419    pub(crate) fn choice_picker_field_index(&self) -> Option<usize> {
2420        self.choice_picker
2421            .as_ref()
2422            .and_then(|picker| match picker.target {
2423                ChoicePickerTarget::Field(field_index) => Some(field_index),
2424                _ => None,
2425            })
2426    }
2427
2428    fn choice_picker_anchor_target(&self) -> Option<FormSelection> {
2429        self.choice_picker
2430            .as_ref()
2431            .map(|picker| match picker.target {
2432                ChoicePickerTarget::Field(field_index) => FormSelection::Field(field_index),
2433                ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowContextSetting(kind) => {
2434                    FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind)
2435                }
2436                ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowProductAction(kind) => {
2437                    FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind)
2438                }
2439                ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind) => {
2440                    FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind)
2441                }
2442            })
2443    }
2444
2445    fn selected_path_field_index(&self) -> Option<usize> {
2446        let FormSelection::Field(field_index) = self.selected_form else {
2447            return None;
2448        };
2449        self.fields
2450            .get(field_index)
2451            .filter(|field| field.is_path())
2452            .map(|_| field_index)
2453    }
2454
2455    fn path_field_browse_hit(&self, field_index: usize, column: u16, layout: &UiLayout) -> bool {
2456        let Some(field) = self.fields.get(field_index) else {
2457            return false;
2458        };
2459        if !field.is_path() {
2460            return false;
2461        }
2462        let Some(row) = layout
2463            .form_rows
2464            .iter()
2465            .find(|row| row.target == FormSelection::Field(field_index))
2466        else {
2467            return false;
2468        };
2469        let text = field.render_line(self.edit_state.as_ref(), field_index);
2470        let browse_len = BROWSE_SUFFIX.chars().count() as u16;
2471        let text_end = row
2472            .rect
2473            .x
2474            .saturating_add(text.chars().count().min(row.rect.width as usize) as u16);
2475        let browse_start = text_end.saturating_sub(browse_len);
2476        column >= browse_start && column < text_end
2477    }
2478
2479    fn field_picker_entries(&self, field_index: usize) -> Option<Vec<ChoicePickerEntry>> {
2480        let field = self.fields.get(field_index)?;
2481        if field.is_path() {
2482            return None;
2483        }
2484        if let FormValue::Choice { choices, .. } = &field.value
2485            && !choices.is_empty()
2486        {
2487            return Some(
2488                choices
2489                    .iter()
2490                    .map(|choice| ChoicePickerEntry {
2491                        value: choice.clone(),
2492                        label: choice.clone(),
2493                    })
2494                    .collect(),
2495            );
2496        }
2497        dynamic_field_picker_entries(self, field.schema.id.as_str())
2498    }
2499
2500    fn open_choice_picker(&mut self, field_index: usize) {
2501        let Some(entries) = self.field_picker_entries(field_index) else {
2502            return;
2503        };
2504        let title = self
2505            .fields
2506            .get(field_index)
2507            .map(|field| format!("Choose {}", field.schema.label))
2508            .unwrap_or_else(|| "Choose Value".to_string());
2509        let current = self
2510            .fields
2511            .get(field_index)
2512            .and_then(FormField::text_value)
2513            .unwrap_or_default();
2514        self.open_choice_picker_target(
2515            ChoicePickerTarget::Field(field_index),
2516            title,
2517            entries,
2518            current,
2519        );
2520    }
2521
2522    fn open_choice_picker_target(
2523        &mut self,
2524        target: ChoicePickerTarget,
2525        title: String,
2526        entries: Vec<ChoicePickerEntry>,
2527        current: String,
2528    ) {
2529        if entries.is_empty() {
2530            return;
2531        }
2532        self.path_chooser = None;
2533        let selected_filtered_index = entries
2534            .iter()
2535            .position(|entry| entry.value == current)
2536            .unwrap_or(0);
2537        self.choice_picker = Some(ChoicePickerState {
2538            target,
2539            title,
2540            entries,
2541            selected_filtered_index,
2542            filter: String::new(),
2543        });
2544    }
2545
2546    fn workflow_product_picker_entries(&self) -> Vec<ChoicePickerEntry> {
2547        self.workflow_products
2548            .iter()
2549            .filter(|product| product.stage != WorkflowStageId::Apply)
2550            .map(|product| ChoicePickerEntry {
2551                value: product.path.display().to_string(),
2552                label: format!(
2553                    "r{}  {}  [{} | {}]",
2554                    product.revision,
2555                    product.path.display(),
2556                    product.family,
2557                    product.status.label()
2558                ),
2559            })
2560            .collect()
2561    }
2562
2563    fn workflow_context_picker_entries(
2564        &self,
2565        kind: WorkflowContextSettingKind,
2566    ) -> Vec<ChoicePickerEntry> {
2567        match kind {
2568            WorkflowContextSettingKind::ActiveFields => {
2569                let mut entries = vec![ChoicePickerEntry {
2570                    value: String::new(),
2571                    label: "<all fields>".to_string(),
2572                }];
2573                if let Some(summary) = self.current_structured_summary() {
2574                    entries.extend(summary.fields.iter().map(|field| ChoicePickerEntry {
2575                        value: field.field_id.to_string(),
2576                        label: format!("{}  {}", field.field_id, field.name),
2577                    }));
2578                }
2579                entries
2580            }
2581            WorkflowContextSettingKind::RefAnt => {
2582                dynamic_field_picker_entries(self, "refant").unwrap_or_default()
2583            }
2584            WorkflowContextSettingKind::FluxReferenceFields => {
2585                let mut entries = vec![ChoicePickerEntry {
2586                    value: String::new(),
2587                    label: "<unset>".to_string(),
2588                }];
2589                entries.extend(
2590                    dynamic_field_picker_entries(self, "reference_fields").unwrap_or_default(),
2591                );
2592                entries
2593            }
2594            WorkflowContextSettingKind::FluxTransferFields => {
2595                let mut entries = vec![ChoicePickerEntry {
2596                    value: String::new(),
2597                    label: "<unset>".to_string(),
2598                }];
2599                entries.extend(
2600                    dynamic_field_picker_entries(self, "transfer_fields").unwrap_or_default(),
2601                );
2602                entries
2603            }
2604        }
2605    }
2606
2607    fn workflow_chain_setting_picker_entries(
2608        &self,
2609        kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind,
2610    ) -> Vec<ChoicePickerEntry> {
2611        match kind {
2612            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => {
2613                let mut entries = vec![
2614                    ChoicePickerEntry {
2615                        value: String::new(),
2616                        label: "<default>".to_string(),
2617                    },
2618                    ChoicePickerEntry {
2619                        value: "nearest".to_string(),
2620                        label: "nearest".to_string(),
2621                    },
2622                ];
2623                if let Some(summary) = self.current_structured_summary() {
2624                    entries.extend(summary.fields.iter().map(|field| ChoicePickerEntry {
2625                        value: field.field_id.to_string(),
2626                        label: format!("{}  {}", field.field_id, field.name),
2627                    }));
2628                }
2629                entries
2630            }
2631            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => ["nearest", "linear", "nearest,linear"]
2632                .into_iter()
2633                .map(|value| ChoicePickerEntry {
2634                    value: value.to_string(),
2635                    label: value.to_string(),
2636                })
2637                .collect(),
2638            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => {
2639                let mut entries = vec![ChoicePickerEntry {
2640                    value: String::new(),
2641                    label: "<identity>".to_string(),
2642                }];
2643                if let Some(summary) = self.current_structured_summary() {
2644                    let spw_ids = summary
2645                        .spectral_windows
2646                        .iter()
2647                        .map(|spw| spw.spectral_window_id)
2648                        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2649                    if !spw_ids.is_empty() {
2650                        if spw_ids.len() > 1 {
2651                            let exact = spw_ids
2652                                .iter()
2653                                .map(|spw| spw.to_string())
2654                                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
2655                                .join(",");
2656                            entries.push(ChoicePickerEntry {
2657                                value: exact.clone(),
2658                                label: format!("match selected SPWs ({exact})"),
2659                            });
2660                        }
2661                        entries.extend(spw_ids.iter().map(|spw_id| {
2662                            let map = if spw_ids.len() > 1 {
2663                                std::iter::repeat_n(spw_id.to_string(), spw_ids.len())
2664                                    .collect::<Vec<_>>()
2665                                    .join(",")
2666                            } else {
2667                                spw_id.to_string()
2668                            };
2669                            ChoicePickerEntry {
2670                                value: map.clone(),
2671                                label: format!("all selected SPWs -> {spw_id} ({map})"),
2672                            }
2673                        }));
2674                    }
2675                }
2676                entries
2677            }
2678            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => ["false", "true"]
2679                .into_iter()
2680                .map(|value| ChoicePickerEntry {
2681                    value: value.to_string(),
2682                    label: value.to_string(),
2683                })
2684                .collect(),
2685        }
2686    }
2687
2688    fn close_choice_picker(&mut self) {
2689        self.choice_picker = None;
2690    }
2691
2692    fn commit_choice_picker(&mut self) {
2693        let Some((target, value, label)) = self.choice_picker.as_ref().and_then(|picker| {
2694            picker
2695                .selected_entry()
2696                .map(|entry| (picker.target, entry.value.clone(), entry.label.clone()))
2697        }) else {
2698            self.close_choice_picker();
2699            return;
2700        };
2701        match target {
2702            ChoicePickerTarget::Field(field_index) => {
2703                if let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(field_index) {
2704                    field.set_text(value.clone());
2705                }
2706                self.apply_live_image_view_parameters_if_needed(field_index);
2707                self.mark_plot_snapshot_dirty();
2708            }
2709            ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowContextSetting(kind) => {
2710                let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value(kind.field_id(), value.clone());
2711                self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind);
2712            }
2713            ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowProductAction(
2714                WorkflowProductActionKind::AddSolvedProduct,
2715            ) => {
2716                self.append_workflow_chain_path(value.clone());
2717            }
2718            ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowProductAction(
2719                WorkflowProductActionKind::ImportChainTable,
2720            )
2721            | ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowProductAction(
2722                WorkflowProductActionKind::ChooseCallibrary,
2723            ) => {}
2724            ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind) => {
2725                if let Err(error) =
2726                    self.apply_workflow_chain_setting_value(entry, kind, value.clone())
2727                {
2728                    self.close_choice_picker();
2729                    self.result.status_line = error;
2730                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
2731                    return;
2732                }
2733            }
2734        }
2735        self.close_choice_picker();
2736        self.result.status_line = format!("Selected {}.", label);
2737        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
2738    }
2739
2740    fn cancel_choice_picker(&mut self) {
2741        self.close_choice_picker();
2742        self.result.status_line = "Choice picker canceled.".to_string();
2743        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
2744    }
2745
2746    fn activate_workflow_context_setting(&mut self, kind: WorkflowContextSettingKind) {
2747        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind);
2748        let entries = self.workflow_context_picker_entries(kind);
2749        if entries.is_empty() {
2750            self.result.status_line = format!(
2751                "No {} choices are available yet.",
2752                kind.label().to_ascii_lowercase()
2753            );
2754            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
2755            return;
2756        }
2757        let current = self.field_text(kind.field_id()).unwrap_or_default();
2758        self.open_choice_picker_target(
2759            ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowContextSetting(kind),
2760            format!("Choose {}", kind.label()),
2761            entries,
2762            current,
2763        );
2764    }
2765
2766    fn cycle_choice_picker(&mut self, forward: bool) {
2767        let Some(picker) = self.choice_picker.as_mut() else {
2768            return;
2769        };
2770        let visible_len = picker.filtered_entries().len();
2771        if visible_len == 0 {
2772            picker.selected_filtered_index = 0;
2773            return;
2774        }
2775        if forward {
2776            picker.selected_filtered_index = (picker.selected_filtered_index + 1) % visible_len;
2777        } else if picker.selected_filtered_index == 0 {
2778            picker.selected_filtered_index = visible_len - 1;
2779        } else {
2780            picker.selected_filtered_index -= 1;
2781        }
2782    }
2783
2784    fn extend_choice_picker_filter(&mut self, ch: char) {
2785        let Some(picker) = self.choice_picker.as_mut() else {
2786            return;
2787        };
2788        picker.filter.push(ch);
2789        picker.clamp_selection();
2790    }
2791
2792    fn delete_choice_picker_filter_backward(&mut self) {
2793        let Some(picker) = self.choice_picker.as_mut() else {
2794            return;
2795        };
2796        picker.filter.pop();
2797        picker.clamp_selection();
2798    }
2799
2800    fn open_path_chooser_for_selected_field(&mut self) {
2801        let Some(field_index) = self.selected_path_field_index() else {
2802            return;
2803        };
2804        self.open_path_chooser(field_index);
2805    }
2806
2807    fn open_path_chooser(&mut self, field_index: usize) {
2808        let Some(field) = self.fields.get(field_index) else {
2809            return;
2810        };
2811        let start = chooser_start_path(field.text_value().as_deref());
2812        self.open_path_chooser_target(PathChooserTarget::Field(field_index), start);
2813    }
2814
2815    fn open_path_chooser_target(&mut self, target: PathChooserTarget, start: PathBuf) {
2816        if let PathChooserTarget::Field(field_index) = target {
2817            self.prepare_path_chooser_field(field_index);
2818        }
2819        self.choice_picker = None;
2820        let start_is_dir = start.is_dir();
2821        let builder = if start_is_dir {
2822            FileExplorerBuilder::default().working_dir(start)
2823        } else {
2824            FileExplorerBuilder::default().working_file(start)
2825        };
2826        match builder.show_hidden(false).build() {
2827            Ok(mut explorer) => {
2828                if start_is_dir && explorer.current().name == "../" && explorer.files().len() > 1 {
2829                    explorer.set_selected_idx(1);
2830                }
2831                self.path_chooser = Some(PathChooserState {
2832                    target,
2833                    explorer,
2834                    last_error: None,
2835                });
2836            }
2837            Err(error) => {
2838                self.result.status_line = "Failed to open path chooser.".to_string();
2839                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
2840                self.result.stderr.push_str(&format!("{error}\n"));
2841            }
2842        }
2843    }
2844
2845    fn prepare_path_chooser_field(&mut self, field_index: usize) {
2846        let Some(edit_state) = self.edit_state.take() else {
2847            return;
2848        };
2849        match edit_state.target {
2850            EditTarget::FormField(target_index) if target_index == field_index => {
2851                if let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(field_index) {
2852                    field.set_text(edit_state.buffer);
2853                    self.mark_plot_snapshot_dirty();
2854                }
2855            }
2856            _ => {
2857                self.edit_state = Some(edit_state);
2858            }
2859        }
2860    }
2861
2862    fn close_path_chooser(&mut self) {
2863        self.path_chooser = None;
2864    }
2865
2866    fn confirm_path_chooser(&mut self) {
2867        let Some((target, selected_path)) = self
2868            .path_chooser
2869            .as_ref()
2870            .map(|chooser| (chooser.target, chooser.explorer.current().path.clone()))
2871        else {
2872            return;
2873        };
2874        self.select_path_chooser_path(target, &selected_path);
2875    }
2876
2877    fn select_current_path_chooser_entry(&mut self) {
2878        let Some((target, selected_path)) = self
2879            .path_chooser
2880            .as_ref()
2881            .map(|chooser| (chooser.target, chooser.explorer.current().path.clone()))
