2882        else {
2883            return;
2884        };
2885        self.select_path_chooser_path(target, &selected_path);
2886    }
2887
2888    fn select_path_chooser_path(&mut self, target: PathChooserTarget, selected_path: &Path) {
2889        let value = absolute_display_path(selected_path);
2890        match target {
2891            PathChooserTarget::Field(selected_field_index) => {
2892                if let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(selected_field_index) {
2893                    field.set_text(value.clone());
2894                    self.mark_plot_snapshot_dirty();
2895                }
2896            }
2897            PathChooserTarget::WorkflowImportChainTable => {
2898                self.append_workflow_chain_path(value.clone());
2899            }
2900            PathChooserTarget::WorkflowChooseCallibrary => {
2901                self.set_workflow_callibrary_path(value.clone());
2902            }
2903        }
2904        self.close_path_chooser();
2905        self.result.status_line = format!("Selected path: {value}");
2906        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
2907    }
2908
2909    fn cancel_path_chooser(&mut self) {
2910        self.close_path_chooser();
2911        self.result.status_line = "Path chooser canceled.".to_string();
2912        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
2913    }
2914
2915    fn apply_path_chooser_input(&mut self, input: ExplorerInput) {
2916        let Some(chooser) = self.path_chooser.as_mut() else {
2917            return;
2918        };
2919        chooser.last_error = None;
2920        if let Err(error) = chooser.explorer.handle(input) {
2921            chooser.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
2922        }
2923    }
2924
2925    pub(crate) fn on_tick(&mut self) {
2926        self.spinner_frame = (self.spinner_frame + 1) % spinner_frames(self.theme_mode()).len();
2927        self.ensure_current_summary_snapshot_if_needed();
2928        self.pump_plot_panel();
2929        if self.image_movie_scheduler_enabled() {
2930            self.maybe_emit_movie_perf_summary();
2931            return;
2932        }
2933        self.advance_image_movie();
2934        self.pump_image_plane_panel();
2935        self.pump_image_spectrum_panel();
2936        self.maybe_emit_movie_perf_summary();
2937    }
2938
2939    pub(crate) fn preferred_tick_rate(&self) -> Duration {
2940        const DEFAULT_TICK_RATE: Duration = Duration::from_millis(100);
2941        const MIN_MOVIE_TICK_RATE: Duration = Duration::from_millis(16);
2942
2943        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
2944            return DEFAULT_TICK_RATE;
2945        };
2946        if !state.movie.playing || state.movie.terminal_looping {
2947            return DEFAULT_TICK_RATE;
2948        }
2949        state
2950            .movie
2951            .frame_interval
2952            .max(MIN_MOVIE_TICK_RATE)
2953            .min(DEFAULT_TICK_RATE)
2954    }
2955
2956    fn key_profile(&self) -> KeyProfile {
2957        KeyProfile::Default
2958    }
2959
2960    fn input_mode(&self) -> InputMode {
2961        if self.path_chooser.is_some() {
2962            InputMode::PathChooser
2963        } else if self.edit_state.is_some() {
2964            InputMode::Edit
2965        } else if self.browser_session.is_some() {
2966            if self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() && self.pane_focus == PaneFocus::Parameters {
2967                InputMode::Parameters
2968            } else if self.pane_focus == PaneFocus::Result
2969                && !self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation()
2970            {
2971                InputMode::Result
2972            } else {
2973                InputMode::Browser
2974            }
2975        } else {
2976            match self.pane_focus {
2977                PaneFocus::Parameters => InputMode::Parameters,
2978                PaneFocus::Result => InputMode::Result,
2979            }
2980        }
2981    }
2982
2983    pub(crate) fn browser_uses_parameter_pane(&self) -> bool {
2984        self.browser_session()
2985            .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Image)
2986    }
2987
2988    fn browser_inspector_reachable(&self) -> bool {
2989        !self.browser_uses_parameter_pane()
2990            && !self.parameters_pane_collapsed()
2991            && self
2992                .browser_session()
2993                .is_some_and(BrowserSession::has_inspector)
2994    }
2995
2996    fn focus_ring(&self) -> Vec<FocusTarget> {
2997        if self.browser_session.is_some() {
2998            let mut ring = Vec::new();
2999            if self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() && !self.parameters_pane_collapsed() {
3000                ring.push(FocusTarget::ParametersPane);
3001            }
3002            ring.push(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
3003            if self.browser_inspector_reachable() {
3004                ring.push(FocusTarget::BrowserInspector);
3005            }
3006            return ring;
3007        }
3008
3009        let mut ring = Vec::new();
3010        if !self.parameters_pane_collapsed() {
3011            ring.push(FocusTarget::ParametersPane);
3012        }
3013        if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
3014            ring.extend([
3015                FocusTarget::PlotCatalog,
3016                FocusTarget::PlotCanvas,
3017                FocusTarget::PlotControls,
3018            ]);
3019        } else {
3020            ring.push(FocusTarget::ResultPane);
3021        }
3022        ring
3023    }
3024
3025    fn current_focus_target(&self) -> FocusTarget {
3026        if let Some(session) = self.browser_session() {
3027            if self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() && self.pane_focus == PaneFocus::Parameters {
3028                return FocusTarget::ParametersPane;
3029            }
3030            return match session.focus() {
3031                BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector if self.browser_inspector_reachable() => {
3032                    FocusTarget::BrowserInspector
3033                }
3034                _ => FocusTarget::BrowserMain,
3035            };
3036        }
3037
3038        match self.pane_focus {
3039            PaneFocus::Parameters if !self.parameters_pane_collapsed() => {
3040                FocusTarget::ParametersPane
3041            }
3042            PaneFocus::Parameters | PaneFocus::Result => {
3043                if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
3044                    match self.plot_workspace.focus {
3045                        PlotPaneFocus::Catalog => FocusTarget::PlotCatalog,
3046                        PlotPaneFocus::Canvas => FocusTarget::PlotCanvas,
3047                        PlotPaneFocus::Controls => FocusTarget::PlotControls,
3048                    }
3049                } else {
3050                    FocusTarget::ResultPane
3051                }
3052            }
3053        }
3054    }
3055
3056    fn set_focus_target(&mut self, target: FocusTarget) {
3057        match target {
3058            FocusTarget::ParametersPane => {
3059                if self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() || !self.parameters_pane_collapsed() {
3060                    self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
3061                }
3062            }
3063            FocusTarget::ResultPane => {
3064                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
3065            }
3066            FocusTarget::PlotCatalog => {
3067                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
3068                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Catalog;
3069            }
3070            FocusTarget::PlotCanvas => {
3071                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
3072                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Canvas;
3073            }
3074            FocusTarget::PlotControls => {
3075                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
3076                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Controls;
3077            }
3078            FocusTarget::BrowserMain => {
3079                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
3080                if self
3081                    .browser_session()
3082                    .is_some_and(|session| session.focus() != BrowserPaneFocus::Main)
3083                {
3084                    self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetFocus(BrowserPaneFocus::Main));
3085                }
3086            }
3087            FocusTarget::BrowserInspector => {
3088                if self.browser_inspector_reachable() {
3089                    self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
3090                    if self
3091                        .browser_session()
3092                        .is_some_and(|session| session.focus() != BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector)
3093                    {
3094                        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetFocus(
3095                            BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector,
3096                        ));
3097                    }
3098                }
3099            }
3100        }
3101    }
3102
3103    fn cycle_focus(&mut self, forward: bool) {
3104        let ring = self.focus_ring();
3105        if ring.is_empty() {
3106            return;
3107        }
3108        let current = self.current_focus_target();
3109        let index = ring
3110            .iter()
3111            .position(|target| *target == current)
3112            .unwrap_or(0);
3113        let next = if forward {
3114            (index + 1) % ring.len()
3115        } else if index == 0 {
3116            ring.len() - 1
3117        } else {
3118            index - 1
3119        };
3120        self.set_focus_target(ring[next]);
3121    }
3122
3123    fn resolve_key_action(&self, key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<AppAction> {
3124        if key_event.kind != KeyEventKind::Press {
3125            return None;
3126        }
3127        match self.key_profile() {
3128            KeyProfile::Default => self.resolve_default_key_action(key_event),
3129        }
3130    }
3131
3132    fn resolve_default_key_action(&self, key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<AppAction> {
3133        let mode = self.input_mode();
3134        let plots_active = mode == InputMode::Result && self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace();
3135
3136        if mode == InputMode::PathChooser {
3137            return match key_event.code {
3138                KeyCode::Esc => Some(AppAction::PathChooser(PathChooserAction::Cancel)),
3139                KeyCode::Enter if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
3140                    Some(AppAction::PathChooser(PathChooserAction::Confirm))
3141                }
3142                KeyCode::Char(' ') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
3143                    Some(AppAction::PathChooser(PathChooserAction::SelectCurrent))
3144                }
3145                _ => chooser_input_from_key(key_event)
3146                    .map(PathChooserAction::Navigate)
3147                    .map(AppAction::PathChooser),
3148            };
3149        }
3150
3151        if self.show_help {
3152            return match key_event.code {
3153                KeyCode::Esc | KeyCode::Char('?') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
3154                    Some(AppAction::ToggleHelp)
3155                }
3156                _ => None,
3157            };
3158        }
3159
3160        match key_event.code {
3161            KeyCode::Char('c') if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::CONTROL => {
3162                return Some(AppAction::Quit);
3163            }
3164            KeyCode::Char('?') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3165                return Some(AppAction::ToggleHelp);
3166            }
3167            KeyCode::Char('q') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3168                return Some(AppAction::Quit);
3169            }
3170            KeyCode::Char('t') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3171                return Some(AppAction::ToggleTheme);
3172            }
3173            KeyCode::Char('x') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3174                return Some(AppAction::CancelSession);
3175            }
3176            KeyCode::Char('b') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3177                return Some(AppAction::BackToLauncher);
3178            }
3179            KeyCode::Char('p') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3180                return Some(AppAction::TogglePrimaryAuxPane);
3181            }
3182            KeyCode::Char('y') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3183                return Some(AppAction::CopySelection);
3184            }
3185            KeyCode::Char('c')
3186                if is_browser_copy_modifier(key_event.modifiers) && mode != InputMode::Edit =>
3187            {
3188                return Some(AppAction::CopySelection);
3189            }
3190            KeyCode::Char('r')
3191                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3192                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3193                    && (!self.has_active_session() || self.browser_uses_parameter_pane()) =>
3194            {
3195                return Some(AppAction::StartRun);
3196            }
3197            KeyCode::Char('a')
3198                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3199                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3200                    && (!self.has_active_session() || self.browser_uses_parameter_pane()) =>
3201            {
3202                return Some(AppAction::ToggleAdvanced);
3203            }
3204            KeyCode::Char('o')
3205                if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::CONTROL
3206                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3207                    && (!self.has_active_session() || self.browser_uses_parameter_pane()) =>
3208            {
3209                return Some(AppAction::OpenPathChooser);
3210            }
3211            KeyCode::Char('g')
3212                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3213                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3214                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3215            {
3216                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::TogglePlaneMode));
3217            }
3218            KeyCode::Char('s')
3219                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3220                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3221                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3222            {
3223                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ToggleSpectrumPane));
3224            }
3225            KeyCode::Char('m')
3226                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3227                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3228                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3229            {
3230                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ToggleMovie));
3231            }
3232            KeyCode::Char('+') | KeyCode::Char('=')
3233                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3234                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3235                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3236            {
3237                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ZoomIn));
3238            }
3239            KeyCode::Char('-')
3240                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3241                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3242                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3243            {
3244                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ZoomOut));
3245            }
3246            KeyCode::Char('0')
3247                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3248                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3249                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3250            {
3251                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ResetViewWindow));
3252            }
3253            KeyCode::Char('H')
3254                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3255                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3256                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3257                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3258            {
3259                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::PanLeft));
3260            }
3261            KeyCode::Char('L')
3262                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3263                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3264                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3265                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3266            {
3267                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::PanRight));
3268            }
3269            KeyCode::Char('K')
3270                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3271                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3272                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3273                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3274            {
3275                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::PanUp));
3276            }
3277            KeyCode::Char('J')
3278                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3279                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3280                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3281                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3282            {
3283                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::PanDown));
3284            }
3285            KeyCode::Char('c')
3286                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3287                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3288                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3289            {
3290                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::CycleColormap));
3291            }
3292            KeyCode::Char('i')
3293                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3294                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3295                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3296            {
3297                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ToggleInvert));
3298            }
3299            KeyCode::Char('R')
3300                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3301                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3302                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3303                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3304            {
3305                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::StartRegionShape));
3306            }
3307            KeyCode::Char('D')
3308                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3309                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3310                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3311                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3312            {
3313                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ClearRegion));
3314            }
3315            KeyCode::Char('S')
3316                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3317                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3318                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3319                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3320            {
3321                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::SaveRegionDefinition));
3322            }
3323            KeyCode::Char('O')
3324                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3325                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3326                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3327                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3328            {
3329                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::LoadNextRegionDefinition));
3330            }
3331            KeyCode::Char('E')
3332                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3333                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3334                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3335                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3336            {
3337                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::RenameRegionDefinition));
3338            }
3339            KeyCode::Delete
3340                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3341                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3342                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3343            {
3344                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::DeleteRegionDefinition));
3345            }
3346            KeyCode::Char('M')
3347                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3348                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3349                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3350                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3351            {
3352                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::WriteRegionMask));
3353            }
3354            KeyCode::Char('P')
3355                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3356                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3357                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3358                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3359            {
3360                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::PinProbe));
3361            }
3362            KeyCode::Char('u')
3363                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3364                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3365                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3366            {
3367                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::RemovePinnedProbe));
3368            }
3369            KeyCode::Char('n')
3370                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3371                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3372                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3373            {
3374                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::CyclePinnedProbe {
3375                    forward: true,
3376                }));
3377            }
3378            KeyCode::Char('N')
3379                if (key_event.modifiers.is_empty()
3380                    || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
3381                    && mode != InputMode::Edit
3382                    && self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() =>
3383            {
3384                return Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::CyclePinnedProbe {
3385                    forward: false,
3386                }));
3387            }
3388            KeyCode::Tab if mode == InputMode::Edit => {
3389                return Some(AppAction::Edit(EditAction::CommitAndNext));
3390            }
3391            KeyCode::BackTab if mode == InputMode::Edit => {
3392                return Some(AppAction::Edit(EditAction::CommitAndPrevious));
3393            }
3394            KeyCode::Tab => return Some(AppAction::FocusNext),
3395            KeyCode::BackTab => return Some(AppAction::FocusPrevious),
3396            KeyCode::Char('[') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3397                return if self.browser_session.is_some() {
3398                    Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::CycleView {
3399                        forward: false,
3400                    }))
3401                } else {
3402                    Some(AppAction::Result(ResultAction::PreviousTab))
3403                };
3404            }
3405            KeyCode::Char(']') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() && mode != InputMode::Edit => {
3406                return if self.browser_session.is_some() {
3407                    Some(AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::CycleView {
3408                        forward: true,
3409                    }))
3410                } else {
3411                    Some(AppAction::Result(ResultAction::NextTab))
3412                };
3413            }
3414            KeyCode::Enter if plots_active && key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
3415                return Some(AppAction::Result(ResultAction::Activate));
3416            }
3417            _ => {}
3418        }
3419
3420        if key_event.code == KeyCode::Esc && self.output_selection.is_some() {
3421            return Some(AppAction::ClearSelection);
3422        }
3423
3424        match mode {
3425            InputMode::Parameters => resolve_parameter_action(key_event).map(AppAction::Parameter),
3426            InputMode::Result => resolve_result_action(key_event).map(AppAction::Result),
3427            InputMode::Browser => resolve_browser_action(key_event).map(AppAction::Browser),
3428            InputMode::Edit => resolve_edit_action(key_event).map(AppAction::Edit),
3429            InputMode::PathChooser => None,
3430        }
3431    }
3432
3433    fn apply_action(&mut self, action: AppAction) {
3434        if !matches!(action, AppAction::StartRun) {
3435            self.pending_run_confirmation = false;
3436        }
3437        match action {
3438            AppAction::Quit => {
3439                if self.has_active_session() {
3440                    self.cancel_current();
3441                }
3442                self.quit = true;
3443            }
3444            AppAction::BackToLauncher => {
3445                if self.has_active_session() {
3446                    self.cancel_current();
3447                }
3448                self.return_to_launcher = true;
3449            }
3450            AppAction::ToggleTheme => self.toggle_theme(),
3451            AppAction::TogglePrimaryAuxPane => self.toggle_primary_aux_pane(),
3452            AppAction::CopySelection => self.copy_output_selection(),
3453            AppAction::FocusNext => self.cycle_focus(true),
3454            AppAction::FocusPrevious => self.cycle_focus(false),
3455            AppAction::StartRun => {
3456                if self.has_active_session() && self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() {
3457                    self.cancel_current();
3458                    self.start_run();
3459                } else if !self.has_active_session() {
3460                    self.start_run();
3461                }
3462            }
3463            AppAction::ToggleAdvanced => self.toggle_advanced(),
3464            AppAction::CancelSession => self.cancel_current(),
3465            AppAction::OpenPathChooser => self.open_path_chooser_for_selected_field(),
3466            AppAction::ClearSelection => self.clear_output_selection(),
3467            AppAction::ToggleHelp => self.show_help = !self.show_help,
3468            AppAction::Parameter(action) => self.apply_parameter_action(action),
3469            AppAction::Result(action) => self.apply_result_action(action),
3470            AppAction::Browser(action) => self.apply_browser_action(action),
3471            AppAction::Edit(action) => self.apply_edit_action(action),
3472            AppAction::PathChooser(action) => self.apply_path_chooser_action(action),
3473        }
3474    }
3475
3476    pub(crate) fn handle_key_event(&mut self, key_event: KeyEvent) {
3477        if self.consume_kitty_protocol_response_key(key_event) {
3478            return;
3479        }
3480        if key_event.code == KeyCode::Char('P')
3481            && key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT
3482            && self.pane_focus == PaneFocus::Result
3483            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
3484            && self.promote_latest_workflow_product_from_current_report()
3485        {
3486            return;
3487        }
3488        if self.choice_picker.is_some() {
3489            self.handle_choice_picker_key(key_event);
3490            return;
3491        }
3492        if self.browser_mode_picker.is_some() {
3493            self.handle_browser_mode_picker_key(key_event);
3494            return;
3495        }
3496        let action = self.resolve_key_action(key_event);
3497        if self.image_movie_active() {
3498            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
3499                "key event code={:?} modifiers={:?} kind={:?} action={:?}",
3500                key_event.code, key_event.modifiers, key_event.kind, action
3501            ));
3502        }
3503        if movie_input_fully_ignored_for_debug() && self.image_movie_active() {
3504            return;
3505        }
3506        if self.should_stop_image_movie_for_key(key_event, action.as_ref()) {
3507            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
3508                "stop movie due to key event code={:?} modifiers={:?} kind={:?}",
3509                key_event.code, key_event.modifiers, key_event.kind
3510            ));
3511            self.stop_image_movie(
3512                false,
3513                format!(
3514                    "key event code={:?} modifiers={:?} kind={:?}",
3515                    key_event.code, key_event.modifiers, key_event.kind
3516                ),
3517            );
3518        }
3519        if let Some(action) = action {
3520            self.apply_action(action);
3521        }
3522    }
3523
3524    pub(crate) fn handle_paste(&mut self, text: String) {
3525        let pasted = text.trim_end_matches(['\r', '\n']).to_string();
3526        if pasted.is_empty() {
3527            return;
3528        }
3529
3530        if let Some(edit_state) = self.edit_state.as_mut() {
3531            edit_state.buffer.push_str(&pasted);
3532            return;
3533        }
3534
3535        let FormSelection::Field(field_index) = self.selected_form else {
3536            return;
3537        };
3538        let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(field_index) else {
3539            return;
3540        };
3541        if matches!(field.value, FormValue::Text(_)) {
3542            field.set_text(pasted);
3543        }
3544    }
3545
3546    pub(crate) fn handle_mouse_event(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout) {
3547        self.cache_output_layout(layout);
3548        if self.image_movie_active() {
3549            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
3550                "mouse event kind={:?} column={} row={} modifiers={:?}",
3551                mouse_event.kind, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, mouse_event.modifiers
3552            ));
3553        }
3554        if movie_input_fully_ignored_for_debug() && self.image_movie_active() {
3555            return;
3556        }
3557        if self.choice_picker.is_some() {
3558            self.handle_choice_picker_mouse(mouse_event, layout);
3559            return;
3560        }
3561        if self.browser_mode_picker.is_some() {
3562            self.handle_browser_mode_picker_mouse(mouse_event, layout);
3563            return;
3564        }
3565        if self.should_stop_image_movie_for_mouse(mouse_event) {
3566            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
3567                "stop movie due to mouse event kind={:?} column={} row={} modifiers={:?}",
3568                mouse_event.kind, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, mouse_event.modifiers
3569            ));
3570            self.stop_image_movie(
3571                false,
3572                format!(
3573                    "mouse event kind={:?} column={} row={} modifiers={:?}",
3574                    mouse_event.kind, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, mouse_event.modifiers
3575                ),
3576            );
3577        }
3578        if self.path_chooser.is_some() {
3579            self.handle_path_chooser_mouse(mouse_event, layout);
3580            return;
3581        }
3582        match mouse_event.kind {
3583            MouseEventKind::Down(MouseButton::Left) => {
3584                self.handle_left_mouse_down(mouse_event, layout)
3585            }
3586            MouseEventKind::Up(MouseButton::Left) => {
3587                self.finalize_output_selection();
3588                self.dragging_divider = false;
3589                self.dragging_image_workspace_divider = false;
3590                self.dragging_image_cursor = false;
3591                self.dragging_image_profile = false;
3592                self.dragging_result_scrollbar = false;
3593                self.dragging_result_hscrollbar = false;
3594                self.dragging_result_hscrollbar_grab = 0;
3595            }
3596            MouseEventKind::Drag(MouseButton::Left) => {
3597                self.handle_left_mouse_drag(mouse_event, layout)
3598            }
3599            MouseEventKind::ScrollUp => self.handle_mouse_scroll(mouse_event, layout, -3),
3600            MouseEventKind::ScrollDown => self.handle_mouse_scroll(mouse_event, layout, 3),
3601            MouseEventKind::ScrollLeft => {
3602                self.handle_mouse_hscroll(mouse_event, layout, -HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_STEP)
3603            }
3604            MouseEventKind::ScrollRight => {
3605                self.handle_mouse_hscroll(mouse_event, layout, HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_STEP)
3606            }
3607            _ => {}
3608        }
3609    }
3610
3611    fn consume_kitty_protocol_response_key(&mut self, key_event: KeyEvent) -> bool {
3612        if key_event.kind != KeyEventKind::Press {
3613            return false;
3614        }
3615        if let Some(capture) = self.kitty_response_capture.as_mut() {
3616            let Some(ch) = kitty_protocol_response_char(key_event) else {
3617                self.kitty_response_capture = None;
3618                return false;
3619            };
3620            capture.push(ch);
3621            if matches!(key_event.code, KeyCode::Char('\\'))
3622                && key_event.modifiers.contains(KeyModifiers::ALT)
3623            {
3624                if let Some((image_id, placement_id)) =
3625                    kitty_protocol_response_image_not_found(capture)
3626                    && image_id >= crate::KITTY_MOVIE_OVERLAY_IMAGE_ID_BASE
3627                {
3628                    self.kitty_movie_store_invalidated = true;
3629                    crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
3630                        "kitty movie cache miss image_id={} placement_id={} -> invalidate local stored-image cache",
3631                        image_id,
3632                        placement_id.unwrap_or(0)
3633                    ));
3634                }
3635                crate::movie_debug_log(format!("kitty protocol response: {capture}"));
3636                self.kitty_response_capture = None;
3637            }
3638            return true;
3639        }
3640        if self.image_browser_session_state().is_some()
3641            && matches!(key_event.code, KeyCode::Char('_'))
3642            && key_event.modifiers.contains(KeyModifiers::ALT)
3643        {
3644            self.kitty_response_capture = Some("_".to_string());
3645            return true;
3646        }
3647        false
3648    }
3649
3650    pub(crate) fn take_kitty_movie_store_invalidated(&mut self) -> bool {
3651        std::mem::take(&mut self.kitty_movie_store_invalidated)
3652    }
3653
3654    #[cfg(test)]
3655    pub(crate) fn kitty_movie_store_invalidated_for_test(&self) -> bool {
3656        self.kitty_movie_store_invalidated
3657    }
3658
3659    pub(crate) fn drain_execution_events(&mut self) {
3660        while let Some(running) = self.running.as_ref() {
3661            let event = running.process.try_recv();
3662            match event {
3663                Ok(ExecutionEvent::Stdout(chunk)) => self.result.stdout.push_str(&chunk),
3664                Ok(ExecutionEvent::Stderr(chunk)) => self.result.stderr.push_str(&chunk),
3665                Ok(ExecutionEvent::Exited(exit)) => {
3666                    self.finish_execution(exit.code, exit.success);
3667                    break;
3668                }
3669                Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Empty) => break,
3670                Err(std::sync::mpsc::TryRecvError::Disconnected) => {
3671                    self.result.status_line =
3672                        "Execution channel disconnected unexpectedly.".to_string();
3673                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
3674                    self.running = None;
3675                    break;
3676                }
3677            }
3678        }
3679    }
3680
3681    pub(crate) fn app_category(&self) -> &str {
3682        &self.app.category
3683    }
3684
3685    pub(crate) fn app_name(&self) -> &str {
3686        &self.app.display_name
3687    }
3688
3689    pub(crate) fn footer_text(&self) -> String {
3690        let mut parts = vec!["Tab/Shift-Tab focus".to_string(), "t theme".to_string()];
3691        if self.edit_state.is_some() {
3692            parts.extend([
3693                "Enter save".to_string(),
3694                "Esc cancel".to_string(),
3695                "Bksp delete".to_string(),
3696            ]);
3697        } else if self.browser_session.is_some() {
3698            parts.push("[/] views".to_string());
3699            parts.push("Arrows/hjkl move".to_string());
3700            parts.push("PgUp/PgDn page".to_string());
3701            if self.image_plane_has_linked_profile() {
3702                parts.push("s spectrum pane".to_string());
3703            }
3704            if self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() {
3705                parts.push("+/- zoom".to_string());
3706                parts.push("HJKL pan".to_string());
3707                parts.push("c map".to_string());
3708                parts.push("i invert".to_string());
3709                parts.push("R region".to_string());
3710                parts.push("S save".to_string());
3711                parts.push("O load".to_string());
3712                parts.push("E rename".to_string());
3713                parts.push("Del delete".to_string());
3714                parts.push("M mask".to_string());
3715                parts.push("P pin".to_string());
3716                parts.push("n/N probe".to_string());
3717            }
3718            if self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() {
3719                parts.push("r reopen".to_string());
3720                parts.push("a adv".to_string());
3721                parts.push("^o browse".to_string());
3722            }
3723            if self
3724                .browser_session()
3725                .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Table)
3726            {
3727                parts.push("Enter open".to_string());
3728                parts.push("Esc back".to_string());
3729                parts.push("Bksp parent table".to_string());
3730            } else if self
3731                .browser_session()
3732                .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Image)
3733            {
3734                parts.push("Esc region/reticle".to_string());
3735            }
3736            parts.push("y copy".to_string());
3737        } else if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
3738            parts.extend([
3739                "[/] tabs".to_string(),
3740                "Arrows/hjkl move".to_string(),
3741                "Enter activate".to_string(),
3742                "y copy".to_string(),
3743            ]);
3744        } else {
3745            parts.extend([
3746                "[/] tabs".to_string(),
3747                "Arrows/hjkl move".to_string(),
3748                "y copy".to_string(),
3749            ]);
3750            if self.running.is_none() {
3751                parts.push("a adv".to_string());
3752                parts.push("r run".to_string());
3753            } else {
3754                parts.push("x cancel".to_string());
3755            }
3756        }
3757        parts.extend([
3758            "p pane".to_string(),
3759            "? help".to_string(),
3760            "b apps".to_string(),
3761            "q quit".to_string(),
3762        ]);
3763        parts.join("  ")
3764    }
3765
3766    pub(crate) fn help_visible(&self) -> bool {
3767        self.show_help
3768    }
3769
3770    pub(crate) fn help_overlay_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
3771        let mut lines = vec![
3772            "Key Help".to_string(),
3773            String::new(),
3774            "Global: Tab/Shift-Tab focus  [/] primary views  ? help".to_string(),
3775            "Global: p primary pane  y copy  b apps  t theme  q quit".to_string(),
3776        ];
3777        if self.running.is_none() && self.browser_session.is_none() && self.edit_state.is_none() {
3778            lines.push("Global: r run  a advanced options".to_string());
3779        } else if self.running.is_some() {
3780            lines.push("Global: x cancel active process".to_string());
3781        } else if self.browser_session.is_some() {
3782            lines.push("Global: x close browser session".to_string());
3783        }
3784        lines.push(String::new());
3785
3786        if self.edit_state.is_some() {
3787            lines.extend([
3788                "Edit: Enter save  Tab next field  Shift-Tab previous field".to_string(),
3789                "Edit: Esc cancel  Backspace delete".to_string(),
3790            ]);
3791            return lines;
3792        }
3793
3794        match self.current_focus_target() {
3795            FocusTarget::ParametersPane => {
3796                lines.extend([
3797                    "Focus: Parameters pane".to_string(),
3798                    "Move: Up/Down or j/k".to_string(),
3799                    "Adjust: Left/Right".to_string(),
3800                    "Activate: Enter or Space".to_string(),
3801                ]);
3802                match self.selected_form {
3803                    FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(_) => {
3804                        lines.push("Workflow action: Enter opens picker or chooser".to_string());
3805                    }
3806                    FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(_) => {
3807                        lines
3808                            .push("Workflow product: Shift-P promote into apply chain".to_string());
3809                    }
3810                    FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(_) => {
3811                        lines.push("Chain entry: Delete remove  Ctrl-K/Ctrl-J reorder".to_string());
3812                    }
3813                    FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(_, _) => {
3814                        lines.push("Chain setting: Enter opens picker".to_string());
3815                    }
3816                    _ => {}
3817                }
3818            }
3819            FocusTarget::ResultPane => {
3820                lines.extend([
3821                    "Focus: Result pane".to_string(),
3822                    "Move: Up/Down or j/k".to_string(),
3823                    "Scroll horizontally: Left/Right or h/l".to_string(),
3824                ]);
3825            }
3826            FocusTarget::PlotCatalog => {
3827                lines.extend([
3828                    "Focus: Plot catalog".to_string(),
3829                    "Move: Up/Down or j/k".to_string(),
3830                    "Activate: Enter".to_string(),
3831                ]);
3832            }
3833            FocusTarget::PlotCanvas => {
3834                lines.extend([
3835                    "Focus: Plot canvas".to_string(),
3836                    "Canvas is passive in this wave.".to_string(),
3837                ]);
3838            }
3839            FocusTarget::PlotControls => {
3840                lines.extend([
3841                    "Focus: Plot controls".to_string(),
3842                    "Move: Up/Down or j/k".to_string(),
3843                    "Adjust: Left/Right or h/l".to_string(),
3844                    "Activate: Enter".to_string(),
3845                ]);
3846            }
3847            FocusTarget::BrowserMain => {
3848                lines.extend([
3849                    "Focus: Browser main pane".to_string(),
3850                    "Move: Arrows or h/j/k/l".to_string(),
3851                    "Page: PgUp/PgDn".to_string(),
3852                ]);
3853                if self
3854                    .browser_session()
3855                    .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Table)
3856                {
3857                    lines.extend([
3858                        "Activate: Enter".to_string(),
3859                        "Back: Esc  Parent table: Backspace".to_string(),
3860                    ]);
3861                } else if self
3862                    .browser_session()
3863                    .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Image)
3864                {
3865                    lines.push("Plane view: g toggle raster/spreadsheet".to_string());
3866                    lines.push("Plane view: +/- zoom  0 reset view".to_string());
3867                    lines.push("Plane view: H/J/K/L pan view".to_string());
3868                    lines.push("Plane view: c cycle colormap  i invert".to_string());
3869                    lines.push(
3870                        "Display params: edit stretch/autoscale/clip_low/clip_high in Parameters"
3871                            .to_string(),
3872                    );
3873                    lines.push(
3874                        "Display stretch: percentile99 percentile95 minmax zscale manual"
3875                            .to_string(),
3876                    );
3877                    lines.push("Display autoscale: per_plane or frozen".to_string());
3878                    lines.push(
3879                        "Manual clip: set stretch=manual and both clip fields in image units"
3880                            .to_string(),
3881                    );
3882                    lines.push("Movie params: edit fps in Parameters (default 1)".to_string());
3883                    lines.push(
3884                        "Left pane: choose Live, Regions, or Masks with arrows or the mouse"
3885                            .to_string(),
3886                    );
3887                    lines.push(
3888                        "Regions: R start/add polygon  Enter close  Backspace undo  Esc cancel"
3889                            .to_string(),
3890                    );
3891                    lines.push(
3892                        "Regions: S save definition  O load next  E rename  Delete remove  M write default mask"
3893                            .to_string(),
3894                    );
3895                    lines.push("Regions: D clear active region".to_string());
3896                    lines.push(
3897                        "Masks: Enter set selected default mask  Delete remove selected mask"
3898                            .to_string(),
3899                    );
3900                    lines.push("Regions: polygons are stored in world coordinates".to_string());
3901                    lines.push("Spectrum view: follows the active plane cursor".to_string());
3902                    lines.push("Probes: P pin current  n/N cycle pinned  u remove".to_string());
3903                    lines.push(
3904                        "Probes: Esc return to the live cursor, then hide/show reticle".to_string(),
3905                    );
3906                    if self.image_plane_has_linked_profile() {
3907                        lines.push("Plane workspace: s collapse/expand spectrum".to_string());
3908                        lines.push("Plane workspace: drag divider to resize spectrum".to_string());
3909                        lines.push(
3910                            "Plane workspace: click chevron to collapse/expand spectrum"
3911                                .to_string(),
3912                        );
3913                    }
3914                    if self
3915                        .image_browser_session_state()
3916                        .is_some_and(|state| state.movie_available())
3917                    {
3918                        lines.push("Plane view: m play/pause movie".to_string());
3919                    }
3920                    if self.image_raster_plane_active() {
3921                        lines.push("Raster: click to select active pixel".to_string());
3922                        lines.push("Raster: mouse wheel zooms the plane".to_string());
3923                        lines
3924                            .push("Raster: click a pinned marker to select that probe".to_string());
3925                    }
3926                }
3927            }
3928            FocusTarget::BrowserInspector => {
3929                lines.extend([
3930                    "Focus: Browser inspector".to_string(),
3931                    "Move: Arrows or h/j/k/l".to_string(),
3932                    "Page: PgUp/PgDn".to_string(),
3933                ]);
3934                if self
3935                    .browser_session()
3936                    .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Table)
3937                {
3938                    lines.extend(["Activate: Enter".to_string(), "Back: Esc".to_string()]);
3939                } else if self.browser_session().is_some_and(|session| {
3940                    matches!(&session.kind, BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) if !state.snapshot.non_display_axes.is_empty())
3941                }) {
3942                    if self
3943                        .image_browser_session_state()
3944                        .is_some_and(|state| state.snapshot.non_display_axes.len() > 1)
3945                    {
3946                        lines.push("Select non-display axis: Up/Down".to_string());
3947                    }
3948                    lines.push("Adjust selected axis: Left/Right".to_string());
3949                    lines.push("Use Tab to focus this pane, then arrows or h/j/k/l".to_string());
3950                }
3951            }
3952        }
3953        lines
3954    }
3955
3956    pub(crate) fn parameter_title(&self) -> String {
3957        let focus = if self.pane_focus == PaneFocus::Parameters {
3958            " [focus]"
3959        } else {
3960            ""
3961        };
3962        let title = match self.theme_mode() {
3963            ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => "Parameters",
3964            ThemeMode::RichPanel => "◈ Parameters",
3965        };
3966        if self.running.is_some() {
3967            format!(
3968                "{title} [{}] locked{}",
3969                spinner_frames(self.theme_mode())[self.spinner_frame],
3970                focus
3971            )
3972        } else if self.browser_session.is_some() {
3973            if self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() {
3974                let mode = self
3975                    .image_browser_session_state()
3976                    .map(|state| state.left_pane_mode.label().to_ascii_lowercase())
3977                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "live".to_string());
3978                match self.theme_mode() {
3979                    ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => format!("Parameters [{mode}]{focus}"),
3980                    ThemeMode::RichPanel => format!("◈ Parameters [{mode}]{focus}"),
3981                }
3982            } else {
3983                match self.theme_mode() {
3984                    ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => format!("Inspector [live]{focus}"),
3985                    ThemeMode::RichPanel => format!("◈ Inspector [live]{focus}"),
3986                }
3987            }
3988        } else if self.schema_error.is_some() {
3989            format!("{title} (schema unavailable){focus}")
3990        } else {
3991            format!("{title}{focus}")
3992        }
3993    }
3994
3995    pub(crate) fn result_title(&self) -> String {
3996        let focus = if self.pane_focus == PaneFocus::Result {
3997            " [focus]"
3998        } else {
3999            ""
4000        };
4001        let title = match self.theme_mode() {
4002            ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => "Result",
4003            ThemeMode::RichPanel => "◉ Result",
4004        };
4005        format!("{title}{focus}")
4006    }
4007
4008    pub(crate) fn theme_mode(&self) -> ThemeMode {
4009        self.config_store.theme_mode()
4010    }
4011
4012    pub(crate) fn pane_split_ratio(&self) -> f32 {
4013        self.config_store.pane_split_ratio()
4014    }
4015
4016    pub(crate) fn image_workspace_split_ratio(&self) -> f32 {
4017        self.config_store.image_workspace_split_ratio()
4018    }
4019
4020    pub(crate) fn parameters_pane_collapsed(&self) -> bool {
4021        self.pane_split_ratio() <= 0.0
4022    }
4023
4024    pub(crate) fn image_spectrum_pane_collapsed(&self) -> bool {
4025        self.image_workspace_split_ratio() >= 1.0
4026    }
4027
4028    pub(crate) fn pane_focus(&self) -> PaneFocus {
4029        self.pane_focus
4030    }
4031
4032    pub(crate) fn form_rows(&self) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4033        if self.image_browser_session_state().is_some() {
4034            return self.live_parameter_rows();
4035        }
4036
4037        let mut rows = Vec::new();
4038        for (section_index, section) in self.sections.iter().enumerate() {
4039            let visible_items = self.visible_section_items(section);
4040            let context_rows = self.workflow_context_rows_for_section(section);
4041            let stage_rows = self.workflow_stage_parameter_rows_for_section(section);
4042            let product_action_rows = self.workflow_product_action_rows_for_section(section);
4043            let chain_rows = self.workflow_chain_rows_for_section(section);
4044            let product_rows = self.workflow_product_rows_for_section(section);
4045            let keep_section = self.keep_empty_workflow_products_section(section);
4046            let visible_items_empty = visible_items.is_empty();
4047            let context_rows_empty = context_rows.is_empty();
4048            let stage_rows_empty = stage_rows.is_empty();
4049            let product_action_rows_empty = product_action_rows.is_empty();
4050            let chain_rows_empty = chain_rows.is_empty();
4051            let product_rows_empty = product_rows.is_empty();
4052            if visible_items_empty
4053                && context_rows_empty
4054                && stage_rows_empty
4055                && product_action_rows_empty
4056                && chain_rows_empty
4057                && product_rows_empty
4058                && !keep_section
4059            {
4060                continue;
4061            }
4062
4063            rows.push(FormRowView {
4064                target: FormSelection::Section(section_index),
4065                text: section.name.clone(),
4066                kind: FormRowKind::Section {
4067                    collapsed: section.collapsed,
4068                },
4069                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::Section(section_index),
4070            });
4071
4072            if section.collapsed {
4073                continue;
4074            }
4075
4076            rows.extend(self.render_section_items_for_section(
4077                section,
4078                section_index,
4079                &visible_items,
4080            ));
4081            rows.extend(context_rows);
4082            rows.extend(stage_rows);
4083            rows.extend(product_action_rows);
4084            rows.extend(chain_rows);
4085            rows.extend(product_rows);
4086            if keep_section
4087                && visible_items_empty
4088                && context_rows_empty
4089                && stage_rows_empty
4090                && product_action_rows_empty
4091                && chain_rows_empty
4092                && product_rows_empty
4093            {
4094                rows.push(FormRowView {
4095                    target: FormSelection::Section(section_index),
4096                    text: "No chain entries or products yet.".to_string(),
4097                    kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4098                    selected: false,
4099                });
4100            }
4101        }
4102
4103        if rows.is_empty() {
4104            rows.push(FormRowView {
4105                target: FormSelection::Section(0),
4106                text: "No editable parameters available.".to_string(),
4107                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4108                selected: false,
4109            });
4110        }
4111
4112        rows
4113    }
4114
4115    fn render_section_items_for_section(
4116        &self,
4117        section: &FormSection,
4118        section_index: usize,
4119        visible_items: &[StaticFormItem],
4120    ) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4121        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4122            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4123            && section.name == "Stage Parameters")
4124        {
4125            return visible_items
4126                .iter()
4127                .copied()
4128                .map(|item| self.render_section_item(item))
4129                .collect();
4130        }
4131
4132        let mut rows = Vec::new();
4133        let mut last_group: Option<&str> = None;
4134        for item in visible_items.iter().copied() {
4135            if let StaticFormItem::Field(field_index) = item {
4136                let group = self.workflow_stage_parameter_subsection_title(field_index);
4137                if last_group != Some(group) {
4138                    rows.push(FormRowView {
4139                        target: FormSelection::Section(section_index),
4140                        text: group.to_string(),
4141                        kind: FormRowKind::Subsection,
4142                        selected: false,
4143                    });
4144                    last_group = Some(group);
4145                }
4146            }
4147            rows.push(self.render_section_item(item));
4148        }
4149        rows
4150    }
4151
4152    fn live_parameter_rows(&self) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4153        let mut rows = Vec::new();
4154        for (section_index, section) in self.sections.iter().enumerate() {
4155            let visible_items = self
4156                .visible_section_items(section)
4157                .into_iter()
4158                .filter(|item| {
4159                    matches!(
4160                        item,
4161                        StaticFormItem::Field(index)
4162                            if IMEXPLORE_LIVE_PARAMETER_FIELD_IDS
4163                                .contains(&self.fields[*index].schema.id.as_str())
4164                    )
4165                })
4166                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
4167            if visible_items.is_empty() {
4168                continue;
4169            }
4170
4171            rows.push(FormRowView {
4172                target: FormSelection::Section(section_index),
4173                text: section.name.clone(),
4174                kind: FormRowKind::Section {
4175                    collapsed: section.collapsed,
4176                },
4177                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::Section(section_index),
4178            });
4179
4180            if section.collapsed {
4181                continue;
4182            }
4183
4184            for item in visible_items {
4185                rows.push(self.render_section_item(item));
4186            }
4187        }
4188        rows
4189    }
4190
4191    fn visible_section_items(&self, section: &FormSection) -> Vec<StaticFormItem> {
4192        match &section.content {
4193            FormSectionContent::Items(items) => items
4194                .iter()
4195                .copied()
4196                .filter(|item| match item {
4197                    StaticFormItem::Field(index) => {
4198                        (self.show_advanced || !self.fields[*index].schema.advanced)
4199                            && !self.workflow_context_owns_field(section, *index)
4200                            && (!self.is_calibrate_workflow_stage_parameters(section)
4201                                || calibrate_argument_applies_to_mode(
4202                                    self.fields[*index].schema.id.as_str(),
4203                                    self.current_workflow_stage().cli_mode(),
4204                                ))
4205                    }
4206                    StaticFormItem::SummaryView(_)
4207                    | StaticFormItem::BrowserView(_)
4208                    | StaticFormItem::WorkflowStage(_) => true,
4209                })
4210                .collect(),
4211        }
4212    }
4213
4214    fn workflow_context_owns_field(&self, section: &FormSection, field_index: usize) -> bool {
4215        self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4216            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4217            && section.name == "Context"
4218            && matches!(
4219                self.fields[field_index].schema.id.as_str(),
4220                "field" | "refant" | "reference_fields" | "transfer_fields"
4221            )
4222    }
4223
4224    fn workflow_context_rows_for_section(&self, section: &FormSection) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4225        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4226            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4227            && section.name == "Context")
4228        {
4229            return Vec::new();
4230        }
4231        self.workflow_context_displays()
4232            .into_iter()
4233            .map(|(kind, display)| FormRowView {
4234                target: FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind),
4235                text: render_workflow_value_display(&display),
4236                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4237                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind),
4238            })
4239            .collect()
4240    }
4241
4242    fn workflow_context_displays(&self) -> Vec<(WorkflowContextSettingKind, WorkflowValueDisplay)> {
4243        [
4244            WorkflowContextSettingKind::ActiveFields,
4245            WorkflowContextSettingKind::RefAnt,
4246            WorkflowContextSettingKind::FluxReferenceFields,
4247            WorkflowContextSettingKind::FluxTransferFields,
4248        ]
4249        .into_iter()
4250        .map(|kind| {
4251            (
4252                kind,
4253                WorkflowValueDisplay {
4254                    label: kind.label().to_string(),
4255                    value: self.workflow_context_setting_display_value(kind),
4256                },
4257            )
4258        })
4259        .collect()
4260    }
4261
4262    fn workflow_stage_parameter_rows_for_section(&self, section: &FormSection) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4263        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4264            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4265            && section.name == "Stage Parameters")
4266        {
4267            return Vec::new();
4268        }
4269        let stage = self.current_workflow_stage();
4270        let mut rows = self
4271            .workflow_stage_guide_displays(stage)
4272            .into_iter()
4273            .map(|(kind, display)| FormRowView {
4274                target: FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(kind),
4275                text: render_workflow_detail_display(&display),
4276                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4277                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(kind),
4278            })
4279            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
4280        rows.push(FormRowView {
4281            target: FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction,
4282            text: render_workflow_detail_display(&WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4283                label: "Action".to_string(),
4284                value: workflow_stage_action_label(stage).to_string(),
4285                indent: 0,
4286            }),
4287            kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4288            selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction,
4289        });
4290        rows
4291    }
4292
4293    fn workflow_stage_parameter_subsection_title(&self, field_index: usize) -> &'static str {
4294        match self.fields[field_index].schema.group.as_str() {
4295            "Apply" => "Apply Settings",
4296            "Output" => "Output",
4297            "Inspect" => "Inspect",
4298            "Solve" => "Solve",
4299            "Solve Gain" => "Gain Solve",
4300            "Solve Bandpass" => "Bandpass Solve",
4301            "Fluxscale" => "Fluxscale",
4302            "Selection" => "Selection",
4303            "Input" => "Inputs",
4304            _ => "Parameters",
4305        }
4306    }
4307
4308    fn workflow_stage_guide_displays(
4309        &self,
4310        stage: WorkflowStageId,
4311    ) -> Vec<(WorkflowStageGuideKind, WorkflowDetailDisplay)> {
4312        [
4313            (
4314                WorkflowStageGuideKind::Goal,
4315                WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4316                    label: WorkflowStageGuideKind::Goal.label().to_string(),
4317                    value: workflow_stage_goal(stage).to_string(),
4318                    indent: 0,
4319                },
4320            ),
4321            (
4322                WorkflowStageGuideKind::Produces,
4323                WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4324                    label: WorkflowStageGuideKind::Produces.label().to_string(),
4325                    value: workflow_stage_output(stage).to_string(),
4326                    indent: 0,
4327                },
4328            ),
4329            (
4330                WorkflowStageGuideKind::Hint,
4331                WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4332                    label: WorkflowStageGuideKind::Hint.label().to_string(),
4333                    value: workflow_stage_hint(stage).to_string(),
4334                    indent: 0,
4335                },
4336            ),
4337        ]
4338        .into_iter()
4339        .collect()
4340    }
4341
4342    fn workflow_product_rows_for_section(&self, section: &FormSection) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4343        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4344            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4345            && section.name == "Products")
4346        {
4347            return Vec::new();
4348        }
4349        self.workflow_products
4350            .iter()
4351            .enumerate()
4352            .map(|(index, product)| {
4353                let display_name = product
4354                    .path
4355                    .file_name()
4356                    .map(|name| name.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
4357                    .unwrap_or_else(|| product.path.display().to_string());
4358                FormRowView {
4359                    target: FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index),
4360                    text: render_workflow_product_row_display(&WorkflowProductRowDisplay {
4361                        family: product.family.clone(),
4362                        revision: product.revision,
4363                        display_name,
4364                        stage_label: product.stage.label().to_string(),
4365                        status_label: product.status.label().to_string(),
4366                    }),
4367                    kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4368                    selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index),
4369                }
4370            })
4371            .collect()
4372    }
4373
4374    fn workflow_context_setting_display_value(&self, kind: WorkflowContextSettingKind) -> String {
4375        let mut current =
4376            self.non_empty_field_text(kind.field_id())
4377                .unwrap_or_else(|| match kind {
4378                    WorkflowContextSettingKind::ActiveFields => "<all fields>".to_string(),
4379                    WorkflowContextSettingKind::RefAnt => "<unset>".to_string(),
4380                    WorkflowContextSettingKind::FluxReferenceFields
4381                    | WorkflowContextSettingKind::FluxTransferFields => "<unset>".to_string(),
4382                });
4383        if kind == WorkflowContextSettingKind::ActiveFields
4384            && let Ok(field_id) = current.parse::<usize>()
4385            && let Some(summary) = self.current_structured_summary()
4386            && let Some(field) = summary
4387                .fields
4388                .iter()
4389                .find(|field| field.field_id == field_id)
4390        {
4391            current = field.name.clone();
4392        }
4393        if kind != WorkflowContextSettingKind::RefAnt {
4394            return current;
4395        }
4396        match self.workflow_recommended_refant_name() {
4397            Some(recommended) if current == "<unset>" => {
4398                format!("{current}  [suggested {recommended}]")
4399            }
4400            Some(recommended) if current == recommended => format!("{current}  [suggested]"),
4401            Some(recommended) => format!("{current}  [suggested {recommended}]"),
4402            None => current,
4403        }
4404    }
4405
4406    fn workflow_recommended_refant_name(&self) -> Option<String> {
4407        let summary = self.current_structured_summary()?;
4408        summary
4409            .antennas
4410            .iter()
4411            .find(|antenna| !antenna.station.ends_with(":OUT"))
4412            .or_else(|| summary.antennas.first())
4413            .map(|antenna| antenna.name.clone())
4414    }
4415
4416    fn workflow_product_action_rows_for_section(&self, section: &FormSection) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4417        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4418            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4419            && section.name == "Products")
4420        {
4421            return Vec::new();
4422        }
4423        [
4424            WorkflowProductActionKind::AddSolvedProduct,
4425            WorkflowProductActionKind::ImportChainTable,
4426            WorkflowProductActionKind::ChooseCallibrary,
4427        ]
4428        .into_iter()
4429        .map(|kind| FormRowView {
4430            target: FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind),
4431            text: kind.label().to_string(),
4432            kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4433            selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind),
4434        })
4435        .collect()
4436    }
4437
4438    fn workflow_chain_rows_for_section(&self, section: &FormSection) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4439        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4440            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4441            && section.name == "Products")
4442        {
4443            return Vec::new();
4444        }
4445        let mut rows = Vec::new();
4446        for (index, entry) in self.workflow_chain_entries().into_iter().enumerate() {
4447            rows.push(FormRowView {
4448                target: FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index),
4449                text: entry.label.clone(),
4450                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4451                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index),
4452            });
4453            rows.extend(self.workflow_chain_detail_rows(index, &entry));
4454        }
4455        rows
4456    }
4457
4458    fn workflow_chain_detail_rows(
4459        &self,
4460        entry: usize,
4461        record: &WorkflowChainEntryRecord,
4462    ) -> Vec<FormRowView> {
4463        match &record.source {
4464            WorkflowChainEntrySource::DirectTable => self
4465                .workflow_chain_setting_records(entry)
4466                .into_iter()
4467                .map(|setting| FormRowView {
4468                    target: FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(setting.entry, setting.kind),
4469                    text: setting.text,
4470                    kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4471                    selected: self.selected_form
4472                        == FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(setting.entry, setting.kind),
4473                })
4474                .collect(),
4475            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryFile { path } => vec![FormRowView {
4476                target: FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(entry),
4477                text: render_workflow_detail_display(&WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4478                    label: "source".to_string(),
4479                    value: path.display().to_string(),
4480                    indent: 2,
4481                }),
4482                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4483                selected: false,
4484            }],
4485            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibrarySpec { spec, .. } => {
4486                let mut rows = [
4487                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield,
4488                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp,
4489                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap,
4490                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt,
4491                ]
4492                .into_iter()
4493                .map(|kind| FormRowView {
4494                    target: FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind),
4495                    text: render_workflow_detail_display(&WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4496                        label: kind.label().to_string(),
4497                        value: workflow_callib_setting_display_value(spec, kind),
4498                        indent: 2,
4499                    }),
4500                    kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4501                    selected: self.selected_form
4502                        == FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind),
4503                })
4504                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
4505                if let Some(apply_to) = workflow_callib_apply_to_row(spec) {
4506                    rows.push(FormRowView {
4507                        target: FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(entry),
4508                        text: apply_to,
4509                        kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4510                        selected: false,
4511                    });
4512                }
4513                rows
4514            }
4515            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryError { message, .. } => vec![FormRowView {
4516                target: FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(entry),
4517                text: render_workflow_detail_display(&WorkflowDetailDisplay {
4518                    label: "error".to_string(),
4519                    value: message.clone(),
4520                    indent: 2,
4521                }),
4522                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4523                selected: false,
4524            }],
4525        }
4526    }
4527
4528    fn keep_empty_workflow_products_section(&self, section: &FormSection) -> bool {
4529        self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4530            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4531            && section.name == "Products"
4532    }
4533
4534    fn render_section_item(&self, item: StaticFormItem) -> FormRowView {
4535        match item {
4536            StaticFormItem::Field(field_index) => FormRowView {
4537                target: FormSelection::Field(field_index),
4538                text: self.render_field_line(field_index),
4539                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4540                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::Field(field_index),
4541            },
4542            StaticFormItem::SummaryView(view) => FormRowView {
4543                target: FormSelection::SummaryView(view),
4544                text: format!("{:<18} {}", "View", view.label()),
4545                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4546                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::SummaryView(view),
4547            },
4548            StaticFormItem::BrowserView(view) => FormRowView {
4549                target: FormSelection::BrowserView(view),
4550                text: format!("{:<18} {}", "View", view.label()),
4551                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4552                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::BrowserView(view),
4553            },
4554            StaticFormItem::WorkflowStage(stage) => FormRowView {
4555                target: FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage),
4556                text: self.workflow_stage_row_text(stage),
4557                kind: FormRowKind::Field,
4558                selected: self.selected_form == FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage),
4559            },
4560        }
4561    }
4562
4563    fn render_field_line(&self, field_index: usize) -> String {
4564        let Some(field) = self.fields.get(field_index) else {
4565            return String::new();
4566        };
4567        let mut rendered = field.render_line(self.edit_state.as_ref(), field_index);
4568        if !field.is_path()
4569            && self
4570                .field_picker_entries(field_index)
4571                .is_some_and(|entries| !entries.is_empty())
4572        {
4573            rendered.push_str(" [pick]");
4574        }
4575        rendered
4576    }
4577
4578    fn is_calibrate_workflow_stage_parameters(&self, section: &FormSection) -> bool {
4579        self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow
4580            && self.app.id == "calibrate"
4581            && section.name == "Stage Parameters"
4582    }
4583
4584    pub(crate) fn browser_parameter_summary_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
4585        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
4586            return Vec::new();
4587        };
4588        match state.left_pane_mode {
4589            ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Live => self.browser_inspector_lines().unwrap_or_default(),
4590            ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Regions => {
4591                let selected = state
4592                    .selected_saved_region_name()
4593                    .map(|name| format!("Selected: {name}"))
4594                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "Selected: none".to_string());
4595                let active = state
4596                    .active_region_definition_name()
4597                    .map(|name| format!("Loaded: {name}"))
4598                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "Loaded: none".to_string());
4599                let mut lines = vec![selected, active];
4600                if let Some(stats) = state
4601                    .snapshot
4602                    .region
4603                    .as_ref()
4604                    .and_then(|region| region.stats.as_ref())
4605                {
4606                    lines.push(format!("Pixels: {}", stats.pixel_count));
4607                    lines.push(format!(
4608                        "Mean: {}",
4609                        format_numeric_value_with_unit(stats.mean, &stats.value_unit)
4610                    ));
4611                    lines.push(format!(
4612                        "Sigma: {}",
4613                        format_numeric_value_with_unit(stats.sigma, &stats.value_unit)
4614                    ));
4615                    lines.push(format!(
4616                        "Median: {}",
4617                        format_numeric_value_with_unit(stats.median, &stats.value_unit)
4618                    ));
4619                    lines.push(format!(
4620                        "Min / Max: {} / {}",
4621                        format_numeric_value_with_unit(stats.min, &stats.value_unit),
4622                        format_numeric_value_with_unit(stats.max, &stats.value_unit)
4623                    ));
4624                }
4625                lines.push("Click [ ] to load or clear a saved region".to_string());
4626                lines.push("Click the name or press E to rename it".to_string());
4627                lines.push("S save active region".to_string());
4628                lines.push("Delete remove selected region".to_string());
4629                lines.push("O cycle next saved region  M write mask".to_string());
4630                lines
4631            }
4632            ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Masks => {
4633                let selected = state
4634                    .selected_mask_name()
4635                    .map(|name| format!("Selected: {name}"))
4636                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "Selected: none".to_string());
4637                let default = state
4638                    .snapshot
4639                    .default_mask_name
4640                    .as_ref()
4641                    .map(|name| format!("Default: {name}"))
4642                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "Default: none".to_string());
4643                vec![
4644                    selected,
