4645                    default,
4646                    "Click [ ] to set or clear the default mask".to_string(),
4647                    "Delete remove selected mask".to_string(),
4648                    "M writes a new mask from the active region".to_string(),
4649                ]
4650            }
4651        }
4652    }
4653
4654    pub(crate) fn browser_parameter_summary_heading(&self) -> String {
4655        self.image_browser_session_state()
4656            .map(|state| state.left_pane_mode.label().to_string())
4657            .unwrap_or_else(|| "Live".to_string())
4658    }
4659
4660    pub(crate) fn active_result_tab(&self) -> ResultTab {
4661        self.active_result_tab
4662    }
4663
4664    pub(crate) fn active_result_scroll(&self) -> u16 {
4665        self.result_scrolls[self.active_result_tab.index()]
4666    }
4667
4668    pub(crate) fn active_result_hscroll(&self) -> u16 {
4669        self.result_hscrolls[self.active_result_tab.index()]
4670    }
4671
4672    pub(crate) fn result_tabs(&self) -> &'static [ResultTab] {
4673        self.visible_result_tabs()
4674    }
4675
4676    pub(crate) fn result_status_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
4677        let mut lines = vec![format!("Status: {}", self.result.status_line)];
4678        if let Some(code) = self.result.exit_code {
4679            lines.push(format!("Exit code: {code}"));
4680        } else if self.running.is_some() {
4681            lines.push("Exit code: running".to_string());
4682        } else {
4683            lines.push(String::new());
4684        }
4685
4686        if let Some(path) = &self.result.file_output_path {
4687            lines.push(format!("Output: {path}"));
4688        } else if let Some(error) = &self.result.structured_error {
4689            lines.push(error.clone());
4690        } else if let Some(error) = &self.schema_error {
4691            lines.push(error.clone());
4692        } else if self.running.is_some() {
4693            lines.push("Structured output will appear when the subprocess exits.".to_string());
4694        } else if let Some(session) = self.browser_session() {
4695            match &session.kind {
4696                BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => lines.push(format!(
4697                    "View: {}  Path: {}  Mode: tablebrowser",
4698                    session.active_tab().label(),
4699                    session.root_path,
4700                )),
4701                BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) => {
4702                    let mut detail = format!(
4703                        "View: {}  Path: {}  Mode: imexplore/{}",
4704                        session.active_tab().label(),
4705                        session.root_path,
4706                        state.plane_mode.label(),
4707                    );
4708                    if state.movie_available() {
4709                        detail.push_str(if state.movie.playing {
4710                            "  Movie: playing"
4711                        } else {
4712                            "  Movie: paused"
4713                        });
4714                    }
4715                    lines.push(detail);
4716                }
4717            }
4718        } else {
4719            lines.push(format!(
4720                "View: {}  Theme: {}  Verbose: {}",
4721                self.active_result_tab.label(),
4722                match self.theme_mode() {
4723                    ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => "dense_ansi",
4724                    ThemeMode::RichPanel => "rich_panel",
4725                },
4726                if self.verbose_enabled() { "on" } else { "off" }
4727            ));
4728        }
4729        lines
4730    }
4731
4732    pub(crate) fn result_status_kind(&self) -> &'static str {
4733        match self.result.status_kind {
4734            StatusKind::Info => "info",
4735            StatusKind::Running => "running",
4736            StatusKind::Ok => "ok",
4737            StatusKind::Error => "error",
4738            StatusKind::Warning => "warning",
4739        }
4740    }
4741
4742    pub(crate) fn browser_is_active(&self) -> bool {
4743        self.browser_session.is_some()
4744    }
4745
4746    fn image_browser_session_state(&self) -> Option<&ImageBrowserSessionState> {
4747        match &self.browser_session()?.kind {
4748            BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) => Some(state),
4749            BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => None,
4750        }
4751    }
4752
4753    fn image_browser_session_state_mut(&mut self) -> Option<&mut ImageBrowserSessionState> {
4754        match &mut self.browser_session.as_mut()?.kind {
4755            BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) => Some(state),
4756            BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => None,
4757        }
4758    }
4759
4760    pub(crate) fn image_raster_plane_active(&self) -> bool {
4761        self.image_browser_session_state()
4762            .is_some_and(ImageBrowserSessionState::raster_plane_active)
4763    }
4764
4765    pub(crate) fn image_movie_active(&self) -> bool {
4766        self.image_browser_session_state()
4767            .is_some_and(|state| state.movie.playing)
4768    }
4769
4770    pub(crate) fn image_movie_terminal_looping_active(&self) -> bool {
4771        self.image_browser_session_state().is_some_and(|state| {
4772            state.movie.playing
4773                && state.movie.terminal_looping
4774                && state.raster_plane_active()
4775                && state.movie_available()
4776        })
4777    }
4778
4779    pub(crate) fn image_movie_direct_overlay_active(&self) -> bool {
4780        self.image_browser_session_state().is_some_and(|state| {
4781            state.movie.playing
4782                && state.movie.direct_overlay
4783                && state.raster_plane_active()
4784                && state.movie_available()
4785        })
4786    }
4787
4788    pub(crate) fn image_movie_fps(&self) -> Option<f64> {
4789        self.image_browser_session_state().and_then(|state| {
4790            if state.movie.playing {
4791                Some(state.movie.fps)
4792            } else {
4793                None
4794            }
4795        })
4796    }
4797
4798    pub(crate) fn note_image_plane_presented(&mut self) {
4799        if self.image_movie_direct_overlay_active() || self.image_movie_scheduler_enabled() {
4800            return;
4801        }
4802        let Some(request_hash) = self
4803            .image_browser_session_state()
4804            .and_then(|state| state.panel.as_ref())
4805            .and_then(|panel| panel.display_key.as_ref())
4806            .map(hashed_render_request_key)
4807        else {
4808            return;
4809        };
4810        self.movie_perf.plane_presented(request_hash);
4811        self.movie_perf.startup_plane_presented(request_hash);
4812    }
4813
4814    pub(crate) fn note_image_plane_direct_presented(&mut self, request_hash: u64) {
4815        self.movie_perf.plane_presented(request_hash);
4816    }
4817
4818    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
4819    pub(crate) fn note_image_plane_direct_overlay_refresh(
4820        &mut self,
4821        request_hash: u64,
4822        canvas: Rect,
4823        pixel_size: (u32, u32),
4824        cache_hit: bool,
4825        render_duration: Duration,
4826        upload_duration: Duration,
4827        show_duration: Duration,
4828        refresh_duration: Duration,
4829        uploaded_bytes: usize,
4830        surface_count: usize,
4831    ) {
4832        let Some(context) = ({
4833            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
4834                return;
4835            };
4836            Some(image_movie_perf_context_from_state(
4837                state,
4838                Some(canvas),
4839                Some(pixel_size),
4840                Some(request_hash),
4841            ))
4842        }) else {
4843            return;
4844        };
4845        self.movie_perf.direct_overlay_refresh_completed(
4846            request_hash,
4847            context,
4848            if cache_hit {
4849                MovieFrameOutcome::CacheHitRenderedImage
4850            } else {
4851                MovieFrameOutcome::CacheMiss
4852            },
4853            render_duration,
4854            upload_duration,
4855            show_duration,
4856            refresh_duration,
4857            uploaded_bytes,
4858            surface_count,
4859            cache_hit,
4860        );
4861    }
4862
4863    fn maybe_emit_movie_perf_summary(&mut self) {
4864        let requested_fps = self.image_movie_fps().unwrap_or(IMAGE_MOVIE_DEFAULT_FPS);
4865        let pipeline = self
4866            .image_browser_session_state()
4867            .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
4868            .map(image_movie_pipeline_state);
4869        self.movie_perf
4870            .maybe_emit_summary(self.image_movie_active(), requested_fps, pipeline);
4871    }
4872
4873    pub(crate) fn browser_tabs(&self) -> &'static [BrowserTab] {
4874        self.browser_session()
4875            .map(BrowserSession::tabs)
4876            .unwrap_or(&BrowserTab::TABLE_ALL)
4877    }
4878
4879    #[allow(dead_code)]
4880    #[cfg(test)]
4881    pub(crate) fn active_browser_tab_label(&self) -> Option<&'static str> {
4882        self.active_browser_tab().map(BrowserTab::label)
4883    }
4884
4885    pub(crate) fn active_browser_tab_for_ui(&self) -> Option<BrowserTab> {
4886        self.active_browser_tab()
4887    }
4888
4889    pub(crate) fn active_browser_scroll_metrics(
4890        &self,
4891        _viewport_height: u16,
4892    ) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
4893        if !self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
4894            return None;
4895        }
4896        self.browser_session()?.vertical_metrics()
4897    }
4898
4899    pub(crate) fn active_browser_hscroll_metrics(
4900        &self,
4901        viewport_width: u16,
4902    ) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
4903        if !self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
4904            return None;
4905        }
4906        self.browser_session()?.horizontal_metrics(viewport_width)
4907    }
4908
4909    pub(crate) fn browser_inspector_lines(&self) -> Option<Vec<String>> {
4910        self.browser_session()?.inspector_lines()
4911    }
4912
4913    fn browser_main_content_lines(&self) -> Option<Vec<String>> {
4914        Some(self.browser_session()?.main_content_lines())
4915    }
4916
4917    pub(crate) fn sync_browser_viewport(&mut self, width: u16, height: u16, inspector_height: u16) {
4918        if self.defer_image_browser_resize_during_divider_drag() {
4919            return;
4920        }
4921        let Some(current_viewport) =
4922            self.browser_session
4923                .as_ref()
4924                .map(|session| match &session.kind {
4925                    BrowserSessionKind::Table(state) => (
4926                        state.viewport.width,
4927                        state.viewport.height,
4928                        state.viewport.inspector_height,
4929                    ),
4930                    BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) => (
4931                        state.viewport.width,
4932                        state.viewport.height,
4933                        state.viewport.inspector_height,
4934                    ),
4935                })
4936        else {
4937            return;
4938        };
4939        let viewport = (width, height, inspector_height);
4940        if viewport == current_viewport {
4941            return;
4942        }
4943        self.clear_output_selection();
4944        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::Resize {
4945            width,
4946            height,
4947            inspector_height,
4948        });
4949    }
4950
4951    fn image_plane_font_size(&self) -> (u16, u16) {
4952        self.image_browser_session_state()
4953            .and_then(|state| state.panel.as_ref().map(|panel| panel.font_size))
4954            .unwrap_or_else(|| terminal_picker().font_size())
4955    }
4956
4957    fn defer_image_browser_resize_during_divider_drag(&self) -> bool {
4958        self.dragging_divider
4959            && self
4960                .browser_session
4961                .as_ref()
4962                .is_some_and(|session| matches!(session.kind, BrowserSessionKind::Image(_)))
4963    }
4964
4965    fn defer_image_plane_render_during_divider_drag(&self) -> bool {
4966        (self.dragging_divider || self.dragging_image_workspace_divider)
4967            && self.image_raster_plane_active()
4968    }
4969
4970    fn defer_image_spectrum_render_during_divider_drag(&self) -> bool {
4971        (self.dragging_divider || self.dragging_image_workspace_divider)
4972            && self.image_plane_has_linked_profile()
4973    }
4974
4975    pub(crate) fn active_result_content(&self) -> ResultContent {
4976        match self.active_result_tab {
4977            ResultTab::Overview => ResultContent::Lines(self.overview_lines()),
4978            ResultTab::Data => self.data_result_content(),
4979            ResultTab::Structure => self.browser_structure_result_content(),
4980            ResultTab::Content => self.browser_content_result_content(),
4981            ResultTab::Inspector => self.browser_inspector_result_content(),
4982            ResultTab::Products => ResultContent::Lines(self.products_tab_lines()),
4983            ResultTab::Diagnostics => ResultContent::Graphic(self.plots_tab_summary()),
4984            ResultTab::History => ResultContent::Lines(self.history_tab_lines()),
4985            ResultTab::Observations => match self.current_structured_summary() {
4986                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Table(build_observations_table(summary)),
4987                None => {
4988                    ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No observation table available yet.".to_string()])
4989                }
4990            },
4991            ResultTab::Scans => match self.current_structured_summary() {
4992                Some(summary) => {
4993                    ResultContent::Table(build_scans_table(summary, self.listunfl_enabled()))
4994                }
4995                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No scan table available yet.".to_string()]),
4996            },
4997            ResultTab::Fields => match self.current_structured_summary() {
4998                Some(summary) => {
4999                    ResultContent::Table(build_fields_table(summary, self.listunfl_enabled()))
5000                }
5001                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No field table available yet.".to_string()]),
5002            },
5003            ResultTab::Spws => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5004                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Table(build_spws_table(summary)),
5005                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5006                    "No spectral-window table available yet.".to_string(),
5007                ]),
5008            },
5009            ResultTab::Sources => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5010                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Table(build_sources_table(summary)),
5011                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No source table available yet.".to_string()]),
5012            },
5013            ResultTab::Antennas => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5014                Some(summary) if self.verbose_enabled() => {
5015                    ResultContent::Table(build_antennas_table(summary))
5016                }
5017                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Lines(build_compact_antenna_lines(summary)),
5018                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No antenna table available yet.".to_string()]),
5019            },
5020            ResultTab::Plots => ResultContent::Graphic(self.plots_tab_summary()),
5021            ResultTab::Stdout => ResultContent::Lines(raw_lines("stdout", &self.result.stdout)),
5022            ResultTab::Stderr => ResultContent::Lines(raw_lines("stderr", &self.result.stderr)),
5023        }
5024    }
5025
5026    fn browser_structure_result_content(&self) -> ResultContent {
5027        if !self.browser_is_active() {
5028            return ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5029                "Structure".to_string(),
5030                "This application does not expose browser structure views.".to_string(),
5031            ]);
5032        }
5033        match self.browser_active_view_result_tab() {
5034            Some(ResultTab::Structure) => ResultContent::Lines(
5035                self.browser_main_content_lines()
5036                    .unwrap_or_else(|| vec!["No structure view available yet.".to_string()]),
5037            ),
5038            Some(ResultTab::Content) => ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5039                "Structure".to_string(),
5040                format!(
5041                    "The selected browser view ({}) is content-oriented. Choose a structure view from the left pane.",
5042                    self.active_browser_tab()
5043                        .map(BrowserTab::label)
5044                        .unwrap_or("unknown")
5045                ),
5046            ]),
5047            _ => ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5048                "Structure".to_string(),
5049                "Choose a browser view from the left pane to inspect structure.".to_string(),
5050            ]),
5051        }
5052    }
5053
5054    fn browser_content_result_content(&self) -> ResultContent {
5055        if !self.browser_is_active() {
5056            return ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5057                "Content".to_string(),
5058                "This application does not expose browser content views.".to_string(),
5059            ]);
5060        }
5061        match self.browser_active_view_result_tab() {
5062            Some(ResultTab::Content) => ResultContent::Lines(
5063                self.browser_main_content_lines()
5064                    .unwrap_or_else(|| vec!["No content view available yet.".to_string()]),
5065            ),
5066            Some(ResultTab::Structure) => ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5067                "Content".to_string(),
5068                format!(
5069                    "The selected browser view ({}) is structure-oriented. Choose a content view from the left pane.",
5070                    self.active_browser_tab()
5071                        .map(BrowserTab::label)
5072                        .unwrap_or("unknown")
5073                ),
5074            ]),
5075            _ => ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5076                "Content".to_string(),
5077                "Choose a browser view from the left pane to inspect content.".to_string(),
5078            ]),
5079        }
5080    }
5081
5082    fn browser_inspector_result_content(&self) -> ResultContent {
5083        if !self.browser_is_active() {
5084            return ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5085                "Inspector".to_string(),
5086                "This application does not expose a browser inspector.".to_string(),
5087            ]);
5088        }
5089        ResultContent::Lines(self.browser_inspector_lines().unwrap_or_else(|| {
5090            vec![
5091                "Inspector".to_string(),
5092                String::new(),
5093                "No value selected.".to_string(),
5094            ]
5095        }))
5096    }
5097
5098    fn data_result_content(&self) -> ResultContent {
5099        match self.selected_summary_view {
5100            SummaryDataView::Observations => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5101                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Table(build_observations_table(summary)),
5102                None => {
5103                    ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No observation table available yet.".to_string()])
5104                }
5105            },
5106            SummaryDataView::Scans => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5107                Some(summary) => {
5108                    ResultContent::Table(build_scans_table(summary, self.listunfl_enabled()))
5109                }
5110                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No scan table available yet.".to_string()]),
5111            },
5112            SummaryDataView::Fields => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5113                Some(summary) => {
5114                    ResultContent::Table(build_fields_table(summary, self.listunfl_enabled()))
5115                }
5116                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No field table available yet.".to_string()]),
5117            },
5118            SummaryDataView::Spws => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5119                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Table(build_spws_table(summary)),
5120                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec![
5121                    "No spectral-window table available yet.".to_string(),
5122                ]),
5123            },
5124            SummaryDataView::Sources => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5125                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Table(build_sources_table(summary)),
5126                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No source table available yet.".to_string()]),
5127            },
5128            SummaryDataView::Antennas => match self.current_structured_summary() {
5129                Some(summary) if self.verbose_enabled() => {
5130                    ResultContent::Table(build_antennas_table(summary))
5131                }
5132                Some(summary) => ResultContent::Lines(build_compact_antenna_lines(summary)),
5133                None => ResultContent::Lines(vec!["No antenna table available yet.".to_string()]),
5134            },
5135        }
5136    }
5137
5138    fn history_tab_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
5139        if self.history_entries.is_empty() {
5140            return vec![
5141                "History".to_string(),
5142                "No runs have been recorded in this session yet.".to_string(),
5143            ];
5144        }
5145        let mut lines = vec!["History".to_string()];
5146        for (index, entry) in self.history_entries.iter().enumerate() {
5147            lines.push(format!(
5148                "{}. [{}] {}",
5149                entry.sequence.max(index + 1),
5150                entry.status_kind.label(),
5151                entry.title
5152            ));
5153            if let Some(stage) = entry.stage {
5154                lines.push(format!("   stage={} ({})", stage.label(), stage.key()));
5155            }
5156            lines.extend(entry.details.iter().map(|detail| format!("   {detail}")));
5157        }
5158        lines
5159    }
5160
5161    fn products_tab_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
5162        if self.app.shell_kind() != AppShellKind::Workflow {
5163            return vec![
5164                "Products".to_string(),
5165                "This application does not expose workflow products.".to_string(),
5166            ];
5167        }
5168        render_workflow_artifact_groups(
5169            &self.workflow_products_display_groups(),
5170            "No workflow products have been configured or produced yet.",
5171        )
5172    }
5173
5174    fn workflow_products_display_groups(&self) -> Vec<WorkflowArtifactGroupDisplay> {
5175        if self.app.id == "imager" {
5176            return self
5177                .current_imaging_report()
5178                .map(imaging_products_display_groups)
5179                .unwrap_or_default();
5180        }
5181        workflow_products_display_groups(
5182            &self.split_csv_field("gaintables"),
5183            self.non_empty_field_text("callib").as_deref(),
5184            &self.workflow_products,
5185        )
5186    }
5187
5188    #[cfg(test)]
5189    pub(crate) fn set_text_value(&mut self, id: &str, value: &str) {
5190        self.apply_startup_text_value(id, value.to_string())
5191            .expect("set text value in test");
5192    }
5193
5194    #[cfg(test)]
5195    pub(crate) fn set_text_value_and_apply(&mut self, id: &str, value: &str) {
5196        let field_index = self
5197            .fields
5198            .iter()
5199            .position(|field| field.schema.id == id)
5200            .expect("known test field");
5201        self.fields[field_index].set_text(value.to_string());
5202        self.apply_live_image_view_parameters_if_needed(field_index);
5203    }
5204
5205    #[cfg(test)]
5206    pub(crate) fn set_toggle_value(&mut self, id: &str, value: bool) {
5207        self.apply_startup_toggle_value(id, value)
5208            .expect("set toggle value in test");
5209    }
5210
5211    pub(crate) fn apply_startup_text_value(
5212        &mut self,
5213        id: &str,
5214        value: String,
5215    ) -> Result<(), String> {
5216        let field = self
5217            .fields
5218            .iter_mut()
5219            .find(|field| field.schema.id == id)
5220            .ok_or_else(|| format!("unknown startup field {id:?} for {}", self.app.id))?;
5221        let result = field.apply_text_value(value);
5222        if result.is_ok() {
5223            self.mark_plot_snapshot_dirty();
5224        }
5225        result
5226    }
5227
5228    pub(crate) fn apply_startup_toggle_value(
5229        &mut self,
5230        id: &str,
5231        value: bool,
5232    ) -> Result<(), String> {
5233        let field = self
5234            .fields
5235            .iter_mut()
5236            .find(|field| field.schema.id == id)
5237            .ok_or_else(|| format!("unknown startup field {id:?} for {}", self.app.id))?;
5238        let result = field.apply_toggle_value(value);
5239        if result.is_ok() {
5240            self.mark_plot_snapshot_dirty();
5241        }
5242        result
5243    }
5244
5245    pub(crate) fn start_run_on_launch(&mut self) {
5246        if self.is_msexplore_app() {
5247            self.clear_output_selection();
5248            self.activate_result_tab(self.default_plot_result_tab());
5249            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
5250            self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = true;
5251            self.result.status_line = if self.msexplore_form_has_plot_spec() {
5252                "Opening interactive msexplore preview.".to_string()
5253            } else {
5254                "Set a preset or axes to render an interactive preview.".to_string()
5255            };
5256            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
5257            return;
5258        }
5259        self.start_run();
5260    }
5261
5262    #[cfg(test)]
5263    pub(crate) fn set_active_result_tab(&mut self, tab: ResultTab) {
5264        self.activate_result_tab(tab);
5265    }
5266
5267    fn activate_result_tab(&mut self, tab: ResultTab) {
5268        self.clear_output_selection();
5269        self.active_result_tab = tab;
5270        self.ensure_current_summary_snapshot_if_needed();
5271    }

5280        self.result.stdout = stdout.to_string();
5281        self.result.stderr = stderr.to_string();
5282        self.result.status_line = "Test result".to_string();
5283        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
5284    }
5285
5286    fn plots_tab_summary(&self) -> String {
5287        if let Some(summary) = self.current_plot_summary() {
5288            return summary.to_string();
5289        }
5290        if self.plot_workspace.snapshot.is_some() {
5291            return "Select a plot from the catalog to render it.".to_string();
5292        }
5293        "Populate the plot workspace to preview plots.".to_string()
5294    }
5295
5296    #[cfg(test)]
5297    pub(crate) fn start_run_for_test(&mut self) {
5298        self.pending_run_confirmation = self.requires_run_confirmation();
5299        self.start_run();
5300    }

5303    pub(crate) fn cancel_for_test(&mut self) {
5304        self.cancel_current();

5306
5307    #[cfg(test)]
5308    fn test_idle_timeout(timeout: Duration, under_tarpaulin: bool) -> Duration {
5309        if under_tarpaulin {
5310            timeout.saturating_mul(5)
5311        } else {
5312            timeout
5313        }
5314    }
5315
5316    #[cfg(test)]
5317    fn under_tarpaulin_for_test() -> bool {
5318        std::env::var_os("TARPAULIN").is_some() || std::env::var_os("LLVM_PROFILE_FILE").is_some()
5319    }
5320
5321    #[cfg(test)]
5322    pub(crate) fn wait_for_idle_for_test(&mut self, timeout: Duration) -> bool {
5323        let timeout = Self::test_idle_timeout(timeout, Self::under_tarpaulin_for_test());
5324        let start = Instant::now();
5325        while self.running.is_some() && start.elapsed() < timeout {
5326            self.drain_execution_events();
5327            std::thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(25));
5328        }
5329        self.drain_execution_events();
5330        self.running.is_none()
5331    }
5332
5333    #[cfg(test)]
5334    pub(crate) fn is_running_for_test(&self) -> bool {
5335        self.running.is_some()
5336    }
5337

5341    }

5363    #[cfg(test)]
5364    pub(crate) fn set_calibration_report_for_test(&mut self, report: ManagedCalibrationOutput) {
5365        let history_entry = Self::calibration_history_entry(&report, self.next_history_sequence());
5366        self.record_calibration_products(&report, history_entry.sequence);
5367        self.history_entries.push(history_entry);
5368        self.result.structured = Some(StructuredResult::Calibration(Box::new(report)));
5369        self.result.structured_error = None;
5370        self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
5371        if let Some(report) = self.current_calibration_report().cloned() {
5372            self.apply_workflow_post_run_guidance(&report);
5373        } else {
5374            self.result.status_line = "Execution completed successfully.".to_string();
5375            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
5376        }
5377    }

5638    #[cfg(test)]
5639    pub(crate) fn image_spectrum_request_key_hash_for_test(
5640        &self,
5641        layout: &UiLayout,
5642    ) -> Option<u64> {
5643        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
5644        let split_ratio = self.image_workspace_split_ratio();
5645        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
5646        let overlay_profiles = image_spectrum_overlay_series(state);
5647        let font_size = state
5648            .spectrum_panel
5649            .as_ref()
5650            .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
5651            .unwrap_or_else(|| terminal_picker().font_size());
5652        self.current_image_spectrum_render_request(
5653            layout,
5654            font_size,
5655            &state.snapshot,
5656            ImageSpectrumRenderRequestOptions {
5657                overlay_profiles: &overlay_profiles,
5658                split_ratio,
5659                theme_mode,
5660                render_scale: 1.0,
5661                max_pixel_size: None,
5662            },
5663        )
5664        .map(|request| hashed_render_request_key(&request.request_key))
5665    }
5666

5733
5734    pub(crate) fn cache_output_layout(&mut self, layout: &UiLayout) {
5735        let next_result = result_text_area(layout);
5736        let next_left = left_output_area(self, layout);
5737        self.cached_browser_viewport_cells = Some((
5738            layout.result_content.width,
5739            layout.result_content.height,
5740            layout.form_inner.height,
5741        ));
5742        if self.cached_result_text_area != Some(next_result)
5743            && self
5744                .output_selection
5745                .is_some_and(|selection| selection.target == OutputPane::Result)
5746        {
5747            self.clear_output_selection();
5748        }
5749        if self.cached_left_output_area != next_left
5750            && self
5751                .output_selection
5752                .is_some_and(|selection| selection.target == OutputPane::LeftOutput)
5753        {
5754            self.clear_output_selection();
5755        }
5756        self.cached_result_text_area = Some(next_result);
5757        self.cached_left_output_area = next_left;
5758    }
5759
5760    fn browser_startup_viewport_cells(&self) -> (u16, u16, u16) {
5761        self.cached_browser_viewport_cells.unwrap_or((120, 24, 0))
5762    }
5763
5764    pub(crate) fn visible_text_buffer(
5765        &self,
5766        target: OutputPane,
5767        layout: &UiLayout,
5768    ) -> Option<VisibleTextBuffer> {
5769        let area = match target {
5770            OutputPane::Result => result_text_area(layout),
5771            OutputPane::LeftOutput => left_output_area(self, layout)?,
5772        };
5773        self.visible_text_buffer_for_area(target, area)
5774    }
5775
5776    pub(crate) fn output_selection_rect(
5777        &self,
5778        target: OutputPane,
5779    ) -> Option<(usize, usize, usize, usize)> {
5780        let selection = self.output_selection?;
5781        if selection.target != target || selection.mode != OutputSelectionMode::Dragging {
5782            return None;
5783        }
5784        Some(normalize_selection(selection))
5785    }
5786
5787    fn image_movie_scheduler_enabled(&self) -> bool {
5788        self.image_browser_session_state().is_some_and(|state| {
5789            state.movie.playing
5790                && !state.movie.terminal_looping
5791                && !state.movie.direct_overlay
5792                && state.raster_plane_active()
5793                && state.movie_available()
5794        })
5795    }
5796
5797    fn ensure_image_plane_panel_state(&mut self) {
5798        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
5799            return;
5800        };
5801        if state.panel.is_none() {
5802            state.panel = Some(new_image_plane_panel_state());
5803        }
5804    }
5805
5806    fn ensure_image_spectrum_panel_state(&mut self) {
5807        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
5808            return;
5809        };
5810        if state.spectrum_panel.is_none() {
5811            state.spectrum_panel = Some(new_image_spectrum_panel_state());
5812        }
5813    }
5814
5815    fn clear_image_movie_panel_overrides(&mut self) {
5816        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
5817            return;
5818        };
5819        if let Some(panel) = state.panel.as_mut() {
5820            panel.movie_protocol = None;
5821            panel.movie_display_key = None;
5822            panel.movie_image_size = None;
5823        }
5824        if let Some(panel) = state.spectrum_panel.as_mut() {
5825            panel.movie_protocol = None;
5826            panel.movie_display_key = None;
5827            panel.movie_image_size = None;
5828        }
5829    }
5830
5831    fn current_image_movie_scheduler_spec(
5832        &mut self,
5833        layout: &UiLayout,
5834    ) -> Option<ImageMovieSchedulerSpec> {
5835        if !self.image_movie_scheduler_enabled() {
5836            return None;
5837        }
5838        self.ensure_image_plane_panel_state();
5839        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
5840        let split_ratio = self.image_workspace_split_ratio();
5841        let spectrum_visible = {
5842            let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
5843            state.snapshot.profile.is_some()
5844                && split_ratio < 0.999
5845                && crate::ui::image_spectrum_canvas_area(layout, true, split_ratio)
5846                    .is_some_and(|area| !area.is_empty())
5847        };
5848        if spectrum_visible {
5849            self.ensure_image_spectrum_panel_state();
5850        }
5851        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
5852        let axis_state = state.selected_non_display_axis_state()?;
5853        let plane_font_size = state.panel.as_ref()?.font_size;
5854        let spectrum_font_size = if spectrum_visible {
5855            Some(state.spectrum_panel.as_ref()?.font_size)
5856        } else {
5857            None
5858        };
5859        let axis_length = axis_state.length.max(1);
5860        let session_indices = state
5861            .movie_scheduler
5862            .as_ref()
5863            .map(|scheduler| scheduler.session_indices.clone())
5864            .unwrap_or_else(|| {
5865                state
5866                    .snapshot
5867                    .non_display_axes
5868                    .iter()
5869                    .map(|axis| (axis.axis, axis.index))
5870                    .collect()
5871            });
5872        Some(ImageMovieSchedulerSpec {
5873            content_signature: image_movie_content_signature(
5874                state,
5875                layout,
5876                theme_mode,
5877                split_ratio,
5878                plane_font_size,
5879                spectrum_font_size,
5880                spectrum_visible,
5881            ),
5882            movie_axis: axis_state.axis,
5883            axis_length,
5884            next_due_index: (axis_state.index + 1) % axis_length,
5885            requested_fps: state.movie.fps,
5886            theme_mode,
5887            split_ratio,
5888            viewport: state.viewport,
5889            snapshot: state.snapshot.clone(),
5890            parameters: state.snapshot.parameters.clone(),
5891            plane_content_mode: match state.plane_mode {
5892                ImagePlaneMode::Raster => ImagePlaneContentMode::Raster,
5893                ImagePlaneMode::Spreadsheet => ImagePlaneContentMode::Spreadsheet,
5894            },
5895            show_live_reticle: state.show_live_reticle,
5896            plane_colormap: state.plane_colormap,
5897            plane_invert: state.plane_invert,
5898            pinned_probes: state.pinned_probes.clone(),
5899            plane_font_size,
5900            spectrum_font_size,
5901            spectrum_visible,
5902            session_indices,
5903        })
5904    }
5905
5906    fn build_movie_prepared_bundle(
5907        &mut self,
5908        layout: &UiLayout,
5909        spec: &ImageMovieSchedulerSpec,
5910        occurrence: MovieOccurrenceKey,
5911        snapshot: ImageBrowserSnapshot,
5912    ) -> Option<PreparedMovieBundle> {
5913        let overlay_markers =
5914            image_plane_overlay_markers_for_snapshot(&snapshot, &spec.pinned_probes);
5915        let plane_request = self.image_plane_render_request_for_snapshot(
5916            layout,
5917            spec.plane_font_size,
5918            &snapshot,
5919            ImagePlaneRenderRequestOptions {
5920                show_live_reticle: spec.show_live_reticle,
5921                colormap: spec.plane_colormap,
5922                invert: spec.plane_invert,
5923                overlay_markers: &overlay_markers,
5924                split_ratio: spec.split_ratio,
5925                theme_mode: spec.theme_mode,
5926                render_scale: 1.0,
5927                max_pixel_size: None,
5928            },
5929        )?;
5930        let overlay_profiles = image_spectrum_overlay_series_for_pinned(&spec.pinned_probes);
5931        let spectrum_request = if spec.spectrum_visible {
5932            self.current_image_spectrum_render_request(
5933                layout,
5934                spec.spectrum_font_size?,
5935                &snapshot,
5936                ImageSpectrumRenderRequestOptions {
5937                    overlay_profiles: &overlay_profiles,
5938                    split_ratio: spec.split_ratio,
5939                    theme_mode: spec.theme_mode,
5940                    render_scale: 1.0,
5941                    max_pixel_size: None,
5942                },
5943            )
5944        } else {
5945            None
5946        };
5947        let mut surface_requests = vec![ImageMovieSurfaceRequest {
5948            kind: ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Plane,
5949            request_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&plane_request.request_key),
5950            cell_size: (
5951                plane_request.request_key.area.width,
5952                plane_request.request_key.area.height,
5953            ),
5954            pixel_size: (plane_request.pixel_width, plane_request.pixel_height),
5955            payload: DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Plane(plane_request.input.clone()),
5956        }];
5957        if let Some(request) = spectrum_request.as_ref() {
5958            surface_requests.push(ImageMovieSurfaceRequest {
5959                kind: ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum,
5960                request_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&request.request_key),
5961                cell_size: (
5962                    request.request_key.area.width,
5963                    request.request_key.area.height,
5964                ),
5965                pixel_size: (request.pixel_width, request.pixel_height),
5966                payload: DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Spectrum(request.input.clone()),
5967            });
5968        }
5969        let prepared = {
5970            let state = self.image_browser_session_state_mut()?;
5971            state
5972                .direct_movie_engine
5973                .prepare_bundle(&ImageMovieBundleRequest {
5974                    occurrence: ImageMovieOccurrence {
5975                        generation: occurrence.generation,
5976                        movie_key: spec.content_signature,
5977                        axis: occurrence.movie_axis,
5978                        axis_index: occurrence.axis_index,
5979                        axis_length: spec.axis_length,
5980                    },
5981                    requested_fps: spec.requested_fps,
5982                    surfaces: surface_requests,
5983                })
5984        };
5985        let (rendered, cache_hit) =
5986            {
5987                let state = self.image_browser_session_state_mut()?;
5988                state.direct_movie_engine.render_or_get_cached(
5989                &prepared,
5990                &mut |_, pixel_size: (u32, u32), payload: &DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload| {
5991                    match payload {
5992                        DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Plane(input) => {
5993                            render_image_plane_image(pixel_size.0, pixel_size.1, input)
5994                                .map(|image| image.to_rgb8())
5995                        }
5996                        DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Spectrum(input) => {
5997                            render_image_spectrum_image(pixel_size.0, pixel_size.1, input)
5998                                .map(|image| image.to_rgb8())
5999                        }
6000                    }
6001                },
6002            )
6003            .ok()?
6004            };
6005        Some(PreparedMovieBundle {
6006            occurrence,
6007            snapshot,
6008            plane_request,
6009            spectrum_request,
6010            rendered,
6011            cache_hit,
6012        })
6013    }
6014
6015    fn apply_prepared_movie_presentation(&mut self, presentation: PreparedMoviePresentation) {
6016        let PreparedMoviePresentation {
6017            occurrence: _,
6018            snapshot,
6019            plane_request,
6020            plane_protocol,
6021            plane_image_size,
6022            spectrum_request,
6023            spectrum_protocol,
6024            spectrum_image_size,
6025        } = presentation;
6026        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
6027            return;
6028        };
6029        let Some(panel) = state.panel.as_mut() else {
6030            return;
6031        };
6032        panel.movie_protocol = Some(plane_protocol);
6033        panel.movie_display_key = Some(plane_request.request_key.clone());
6034        panel.movie_image_size = Some(plane_image_size);
6035        panel.display_key = Some(plane_request.request_key.clone());
6036        panel.pending_request_key = None;
6037        panel.last_error = None;
6038        if let Some(panel) = state.spectrum_panel.as_mut() {
6039            if let (Some(request), Some(protocol), Some(image_size)) = (
6040                spectrum_request.as_ref(),
6041                spectrum_protocol,
6042                spectrum_image_size,
6043            ) {
6044                panel.movie_protocol = Some(protocol);
6045                panel.movie_display_key = Some(request.request_key.clone());
6046                panel.movie_image_size = Some(image_size);
6047                panel.display_key = Some(request.request_key.clone());
6048                panel.pending_request_key = None;
6049                panel.last_error = None;
6050            } else {
6051                panel.movie_protocol = None;
6052                panel.movie_display_key = None;
6053                panel.movie_image_size = None;
6054            }
6055        }
6056        state.snapshot = snapshot;
6057        state.clamp_selected_non_display_axis();
6058        state.hscroll = state.hscroll.min(
6059            image_browser_max_hscroll(&state.snapshot, state.viewport.width).min(u16::MAX as usize)
6060                as u16,
6061        );
6062    }
6063
6064    pub(crate) fn prepare_graphics(&mut self, layout: &UiLayout) {
6065        if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
6066            self.ensure_plot_requested(layout);
6067        }
6068        if self.defer_image_plane_render_during_divider_drag() {
6069            return;
6070        }
6071        if self.image_movie_scheduler_enabled() {
6072            self.prepare_image_movie(layout);
6073            return;
6074        }
6075        self.ensure_image_plane_requested(layout);
6076        self.ensure_image_spectrum_requested(layout);
6077    }
6078
6079    fn prepare_image_movie(&mut self, layout: &UiLayout) {
6080        let Some(spec) = self.current_image_movie_scheduler_spec(layout) else {
6081            return;
6082        };
6083        let scheduler_context = self
6084            .image_browser_session_state()
6085            .map(|state| image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None))
6086            .unwrap_or_default();
6087        let mut invalidated = false;
6088        {
6089            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
6090                return;
6091            };
6092            let scheduler = state.movie_scheduler.get_or_insert_with(|| {
6093                ImageMovieSchedulerState::new(
6094                    spec.content_signature,
6095                    spec.movie_axis,
6096                    spec.next_due_index,
6097                    spec.requested_fps,
6098                    spec.session_indices.clone(),
6099                )
6100            });
6101            if scheduler.content_signature != spec.content_signature
6102                || scheduler.movie_axis != spec.movie_axis
6103            {
6104                scheduler.invalidate(
6105                    spec.content_signature,
6106                    spec.movie_axis,
6107                    spec.next_due_index,
6108                    spec.requested_fps,
6109                    spec.session_indices.clone(),
6110                );
6111                invalidated = true;
6112            } else {
6113                scheduler.session_indices = spec.session_indices.clone();
6114            }
6115        }
6116        if invalidated {
6117            self.clear_image_movie_panel_overrides();
6118            let pipeline = self
6119                .image_browser_session_state()
6120                .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
6121                .map(image_movie_pipeline_state);
6122            self.movie_perf.generation_invalidated(
6123                scheduler_context,
6124                "movie content changed",
6125                pipeline,
6126            );
6127        }
6128
6129        self.queue_image_movie_presentations(layout, &spec);
6130
6131        let protocol_drained = {
6132            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
6133                return;
6134            };
6135            let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut() else {
6136                return;
6137            };
6138            scheduler.protocol_pool.drain_ready(scheduler.generation)
6139        };
6140
6141        if protocol_drained.stale_count > 0 {
6142            for _ in 0..protocol_drained.stale_count {
6143                self.movie_perf.frame_dropped(
6144                    None,
6145                    scheduler_context,
6146                    MovieFrameOutcome::StaleRenderDiscarded,
6147                    "movie protocol pool discarded stale completion",
6148                );
6149            }
6150        }
6151
6152        for error in protocol_drained.errors {
6153            self.result.status_line = "Movie frame present prep failed.".into();
6154            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
6155            self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
6156        }
6157
6158        for ready in protocol_drained.ready {
6159            let presentation = ready.output;
6160            let request_hash = hashed_render_request_key(&presentation.plane_request.request_key);
6161            let (queue_depth, pipeline) = self
6162                .image_browser_session_state()
6163                .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
6164                .map(|scheduler| {
6165                    (
6166                        scheduler.protocol_pool.queue_depth(),
6167                        Some(image_movie_pipeline_state(scheduler)),
6168                    )
6169                })
6170                .unwrap_or((0, None));
6171            self.movie_perf
6172                .bundle_ready(request_hash, queue_depth, pipeline);
6173            if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut()
6174                && let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut()
6175            {
6176                scheduler
6177                    .presentations
6178                    .clear_in_flight(presentation.occurrence.axis_index);
6179                scheduler
6180                    .presentations
6181                    .mark_ready(presentation.occurrence.axis_index, presentation);
6182            }
6183        }
6184
6185        let now = Instant::now();
6186        let mut due_presentation = None;
6187        let mut deadline_miss_note = None;
6188        if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut()
6189            && let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut()
6190        {
6191            match scheduler.presentations.poll_due(
6192                now,
6193                state.movie.frame_interval,
6194                spec.axis_length,
6195            ) {
6196                ImageMoviePresentationPoll::Ready(presentation) => {
6197                    due_presentation = Some(presentation);
6198                }
6199                ImageMoviePresentationPoll::Missed { axis_index } => {
6200                    deadline_miss_note = Some(format!(
6201                        "movie occurrence {} missed deadline waiting for ready presentation",
6202                        axis_index
6203                    ));
6204                }
6205                ImageMoviePresentationPoll::NotDue => {}
6206            }
6207        }
6208        if let Some(note) = deadline_miss_note {
6209            let (queue_depth, pipeline) = self
6210                .image_browser_session_state()
6211                .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
6212                .map(|scheduler| {
6213                    (
6214                        scheduler.protocol_pool.queue_depth(),
6215                        Some(image_movie_pipeline_state(scheduler)),
6216                    )
6217                })
6218                .unwrap_or((0, None));
6219            self.movie_perf
6220                .deadline_missed(scheduler_context, note, queue_depth, pipeline);
6221        }
6222
6223        if let Some(presentation) = due_presentation {
6224            let request_hash = hashed_render_request_key(&presentation.plane_request.request_key);
6225            self.apply_prepared_movie_presentation(presentation);
6226            let pipeline = self
6227                .image_browser_session_state()
6228                .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
6229                .map(image_movie_pipeline_state);
6230            self.movie_perf.bundle_presented(request_hash, pipeline);
6231        }
6232    }
6233
6234    fn queue_image_movie_presentations(
6235        &mut self,
6236        layout: &UiLayout,
6237        spec: &ImageMovieSchedulerSpec,
6238    ) {
6239        let (render_worker_count, protocol_worker_count) = self
6240            .image_browser_session_state()
6241            .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
6242            .map(|scheduler| {
6243                (
6244                    image_movie_render_worker_count(),
6245                    scheduler.protocol_pool.worker_count(),
6246                )
6247            })
6248            .unwrap_or((
6249                image_movie_render_worker_count(),
6250                image_movie_render_worker_count(),
6251            ));
6252        let lookahead_target = image_movie_lookahead_occurrences(
6253            spec.requested_fps,
6254            spec.axis_length,
6255            render_worker_count,
6256            protocol_worker_count,
6257        );
6258        for offset in 0..lookahead_target {
6259            let (generation, axis_index) = {
6260                let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
6261                    return;
6262                };
6263                let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut() else {
6264                    return;
6265                };
6266                let axis_index = scheduler
6267                    .presentations
6268                    .next_axis_index_for_offset(offset, spec.axis_length);
6269                if scheduler.presentations.contains_ready(axis_index)
6270                    || scheduler.presentations.contains_in_flight(axis_index)
6271                {
6272                    continue;
6273                }
6274                (scheduler.generation, axis_index)
6275            };
6276            let preview_request = build_image_movie_preview_request(spec, axis_index);
6277            let preview = {
6278                let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
6279                    return;
6280                };
6281                state
6282                    .client
6283                    .request_preview(ImageBrowserCommand::PreviewOccurrence {
6284                        request: preview_request,
6285                    })
6286            };
6287            let preview = match preview {
6288                Ok(preview) => preview,
6289                Err(error) => {
6290                    self.stop_image_movie(
6291                        false,
6292                        format!("preview request failed: {}", error.message()),
6293                    );
6294                    self.report_browser_error(
6295                        "Movie preview failed.",
6296                        format!("{}\n", error.message()),
6297                    );
6298                    return;
6299                }
6300            };
6301            let occurrence = MovieOccurrenceKey {
6302                generation,
6303                movie_axis: spec.movie_axis,
6304                axis_index,
6305            };
6306            let Some(bundle) =
6307                self.build_movie_prepared_bundle(layout, spec, occurrence, *preview.snapshot)
6308            else {
6309                continue;
6310            };
6311            let request_hash = hashed_render_request_key(&bundle.plane_request.request_key);
6312            let context = self
6313                .image_browser_session_state()
6314                .map(|state| {
6315                    image_movie_perf_context_from_snapshot(
6316                        state,
6317                        &bundle.snapshot,
6318                        Some(request_hash),
6319                    )
6320                })
6321                .unwrap_or_default();
6322            let frame_seq = self.movie_perf.begin_frame(context);
6323            let backend_timing = bundle
6324                .snapshot
6325                .backend_timing
6326                .as_ref()
6327                .map(map_backend_timing);
6328            if let Some(frame_seq) = frame_seq {
6329                let (queue_depth, pipeline) = self
6330                    .image_browser_session_state()
6331                    .and_then(|state| state.movie_scheduler.as_ref())
6332                    .map(|scheduler| {
6333                        (
6334                            scheduler.protocol_pool.queue_depth(),
6335                            Some(image_movie_pipeline_state(scheduler)),
6336                        )
6337                    })
6338                    .unwrap_or((0, None));
6339                self.movie_perf
6340                    .preview_requested(frame_seq, context, queue_depth, pipeline);
6341                self.movie_perf
6342                    .preview_received(frame_seq, context, backend_timing, pipeline);
6343                self.movie_perf.bundle_render_requested(
6344                    frame_seq,
6345                    request_hash,
6346                    context,
6347                    queue_depth,
6348                    if bundle.cache_hit {
6349                        MovieFrameOutcome::CacheHitRenderedImage
6350                    } else {
6351                        map_backend_plane_outcome(bundle.snapshot.backend_timing.as_ref())
6352                    },
6353                    pipeline,
6354                );
6355            }
6356
6357            let (plane_picker, spectrum_picker) = {
6358                let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
6359                    return;
6360                };
6361                let Some(plane_panel) = state.panel.as_ref() else {
6362                    return;
6363                };
6364                (
6365                    plane_panel.picker.clone(),
6366                    if bundle.spectrum_request.is_some() {
6367                        state
6368                            .spectrum_panel
6369                            .as_ref()
6370                            .map(|panel| panel.picker.clone())
6371                    } else {
6372                        None
6373                    },
6374                )
6375            };
6376
6377            let submit_result = {
6378                let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
6379                    return;
6380                };
6381                let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut() else {
6382                    return;
6383                };
6384                scheduler.protocol_pool.submit(
6385                    generation,
6386                    hashed_movie_occurrence_key(occurrence),
6387                    MovieProtocolRenderJob {
6388                        bundle,
6389                        plane_picker,
6390                        spectrum_picker,
6391                    },
6392                )
6393            };
6394
6395            match submit_result {
6396                Ok(_) => {
6397                    if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut()
6398                        && let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut()
6399                    {
6400                        scheduler.presentations.mark_in_flight(axis_index);
6401                    }
6402                }
6403                Err(error) => {
6404                    self.movie_perf.frame_dropped(
6405                        frame_seq,
6406                        context,
6407                        MovieFrameOutcome::SkippedDueToPending,
6408                        format!("movie protocol submit failed: {error}"),
6409                    );
6410                    self.result.status_line = "Movie frame protocol prep failed.".into();
6411                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
6412                    self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
6413                    return;
6414                }
6415            }
6416        }
6417    }
6418
6419    fn visible_text_buffer_for_area(
6420        &self,
6421        target: OutputPane,
6422        area: Rect,
6423    ) -> Option<VisibleTextBuffer> {
6424        if area.width == 0 || area.height == 0 {
6425            return None;
6426        }
6427        match target {
6428            OutputPane::Result => {
6429                if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
6430                    if self.image_raster_plane_active() {
6431                        return None;
6432                    }
6433                    let lines = self.browser_main_content_lines()?;
6434                    let browser_session = self.browser_session()?;
6435                    let browser_cells = browser_session.cells_view_active();
6436                    let (image_plane_view, image_hscroll) = match &browser_session.kind {
6437                        BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) => (
6438                            state.snapshot.active_view == ImageBrowserView::Plane,
6439                            self.active_browser_hscroll() as usize,
6440                        ),
6441                        BrowserSessionKind::Table(_) => (false, 0),
6442                    };
6443                    Some(VisibleTextBuffer {
6444                        area,
6445                        lines: lines
6446                            .into_iter()
6447                            .take(area.height as usize)
6448                            .map(|line| {
6449                                if browser_cells {
6450                                    browser_cells_visible_line(&line)
6451                                } else if image_hscroll > 0 || image_plane_view {
6452                                    image_browser_visible_line(
6453                                        &line,
6454                                        image_plane_view,
6455                                        image_hscroll,
6456                                        area.width as usize,
6457                                    )
6458                                } else {
6459                                    VisibleTextLine::plain(slice_visible_text(
6460                                        &line,
6461                                        image_hscroll,
6462                                        area.width as usize,
6463                                    ))
6464                                }
6465                            })
6466                            .collect(),
6467                    })
6468                } else {
6469                    let content = self.active_result_content();
6470                    match content {
6471                        ResultContent::Lines(lines) => Some(VisibleTextBuffer {
6472                            area,
6473                            lines: lines
6474                                .iter()
6475                                .skip(self.active_result_scroll() as usize)
6476                                .take(area.height as usize)
6477                                .map(|line| {
6478                                    VisibleTextLine::plain(slice_visible_text(
6479                                        line,
6480                                        self.active_result_hscroll() as usize,
6481                                        area.width as usize,
6482                                    ))
6483                                })
6484                                .collect(),
6485                        }),
6486                        ResultContent::Table(table) => {
6487                            let mut lines = Vec::new();
6488                            lines.push(VisibleTextLine::table_header(slice_visible_text(
6489                                &table.header,
6490                                self.active_result_hscroll() as usize,
6491                                area.width as usize,
6492                            )));
6493                            let body_height = area.height.saturating_sub(1) as usize;
6494                            lines.extend(
6495                                table
6496                                    .rows
6497                                    .iter()
6498                                    .skip(self.active_result_scroll() as usize)
6499                                    .take(body_height)
6500                                    .map(|row| {
6501                                        VisibleTextLine::plain(slice_visible_text(
6502                                            row,
6503                                            self.active_result_hscroll() as usize,
6504                                            area.width as usize,
6505                                        ))
6506                                    }),
6507                            );
6508                            Some(VisibleTextBuffer { area, lines })
6509                        }
6510                        ResultContent::Graphic(_) => None,
6511                    }
6512                }
6513            }
6514            OutputPane::LeftOutput => Some(VisibleTextBuffer {
6515                area,
6516                lines: self
6517                    .browser_inspector_lines()?
6518                    .into_iter()
6519                    .take(area.height as usize)
6520                    .map(VisibleTextLine::plain)
6521                    .collect(),
6522            }),
6523        }
6524    }
6525
6526    fn clear_output_selection(&mut self) {
6527        self.output_selection = None;
6528    }
6529
6530    fn clear_output_selection_for_target(&mut self, target: OutputPane) {
6531        if self
6532            .output_selection
6533            .is_some_and(|selection| selection.target == target)
6534        {
6535            self.output_selection = None;
6536        }
6537    }
6538
6539    fn active_selected_text(&self) -> Option<String> {
6540        let selection = self.output_selection?;
6541        if selection.mode != OutputSelectionMode::Dragging {
6542            return None;
6543        }
6544        let area = match selection.target {
6545            OutputPane::Result => self.cached_result_text_area?,
6546            OutputPane::LeftOutput => self.cached_left_output_area?,
6547        };
6548        let buffer = self.visible_text_buffer_for_area(selection.target, area)?;
6549        let text = extract_selected_text(&buffer, selection);
6550        if text.is_empty() { None } else { Some(text) }
6551    }
6552
6553    fn selection_point_at(
6554        &self,
6555        column: u16,
6556        row: u16,
6557        layout: &UiLayout,
6558    ) -> Option<(OutputPane, BufferPoint)> {
6559        if let Some(buffer) = self.visible_text_buffer(OutputPane::Result, layout)
6560            && rect_contains(buffer.area, column, row)
6561        {
6562            return Some((
6563                OutputPane::Result,
6564                clamp_point_to_buffer(&buffer, column, row),
6565            ));
6566        }
6567        if let Some(buffer) = self.visible_text_buffer(OutputPane::LeftOutput, layout)
6568            && rect_contains(buffer.area, column, row)
6569        {
6570            return Some((
6571                OutputPane::LeftOutput,
6572                clamp_point_to_buffer(&buffer, column, row),
6573            ));
6574        }
6575        None
6576    }
6577
6578    fn clamped_selection_point(
6579        &self,
6580        target: OutputPane,
6581        column: u16,
6582        row: u16,
6583    ) -> Option<BufferPoint> {
6584        let area = match target {
6585            OutputPane::Result => self.cached_result_text_area?,
6586            OutputPane::LeftOutput => self.cached_left_output_area?,
6587        };
6588        let buffer = self.visible_text_buffer_for_area(target, area)?;
6589        Some(clamp_point_to_buffer(&buffer, column, row))
6590    }
6591
6592    fn begin_output_selection(&mut self, target: OutputPane, point: BufferPoint) {
6593        self.output_selection = Some(OutputSelection {
6594            target,
6595            anchor: point,
6596            cursor: point,
6597            mode: OutputSelectionMode::Pending,
6598        });
6599    }
6600
6601    fn update_output_selection(&mut self, column: u16, row: u16) -> bool {
6602        let Some(selection) = self.output_selection else {
6603            return false;
6604        };
6605        let Some(point) = self.clamped_selection_point(selection.target, column, row) else {
6606            return false;
6607        };
6608        let mode = if point == selection.anchor {
6609            selection.mode
6610        } else {
6611            OutputSelectionMode::Dragging
6612        };
6613        self.output_selection = Some(OutputSelection {
6614            cursor: point,
6615            mode,
6616            ..selection
6617        });
6618        true
6619    }
6620
6621    fn image_plane_click_target(
6622        &self,
6623        column: u16,
6624        row: u16,
6625        layout: &UiLayout,
6626    ) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
6627        let area = result_text_area(layout);
6628        if !rect_contains(area, column, row) {
6629            return None;
6630        }
6631        let BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) = &self.browser_session()?.kind else {
6632            return None;
6633        };
6634        if state.snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane {
6635            return None;
6636        }
6637        if state.raster_plane_active() {
6638            let canvas = crate::ui::image_plane_canvas_area_for_browser(
6639                layout,
6640                state.spectrum_workspace_visible(),
6641                self.image_workspace_split_ratio(),
6642            );
6643            return image_raster_click_target(state, column, row, canvas);
6644        }
6645
6646        let relative_row = usize::from(row.saturating_sub(area.y));
6647        if relative_row == 0 {
6648            return None;
6649        }
6650        let line = state.snapshot.content_lines.get(relative_row)?;
6651        let pipe_index = line.find('|')?;
6652        let pixel_y = line[..pipe_index].trim().parse::<usize>().ok()?;
6653
6654        let absolute_col =
6655            self.active_browser_hscroll() as usize + usize::from(column.saturating_sub(area.x));
6656        let after_pipe = absolute_col.checked_sub(pipe_index + 1)?;
6657        if after_pipe == 0 {
6658            return None;
6659        }
6660
6661        let chunk_offset = after_pipe - 1;
6662        let stride = IMAGE_PLANE_CELL_WIDTH + 1;
6663        let offset_in_chunk = chunk_offset % stride;
6664        if offset_in_chunk >= IMAGE_PLANE_CELL_WIDTH {
6665            return None;
6666        }
6667
6668        let column = chunk_offset / stride;
6669        let max_x = image_plane_column_count(&state.snapshot)?;
6670        if column >= max_x {
6671            return None;
6672        }
6673        let pixel_x = image_plane_header_pixel(&state.snapshot, column)?;
6674
6675        Some((pixel_x, pixel_y))
6676    }
6677
6678    fn image_workspace_divider_toggle_hit(&self, column: u16, row: u16, layout: &UiLayout) -> bool {
6679        let Some(session) = self.browser_session() else {
6680            return false;
6681        };
6682        let BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) = &session.kind else {
6683            return false;
6684        };
6685        if !state.spectrum_workspace_visible() {
6686            return false;
6687        }
6688        crate::ui::image_workspace_divider_toggle_area(
6689            layout,
6690            true,
6691            self.image_workspace_split_ratio(),
6692        )
6693        .is_some_and(|rect| rect_contains(rect, column, row))
6694    }
6695
6696    fn image_workspace_divider_hit(&self, column: u16, row: u16, layout: &UiLayout) -> bool {
6697        let Some(session) = self.browser_session() else {
6698            return false;
6699        };
6700        let BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) = &session.kind else {
6701            return false;
6702        };
6703        if !state.spectrum_workspace_visible() {
6704            return false;
6705        }
6706        crate::ui::image_workspace_divider_area(layout, true, self.image_workspace_split_ratio())
6707            .is_some_and(|rect| rect_contains(rect, column, row))
6708    }
6709
6710    fn image_workspace_split_ratio_from_mouse(&self, row: u16, layout: &UiLayout) -> Option<f32> {
6711        let BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) = &self.browser_session()?.kind else {
6712            return None;
6713        };
6714        if !state.spectrum_workspace_visible() {
6715            return None;
6716        }
6717        let area = layout.result_content;
6718        if area.height < 4 {
6719            return None;
6720        }
6721        let available_canvas = area.height.saturating_sub(3);
6722        if available_canvas < 3 {
6723            return None;
6724        }
6725        let plane_canvas_height = row.saturating_sub(area.y.saturating_add(2));
6726        if plane_canvas_height >= available_canvas.saturating_sub(1) {
6727            return Some(1.0);
6728        }
6729        Some(f32::from(plane_canvas_height) / f32::from(available_canvas.max(1)))
6730    }
6731
6732    fn image_raster_plane_canvas_hit(&self, column: u16, row: u16, layout: &UiLayout) -> bool {
6733        let Some(session) = self.browser_session() else {
6734            return false;
6735        };
6736        let BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) = &session.kind else {
6737            return false;
6738        };
6739        if !state.raster_plane_active() {
6740            return false;
6741        }
6742        let canvas = crate::ui::image_plane_canvas_area_for_browser(
6743            layout,
6744            state.spectrum_workspace_visible(),
6745            self.image_workspace_split_ratio(),
6746        );
6747        rect_contains(canvas, column, row)
6748    }
6749
6750    fn image_spectrum_click_target(
6751        &self,
6752        column: u16,
6753        row: u16,
6754        layout: &UiLayout,
6755    ) -> Option<(usize, i32)> {
6756        let BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) = &self.browser_session()?.kind else {
6757            return None;
6758        };
6759        if !state.spectrum_workspace_visible() {
6760            return None;
6761        }
6762        let spectrum_area = crate::ui::image_spectrum_canvas_area(
6763            layout,
6764            state.spectrum_workspace_visible(),
6765            self.image_workspace_split_ratio(),
6766        )?;
6767        let plot_rect = image_spectrum_plot_rect(
6768            spectrum_area,
6769            state
6770                .spectrum_panel
6771                .as_ref()
6772                .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
6773                .unwrap_or((1, 1)),
6774        )?;
6775        if !rect_contains(plot_rect, column, row) {
6776            return None;
6777        }
6778        let profile = state.snapshot.profile.as_ref()?;
6779        let axis_state = state
6780            .snapshot
6781            .non_display_axes
6782            .iter()
6783            .find(|axis| axis.axis == profile.axis)
6784            .or_else(|| state.selected_non_display_axis_state())?;
6785        if profile.samples.is_empty() {
6786            return None;
6787        }
6788        let relative_x = usize::from(column.saturating_sub(plot_rect.x));
6789        let target_index = image_click_sample_index(
6790            relative_x,
6791            usize::from(plot_rect.width.max(1)),
6792            profile.samples.len(),
6793        );
6794        let delta = target_index as i32 - axis_state.index as i32;
6795        Some((axis_state.axis, delta))
6796    }
6797
6798    fn finalize_output_selection(&mut self) {
6799        let Some(selection) = self.output_selection else {
6800            return;
6801        };
6802        if selection.mode == OutputSelectionMode::Pending {
6803            self.output_selection = None;
6804            return;
6805        }
6806        if let Some(text) = self.active_selected_text() {
6807            self.copy_text_to_clipboard(text, "selection");
6808        }
6809    }
6810
6811    fn apply_parameter_action(&mut self, action: ParameterAction) {
6812        match action {
6813            ParameterAction::SelectPrevious => self.select_previous_form_item(),
6814            ParameterAction::SelectNext => self.select_next_form_item(),
6815            ParameterAction::ChoicePrevious => self.adjust_selected_choice(false),
6816            ParameterAction::ChoiceNext => self.adjust_selected_choice(true),
6817            ParameterAction::Activate => self.activate_selected_form_item(),
6818            ParameterAction::PromoteWorkflowProduct => self.promote_selected_workflow_product(),
6819            ParameterAction::Delete => self.delete_selected_parameter_item(),
6820            ParameterAction::MoveUp => self.move_selected_workflow_chain_entry(false),
6821            ParameterAction::MoveDown => self.move_selected_workflow_chain_entry(true),
6822        }
6823    }
6824
6825    fn delete_selected_parameter_item(&mut self) {
6826        if let FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index) = self.selected_form {
6827            self.remove_workflow_chain_entry(index);
6828        }
6829    }
6830
6831    fn apply_path_chooser_action(&mut self, action: PathChooserAction) {
6832        match action {
6833            PathChooserAction::Cancel => self.cancel_path_chooser(),
6834            PathChooserAction::Confirm => self.confirm_path_chooser(),
6835            PathChooserAction::SelectCurrent => self.select_current_path_chooser_entry(),
6836            PathChooserAction::Navigate(input) => self.apply_path_chooser_input(input),
6837        }
6838    }
6839
6840    fn handle_choice_picker_key(&mut self, key_event: KeyEvent) {
6841        if key_event.kind != KeyEventKind::Press {
6842            return;
6843        }
6844        match key_event.code {
6845            KeyCode::Esc if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => self.cancel_choice_picker(),
6846            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
6847                self.commit_choice_picker();
6848            }
6849            KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k')
6850                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
6851            {
6852                self.cycle_choice_picker(false);
6853            }
6854            KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j')
6855                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
6856            {
6857                self.cycle_choice_picker(true);
6858            }
6859            KeyCode::Left | KeyCode::Char('h')
6860                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
6861            {
6862                self.cycle_choice_picker(false);
6863            }
6864            KeyCode::Right | KeyCode::Char('l')
6865                if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
6866            {
6867                self.cycle_choice_picker(true);
6868            }
6869            KeyCode::Backspace if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
6870                self.delete_choice_picker_filter_backward();
6871            }
6872            KeyCode::Char(ch) if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
6873                self.extend_choice_picker_filter(ch);
6874            }
6875            _ => {}
6876        }
6877    }
6878
6879    fn handle_choice_picker_mouse(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout) {
6880        let anchor = layout
6881            .form_rows
