6882            .iter()
6883            .find(|row| Some(row.target) == self.choice_picker_anchor_target())
6884            .map(|row| row.rect);
6885        let item_count = self
6886            .choice_picker_entries()
6887            .map(|entries| entries.len())
6888            .unwrap_or_default();
6889        let area = crate::ui::choice_picker_area(anchor, layout.form_block, item_count);
6890        let list_area = crate::ui::choice_picker_list_area(area);
6891        match mouse_event.kind {
6892            MouseEventKind::Down(MouseButton::Left) => {
6893                if !rect_contains(area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
6894                    self.cancel_choice_picker();
6895                    return;
6896                }
6897                if !rect_contains(list_area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
6898                    return;
6899                }
6900                let Some(row_offset) =
6901                    popup_index_at(list_area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, item_count)
6902                else {
6903                    return;
6904                };
6905                if let Some(picker) = self.choice_picker.as_mut() {
6906                    picker.selected_filtered_index = row_offset;
6907                }
6908                self.commit_choice_picker();
6909            }
6910            MouseEventKind::ScrollUp
6911                if rect_contains(area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) =>
6912            {
6913                self.cycle_choice_picker(false);
6914            }
6915            MouseEventKind::ScrollDown
6916                if rect_contains(area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) =>
6917            {
6918                self.cycle_choice_picker(true);
6919            }
6920            _ => {}
6921        }
6922    }
6923
6924    fn handle_path_chooser_mouse(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout) {
6925        let area = crate::ui::path_chooser_area(layout.body);
6926        let list_area = crate::ui::path_chooser_list_area(area);
6927        match mouse_event.kind {
6928            MouseEventKind::Down(MouseButton::Left) => {
6929                if !rect_contains(area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
6930                    self.cancel_path_chooser();
6931                    return;
6932                }
6933                if !rect_contains(list_area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
6934                    return;
6935                }
6936                let Some(chooser) = self.path_chooser.as_mut() else {
6937                    return;
6938                };
6939                if chooser.explorer.files().is_empty() {
6940                    return;
6941                }
6942                let visible_height = list_area.height as usize;
6943                let row_offset = mouse_event.row.saturating_sub(list_area.y) as usize;
6944                let visible_start = chooser_visible_start(
6945                    chooser.explorer.selected_idx(),
6946                    chooser.explorer.files().len(),
6947                    visible_height,
6948                );
6949                let index = (visible_start + row_offset).min(chooser.explorer.files().len() - 1);
6950                chooser.explorer.set_selected_idx(index);
6951                let click_target = ClickTarget::PathChooserEntry(index);
6952                let double_click = self.last_click.is_some_and(|last| {
6953                    last.target == click_target && last.at.elapsed() <= DOUBLE_CLICK_WINDOW
6954                });
6955                self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
6956                    target: click_target,
6957                    at: Instant::now(),
6958                });
6959                let double_click_target = if double_click {
6960                    Some((
6961                        chooser.target,
6962                        chooser.explorer.current().path.clone(),
6963                        chooser.explorer.current().is_dir,
6964                    ))
6965                } else {
6966                    None
6967                };
6968                let _ = chooser;
6969                if let Some((target, path, is_dir)) = double_click_target {
6970                    if is_dir {
6971                        self.apply_path_chooser_input(ExplorerInput::Right);
6972                    } else {
6973                        self.select_path_chooser_path(target, &path);
6974                    }
6975                }
6976            }
6977            MouseEventKind::ScrollUp
6978                if rect_contains(area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) =>
6979            {
6980                self.apply_path_chooser_input(ExplorerInput::Up);
6981            }
6982            MouseEventKind::ScrollDown
6983                if rect_contains(area, mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) =>
6984            {
6985                self.apply_path_chooser_input(ExplorerInput::Down);
6986            }
6987            _ => {}
6988        }
6989    }
6990
6991    fn apply_result_action(&mut self, action: ResultAction) {
6992        if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
6993            match action {
6994                ResultAction::PreviousTab => {
6995                    self.cycle_visible_result_tab(false);
6996                }
6997                ResultAction::NextTab => {
6998                    self.cycle_visible_result_tab(true);
6999                }
7000                ResultAction::Scroll(delta) => self.scroll_active_plot_workspace(delta),
7001                ResultAction::ScrollHorizontal(_) => {}
7002                ResultAction::Activate => self.activate_plot_workspace_selection(),
7003            }
7004            return;
7005        }
7006        match action {
7007            ResultAction::PreviousTab => self.cycle_visible_result_tab(false),
7008            ResultAction::NextTab => self.cycle_visible_result_tab(true),
7009            ResultAction::Scroll(delta) => self.scroll_active_result(delta),
7010            ResultAction::ScrollHorizontal(delta) => self.scroll_active_result_horizontal(delta),
7011            ResultAction::Activate => {}
7012        }
7013    }
7014
7015    fn apply_browser_action(&mut self, action: BrowserAction) {
7016        match action {
7017            BrowserAction::CycleView { forward } => {
7018                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::CycleView { forward });
7019            }
7020            BrowserAction::TogglePlaneMode => self.toggle_image_plane_mode(),
7021            BrowserAction::ToggleSpectrumPane => self.toggle_image_spectrum_pane(),
7022            BrowserAction::ToggleMovie => self.toggle_image_movie(),
7023            BrowserAction::ZoomIn => self.zoom_image_view(true),
7024            BrowserAction::ZoomOut => self.zoom_image_view(false),
7025            BrowserAction::ResetViewWindow => self.reset_image_view_window(),
7026            BrowserAction::PanLeft => self.pan_image_view(-1, 0),
7027            BrowserAction::PanRight => self.pan_image_view(1, 0),
7028            BrowserAction::PanUp => self.pan_image_view(0, -1),
7029            BrowserAction::PanDown => self.pan_image_view(0, 1),
7030            BrowserAction::CycleColormap => self.cycle_image_plane_colormap(),
7031            BrowserAction::ToggleInvert => self.toggle_image_plane_invert(),
7032            BrowserAction::StartRegionShape => self.start_image_region_shape(),
7033            BrowserAction::ClearRegion => self.clear_image_region(),
7034            BrowserAction::SaveRegionDefinition => self.save_image_region_definition(),
7035            BrowserAction::LoadNextRegionDefinition => self.load_next_image_region_definition(),
7036            BrowserAction::RenameRegionDefinition => {
7037                if self
7038                    .image_browser_session_state()
7039                    .is_some_and(|state| state.left_pane_mode == ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Regions)
7040                {
7041                    self.rename_image_region_definition();
7042                }
7043            }
7044            BrowserAction::DeleteRegionDefinition => match self.image_browser_session_state() {
7045                Some(state) if state.left_pane_mode == ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Regions => {
7046                    self.delete_image_region_definition();
7047                }
7048                Some(state) if state.left_pane_mode == ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Masks => {
7049                    self.delete_selected_image_mask();
7050                }
7051                _ => {}
7052            },
7053            BrowserAction::WriteRegionMask => self.write_image_region_mask(),
7054            BrowserAction::PinProbe => self.pin_current_image_probe(),
7055            BrowserAction::RemovePinnedProbe => self.remove_selected_image_probe(),
7056            BrowserAction::CyclePinnedProbe { forward } => self.cycle_selected_image_probe(forward),
7057            BrowserAction::MoveLeft => {
7058                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveLeft { steps: 1 });
7059            }
7060            BrowserAction::MoveRight => {
7061                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveRight { steps: 1 });
7062            }
7063            BrowserAction::MoveUp => {
7064                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveUp { steps: 1 });
7065            }
7066            BrowserAction::MoveDown => {
7067                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveDown { steps: 1 });
7068            }
7069            BrowserAction::PageUp => self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::PageUp { pages: 1 }),
7070            BrowserAction::PageDown => {
7071                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::PageDown { pages: 1 })
7072            }
7073            BrowserAction::Activate => {
7074                if !self.close_image_region_shape() {
7075                    self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::Activate);
7076                }
7077            }
7078            BrowserAction::Back => {
7079                if !self.undo_image_region_vertex() {
7080                    self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::Back);
7081                }
7082            }
7083            BrowserAction::Escape => {
7084                if !self.cancel_image_region_shape()
7085                    && !self.clear_selected_image_probe()
7086                    && !self.toggle_image_live_reticle()
7087                {
7088                    self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::Escape);
7089                }
7090            }
7091        }
7092    }
7093
7094    fn toggle_image_plane_mode(&mut self) {
7095        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7096            return;
7097        };
7098        if state.snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane {
7099            self.result.status_line =
7100                "Plane mode toggle is only available in the Plane view.".into();
7101            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7102            return;
7103        }
7104        state.plane_mode = match state.plane_mode {
7105            ImagePlaneMode::Raster => ImagePlaneMode::Spreadsheet,
7106            ImagePlaneMode::Spreadsheet => ImagePlaneMode::Raster,
7107        };
7108        let mode_label = state.plane_mode.label();
7109        if state.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Spreadsheet {
7110            keep_image_plane_selection_visible(state);
7111        }
7112        let content_mode = match state.plane_mode {
7113            ImagePlaneMode::Raster => ImagePlaneContentMode::Raster,
7114            ImagePlaneMode::Spreadsheet => ImagePlaneContentMode::Spreadsheet,
7115        };
7116        let _ = state;
7117        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImagePlaneContentMode { mode: content_mode });
7118        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7119        self.result.status_line = format!("Plane view switched to {mode_label} mode.");
7120        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7121    }
7122
7123    fn toggle_image_movie(&mut self) {
7124        let Some(playing) = self
7125            .image_browser_session_state()
7126            .map(|state| state.movie.playing)
7127        else {
7128            crate::movie_debug_log("toggle movie ignored: no image browser session");
7129            return;
7130        };
7131        if playing {
7132            self.stop_image_movie(true, "toggle");
7133            return;
7134        }
7135        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7136            return;
7137        };
7138        if !state.movie_available() {
7139            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
7140                "toggle movie blocked: movie_available=false view={:?} plane_mode={:?} non_display_axes={}",
7141                state.snapshot.active_view,
7142                state.plane_mode,
7143                state.snapshot.non_display_axes.len()
7144            ));
7145            self.result.status_line =
7146                "Movie mode is only available for Plane views with a selected non-display axis."
7147                    .into();
7148            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7149            return;
7150        }
7151        state.movie.playing = true;
7152        state.movie.direct_overlay = false;
7153        state.movie.terminal_looping = false;
7154        state.movie.last_advanced_at = Some(Instant::now());
7155        crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
7156            "toggle movie playing={} terminal_looping={} fps={} axis_state={}",
7157            state.movie.playing,
7158            state.movie.terminal_looping,
7159            state.movie.fps,
7160            state
7161                .selected_non_display_axis_state()
7162                .map(|axis| format!(
7163                    "axis={} index={} len={}",
7164                    axis.axis, axis.index, axis.length
7165                ))
7166                .unwrap_or_else(|| "none".to_string())
7167        ));
7168        let context = image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None);
7169        let _ = state;
7170        self.result.status_line = "Movie playback started.".into();
7171        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7172        self.movie_perf.movie_started(context);
7173    }
7174
7175    fn start_image_region_shape(&mut self) {
7176        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7177            return;
7178        };
7179        if state.snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane {
7180            self.result.status_line = "Regions are only editable in the Plane view.".into();
7181            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7182            return;
7183        }
7184        if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
7185            state.show_live_reticle = false;
7186        }
7187        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StartImageRegionShape);
7188    }
7189
7190    fn close_image_region_shape(&mut self) -> bool {
7191        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7192            return false;
7193        };
7194        if !state.region_editing_active() {
7195            return false;
7196        }
7197        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::CloseImageRegionShape);
7198        true
7199    }
7200
7201    fn undo_image_region_vertex(&mut self) -> bool {
7202        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7203            return false;
7204        };
7205        if !state.region_editing_active() {
7206            return false;
7207        }
7208        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::UndoImageRegionVertex);
7209        true
7210    }
7211
7212    fn cancel_image_region_shape(&mut self) -> bool {
7213        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7214            return false;
7215        };
7216        if !state.region_editing_active() {
7217            return false;
7218        }
7219        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::CancelImageRegionShape);
7220        true
7221    }
7222
7223    fn clear_image_region(&mut self) {
7224        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7225            return;
7226        };
7227        if !state.region_active() {
7228            self.result.status_line = "No active region to clear.".into();
7229            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7230            return;
7231        }
7232        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::ClearImageRegion);
7233    }
7234
7235    fn save_image_region_definition(&mut self) {
7236        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7237            return;
7238        };
7239        if !state.region_active() {
7240            self.result.status_line = "No active region to save.".into();
7241            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7242            return;
7243        }
7244        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SaveImageRegionDefinition);
7245    }
7246
7247    fn load_next_image_region_definition(&mut self) {
7248        if self.image_browser_session_state().is_none() {
7249            return;
7250        }
7251        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::LoadNextImageRegionDefinition);
7252    }
7253
7254    fn select_image_browser_left_pane_mode(&mut self, mode: ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode) {
7255        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7256            return;
7257        };
7258        state.left_pane_mode = mode;
7259        state.clamp_left_pane_selection();
7260        self.browser_mode_picker = None;
7261        self.selected_form = FormSelection::BrowserPane(BrowserPaneSelection::Mode(mode));
7262    }
7263
7264    fn write_image_region_mask(&mut self) {
7265        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7266            return;
7267        };
7268        if !state.region_active() {
7269            self.result.status_line = "No active region to convert into a mask.".into();
7270            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7271            return;
7272        }
7273        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::WriteImageRegionMask);
7274    }
7275
7276    fn pin_current_image_probe(&mut self) {
7277        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7278            return;
7279        };
7280        if !state.pin_from_snapshot() {
7281            self.result.status_line = "No active probe available to pin yet.".into();
7282            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7283            return;
7284        }
7285        let label = state
7286            .pinned_probes
7287            .last()
7288            .map(|probe| probe.label.clone())
7289            .unwrap_or_else(|| "probe".to_string());
7290        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
7291        self.result.status_line = format!("Pinned {label}.");
7292        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7293    }
7294
7295    fn remove_selected_image_probe(&mut self) {
7296        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7297            return;
7298        };
7299        let label = state
7300            .selected_pinned_probe()
7301            .map(|probe| probe.label.clone())
7302            .unwrap_or_else(|| "probe".to_string());
7303        if !state.remove_selected_pinned_probe() {
7304            self.result.status_line = "No pinned probe is currently selected.".into();
7305            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7306            return;
7307        }
7308        state.restoring_selected_pinned_probe = false;
7309        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
7310        self.result.status_line = format!("Removed {label}.");
7311        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7312    }
7313
7314    fn clear_selected_image_probe(&mut self) -> bool {
7315        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7316            return false;
7317        };
7318        if !state.clear_selected_pinned_probe() {
7319            return false;
7320        }
7321        state.restoring_selected_pinned_probe = false;
7322        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
7323        self.result.status_line = "Returned to the live cursor.".into();
7324        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7325        true
7326    }
7327
7328    fn toggle_image_live_reticle(&mut self) -> bool {
7329        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7330            return false;
7331        };
7332        state.show_live_reticle = !state.show_live_reticle;
7333        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
7334        self.result.status_line = if state.show_live_reticle {
7335            "Live reticle shown.".into()
7336        } else {
7337            "Live reticle hidden.".into()
7338        };
7339        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7340        true
7341    }
7342
7343    fn cycle_selected_image_probe(&mut self, forward: bool) {
7344        let probe_id = {
7345            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7346                return;
7347            };
7348            if !state.cycle_selected_pinned_probe(forward) {
7349                self.result.status_line = "No pinned probes available yet.".into();
7350                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7351                return;
7352            }
7353            state.selected_pinned_probe_id
7354        };
7355        let Some(probe_id) = probe_id else {
7356            return;
7357        };
7358        self.activate_image_pinned_probe(probe_id);
7359    }
7360
7361    fn activate_image_pinned_probe(&mut self, probe_id: u64) -> bool {
7362        let target = {
7363            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7364                return false;
7365            };
7366            let Some(target) = state
7367                .pinned_probes
7368                .iter()
7369                .find(|probe| probe.id == probe_id)
7370                .cloned()
7371            else {
7372                return false;
7373            };
7374            state.selected_pinned_probe_id = Some(probe_id);
7375            state.restoring_selected_pinned_probe = true;
7376            state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
7377            target
7378        };
7379
7380        self.restore_image_browser_to_pinned_probe(&target);
7381
7382        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7383            return false;
7384        };
7385        state.restoring_selected_pinned_probe = false;
7386        state.sync_selected_pinned_probe_from_snapshot();
7387        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
7388        self.result.status_line = format!("Selected {}.", target.label);
7389        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7390        true
7391    }
7392
7393    fn restore_image_browser_to_pinned_probe(&mut self, target: &ImagePinnedProbe) {
7394        let Some((current_x, current_y)) = self
7395            .image_browser_session_state()
7396            .and_then(|state| state.snapshot.plane_cursor.as_ref())
7397            .map(|cursor| (cursor.pixel_x, cursor.pixel_y))
7398        else {
7399            return;
7400        };
7401        if (current_x, current_y) != target.plane_pixel {
7402            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageCursor {
7403                x: target.plane_pixel.0,
7404                y: target.plane_pixel.1,
7405            });
7406        }
7407        for (axis, target_index) in &target.non_display_axis_indices {
7408            let current_index = self
7409                .image_browser_session_state()
7410                .and_then(|state| {
7411                    state
7412                        .snapshot
7413                        .non_display_axes
7414                        .iter()
7415                        .find(|state_axis| state_axis.axis == *axis)
7416                        .map(|state_axis| state_axis.index)
7417                })
7418                .unwrap_or(*target_index);
7419            let delta = *target_index as i32 - current_index as i32;
7420            if delta != 0 {
7421                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis {
7422                    axis: *axis,
7423                    delta,
7424                });
7425            }
7426        }
7427    }
7428
7429    fn select_image_pinned_probe_by_pixel(&mut self, pixel: (usize, usize)) -> bool {
7430        let selected_id = self.image_browser_session_state().and_then(|state| {
7431            state
7432                .pinned_probes
7433                .iter()
7434                .rev()
7435                .find(|probe| probe.plane_pixel == pixel)
7436                .map(|probe| probe.id)
7437        });
7438        selected_id
7439            .map(|probe_id| self.activate_image_pinned_probe(probe_id))
7440            .unwrap_or(false)
7441    }
7442
7443    fn stop_image_movie(&mut self, update_status: bool, reason: impl Into<String>) {
7444        let Some(_) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
7445            return;
7446        };
7447        if !self.image_movie_active() {
7448            return;
7449        }
7450        let reason = reason.into();
7451        let mut sync_steps = Vec::new();
7452        let context = {
7453            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
7454                return;
7455            };
7456            if let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_ref() {
7457                for axis_state in &state.snapshot.non_display_axes {
7458                    if let Some((_, session_index)) = scheduler
7459                        .session_indices
7460                        .iter()
7461                        .find(|(axis, _)| *axis == axis_state.axis)
7462                    {
7463                        let delta = axis_state.index as i32 - *session_index as i32;
7464                        if delta != 0 {
7465                            sync_steps.push((axis_state.axis, delta));
7466                        }
7467                    }
7468                }
7469            }
7470            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
7471                "stop_image_movie update_status={} terminal_looping={} axis_state={} reason={}",
7472                update_status,
7473                state.movie.terminal_looping,
7474                state
7475                    .selected_non_display_axis_state()
7476                    .map(|axis| format!(
7477                        "axis={} index={} len={}",
7478                        axis.axis, axis.index, axis.length
7479                    ))
7480                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "none".to_string()),
7481                reason
7482            ));
7483            let context = image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None);
7484            state.movie.playing = false;
7485            state.movie.direct_overlay = false;
7486            state.movie.terminal_looping = false;
7487            state.movie.last_advanced_at = None;
7488            state.movie_frame_seq = None;
7489            state.movie_scheduler = None;
7490            context
7491        };
7492        self.clear_image_movie_panel_overrides();
7493        for (axis, delta) in sync_steps {
7494            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta });
7495        }
7496        if update_status {
7497            self.result.status_line = "Movie playback paused.".into();
7498            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
7499        }
7500        self.movie_perf.movie_stopped(context, reason);
7501    }
7502
7503    fn should_stop_image_movie_for_key(
7504        &self,
7505        key_event: KeyEvent,
7506        action: Option<&AppAction>,
7507    ) -> bool {
7508        !movie_stop_input_ignored_for_debug()
7509            && self.image_movie_active()
7510            && key_event.kind == KeyEventKind::Press
7511            && matches!(
7512                action,
7513                Some(action)
7514                    if !matches!(
7515                        action,
7516                        AppAction::Browser(BrowserAction::ToggleMovie)
7517                            | AppAction::Quit
7518                            | AppAction::BackToLauncher
7519                    )
7520            )
7521    }
7522
7523    fn should_stop_image_movie_for_mouse(&self, mouse_event: MouseEvent) -> bool {
7524        !movie_stop_input_ignored_for_debug()
7525            && self.image_movie_active()
7526            && matches!(
7527                mouse_event.kind,
7528                MouseEventKind::Down(_)
7529                    | MouseEventKind::Drag(_)
7530                    | MouseEventKind::ScrollUp
7531                    | MouseEventKind::ScrollDown
7532                    | MouseEventKind::ScrollLeft
7533                    | MouseEventKind::ScrollRight
7534            )
7535    }
7536
7537    fn activate_browser_tab(&mut self, tab: BrowserTab) {
7538        let Some(current) = self.active_browser_tab() else {
7539            return;
7540        };
7541        if current == tab {
7542            return;
7543        }
7544
7545        let tabs = self.browser_tabs();
7546        let current_index = tabs
7547            .iter()
7548            .position(|candidate| *candidate == current)
7549            .unwrap_or(0);
7550        let target_index = tabs
7551            .iter()
7552            .position(|candidate| *candidate == tab)
7553            .unwrap_or(0);
7554        let (steps, forward) = if target_index >= current_index {
7555            (target_index - current_index, true)
7556        } else {
7557            (current_index - target_index, false)
7558        };
7559        for _ in 0..steps {
7560            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::CycleView { forward });
7561        }
7562    }
7563
7564    fn copy_output_selection(&mut self) {
7565        let payload = self
7566            .active_selected_text()
7567            .map(|text| (text, "selection"))
7568            .or_else(|| {
7569                if self.browser_session.is_some() {
7570                    self.browser_clipboard_payload()
7571                } else if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
7572                    self.current_plot_summary()
7573                        .map(|summary| (summary, "plot summary"))
7574                } else {
7575                    None
7576                }
7577            });
7578        let Some((text, label)) = payload else {
7579            self.result.status_line = "Nothing copyable is selected.".to_string();
7580            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
7581            return;
7582        };
7583        self.copy_text_to_clipboard(text, label);
7584    }
7585
7586    fn copy_text_to_clipboard(&mut self, text: String, label: &str) {
7587        match clipboard::copy_text(&text) {
7588            Ok(()) => {
7589                self.result.status_line = format!("Copied {label} to clipboard.");
7590                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
7591            }
7592            Err(error) => {
7593                self.result.status_line = "Failed to copy to clipboard.".to_string();
7594                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
7595                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
7596            }
7597        }
7598    }
7599
7600    fn apply_edit_action(&mut self, action: EditAction) {
7601        let Some(edit_state) = self.edit_state.as_mut() else {
7602            return;
7603        };
7604        match action {
7605            EditAction::Cancel => self.edit_state = None,
7606            EditAction::Commit => {
7607                let committed = self.edit_state.take().expect("edit state");
7608                self.commit_plot_or_field_edit(committed);
7609            }
7610            EditAction::CommitAndNext => {
7611                let committed = self.edit_state.take().expect("edit state");
7612                let target = committed.target;
7613                self.commit_plot_or_field_edit(committed);
7614                self.advance_after_edit(target, true);
7615            }
7616            EditAction::CommitAndPrevious => {
7617                let committed = self.edit_state.take().expect("edit state");
7618                let target = committed.target;
7619                self.commit_plot_or_field_edit(committed);
7620                self.advance_after_edit(target, false);
7621            }
7622            EditAction::DeleteBackward => {
7623                edit_state.buffer.pop();
7624            }
7625            EditAction::Insert(character) => {
7626                edit_state.buffer.push(character);
7627            }
7628        }
7629    }
7630
7631    fn advance_after_edit(&mut self, target: EditTarget, forward: bool) {
7632        match target {
7633            EditTarget::FormField(field_index) => self.advance_form_edit(field_index, forward),
7634            EditTarget::RenameImageRegionDefinition => {}
7635        }
7636    }
7637
7638    fn advance_form_edit(&mut self, field_index: usize, forward: bool) {
7639        let targets = self
7640            .visible_form_targets()
7641            .into_iter()
7642            .filter_map(|target| match target {
7643                FormSelection::Field(index) => Some(index),
7644                FormSelection::Section(_)
7645                | FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(_)
7646                | FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction
7647                | FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(_)
7648                | FormSelection::SummaryView(_)
7649                | FormSelection::BrowserView(_)
7650                | FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(_)
7651                | FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(_)
7652                | FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(_, _)
7653                | FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(_)
7654                | FormSelection::WorkflowStage(_)
7655                | FormSelection::BrowserPane(_) => None,
7656            })
7657            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
7658        let Some(position) = targets
7659            .iter()
7660            .position(|candidate| *candidate == field_index)
7661        else {
7662            return;
7663        };
7664        let next = if forward {
7665            (position + 1) % targets.len()
7666        } else if position == 0 {
7667            targets.len() - 1
7668        } else {
7669            position - 1
7670        };
7671        let next_field = targets[next];
7672        self.selected_form = FormSelection::Field(next_field);
7673        self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
7674        if self
7675            .fields
7676            .get(next_field)
7677            .is_some_and(|field| matches!(field.value, FormValue::Text(_)))
7678        {
7679            self.enter_edit_mode(next_field);
7680        }
7681    }
7682
7683    fn handle_left_mouse_down(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout) {
7684        self.dragging_image_workspace_divider = false;
7685        self.dragging_image_cursor = false;
7686        self.dragging_image_profile = false;
7687        if layout.in_divider_toggle(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7688            self.clear_output_selection();
7689            self.dragging_divider = false;
7690            self.dragging_result_scrollbar = false;
7691            self.toggle_primary_aux_pane();
7692            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7693                target: ClickTarget::DividerToggle,
7694                at: Instant::now(),
7695            });
7696            return;
7697        }
7698
7699        if layout.in_divider(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7700            self.clear_output_selection();
7701            self.dragging_divider = true;
7702            self.dragging_result_scrollbar = false;
7703            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7704                target: ClickTarget::Divider,
7705                at: Instant::now(),
7706            });
7707            return;
7708        }
7709
7710        if layout.in_result_scrollbar(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7711            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7712            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7713            self.dragging_divider = false;
7714            self.dragging_result_scrollbar = true;
7715            self.dragging_result_hscrollbar = false;
7716            self.scroll_result_to_mouse(mouse_event.row, layout);
7717            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7718                target: ClickTarget::ResultScrollbar,
7719                at: Instant::now(),
7720            });
7721            return;
7722        }
7723
7724        if layout.in_result_hscrollbar(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7725            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7726            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7727            self.dragging_divider = false;
7728            self.dragging_result_scrollbar = false;
7729            self.dragging_result_hscrollbar = true;
7730            self.dragging_result_hscrollbar_grab =
7731                self.result_hscrollbar_grab_offset(mouse_event.column, layout);
7732            self.scroll_result_horizontally_to_mouse(mouse_event.column, layout);
7733            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7734                target: ClickTarget::ResultHorizontalScrollbar,
7735                at: Instant::now(),
7736            });
7737            return;
7738        }
7739
7740        if let Some(tab) = layout.result_tab_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7741            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7742            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7743            match tab {
7744                crate::ui::TabHitTarget::Result(tab) => self.activate_result_tab(tab),
7745                crate::ui::TabHitTarget::Browser(tab) => {
7746                    self.activate_browser_tab(tab);
7747                    self.activate_result_tab(tab.shell_result_tab());
7748                }
7749            }
7750            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7751                target: ClickTarget::ResultTabs,
7752                at: Instant::now(),
7753            });
7754            return;
7755        }
7756
7757        if self.image_workspace_divider_toggle_hit(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout) {
7758            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7759            self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
7760            self.dragging_divider = false;
7761            self.dragging_image_workspace_divider = false;
7762            self.toggle_image_spectrum_pane();
7763            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7764                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Result),
7765                at: Instant::now(),
7766            });
7767            return;
7768        }
7769
7770        if self.image_workspace_divider_hit(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout) {
7771            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7772            self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
7773            self.dragging_divider = false;
7774            self.dragging_image_workspace_divider = true;
7775            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7776                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Result),
7777                at: Instant::now(),
7778            });
7779            return;
7780        }
7781
7782        if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
7783            if let Some(row) = layout.plot_catalog_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7784                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7785                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7786                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Catalog;
7787                self.apply_plot_catalog_target(row.target);
7788                self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7789                    target: ClickTarget::PlotCatalog(row.target),
7790                    at: Instant::now(),
7791                });
7792                return;
7793            }
7794
7795            if let Some(target) = layout.plot_control_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7796                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7797                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7798                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Controls;
7799                if let Some(index) = self
7800                    .plot_control_rows()
7801                    .iter()
7802                    .position(|row| row.target == target)
7803                {
7804                    self.plot_workspace.selected_control = index;
7805                }
7806                self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7807                    target: ClickTarget::PlotControl(target),
7808                    at: Instant::now(),
7809                });
7810                match target {
7811                    PlotControlTarget::Refresh
7812                    | PlotControlTarget::CopyCli
7813                    | PlotControlTarget::ExportPng
7814                    | PlotControlTarget::ExportPdf => self.activate_plot_workspace_selection(),
7815                }
7816                return;
7817            }
7818
7819            if layout.in_plot_canvas(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7820                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7821                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7822                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Canvas;
7823                self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7824                    target: ClickTarget::PlotCanvas,
7825                    at: Instant::now(),
7826                });
7827                return;
7828            }
7829        }
7830
7831        if let Some((x, y)) =
7832            self.image_plane_click_target(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout)
7833        {
7834            self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
7835            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7836            self.dragging_image_cursor = self
7837                .image_browser_session_state()
7838                .is_some_and(|state| !state.region_editing_active());
7839            if self.select_image_pinned_probe_by_pixel((x, y)) {
7840                self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7841                    target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Result),
7842                    at: Instant::now(),
7843                });
7844                return;
7845            }
7846            if self
7847                .image_browser_session_state()
7848                .is_some_and(|state| state.region_editing_active())
7849            {
7850                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::AppendImageRegionVertex { x, y });
7851            } else {
7852                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageCursor { x, y });
7853            }
7854            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7855                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Result),
7856                at: Instant::now(),
7857            });
7858            return;
7859        }
7860
7861        if let Some((axis, delta)) =
7862            self.image_spectrum_click_target(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout)
7863        {
7864            self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
7865            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7866            self.dragging_image_profile = true;
7867            if delta != 0 {
7868                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta });
7869            }
7870            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7871                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Result),
7872                at: Instant::now(),
7873            });
7874            return;
7875        }
7876
7877        if let Some((target, point)) =
7878            self.selection_point_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout)
7879        {
7880            if self.browser_session.is_some() {
7881                match target {
7882                    OutputPane::Result => self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain),
7883                    OutputPane::LeftOutput => self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserInspector),
7884                }
7885            } else {
7886                self.pane_focus = if target == OutputPane::Result {
7887                    PaneFocus::Result
7888                } else {
7889                    PaneFocus::Parameters
7890                };
7891            }
7892            self.begin_output_selection(target, point);
7893            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7894                target: ClickTarget::Pane(self.pane_focus),
7895                at: Instant::now(),
7896            });
7897            return;
7898        }
7899
7900        if layout.in_result_block(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7901            if self.browser_session.is_some() {
7902                self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
7903            } else {
7904                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
7905            }
7906            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
7907            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7908                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Result),
7909                at: Instant::now(),
7910            });
7911            return;
7912        }
7913
7914        if layout.in_browser_mode_selector(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7915            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
7916            self.open_browser_mode_picker();
7917            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7918                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Parameters),
7919                at: Instant::now(),
7920            });
7921            return;
7922        }
7923
7924        if let Some(target) = layout.form_target_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
7925            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
7926            let click_target = match target {
7927                FormSelection::Section(index) => ClickTarget::Section(index),
7928                FormSelection::Field(index) => ClickTarget::Field(index),
7929                FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind) => {
7930                    ClickTarget::WorkflowContextSetting(kind)
7931                }
7932                FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind) => {
7933                    ClickTarget::WorkflowProductAction(kind)
7934                }
7935                FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index) => ClickTarget::WorkflowChainEntry(index),
7936                FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind) => {
7937                    ClickTarget::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind)
7938                }
7939                FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index) => ClickTarget::WorkflowProduct(index),
7940                FormSelection::SummaryView(_)
7941                | FormSelection::BrowserView(_)
7942                | FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(_)
7943                | FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction
7944                | FormSelection::WorkflowStage(_) => ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Parameters),
7945                FormSelection::BrowserPane(_) => ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Parameters),
7946            };
7947            let double_click = self.last_click.is_some_and(|last| {
7948                last.target == click_target && last.at.elapsed() <= DOUBLE_CLICK_WINDOW
7949            });
7950
7951            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
7952                target: click_target,
7953                at: Instant::now(),
7954            });
7955
7956            match target {
7957                FormSelection::Section(section_index) => {
7958                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::Section(section_index);
7959                    self.toggle_section(section_index);
7960                }
7961                FormSelection::SummaryView(view) => {
7962                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::SummaryView(view);
7963                    self.activate_selected_form_item();
7964                }
7965                FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind) => {
7966                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind);
7967                    if double_click {
7968                        self.activate_selected_form_item();
7969                    }
7970                }
7971                FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(kind) => {
7972                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(kind);
7973                }
7974                FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction => {
7975                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction;
7976                    if double_click {
7977                        self.activate_selected_form_item();
7978                    }
7979                }
7980                FormSelection::BrowserView(view) => {
7981                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::BrowserView(view);
7982                    self.activate_selected_form_item();
7983                }
7984                FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index) => {
7985                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index);
7986                    self.activate_selected_form_item();
7987                }
7988                FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind) => {
7989                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind);
7990                    self.activate_selected_form_item();
7991                }
7992                FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind) => {
7993                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind);
7994                    if double_click {
7995                        self.activate_selected_form_item();
7996                    }
7997                }
7998                FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index) => {
7999                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index);
8000                    self.activate_selected_form_item();
8001                }
8002                FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage) => {
8003                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage);
8004                    self.activate_selected_form_item();
8005                }
8006                FormSelection::Field(field_index) => {
8007                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::Field(field_index);
8008                    if self.path_field_browse_hit(field_index, mouse_event.column, layout) {
8009                        self.open_path_chooser(field_index);
8010                    } else if self
8011                        .field_picker_entries(field_index)
8012                        .is_some_and(|entries| !entries.is_empty())
8013                        && double_click
8014                    {
8015                        self.open_choice_picker(field_index);
8016                    } else if double_click {
8017                        self.enter_edit_mode(field_index);
8018                    }
8019                }
8020                FormSelection::BrowserPane(target) => {
8021                    self.selected_form = FormSelection::BrowserPane(target);
8022                    match target {
8023                        BrowserPaneSelection::SavedRegion(index) => {
8024                            if self.browser_pane_checkbox_hit(index, mouse_event.column, layout) {
8025                                self.activate_browser_pane_selection(target);
8026                            } else if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
8027                                state.left_pane_mode = ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Regions;
8028                                state.selected_saved_region_index = index;
8029                                self.rename_image_region_definition();
8030                            }
8031                        }
8032                        BrowserPaneSelection::Mask(index) => {
8033                            if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
8034                                state.left_pane_mode = ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Masks;
8035                                state.selected_mask_index = index;
8036                            }
8037                            self.activate_browser_pane_selection(target);
8038                        }
8039                        BrowserPaneSelection::Mode(mode) => {
8040                            self.selected_form =
8041                                FormSelection::BrowserPane(BrowserPaneSelection::Mode(mode));
8042                            self.open_browser_mode_picker();
8043                        }
8044                    }
8045                }
8046            }
8047            return;
8048        }
8049
8050        if layout.in_form_block(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
8051            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
8052            self.last_click = Some(ClickState {
8053                target: ClickTarget::Pane(PaneFocus::Parameters),
8054                at: Instant::now(),
8055            });
8056        }
8057    }
8058
8059    fn handle_left_mouse_drag(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout) {
8060        if self.dragging_divider {
8061            self.clear_output_selection();
8062            let relative = mouse_event
8063                .column
8064                .saturating_sub(layout.body.x)
8065                .min(layout.body.width.saturating_sub(1));
8066            let ratio = if relative <= 1 {
8067                0.0
8068            } else {
8069                f32::from(relative) / f32::from(layout.body.width.max(1))
8070            };
8071            self.config_store.set_pane_split_ratio(ratio);
8072            return;
8073        }
8074        if self.dragging_image_workspace_divider {
8075            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8076            if let Some(ratio) =
8077                self.image_workspace_split_ratio_from_mouse(mouse_event.row, layout)
8078            {
8079                self.config_store.set_image_workspace_split_ratio(ratio);
8080            }
8081            return;
8082        }
8083        if self.dragging_result_scrollbar {
8084            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8085            self.scroll_result_to_mouse(mouse_event.row, layout);
8086            return;
8087        }
8088        if self.dragging_result_hscrollbar {
8089            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8090            self.scroll_result_horizontally_to_mouse(mouse_event.column, layout);
8091            return;
8092        }
8093        if self.dragging_image_profile {
8094            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8095            if let Some((axis, delta)) =
8096                self.image_spectrum_click_target(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout)
8097                && delta != 0
8098            {
8099                self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
8100                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta });
8101            }
8102            return;
8103        }
8104        if self.dragging_image_cursor {
8105            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8106            if let Some((x, y)) =
8107                self.image_plane_click_target(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout)
8108            {
8109                self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
8110                self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageCursor { x, y });
8111            }
8112            return;
8113        }
8114        if self.update_output_selection(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
8115            self.last_click = None;
8116        }
8117    }
8118
8119    fn handle_mouse_scroll(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout, delta: i16) {
8120        if self.image_raster_plane_canvas_hit(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row, layout) {
8121            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8122            self.set_focus_target(FocusTarget::BrowserMain);
8123            if delta.is_negative() {
8124                self.zoom_image_view(true);
8125            } else {
8126                self.zoom_image_view(false);
8127            }
8128            return;
8129        }
8130
8131        if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
8132            if layout
8133                .plot_catalog_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row)
8134                .is_some()
8135            {
8136                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8137                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8138                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Catalog;
8139                self.scroll_active_plot_workspace(delta);
8140                return;
8141            }
8142            if layout
8143                .plot_control_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row)
8144                .is_some()
8145            {
8146                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8147                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8148                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Controls;
8149                self.scroll_active_plot_workspace(delta);
8150                return;
8151            }
8152            if layout.in_plot_canvas(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
8153                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8154                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8155                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Canvas;
8156                return;
8157            }
8158        }
8159
8160        if layout.in_result_block(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
8161            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8162            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8163            if self.browser_session.is_some() {
8164                self.scroll_active_browser(delta);
8165            } else {
8166                self.scroll_active_result(delta);
8167            }
8168            return;
8169        }
8170        if layout.in_form_block(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) && !self.has_active_session() {
8171            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
8172            if delta.is_negative() {
8173                for _ in 0..delta.unsigned_abs() {
8174                    self.select_previous_form_item();
8175                }
8176            } else {
8177                for _ in 0..delta as u16 {
8178                    self.select_next_form_item();
8179                }
8180            }
8181        }
8182    }
8183
8184    fn handle_mouse_hscroll(&mut self, mouse_event: MouseEvent, layout: &UiLayout, delta: i16) {
8185        if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
8186            if layout
8187                .plot_control_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row)
8188                .is_some()
8189            {
8190                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8191                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8192                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Controls;
8193                return;
8194            }
8195            if layout
8196                .plot_catalog_at(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row)
8197                .is_some()
8198            {
8199                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8200                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8201                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Catalog;
8202                return;
8203            }
8204            if layout.in_plot_canvas(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
8205                self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8206                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8207                self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Canvas;
8208                return;
8209            }
8210        }
8211
8212        if layout.in_result_block(mouse_event.column, mouse_event.row) {
8213            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8214            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8215            if self.browser_session.is_some() {
8216                self.scroll_active_browser_horizontal(delta);
8217            } else {
8218                self.scroll_active_result_horizontal(delta);
8219            }
8220        }
8221    }
8222
8223    fn toggle_theme(&mut self) {
8224        let next = self.theme_mode().toggle();
8225        self.config_store.set_theme_mode(next);
8226    }
8227
8228    fn toggle_advanced(&mut self) {
8229        self.show_advanced = !self.show_advanced;
8230        self.ensure_visible_form_selection();
8231    }
8232
8233    fn visible_form_targets(&self) -> Vec<FormSelection> {
8234        self.form_rows().into_iter().map(|row| row.target).collect()
8235    }
8236
8237    fn select_previous_form_item(&mut self) {
8238        let visible = self.visible_form_targets();
8239        if visible.is_empty() {
8240            return;
8241        }
8242        let position = visible
8243            .iter()
8244            .position(|target| *target == self.selected_form)
8245            .unwrap_or(0);
8246        let next = if position == 0 {
8247            visible.len() - 1
8248        } else {
8249            position - 1
8250        };
8251        self.selected_form = visible[next];
8252    }
8253
8254    fn select_next_form_item(&mut self) {
8255        let visible = self.visible_form_targets();
8256        if visible.is_empty() {
8257            return;
8258        }
8259        let position = visible
8260            .iter()
8261            .position(|target| *target == self.selected_form)
8262            .unwrap_or(0);
8263        self.selected_form = visible[(position + 1) % visible.len()];
8264    }
8265
8266    fn activate_selected_form_item(&mut self) {
8267        match self.selected_form {
8268            FormSelection::Section(section_index) => self.toggle_section(section_index),
8269            FormSelection::SummaryView(view) => {
8270                self.selected_summary_view = view;
8271                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Data);
8272            }
8273            FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind) => {
8274                self.activate_workflow_context_setting(kind)
8275            }
8276            FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(_) => {}
8277            FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction => self.start_run(),
8278            FormSelection::BrowserView(view) => {
8279                self.activate_browser_tab(view);
8280                self.activate_result_tab(view.shell_result_tab());
8281                self.result.status_line = format!("Browser view selected: {}.", view.label());
8282                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
8283            }
8284            FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index) => self.select_workflow_chain_entry(index),
8285            FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind) => {
8286                self.activate_workflow_product_action(kind)
8287            }
8288            FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind) => {
8289                self.activate_workflow_chain_setting(entry, kind)
8290            }
8291            FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index) => self.select_workflow_product(index),
8292            FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage) => {
8293                self.set_current_workflow_stage(stage);
8294                self.result.status_line = format!(
8295                    "Workflow stage selected: {}. {}",
8296                    stage.label(),
8297                    workflow_stage_hint(stage)
8298                );
8299                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
8300            }
8301            FormSelection::Field(field_index) => {
8302                let Some(field) = self.fields.get(field_index) else {
8303                    return;
8304                };
8305                if self
8306                    .field_picker_entries(field_index)
8307                    .is_some_and(|entries| !entries.is_empty())
8308                {
8309                    self.open_choice_picker(field_index);
8310                    return;
8311                }
8312                match &field.value {
8313                    FormValue::Text(_) => self.enter_edit_mode(field_index),
8314                    FormValue::Toggle(_) => self.toggle_field(field_index),
8315                    FormValue::Choice { .. } => self.cycle_field_choice(field_index, true),
8316                }
8317            }
8318            FormSelection::BrowserPane(target) => self.activate_browser_pane_selection(target),
8319        }
8320    }
8321
8322    fn toggle_section(&mut self, section_index: usize) {
8323        let Some(section) = self.sections.get_mut(section_index) else {
8324            return;
8325        };
8326        section.collapsed = !section.collapsed;
8327        self.selected_form = FormSelection::Section(section_index);
8328        self.ensure_visible_form_selection();
8329    }
8330
8331    fn enter_edit_mode(&mut self, field_index: usize) {
8332        let Some(field) = self.fields.get(field_index) else {
8333            return;
8334        };
8335        if let FormValue::Text(value) = &field.value {
8336            self.edit_state = Some(EditState {
8337                target: EditTarget::FormField(field_index),
8338                buffer: value.clone(),
8339            });
8340        }
8341    }
8342
8343    fn toggle_field(&mut self, field_index: usize) {
8344        if let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(field_index) {
8345            field.toggle();
8346        }
8347        self.sync_result_tab_visibility();
8348    }
8349
8350    fn cycle_field_choice(&mut self, field_index: usize, forward: bool) {
8351        if let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(field_index) {
8352            field.cycle_choice(forward);
8353        }
8354        self.apply_live_image_view_parameters_if_needed(field_index);
8355    }
8356
8357    fn adjust_selected_choice(&mut self, forward: bool) {
8358        match self.selected_form {
8359            FormSelection::Field(field_index) => {
8360                if self
8361                    .field_picker_entries(field_index)
8362                    .is_some_and(|entries| !entries.is_empty())
8363                {
8364                    self.open_choice_picker(field_index);
8365                } else {
8366                    self.cycle_field_choice(field_index, forward);
8367                }
8368            }
8369            FormSelection::SummaryView(view) => {
8370                self.selected_summary_view = view.cycle(forward);
8371                self.selected_form = FormSelection::SummaryView(self.selected_summary_view);
8372                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Data);
8373            }
8374            FormSelection::BrowserView(view) => {
8375                let tabs = self.browser_tabs();
8376                if tabs.is_empty() {
8377                    return;
8378                }
8379                let position = tabs
8380                    .iter()
8381                    .position(|candidate| *candidate == view)
8382                    .unwrap_or(0);
8383                let next = if forward {
8384                    tabs[(position + 1) % tabs.len()]
8385                } else if position == 0 {
8386                    tabs[tabs.len() - 1]
8387                } else {
8388                    tabs[position - 1]
8389                };
8390                self.selected_form = FormSelection::BrowserView(next);
8391                self.activate_browser_tab(next);
8392                self.activate_result_tab(next.shell_result_tab());
8393            }
8394            FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index) => {
8395                let entries = self.workflow_chain_entries();
8396                if entries.is_empty() {
8397                    return;
8398                }
8399                let next = if forward {
8400                    (index + 1) % entries.len()
8401                } else if index == 0 {
8402                    entries.len() - 1
8403                } else {
8404                    index - 1
8405                };
8406                self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(next);
8407                self.select_workflow_chain_entry(next);
8408            }
8409            FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind) => {
8410                self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind);
8411                match kind {
8412                    WorkflowProductActionKind::AddSolvedProduct => {
8413                        self.activate_workflow_product_action(kind);
8414                    }
8415                    WorkflowProductActionKind::ImportChainTable
8416                    | WorkflowProductActionKind::ChooseCallibrary => {}
8417                }
8418            }
8419            FormSelection::WorkflowContextSetting(kind) => {
8420                self.activate_workflow_context_setting(kind);
8421            }
8422            FormSelection::WorkflowStageGuide(_) => {}
8423            FormSelection::WorkflowStageAction => {}
8424            FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind) => match kind {
8425                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => {
8426                    self.open_workflow_chain_setting_picker(entry, kind);
8427                }
8428                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => {
8429                    self.open_workflow_chain_setting_picker(entry, kind);
8430                }
8431                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield | WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => {
8432                    self.open_workflow_chain_setting_picker(entry, kind);
8433                }
8434            },
8435            FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index) => {
8436                if self.workflow_products.is_empty() {
8437                    return;
8438                }
8439                let next = if forward {
8440                    (index + 1) % self.workflow_products.len()
8441                } else if index == 0 {
8442                    self.workflow_products.len() - 1
8443                } else {
8444                    index - 1
8445                };
8446                self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(next);
8447                self.select_workflow_product(next);
8448            }
8449            FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage) => {
8450                let next = stage.cycle(forward);
8451                self.set_current_workflow_stage(next);
8452            }
8453            FormSelection::BrowserPane(BrowserPaneSelection::Mode(_)) => {
8454                if self.browser_mode_picker.is_none() {
8455                    self.open_browser_mode_picker();
8456                } else {
8457                    self.cycle_browser_mode_picker(forward);
8458                }
8459            }
8460            FormSelection::Section(_) | FormSelection::BrowserPane(_) => {}
8461        }
8462    }
8463
8464    fn active_browser_tab(&self) -> Option<BrowserTab> {
8465        self.browser_session().map(BrowserSession::active_tab)
8466    }
8467
8468    fn browser_active_view_result_tab(&self) -> Option<ResultTab> {
8469        self.active_browser_tab().map(BrowserTab::shell_result_tab)
8470    }
8471
8472    pub(crate) fn browser_result_uses_live_navigation(&self) -> bool {
8473        matches!(
8474            self.active_result_tab,
8475            ResultTab::Structure | ResultTab::Content
8476        ) && self.browser_active_view_result_tab() == Some(self.active_result_tab)
8477    }
8478
8479    pub(crate) fn browser_result_requires_special_renderer(&self) -> bool {
8480        self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation()
8481            && self.active_result_tab == ResultTab::Content
8482            && self.image_raster_plane_active()
8483    }
8484
8485    fn sync_browser_shell_state(&mut self, force_result_tab: bool) {
8486        let Some(view) = self.active_browser_tab() else {
8487            return;
8488        };
8489        if !self.browser_uses_parameter_pane() {
8490            self.selected_form = FormSelection::BrowserView(view);
8491        }
8492        if force_result_tab
8493            || matches!(
8494                self.active_result_tab,
8495                ResultTab::Structure | ResultTab::Content
8496            )
8497        {
8498            self.active_result_tab = view.shell_result_tab();
8499        }
8500    }
8501
8502    fn toggle_primary_aux_pane(&mut self) {
8503        if (self.browser_session.is_some() && !self.browser_uses_parameter_pane())
8504            || self.sections.is_empty()
8505        {
8506            return;
8507        }
8508        self.clear_output_selection();
8509        let next = if self.parameters_pane_collapsed() {
8510            self.config_store.pane_restore_ratio()
8511        } else {
8512            0.0
8513        };
8514        self.config_store.set_pane_split_ratio(next);
8515        if next == 0.0 {
8516            self.set_focus_target(if self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
8517                FocusTarget::PlotCatalog
8518            } else {
8519                FocusTarget::ResultPane
8520            });
8521        } else if self.focus_ring().contains(&FocusTarget::ParametersPane) {
8522            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
8523        }
8524    }
8525
8526    fn toggle_image_spectrum_pane(&mut self) {
8527        if !self.image_plane_has_linked_profile() {
8528            return;
8529        }
8530        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8531        let next = if self.image_spectrum_pane_collapsed() {
8532            self.config_store.image_workspace_restore_ratio()
8533        } else {
8534            1.0
8535        };
8536        self.config_store.set_image_workspace_split_ratio(next);
8537    }
8538
8539    pub(crate) fn active_browser_scroll(&self) -> u16 {
8540        self.browser_session()
8541            .map(BrowserSession::active_scroll)
8542            .unwrap_or(0)
8543    }
8544
8545    pub(crate) fn active_browser_hscroll(&self) -> u16 {
8546        self.browser_session()
8547            .map(BrowserSession::active_hscroll)
8548            .unwrap_or(0)
8549    }
8550
8551    fn scroll_active_browser(&mut self, delta: i16) {
8552        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8553        if delta.is_negative() {
8554            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveUp {
8555                steps: delta.unsigned_abs() as usize,
8556            });
8557        } else {
8558            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveDown {
8559                steps: delta as usize,
8560            });
8561        }
8562    }
8563
8564    fn set_active_browser_scroll(&mut self, scroll: usize) {
8565        let current = self.active_browser_scroll() as usize;
8566        if scroll > current {
8567            self.scroll_active_browser((scroll - current).min(i16::MAX as usize) as i16);
8568        } else if current > scroll {
8569            self.scroll_active_browser(-((current - scroll).min(i16::MAX as usize) as i16));
8570        }
8571    }
8572
8573    fn scroll_active_browser_horizontal(&mut self, delta: i16) {
8574        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8575        if let Some(BrowserSession {
8576            kind: BrowserSessionKind::Image(state),
8577            ..
8578        }) = self.browser_session.as_mut()
8579        {
8580            if state.raster_plane_active() {
8581                return;
8582            }
8583            let max_scroll = image_browser_max_hscroll(&state.snapshot, state.viewport.width);
8584            let next = if delta.is_negative() {
8585                usize::from(state.hscroll).saturating_sub(delta.unsigned_abs() as usize)
8586            } else {
8587                usize::from(state.hscroll).saturating_add(delta as usize)
8588            };
8589            state.hscroll = next.min(max_scroll).min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16;
8590            return;
8591        }
8592        if delta.is_negative() {
8593            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveLeft {
8594                steps: delta.unsigned_abs() as usize,
8595            });
8596        } else {
8597            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::MoveRight {
8598                steps: delta as usize,
8599            });
8600        }
8601    }
8602
8603    fn set_active_browser_hscroll(&mut self, scroll: usize) {
8604        if let Some(BrowserSession {
8605            kind: BrowserSessionKind::Image(state),
8606            ..
8607        }) = self.browser_session.as_mut()
8608        {
8609            if state.raster_plane_active() {
8610                return;
8611            }
8612            let max_scroll = image_browser_max_hscroll(&state.snapshot, state.viewport.width);
8613            state.hscroll = scroll.min(max_scroll).min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16;
8614            return;
8615        }
8616        let current = self.active_browser_hscroll() as usize;
8617        if scroll > current {
8618            self.scroll_active_browser_horizontal((scroll - current).min(i16::MAX as usize) as i16);
8619        } else if current > scroll {
8620            self.scroll_active_browser_horizontal(
8621                -((current - scroll).min(i16::MAX as usize) as i16),
8622            );
8623        }
8624    }
8625
8626    fn keep_active_image_plane_selection_visible(&mut self) {
8627        if let Some(BrowserSession {
8628            kind: BrowserSessionKind::Image(state),
8629            ..
8630        }) = self.browser_session.as_mut()
8631        {
8632            keep_image_plane_selection_visible(state);
8633        }
8634    }
8635
8636    fn scroll_active_result(&mut self, delta: i16) {
8637        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8638        let scroll = &mut self.result_scrolls[self.active_result_tab.index()];
8639        if delta.is_negative() {
8640            *scroll = scroll.saturating_sub(delta.unsigned_abs());
8641        } else {
8642            *scroll = scroll.saturating_add(delta as u16);
8643        }
8644    }
8645
8646    fn set_active_result_scroll(&mut self, scroll: usize) {
8647        self.result_scrolls[self.active_result_tab.index()] = scroll.min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16;
8648    }
8649
8650    fn scroll_active_result_horizontal(&mut self, delta: i16) {
8651        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8652        let current = self.result_hscrolls[self.active_result_tab.index()] as usize;
8653        let next = if delta.is_negative() {
8654            current.saturating_sub(delta.unsigned_abs() as usize)
8655        } else {
8656            current.saturating_add(delta as usize)
8657        };
8658        self.set_active_result_hscroll(next);
8659    }
8660
8661    fn set_active_result_hscroll(&mut self, scroll: usize) {
8662        self.result_hscrolls[self.active_result_tab.index()] = scroll.min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16;
8663    }
8664
8665    fn scroll_result_to_mouse(&mut self, row: u16, layout: &UiLayout) {
