8666        let Some(track) = layout.result_scrollbar else {
8667            return;
8668        };
8669        let metrics = if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8670            self.active_browser_scroll_metrics(track.height)
8671        } else {
8672            self.active_result_scroll_metrics(track.height)
8673        };
8674        let Some((content_length, viewport_length)) = metrics else {
8675            return;
8676        };
8677        if content_length <= viewport_length || track.height == 0 {
8678            if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8679                self.set_active_browser_scroll(0);
8680            } else {
8681                self.set_active_result_scroll(0);
8682            }
8683            return;
8684        }
8685
8686        let max_scroll = content_length.saturating_sub(viewport_length);
8687        let row_offset = row
8688            .saturating_sub(track.y)
8689            .min(track.height.saturating_sub(1)) as usize;
8690        let denominator = track.height.saturating_sub(1) as usize;
8691        let scroll = (row_offset * max_scroll + denominator / 2)
8692            .checked_div(denominator)
8693            .unwrap_or(0);
8694        if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8695            self.set_active_browser_scroll(scroll);
8696        } else {
8697            self.set_active_result_scroll(scroll);
8698        }
8699    }
8700
8701    fn scroll_result_horizontally_to_mouse(&mut self, column: u16, layout: &UiLayout) {
8702        let Some(track) = layout.result_hscrollbar else {
8703            return;
8704        };
8705        let metrics = if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8706            self.active_browser_hscroll_metrics(track.width)
8707        } else {
8708            self.active_result_hscroll_metrics(track.width)
8709        };
8710        let Some((content_width, viewport_width)) = metrics else {
8711            return;
8712        };
8713        if content_width <= viewport_width || track.width == 0 {
8714            if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8715                self.set_active_browser_hscroll(0);
8716            } else {
8717                self.set_active_result_hscroll(0);
8718            }
8719            return;
8720        }
8721
8722        let max_scroll = content_width.saturating_sub(viewport_width);
8723        let thumb_length =
8724            scrollbar_thumb_length(track.width as usize, content_width, viewport_width);
8725        let max_thumb_offset = track.width as usize - thumb_length;
8726        let scroll = if max_thumb_offset == 0 {
8727            0
8728        } else {
8729            let column_offset = column.saturating_sub(track.x) as usize;
8730            let adjusted =
8731                column_offset.saturating_sub(self.dragging_result_hscrollbar_grab as usize);
8732            let thumb_offset = adjusted.min(max_thumb_offset);
8733            (thumb_offset * max_scroll + max_thumb_offset / 2) / max_thumb_offset
8734        };
8735        if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8736            self.set_active_browser_hscroll(scroll);
8737        } else {
8738            self.set_active_result_hscroll(scroll);
8739        }
8740    }
8741
8742    fn active_result_scroll_metrics(&self, viewport_height: u16) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
8743        let content = self.active_result_content();
8744        let viewport_length = match &content {
8745            ResultContent::Lines(_) => viewport_height as usize,
8746            ResultContent::Table(_) => viewport_height.saturating_sub(1) as usize,
8747            ResultContent::Graphic(_) => return None,
8748        };
8749        if viewport_length == 0 {
8750            return None;
8751        }
8752        let content_length = match content {
8753            ResultContent::Lines(lines) => lines.len(),
8754            ResultContent::Table(table) => table.rows.len(),
8755            ResultContent::Graphic(_) => return None,
8756        };
8757        Some((content_length, viewport_length))
8758    }
8759
8760    fn active_result_hscroll_metrics(&self, viewport_width: u16) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
8761        let content = self.active_result_content();
8762        let viewport_width = viewport_width as usize;
8763        if viewport_width == 0 {
8764            return None;
8765        }
8766        let content_width = match content {
8767            ResultContent::Lines(lines) => lines
8768                .iter()
8769                .map(|line| line.chars().count())
8770                .max()
8771                .unwrap_or(0),
8772            ResultContent::Table(table) => table.content_width(),
8773            ResultContent::Graphic(_) => return None,
8774        };
8775        Some((content_width, viewport_width))
8776    }
8777
8778    fn result_hscrollbar_grab_offset(&self, column: u16, layout: &UiLayout) -> u16 {
8779        let Some(track) = layout.result_hscrollbar else {
8780            return 0;
8781        };
8782        let metrics = if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8783            self.active_browser_hscroll_metrics(track.width)
8784        } else {
8785            self.active_result_hscroll_metrics(track.width)
8786        };
8787        let Some((content_width, viewport_width)) = metrics else {
8788            return 0;
8789        };
8790        if content_width <= viewport_width || track.width == 0 {
8791            return 0;
8792        }
8793
8794        let thumb_length =
8795            scrollbar_thumb_length(track.width as usize, content_width, viewport_width);
8796        let max_scroll = content_width.saturating_sub(viewport_width);
8797        let max_thumb_offset = track.width as usize - thumb_length;
8798        if max_scroll == 0 || max_thumb_offset == 0 {
8799            return 0;
8800        }
8801
8802        let active_hscroll = if self.browser_result_uses_live_navigation() {
8803            self.active_browser_hscroll()
8804        } else {
8805            self.active_result_hscroll()
8806        };
8807        let thumb_offset =
8808            (active_hscroll as usize * max_thumb_offset + max_scroll / 2) / max_scroll;
8809        let thumb_start = track.x as usize + thumb_offset;
8810        let thumb_end = thumb_start + thumb_length;
8811        let click = column as usize;
8812        if (thumb_start..thumb_end).contains(&click) {
8813            (click - thumb_start) as u16
8814        } else {
8815            (thumb_length / 2) as u16
8816        }
8817    }
8818
8819    fn cycle_visible_result_tab(&mut self, forward: bool) {
8820        self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
8821        let tabs = self.visible_result_tabs();
8822        let Some(position) = tabs.iter().position(|tab| *tab == self.active_result_tab) else {
8823            self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
8824            return;
8825        };
8826        let next = if forward {
8827            (position + 1) % tabs.len()
8828        } else if position == 0 {
8829            tabs.len() - 1
8830        } else {
8831            position - 1
8832        };
8833        self.activate_result_tab(tabs[next]);
8834    }
8835
8836    fn ensure_visible_form_selection(&mut self) {
8837        let visible = self.visible_form_targets();
8838        if visible.is_empty() {
8839            self.selected_form = FormSelection::Section(0);
8840            return;
8841        }
8842        if !visible.contains(&self.selected_form) {
8843            self.selected_form = visible[0];
8844        }
8845    }
8846
8847    fn start_run(&mut self) {
8848        self.clear_output_selection();
8849        self.choice_picker = None;
8850        self.path_chooser = None;
8851        self.commit_edit_buffer();
8852
8853        if self.schema.is_none() {
8854            self.result.status_line = "Cannot run without a loaded UI schema.".to_string();
8855            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
8856            self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Stderr;
8857            return;
8858        }
8859
8860        if self.app.is_browser_session() {
8861            self.pending_run_confirmation = false;
8862            self.start_browser_session();
8863            return;
8864        }
8865
8866        if self.app.id == "calibrate"
8867            && self.current_workflow_stage() == WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset
8868        {
8869            self.pending_run_confirmation = false;
8870            self.run_calibrate_dataset_summary_inline();
8871            return;
8872        }
8873
8874        if self.requires_run_confirmation() && !self.pending_run_confirmation {
8875            self.pending_run_confirmation = true;
8876            self.result.status_line = format!(
8877                "{} may modify data or create products. Press r again to confirm.",
8878                self.app.display_name
8879            );
8880            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
8881            self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
8882            return;
8883        }
8884        self.pending_run_confirmation = false;
8885
8886        match self.build_execution_plan() {
8887            Ok(plan) => match spawn_process(&plan) {
8888                Ok(process) => {
8889                    self.result = ResultState {
8890                        status_line: format!("Running {}...", self.app.id),
8891                        status_kind: StatusKind::Running,
8892                        file_output_path: plan.file_output_path.clone(),
8893                        ..ResultState::default()
8894                    };
8895                    self.edit_state = None;
8896                    self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8897                    self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
8898                    self.result_scrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
8899                    self.result_hscrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
8900                    self.running = Some(RunningState {
8901                        process,
8902                        renderer: plan.renderer,
8903                        file_output_path: plan.file_output_path,
8904                        cancel_requested: false,
8905                    });
8906                }
8907                Err(error) => {
8908                    self.result.status_line = format!("Failed to launch {}.", self.app.id);
8909                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
8910                    self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
8911                    self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Stderr;
8912                }
8913            },
8914            Err(error) => {
8915                self.result.status_line = "Cannot start command.".to_string();
8916                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
8917                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
8918                self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Stderr;
8919            }
8920        }
8921    }
8922
8923    fn requires_run_confirmation(&self) -> bool {
8924        matches!(
8925            self.app.id.as_str(),
8926            "calibrate"
8927                | "importvla"
8928                | "imager"
8929                | "simobserve"
8930                | "immoments"
8931                | "exportfits"
8932                | "mstransform"
8933                | "flagdata"
8934                | "flagmanager"
8935                | "impv"
8936                | "imsubimage"
8937                | "immath"
8938                | "imregrid"
8939                | "feather"
8940                | "importfits"
8941        )
8942    }
8943
8944    fn run_calibrate_dataset_summary_inline(&mut self) {
8945        let Some(ms_path) = self.non_empty_field_text("measurement_set") else {
8946            self.result.status_line =
8947                "Enter a MeasurementSet path before running dataset summary.".to_string();
8948            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
8949            self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
8950            return;
8951        };
8952
8953        self.result = ResultState::default();
8954        self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
8955        self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
8956        self.result_scrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
8957        self.result_hscrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
8958        self.ensure_current_summary_snapshot_if_needed();
8959
8960        if let Some(error) = self.result.structured_error.clone() {
8961            self.result.status_line = "Dataset summary failed.".to_string();
8962            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
8963            self.record_history_entry(
8964                Some(WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset),
8965                "Dataset Summary Failed".to_string(),
8966                StatusKind::Error,
8967                vec![format!("MS: {ms_path}"), error],
8968            );
8969            return;
8970        }
8971
8972        self.result.status_line = "MeasurementSet summary refreshed.".to_string();
8973        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
8974        self.record_history_entry(
8975            Some(WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset),
8976            "Dataset Summary".to_string(),
8977            StatusKind::Ok,
8978            vec![format!("MS: {ms_path}")],
8979        );
8980    }
8981
8982    fn start_browser_session(&mut self) {
8983        self.clear_output_selection();
8984        let Some(path_field) = self.app.browser_path_field_id() else {
8985            self.result.status_line =
8986                "Browser session is missing a startup path field.".to_string();
8987            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
8988            return;
8989        };
8990        let Some(path) = self
8991            .field_text(path_field)
8992            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
8993        else {
8994            self.result.status_line = format!(
8995                "{} is required.",
8996                self.fields
8997                    .iter()
8998                    .find(|field| field.schema.id == path_field)
8999                    .map(|field| field.schema.label.as_str())
9000                    .unwrap_or("Path")
9001            );
9002            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
9003            return;
9004        };
9005
9006        let Some(browser_kind) = self.app.browser_kind() else {
9007            self.result.status_line = "Selected app is not a browser session.".to_string();
9008            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
9009            return;
9010        };
9011
9012        match browser_kind {
9013            BrowserAppKind::Table => {
9014                let (width, height, _) = self.browser_startup_viewport_cells();
9015                let viewport = BrowserViewport::new(width, height);
9016                match self
9017                    .app
9018                    .resolve_command()
9019                    .and_then(|command| BrowserClient::spawn(&command))
9020                {
9021                    Ok(client) => match client.request_startup(BrowserCommand::OpenRoot {
9022                        path: path.clone(),
9023                        viewport,
9024                    }) {
9025                        Ok(snapshot) => {
9026                            self.result = ResultState {
9027                                status_line: snapshot.status_line.clone(),
9028                                status_kind: StatusKind::Info,
9029                                ..ResultState::default()
9030                            };
9031                            self.edit_state = None;
9032                            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
9033                            self.browser_session = Some(BrowserSession {
9034                                root_path: path,
9035                                kind: BrowserSessionKind::Table(Box::new(TableBrowserSession {
9036                                    client,
9037                                    snapshot,
9038                                    viewport,
9039                                })),
9040                            });
9041                            self.result_scrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
9042                            self.result_hscrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
9043                            self.sync_browser_shell_state(true);
9044                        }
9045                        Err(error) => {
9046                            let _ = client.cancel();
9047                            self.report_browser_error(
9048                                "Failed to open table browser.",
9049                                format!("{}\n", error.message()),
9050                            );
9051                        }
9052                    },
9053                    Err(error) => {
9054                        self.report_browser_error(
9055                            "Failed to launch table browser.",
9056                            format!("{error}\n"),
9057                        );
9058                    }
9059                }
9060            }
9061            BrowserAppKind::Image => {
9062                let (width, height, inspector_height) = self.browser_startup_viewport_cells();
9063                let font_size = self.image_plane_font_size();
9064                let startup_context = image_startup_perf_context(
9065                    width,
9066                    height,
9067                    width.saturating_mul(font_size.0.max(1)),
9068                    height.saturating_mul(font_size.1.max(1)),
9069                );
9070                let viewport = ImageBrowserViewport::with_plane_pixels(
9071                    width,
9072                    height,
9073                    inspector_height,
9074                    width.saturating_mul(font_size.0.max(1)),
9075                    height.saturating_mul(font_size.1.max(1)),
9076                );
9077                self.movie_perf
9078                    .startup_started(startup_context, format!("imexplore path={path}"));
9079                match self
9080                    .app
9081                    .resolve_command()
9082                    .and_then(|command| ImageBrowserClient::spawn(&command))
9083                {
9084                    Ok(client) => {
9085                        self.movie_perf.startup_browser_open_requested(
9086                            startup_context,
9087                            format!("open_root path={path}"),
9088                        );
9089                        match client.request_startup(ImageBrowserCommand::OpenRoot {
9090                            path: path.clone(),
9091                            viewport,
9092                            parameters: Some(self.current_image_browser_parameters()),
9093                        }) {
9094                            Ok(snapshot) => {
9095                                self.movie_perf.startup_browser_open_completed(
9096                                    startup_context,
9097                                    snapshot.backend_timing.as_ref().map(map_backend_timing),
9098                                    snapshot.active_view == ImageBrowserView::Plane
9099                                        && snapshot.profile.is_some(),
9100                                );
9101                                self.result = ResultState {
9102                                    status_line: snapshot.status_line.clone(),
9103                                    status_kind: StatusKind::Info,
9104                                    ..ResultState::default()
9105                                };
9106                                self.edit_state = None;
9107                                self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
9108                                let mut state = ImageBrowserSessionState {
9109                                    client,
9110                                    snapshot,
9111                                    viewport,
9112                                    hscroll: 0,
9113                                    left_pane_mode: ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Live,
9114                                    selected_saved_region_index: 0,
9115                                    selected_mask_index: 0,
9116                                    selected_non_display_axis: 0,
9117                                    pinned_probes: Vec::new(),
9118                                    selected_pinned_probe_id: None,
9119                                    next_pinned_probe_id: 1,
9120                                    restoring_selected_pinned_probe: false,
9121                                    show_live_reticle: true,
9122                                    plane_mode: ImagePlaneMode::Raster,
9123                                    plane_colormap: ImagePlaneColormap::Grayscale,
9124                                    plane_invert: false,
9125                                    panel: None,
9126                                    spectrum_panel: None,
9127                                    snapshot_generation: 1,
9128                                    movie: ImageMovieState::with_fps(
9129                                        self.current_image_movie_fps(),
9130                                    ),
9131                                    movie_scheduler: None,
9132                                    movie_frame_seq: None,
9133                                    direct_movie_engine: new_direct_image_movie_engine(),
9134                                };
9135                                state.clamp_left_pane_selection();
9136                                self.browser_session = Some(BrowserSession {
9137                                    root_path: path,
9138                                    kind: BrowserSessionKind::Image(Box::new(state)),
9139                                });
9140                                self.result_scrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
9141                                self.result_hscrolls = [0; RESULT_TAB_COUNT];
9142                                self.sync_browser_shell_state(true);
9143                                if let Some(parameters) = self
9144                                    .browser_session()
9145                                    .and_then(BrowserSession::image_parameters)
9146                                {
9147                                    self.sync_image_parameter_fields(&parameters);
9148                                }
9149                                self.keep_active_image_plane_selection_visible();
9150                                if std::env::var_os("CASARS_IMEXPLORE_AUTOSTART_MOVIE").is_some() {
9151                                    if let Some(fps_text) =
9152                                        std::env::var_os("CASARS_IMEXPLORE_AUTOSTART_FPS")
9153                                            .map(|value| value.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
9154                                    {
9155                                        crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
9156                                            "autostart movie fps override requested: {fps_text}"
9157                                        ));
9158                                        if let Some(field_index) = self
9159                                            .fields
9160                                            .iter()
9161                                            .position(|field| field.schema.id == "fps")
9162                                        {
9163                                            self.fields[field_index].set_text(fps_text);
9164                                            self.apply_live_image_view_parameters_if_needed(
9165                                                field_index,
9166                                            );
9167                                        }
9168                                    }
9169                                    crate::movie_debug_log(
9170                                        "autostart movie requested via CASARS_IMEXPLORE_AUTOSTART_MOVIE",
9171                                    );
9172                                    self.toggle_image_movie();
9173                                }
9174                            }
9175                            Err(error) => {
9176                                let _ = client.cancel();
9177                                self.report_browser_error(
9178                                    "Failed to open imexplore.",
9179                                    format!("{}\n", error.message()),
9180                                );
9181                            }
9182                        }
9183                    }
9184                    Err(error) => {
9185                        self.report_browser_error(
9186                            "Failed to launch imexplore.",
9187                            format!("{error}\n"),
9188                        );
9189                    }
9190                }
9191            }
9192        }
9193    }
9194
9195    fn send_browser_command(&mut self, command: BrowserRequest) {
9196        let movie_perf = &mut self.movie_perf;
9197        let mut sync_image_parameters = None::<ImageBrowserParameters>;
9198        let result = {
9199            let Some(session) = self.browser_session.as_mut() else {
9200                return;
9201            };
9202            match &mut session.kind {
9203                BrowserSessionKind::Table(state) => {
9204                    let request = match command {
9205                        BrowserRequest::Resize {
9206                            width,
9207                            height,
9208                            inspector_height,
9209                        } => Some(BrowserCommand::Resize {
9210                            viewport: BrowserViewport::with_inspector_height(
9211                                width,
9212                                height,
9213                                inspector_height,
9214                            ),
9215                        }),
9216                        BrowserRequest::SetFocus(BrowserPaneFocus::Main) => {
9217                            Some(BrowserCommand::SetFocus {
9218                                focus: BrowserFocus::Main,
9219                                viewport: None,
9220                            })
9221                        }
9222                        BrowserRequest::SetFocus(BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector) => {
9223                            Some(BrowserCommand::SetFocus {
9224                                focus: BrowserFocus::Inspector,
9225                                viewport: None,
9226                            })
9227                        }
9228                        BrowserRequest::CycleView { forward } => Some(BrowserCommand::CycleView {
9229                            forward,
9230                            viewport: None,
9231                        }),
9232                        BrowserRequest::MoveLeft { steps } => Some(BrowserCommand::MoveLeft {
9233                            steps,
9234                            viewport: None,
9235                        }),
9236                        BrowserRequest::MoveRight { steps } => Some(BrowserCommand::MoveRight {
9237                            steps,
9238                            viewport: None,
9239                        }),
9240                        BrowserRequest::MoveUp { steps } => Some(BrowserCommand::MoveUp {
9241                            steps,
9242                            viewport: None,
9243                        }),
9244                        BrowserRequest::MoveDown { steps } => Some(BrowserCommand::MoveDown {
9245                            steps,
9246                            viewport: None,
9247                        }),
9248                        BrowserRequest::PageUp { pages } => Some(BrowserCommand::PageUp {
9249                            pages,
9250                            viewport: None,
9251                        }),
9252                        BrowserRequest::PageDown { pages } => Some(BrowserCommand::PageDown {
9253                            pages,
9254                            viewport: None,
9255                        }),
9256                        BrowserRequest::Activate => {
9257                            Some(BrowserCommand::Activate { viewport: None })
9258                        }
9259                        BrowserRequest::Back => Some(BrowserCommand::Back { viewport: None }),
9260                        BrowserRequest::Escape => Some(BrowserCommand::Escape { viewport: None }),
9261                        BrowserRequest::SetImageCursor { .. }
9262                        | BrowserRequest::AppendImageRegionVertex { .. }
9263                        | BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { .. }
9264                        | BrowserRequest::StartImageRegionShape
9265                        | BrowserRequest::CloseImageRegionShape
9266                        | BrowserRequest::UndoImageRegionVertex
9267                        | BrowserRequest::CancelImageRegionShape
9268                        | BrowserRequest::ClearImageRegion
9269                        | BrowserRequest::SaveImageRegionDefinition
9270                        | BrowserRequest::LoadNextImageRegionDefinition
9271                        | BrowserRequest::LoadImageRegionDefinition { .. }
9272                        | BrowserRequest::RenameImageRegionDefinition { .. }
9273                        | BrowserRequest::DeleteImageRegionDefinition { .. }
9274                        | BrowserRequest::SetImageDefaultMask { .. }
9275                        | BrowserRequest::UnsetImageDefaultMask
9276                        | BrowserRequest::DeleteImageMask { .. }
9277                        | BrowserRequest::WriteImageRegionMask
9278                        | BrowserRequest::SetImagePlaneContentMode { .. }
9279                        | BrowserRequest::SetImageViewParameters { .. } => None,
9280                    };
9281                    let Some(request) = request else {
9282                        return;
9283                    };
9284                    match state.client.request(request) {
9285                        Ok(snapshot) => {
9286                            if let BrowserRequest::Resize {
9287                                width,
9288                                height,
9289                                inspector_height,
9290                            } = command
9291                            {
9292                                state.viewport = BrowserViewport::with_inspector_height(
9293                                    width,
9294                                    height,
9295                                    inspector_height,
9296                                );
9297                            }
9298                            state.snapshot = snapshot;
9299                            Ok(())
9300                        }
9301                        Err(error) => Err((error, state.client.stderr_text())),
9302                    }
9303                }
9304                BrowserSessionKind::Image(state) => {
9305                    let font_size = state
9306                        .panel
9307                        .as_ref()
9308                        .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
9309                        .unwrap_or_else(|| terminal_picker().font_size());
9310                    let request = match command {
9311                        BrowserRequest::Resize {
9312                            width,
9313                            height,
9314                            inspector_height,
9315                        } => Some(ImageBrowserCommand::Resize {
9316                            viewport: ImageBrowserViewport::with_plane_pixels(
9317                                width,
9318                                height,
9319                                inspector_height,
9320                                width.saturating_mul(font_size.0.max(1)),
9321                                height.saturating_mul(font_size.1.max(1)),
9322                            ),
9323                        }),
9324                        BrowserRequest::SetFocus(BrowserPaneFocus::Main) => {
9325                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SetFocus {
9326                                focus: ImageBrowserFocus::Content,
9327                            })
9328                        }
9329                        BrowserRequest::SetFocus(BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector) => {
9330                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SetFocus {
9331                                focus: ImageBrowserFocus::Inspector,
9332                            })
9333                        }
9334                        BrowserRequest::CycleView { forward } => {
9335                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::CycleView { forward })
9336                        }
9337                        BrowserRequest::MoveLeft { steps } => {
9338                            if state.snapshot.focus == ImageBrowserFocus::Inspector
9339                                && !state.snapshot.non_display_axes.is_empty()
9340                            {
9341                                state.selected_non_display_axis_state().map(|axis_state| {
9342                                    ImageBrowserCommand::StepNonDisplayAxis {
9343                                        axis: axis_state.axis,
9344                                        delta: -(steps as i32),
9345                                    }
9346                                })
9347                            } else if state.snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane {
9348                                state.hscroll = state.hscroll.saturating_sub(steps as u16);
9349                                None
9350                            } else {
9351                                Some(ImageBrowserCommand::MoveCursor {
9352                                    dx: -(steps as i32),
9353                                    dy: 0,
9354                                })
9355                            }
9356                        }
9357                        BrowserRequest::MoveRight { steps } => {
9358                            if state.snapshot.focus == ImageBrowserFocus::Inspector
9359                                && !state.snapshot.non_display_axes.is_empty()
9360                            {
9361                                state.selected_non_display_axis_state().map(|axis_state| {
9362                                    ImageBrowserCommand::StepNonDisplayAxis {
9363                                        axis: axis_state.axis,
9364                                        delta: steps as i32,
9365                                    }
9366                                })
9367                            } else if state.snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane {
9368                                let max_scroll = image_browser_max_hscroll(
9369                                    &state.snapshot,
9370                                    state.viewport.width,
9371                                );
9372                                state.hscroll = state
9373                                    .hscroll
9374                                    .saturating_add(steps as u16)
9375                                    .min(max_scroll.min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16);
9376                                None
9377                            } else {
9378                                Some(ImageBrowserCommand::MoveCursor {
9379                                    dx: steps as i32,
9380                                    dy: 0,
9381                                })
9382                            }
9383                        }
9384                        BrowserRequest::MoveUp { steps } => {
9385                            if state.snapshot.focus == ImageBrowserFocus::Inspector
9386                                && state.snapshot.non_display_axes.len() > 1
9387                            {
9388                                state.selected_non_display_axis =
9389                                    state.selected_non_display_axis.saturating_sub(steps);
9390                                state.selected_non_display_axis_state().map(|axis_state| {
9391                                    ImageBrowserCommand::SetSelectedNonDisplayAxis {
9392                                        axis: axis_state.axis,
9393                                    }
9394                                })
9395                            } else {
9396                                Some(ImageBrowserCommand::MoveCursor {
9397                                    dx: 0,
9398                                    dy: -(steps as i32),
9399                                })
9400                            }
9401                        }
9402                        BrowserRequest::MoveDown { steps } => {
9403                            if state.snapshot.focus == ImageBrowserFocus::Inspector
9404                                && state.snapshot.non_display_axes.len() > 1
9405                            {
9406                                state.selected_non_display_axis = state
9407                                    .selected_non_display_axis
9408                                    .saturating_add(steps)
9409                                    .min(state.snapshot.non_display_axes.len().saturating_sub(1));
9410                                state.selected_non_display_axis_state().map(|axis_state| {
9411                                    ImageBrowserCommand::SetSelectedNonDisplayAxis {
9412                                        axis: axis_state.axis,
9413                                    }
9414                                })
9415                            } else {
9416                                Some(ImageBrowserCommand::MoveCursor {
9417                                    dx: 0,
9418                                    dy: steps as i32,
9419                                })
9420                            }
9421                        }
9422                        BrowserRequest::SetImageCursor { x, y } => {
9423                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SetCursor { x, y })
9424                        }
9425                        BrowserRequest::AppendImageRegionVertex { x, y } => {
9426                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::AppendRegionVertex { x, y })
9427                        }
9428                        BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta } => {
9429                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::StepNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta })
9430                        }
9431                        BrowserRequest::StartImageRegionShape => {
9432                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::StartRegionShape)
9433                        }
9434                        BrowserRequest::CloseImageRegionShape => {
9435                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::CloseRegionShape)
9436                        }
9437                        BrowserRequest::UndoImageRegionVertex => {
9438                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::UndoRegionVertex)
9439                        }
9440                        BrowserRequest::CancelImageRegionShape => {
9441                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::CancelRegionShape)
9442                        }
9443                        BrowserRequest::ClearImageRegion => Some(ImageBrowserCommand::ClearRegion),
9444                        BrowserRequest::SaveImageRegionDefinition => {
9445                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SaveRegionDefinition)
9446                        }
9447                        BrowserRequest::LoadNextImageRegionDefinition => {
9448                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::LoadNextRegionDefinition)
9449                        }
9450                        BrowserRequest::LoadImageRegionDefinition { ref name } => {
9451                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::LoadRegionDefinition { name: name.clone() })
9452                        }
9453                        BrowserRequest::RenameImageRegionDefinition {
9454                            ref name,
9455                            ref new_name,
9456                        } => Some(ImageBrowserCommand::RenameRegionDefinition {
9457                            name: name.clone(),
9458                            new_name: new_name.clone(),
9459                        }),
9460                        BrowserRequest::DeleteImageRegionDefinition { ref name } => {
9461                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::DeleteRegionDefinition { name: name.clone() })
9462                        }
9463                        BrowserRequest::SetImageDefaultMask { ref name } => {
9464                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SetDefaultMask { name: name.clone() })
9465                        }
9466                        BrowserRequest::UnsetImageDefaultMask => {
9467                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::UnsetDefaultMask)
9468                        }
9469                        BrowserRequest::DeleteImageMask { ref name } => {
9470                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::DeleteMask { name: name.clone() })
9471                        }
9472                        BrowserRequest::WriteImageRegionMask => {
9473                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::WriteRegionMask {
9474                                name: None,
9475                                set_default: true,
9476                            })
9477                        }
9478                        BrowserRequest::SetImagePlaneContentMode { mode } => {
9479                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SetPlaneContentMode { mode })
9480                        }
9481                        BrowserRequest::PageUp { pages } => Some(ImageBrowserCommand::MoveCursor {
9482                            dx: 0,
9483                            dy: -((pages as i32) * i32::from(state.viewport.height.max(1))),
9484                        }),
9485                        BrowserRequest::PageDown { pages } => {
9486                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::MoveCursor {
9487                                dx: 0,
9488                                dy: (pages as i32) * i32::from(state.viewport.height.max(1)),
9489                            })
9490                        }
9491                        BrowserRequest::SetImageViewParameters { ref parameters } => {
9492                            Some(ImageBrowserCommand::SetViewWindow {
9493                                parameters: parameters.clone(),
9494                            })
9495                        }
9496                        BrowserRequest::Activate
9497                        | BrowserRequest::Back
9498                        | BrowserRequest::Escape => None,
9499                    };
9500                    let Some(request) = request else {
9501                        return;
9502                    };
9503                    let movie_frame_seq =
9504                        matches!(command, BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { .. })
9505                            .then_some(state.movie_frame_seq)
9506                            .flatten();
9507                    if let Some(frame_seq) = movie_frame_seq {
9508                        movie_perf.browser_command_sent(frame_seq);
9509                    }
9510                    match state.client.request(request) {
9511                        Ok(snapshot) => {
9512                            if let BrowserRequest::Resize {
9513                                width,
9514                                height,
9515                                inspector_height,
9516                            } = command
9517                            {
9518                                state.viewport = ImageBrowserViewport::with_plane_pixels(
9519                                    width,
9520                                    height,
9521                                    inspector_height,
9522                                    width.saturating_mul(font_size.0.max(1)),
9523                                    height.saturating_mul(font_size.1.max(1)),
9524                                );
9525                            }
9526                            if let Some(frame_seq) = movie_frame_seq {
9527                                let context =
9528                                    image_movie_perf_context_from_snapshot(state, &snapshot, None);
9529                                let backend =
9530                                    snapshot.backend_timing.as_ref().map(map_backend_timing);
9531                                movie_perf.browser_snapshot_received(frame_seq, context, backend);
9532                                state.movie_frame_seq = Some(frame_seq);
9533                            }
9534                            state.snapshot = snapshot;
9535                            state.clamp_left_pane_selection();
9536                            state.clamp_selected_non_display_axis();
9537                            if !state.restoring_selected_pinned_probe {
9538                                state.sync_selected_pinned_probe_from_snapshot();
9539                            }
9540                            if let Some(scheduler) = state.movie_scheduler.as_mut() {
9541                                scheduler.session_indices = state
9542                                    .snapshot
9543                                    .non_display_axes
9544                                    .iter()
9545                                    .map(|axis| (axis.axis, axis.index))
9546                                    .collect();
9547                            }
9548                            state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
9549                            sync_image_parameters = Some(state.snapshot.parameters.clone());
9550                            if !state.movie_available() {
9551                                crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
9552                                    "stop movie due to snapshot movie_available=false active_view={:?} plane_mode={:?} non_display_axes={}",
9553                                    state.snapshot.active_view,
9554                                    state.plane_mode,
9555                                    state.snapshot.non_display_axes.len()
9556                                ));
9557                                movie_perf.movie_stopped(
9558                                    image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None),
9559                                    "snapshot movie_available=false",
9560                                );
9561                                state.movie.playing = false;
9562                                state.movie.last_advanced_at = None;
9563                                state.movie_frame_seq = None;
9564                            }
9565                            state.hscroll = state.hscroll.min(
9566                                image_browser_max_hscroll(&state.snapshot, state.viewport.width)
9567                                    .min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16,
9568                            );
9569                            keep_image_plane_selection_visible(state);
9570                            Ok(())
9571                        }
9572                        Err(error) => {
9573                            if let Some(frame_seq) = movie_frame_seq {
9574                                movie_perf.frame_dropped(
9575                                    Some(frame_seq),
9576                                    image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None),
9577                                    MovieFrameOutcome::CacheMiss,
9578                                    format!("browser request failed: {}", error.message()),
9579                                );
9580                                state.movie_frame_seq = None;
9581                            }
9582                            Err((error, state.client.stderr_text()))
9583                        }
9584                    }
9585                }
9586            }
9587        };
9588
9589        if let Some(parameters) = sync_image_parameters.as_ref() {
9590            sync_image_parameter_fields(&mut self.fields, parameters);
9591        }
9592
9593        match result {
9594            Ok(()) => {
9595                self.clear_output_selection();
9596                self.sync_browser_shell_state(true);
9597                self.pane_focus = match self.browser_session() {
9598                    Some(session)
9599                        if session.focus() == BrowserPaneFocus::Inspector
9600                            && self.browser_inspector_reachable() =>
9601                    {
9602                        PaneFocus::Parameters
9603                    }
9604                    _ => PaneFocus::Result,
9605                };
9606                self.result.status_line = self
9607                    .browser_session()
9608                    .map(|session| session.status_line().to_string())
9609                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "Browser session updated.".to_string());
9610                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
9611            }
9612            Err((error, stderr)) => {
9613                let keep_session = !error.is_transport()
9614                    && self
9615                        .browser_session()
9616                        .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Image);
9617                if keep_session {
9618                    self.stop_image_movie(
9619                        false,
9620                        format!("browser request failed: {}", error.message()),
9621                    );
9622                }
9623                if !keep_session {
9624                    if let Some(session) = self.browser_session.take() {
9625                        let _ = session.cancel();
9626                    }
9627                }
9628                let details = if stderr.trim().is_empty() {
9629                    format!("{}\n", error.message())
9630                } else {
9631                    format!("{}\n{stderr}", error.message())
9632                };
9633                let status = if keep_session {
9634                    error.message().to_string()
9635                } else {
9636                    "Browser command failed. Session closed.".to_string()
9637                };
9638                self.report_browser_error(status, details);
9639            }
9640        }
9641    }
9642
9643    fn report_browser_error(&mut self, status_line: impl Into<String>, stderr: String) {
9644        self.result.status_line = status_line.into();
9645        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
9646        self.result.stderr = stderr;
9647        self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Stderr;
9648        self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Result;
9649    }
9650
9651    fn browser_clipboard_payload(&self) -> Option<(String, &'static str)> {
9652        self.browser_session()?.clipboard_payload()
9653    }
9654
9655    fn mark_plot_snapshot_dirty(&mut self) {
9656        if let Some(snapshot) = self.plot_workspace.snapshot.as_mut() {
9657            snapshot.dirty = true;
9658        }
9659    }
9660
9661    fn store_plot_snapshot(&mut self, summary: MeasurementSetSummary, reset_plot_cache: bool) {
9662        let generation = self.plot_workspace.next_generation;
9663        self.plot_workspace.next_generation += 1;
9664        self.plot_workspace.snapshot = Some(MeasurementSetRunSnapshot {
9665            generation,
9666            path: summary.measurement_set.path.as_ref().map(PathBuf::from),
9667            options: summary.options.clone(),
9668            summary,
9669            dirty: false,
9670        });
9671        if reset_plot_cache {
9672            self.plot_workspace.panel = None;
9673        }
9674    }
9675
9676    fn record_plot_snapshot(&mut self, summary: MeasurementSetSummary) {
9677        self.store_plot_snapshot(summary, true);
9678    }
9679
9680    fn record_msexplore_summary_snapshot(&mut self, summary: MeasurementSetSummary) {
9681        self.store_plot_snapshot(summary, false);
9682    }
9683
9684    fn zoom_image_view(&mut self, zoom_in: bool) {
9685        let Some(parameters) = self
9686            .browser_session()
9687            .and_then(BrowserSession::image_snapshot)
9688            .and_then(|snapshot| image_zoom_parameters(snapshot, zoom_in))
9689        else {
9690            self.result.status_line = "Zoom controls are only available for plane views.".into();
9691            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
9692            return;
9693        };
9694        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageViewParameters { parameters });
9695        self.result.status_line = if zoom_in {
9696            "Zoomed in.".into()
9697        } else {
9698            "Zoomed out.".into()
9699        };
9700        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
9701    }
9702
9703    fn pan_image_view(&mut self, dx: i32, dy: i32) {
9704        let Some(parameters) = self
9705            .browser_session()
9706            .and_then(BrowserSession::image_snapshot)
9707            .and_then(|snapshot| image_pan_parameters(snapshot, dx, dy))
9708        else {
9709            self.result.status_line = "Pan controls are only available for plane views.".into();
9710            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
9711            return;
9712        };
9713        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageViewParameters { parameters });
9714        self.result.status_line = "Panned image view.".into();
9715        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
9716    }
9717
9718    fn reset_image_view_window(&mut self) {
9719        let Some(snapshot) = self
9720            .browser_session()
9721            .and_then(BrowserSession::image_snapshot)
9722        else {
9723            return;
9724        };
9725        if snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane {
9726            self.result.status_line = "Reset view is only available in the Plane view.".into();
9727            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
9728            return;
9729        }
9730        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageViewParameters {
9731            parameters: ImageBrowserParameters {
9732                blc: String::new(),
9733                trc: String::new(),
9734                inc: String::new(),
9735                stretch: snapshot.parameters.stretch.clone(),
9736                autoscale: snapshot.parameters.autoscale.clone(),
9737                clip_low: snapshot.parameters.clip_low.clone(),
9738                clip_high: snapshot.parameters.clip_high.clone(),
9739            },
9740        });
9741        self.result.status_line = "Reset image view.".into();
9742        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
9743    }
9744
9745    fn cycle_image_plane_colormap(&mut self) {
9746        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
9747            return;
9748        };
9749        state.plane_colormap = state.plane_colormap.next();
9750        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
9751        self.result.status_line = format!("Colormap: {}.", state.plane_colormap.label());
9752        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
9753    }
9754
9755    fn toggle_image_plane_invert(&mut self) {
9756        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
9757            return;
9758        };
9759        state.plane_invert = !state.plane_invert;
9760        state.snapshot_generation = state.snapshot_generation.saturating_add(1);
9761        self.result.status_line = if state.plane_invert {
9762            "Image colors inverted.".into()
9763        } else {
9764            "Image colors restored.".into()
9765        };
9766        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
9767    }
9768
9769    fn clear_plot_render_cache(&mut self) {
9770        self.plot_workspace.placeholder_protocol = self.build_blank_plot_protocol();
9771        self.plot_workspace.panel = None;
9772        self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = true;
9773    }
9774
9775    pub(crate) fn is_msexplore_app(&self) -> bool {
9776        self.app.id == "msexplore"
9777    }
9778
9779    fn msexplore_form_has_plot_spec(&self) -> bool {
9780        self.field_text("page_spec")
9781            .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
9782            || self
9783                .field_text("preset")
9784                .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
9785            || (self
9786                .field_text("x_axis")
9787                .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
9788                && self
9789                    .field_text("y_axis")
9790                    .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty()))
9791    }
9792
9793    fn msexplore_plot_label(&self) -> String {
9794        if let Some(path) = self
9795            .field_text("page_spec")
9796            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
9797            .map(PathBuf::from)
9798        {
9799            return path
9800                .file_name()
9801                .and_then(|value| value.to_str())
9802                .map(|value| format!("Current Page ({value})"))
9803                .unwrap_or_else(|| "Current Page".to_string());
9804        }
9805        if let Some(preset) = self
9806            .field_text("preset")
9807            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
9808        {
9809            return MsPlotPreset::parse(&preset)
9810                .map(|preset| preset.display_name().to_string())
9811                .unwrap_or_else(|_| {
9812                    preset
9813                        .split('_')
9814                        .map(|token| {
9815                            let mut chars = token.chars();
9816                            match chars.next() {
9817                                Some(first) => {
9818                                    first.to_ascii_uppercase().to_string() + chars.as_str()
9819                                }
9820                                None => String::new(),
9821                            }
9822                        })
9823                        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
9824                        .join(" ")
9825                });
9826        }
9827        if let (Some(y_axis), Some(x_axis)) = (
9828            self.field_text("y_axis")
9829                .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty()),
9830            self.field_text("x_axis")
9831                .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty()),
9832        ) {
9833            return format!("{y_axis} vs {x_axis}");
9834        }
9835        "Current Plot".to_string()
9836    }
9837
9838    pub(crate) fn selected_plot_label(&self) -> String {
9839        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
9840            let target = self
9841                .current_plot_catalog_target()
9842                .unwrap_or_else(|| self.default_calibration_plot_target());
9843            return match target {
9844                PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset) => preset.display_name().to_string(),
9845                PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(_)
9846                | PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(_)
9847                | PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot
9848                | PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec => "Calibration Plot".to_string(),
9849            };
9850        }
9851        if self.app.id == "imager" {
9852            let report = match self.current_imaging_report() {
9853                Some(report) => report,
9854                None => return "Imaging Diagnostics".to_string(),
9855            };
9856            let target = self
9857                .current_plot_catalog_target()
9858                .unwrap_or(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(imaging_preferred_diagnostic(
9859                    report,
9860                )));
9861            return match target {
9862                PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(kind) => kind.label().to_string(),
9863                PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(_)
9864                | PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(_)
9865                | PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot
9866                | PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec => "Imaging Diagnostics".to_string(),
9867            };
9868        }
9869        self.msexplore_plot_label()
9870    }
9871
9872    fn current_plot_summary(&self) -> Option<String> {
9873        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
9874            let target = self
9875                .current_plot_catalog_target()
9876                .unwrap_or_else(|| self.default_calibration_plot_target());
9877            let PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset) = target else {
9878                return Some("Choose one calibration plot preset.".to_string());
9879            };
9880            if preset.uses_calibration_table() {
9881                return Some(render_workflow_diagnostic_summary(
9882                    &WorkflowDiagnosticSummaryDisplay {
9883                        description: preset.summary().to_string(),
9884                        source_path: self
9885                            .current_calibration_plot_table_path()
9886                            .map(|path| path.display().to_string()),
9887                        missing_source_message: Some(
9888                            "Choose or enter a calibration table to preview inspection plots."
9889                                .to_string(),
9890                        ),
9891                    },
9892                ));
9893            }
9894            let ms_path = self.field_text("measurement_set").unwrap_or_default();
9895            return Some(render_workflow_diagnostic_summary(
9896                &WorkflowDiagnosticSummaryDisplay {
9897                    description: preset.summary().to_string(),
9898                    source_path: (!ms_path.trim().is_empty()).then(|| ms_path.trim().to_string()),
9899                    missing_source_message: Some(
9900                        "Enter a MeasurementSet path to preview corrected-data diagnostics."
9901                            .to_string(),
9902                    ),
9903                },
9904            ));
9905        }
9906        if self.app.id == "imager" {
9907            let report = self.current_imaging_report()?;
9908            let target = self
9909                .current_plot_catalog_target()
9910                .unwrap_or(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(imaging_preferred_diagnostic(
9911                    report,
9912                )));
9913            return Some(match target {
9914                PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(ImagingDiagnosticKind::ResidualByChannel) => {
9915                    "Per-channel residual peak before and after deconvolution.".to_string()
9916                }
9917                PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(ImagingDiagnosticKind::IterationsByChannel) => {
9918                    "Per-channel major-cycle and minor-iteration counts.".to_string()
9919                }
9920                PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(kind) => {
9921                    format!(
9922                        "Preview the {} written by the latest imaging run.",
9923                        kind.label()
9924                    )
9925                }
9926                PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(_)
9927                | PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(_)
9928                | PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot
9929                | PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec => "Choose an imaging diagnostic.".to_string(),
9930            });
9931        }
9932        let ms_path = self.field_text("ms_path").unwrap_or_default();
9933        if ms_path.trim().is_empty() {
9934            return Some(
9935                "Enter a MeasurementSet path to preview the current msexplore form.".to_string(),
9936            );
9937        }
9938        if self.msexplore_form_has_plot_spec() {
9939            return Some(format!(
9940                "{} from the current msexplore form.",
9941                self.selected_plot_label()
9942            ));
9943        }
9944        Some(
9945            "Choose a preset, a page spec, or both x/y axes to preview the current msexplore form."
9946                .to_string(),
9947        )
9948    }
9949
9950    fn current_structured_summary(&self) -> Option<&MeasurementSetSummary> {
9951        if self.is_msexplore_app() {
9952            return self
9953                .plot_workspace
9954                .snapshot
9955                .as_ref()
9956                .map(|snapshot| &snapshot.summary);
9957        }
9958        if matches!(self.app.id.as_str(), "calibrate" | "imager")
9959            && self.result.structured.is_none()
9960            && let Some(snapshot) = self.plot_workspace.snapshot.as_ref()
9961        {
9962            return Some(&snapshot.summary);
9963        }
9964        match self.result.structured.as_ref() {
9965            Some(StructuredResult::MeasurementSetSummary(summary)) => Some(summary.as_ref()),
9966            Some(StructuredResult::Calibration(_)) | Some(StructuredResult::Imaging(_)) | None => {
9967                None
9968            }
9969        }
9970    }
9971
9972    fn current_calibration_report(&self) -> Option<&ManagedCalibrationOutput> {
9973        match self.result.structured.as_ref() {
9974            Some(StructuredResult::Calibration(report)) => Some(report.as_ref()),
9975            Some(StructuredResult::MeasurementSetSummary(_))
9976            | Some(StructuredResult::Imaging(_))
9977            | None => None,
9978        }
9979    }
9980
9981    fn current_imaging_report(&self) -> Option<&ManagedImagingOutput> {
9982        match self.result.structured.as_ref() {
9983            Some(StructuredResult::Imaging(report)) => Some(report.as_ref()),
9984            Some(StructuredResult::MeasurementSetSummary(_))
9985            | Some(StructuredResult::Calibration(_))
9986            | None => None,
9987        }
9988    }
9989
9990    fn next_history_sequence(&self) -> usize {
9991        self.history_entries.len() + 1
9992    }
9993
9994    fn record_history_entry(
9995        &mut self,
9996        stage: Option<WorkflowStageId>,
9997        title: String,
9998        status_kind: StatusKind,
9999        details: Vec<String>,
10000    ) {
10001        self.history_entries.push(HistoryEntry {
10002            sequence: self.next_history_sequence(),
10003            stage,
10004            title,
10005            status_kind,
10006            details,
10007        });
10008    }
10009
10010    fn record_calibration_products(
10011        &mut self,
10012        report: &ManagedCalibrationOutput,
10013        run_sequence: usize,
10014    ) {
10015        let product = workflow_product_metadata_from_report(report);
10016        let Some((path, stage, family, provenance)) = product else {
10017            return;
10018        };
10019        let dependency_revisions = self.active_workflow_dependency_revisions();
10020        for record in self.workflow_products.iter_mut().filter(|record| {
10021            record.stage == stage && record.status == WorkflowProductStatus::Active
10022        }) {
10023            record.status = WorkflowProductStatus::Superseded;
10024        }
10025        let revision = self
10026            .workflow_products
10027            .iter()
10028            .filter(|record| record.stage == stage)
10029            .count()
10030            + 1;
10031        self.workflow_products.push(WorkflowProductRecord {
10032            path,
10033            stage,
10034            family,
10035            revision,
10036            provenance,
10037            status: WorkflowProductStatus::Active,
10038            dependency_revisions,
10039            run_sequence,
10040        });
10041        let snapshots = self.workflow_product_snapshots();
10042        let stale_indices = stale_descendant_product_indices(
10043            &calibration_stage_specs(),
10044            &snapshots,
10045            stage.key(),
10046            revision,
10047        );
10048        for index in stale_indices {
10049            if let Some(product) = self.workflow_products.get_mut(index)
10050                && product.status == WorkflowProductStatus::Active
10051            {
10052                product.status = WorkflowProductStatus::Stale;
10053            }
10054        }
10055    }
10056
10057    fn workflow_recommended_next_stage(&self) -> Option<WorkflowStageId> {
10058        self.workflow_stage_states()
10059            .into_iter()
10060            .find(|state| state.recommended)
10061            .and_then(|state| WorkflowStageId::from_key(state.id))
10062    }
10063
10064    fn apply_workflow_post_run_guidance(&mut self, report: &ManagedCalibrationOutput) {
10065        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow && self.app.id == "calibrate") {
10066            return;
10067        }
10068
10069        match report {
10070            ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveGain(report) => {
10071                self.apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(report.output_table.display().to_string());
10072                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10073            }
10074            ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveBandpass(report) => {
10075                self.apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(report.output_table.display().to_string());
10076                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10077            }
10078            ManagedCalibrationOutput::FluxScale(report) => {
10079                self.apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(report.output_table.display().to_string());
10080                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10081            }
10082            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Gencal(report) => {
10083                self.apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(report.output_table.display().to_string());
10084                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10085            }
10086            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Stats(report) => {
10087                self.apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(report.path.display().to_string());
10088                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10089            }
10090            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Apply(_) => {
10091                if let Some(preset) =
10092                    workflow_preferred_diagnostic_preset_for_stage(WorkflowStageId::Apply)
10093                {
10094                    self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
10095                        Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset));
10096                }
10097                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10098            }
10099            ManagedCalibrationOutput::ExportCorrectedData(_) => {
10100                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Overview);
10101            }
10102            ManagedCalibrationOutput::ContinuumSubtract(_) => {
10103                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Overview);
10104            }
10105            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Summary(_) => {
10106                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Overview);
10107            }
10108            ManagedCalibrationOutput::PlanApply(_) => {}
10109        }
10110
10111        let Some(completed_stage) = workflow_stage_from_report(report) else {
10112            return;
10113        };
10114        let next_stage = self.workflow_recommended_next_stage();
10115        if let Some(next_stage) = next_stage
10116            && next_stage != completed_stage
10117        {
10118            self.set_current_workflow_stage(next_stage);
10119            self.result.status_line = format!(
10120                "{} completed. Recommended next stage: {}.",
10121                completed_stage.label(),
10122                next_stage.label()
10123            );
10124            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
10125            return;
10126        }
10127
10128        self.result.status_line = format!("{} completed.", completed_stage.label());
10129        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
10130    }
10131
10132    fn apply_imaging_post_run_guidance(&mut self, report: &ManagedImagingOutput) {
10133        if !(self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow && self.app.id == "imager") {
10134            return;
10135        }
10136        self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target = Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(
10137            imaging_preferred_diagnostic(report),
10138        ));
10139        self.clear_plot_render_cache();
10140        self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
10141        self.result.status_line = format!(
10142            "Imaging completed. {} artifacts recorded at {}.",
10143            report.artifacts.len(),
10144            report.request.imagename
10145        );
10146        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
10147    }
10148
10149    fn apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(&mut self, path: String) {
10150        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("table_path", path.clone());
10151        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("summary_paths", path);
10152    }
10153
10154    fn calibration_history_entry(
10155        report: &ManagedCalibrationOutput,
10156        sequence: usize,
10157    ) -> HistoryEntry {
10158        let (stage, title, details) = match report {
10159            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Apply(report) => (
10160                Some(WorkflowStageId::Apply),
10161                "Apply".to_string(),
10162                vec![
10163                    format!("rows updated={}", report.updated_row_count),
10164                    format!(
10165                        "measurement set={}",
10166                        report
10167                            .plan
10168                            .measurement_set_path
10169                            .as_ref()
10170                            .map(|path| path.display().to_string())
10171                            .unwrap_or_else(|| "<in-memory>".to_string())
10172                    ),
10173                ],
10174            ),
10175            ManagedCalibrationOutput::ExportCorrectedData(report) => (
10176                Some(WorkflowStageId::Apply),
10177                "Export Corrected Data".to_string(),
10178                vec![
10179                    format!("output={}", report.output_ms.display()),
10180                    format!("rows={}", report.row_count),
10181                ],
10182            ),
10183            ManagedCalibrationOutput::ContinuumSubtract(report) => (
10184                Some(WorkflowStageId::Apply),
10185                "Continuum Subtract".to_string(),
10186                vec![
10187                    format!("output={}", report.output_ms.display()),
10188                    format!("rows={}", report.row_count),
10189                    format!("fit_order={}", report.fit_order),
10190                ],
10191            ),
10192            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Summary(summaries) => (
10193                Some(WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset),
10194                "Inspect Dataset".to_string(),
10195                vec![format!("tables={}", summaries.len())],
10196            ),
10197            ManagedCalibrationOutput::PlanApply(plan) => (
10198                None,
10199                "Plan Apply".to_string(),
10200                vec![
10201                    format!("rows selected={}", plan.selected_row_count),
10202                    format!("tables={}", plan.calibration_tables.len()),
10203                ],
10204            ),
10205            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Stats(report) => (
10206                Some(WorkflowStageId::InspectResults),
10207                "Inspect Results".to_string(),
10208                vec![
10209                    format!("table={}", report.path.display()),
10210                    format!("axis={:?}", report.axis),
10211                ],
10212            ),
10213            ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveGain(report) => (
10214                Some(WorkflowStageId::SolveGain),
10215                "Solve Gain".to_string(),
10216                vec![
10217                    format!("output={}", report.output_table.display()),
10218                    format!("rows={}", report.solution_row_count),
10219                ],
10220            ),
10221            ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveBandpass(report) => (
10222                Some(WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass),
10223                "Solve Bandpass".to_string(),
10224                vec![
10225                    format!("output={}", report.output_table.display()),
10226                    format!("rows={}", report.solution_row_count),
10227                ],
10228            ),
10229            ManagedCalibrationOutput::FluxScale(report) => (
10230                Some(WorkflowStageId::FluxScale),
10231                "Fluxscale".to_string(),
10232                vec![
10233                    format!("output={}", report.output_table.display()),
10234                    format!("fields={}", report.fields.len()),
10235                ],
10236            ),
10237            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Gencal(report) => (
10238                Some(WorkflowStageId::InspectResults),
10239                "Generate Prior Cal".to_string(),
10240                vec![
10241                    format!("output={}", report.output_table.display()),
10242                    format!("rows={}", report.row_count),
10243                    format!("subtype={}", report.table_subtype),
10244                ],
10245            ),
10246        };
10247        HistoryEntry {
10248            sequence,
10249            stage,
10250            title,
10251            status_kind: StatusKind::Ok,
10252            details,
10253        }
10254    }
10255
10256    fn is_summary_tab(tab: ResultTab) -> bool {
10257        matches!(
10258            tab,
10259            ResultTab::Overview
10260                | ResultTab::Data
10261                | ResultTab::Observations
10262                | ResultTab::Scans
10263                | ResultTab::Fields
10264                | ResultTab::Spws
10265                | ResultTab::Sources
10266                | ResultTab::Antennas
10267        )
10268    }
10269
10270    fn current_msexplore_summary_request(
10271        &self,
10272    ) -> Result<(PathBuf, MeasurementSetSummaryOptions), String> {
10273        let ms_path = self
10274            .field_text("ms_path")
10275            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
10276            .map(PathBuf::from)
10277            .ok_or_else(|| {
10278                "Enter a MeasurementSet path to populate the summary tabs.".to_string()
10279            })?;
10280        let selection_value =
10281            |id: &str| self.field_text(id).filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty());
10282        let selection = MsSelectionSpec {
10283            selectdata: self.bool_field_value("selectdata").unwrap_or(false),
10284            field: selection_value("field"),
10285            spw: selection_value("spw"),
10286            timerange: selection_value("timerange"),
10287            uvrange: selection_value("uvrange"),
10288            antenna: selection_value("antenna"),
10289            scan: selection_value("scan"),
10290            correlation: selection_value("correlation"),
10291            observation: selection_value("observation"),
10292            array: selection_value("array"),
10293            intent: selection_value("intent"),
10294            feed: selection_value("feed"),
10295            msselect: selection_value("msselect"),
