10296        };
10297        Ok((ms_path, selection.to_summary_options()))
10298    }
10299
10300    fn current_calibrate_summary_request(
10301        &self,
10302    ) -> Result<(PathBuf, MeasurementSetSummaryOptions), String> {
10303        let ms_path = self
10304            .field_text("measurement_set")
10305            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
10306            .map(PathBuf::from)
10307            .ok_or_else(|| {
10308                "Enter a MeasurementSet path to populate the summary tabs.".to_string()
10309            })?;
10310        let selection_value =
10311            |id: &str| self.field_text(id).filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty());
10312        let options = MeasurementSetSummaryOptions {
10313            verbose: self.verbose_enabled(),
10314            selectdata: self.bool_field_value("selectdata").unwrap_or(true),
10315            field: selection_value("field"),
10316            spw: selection_value("spw"),
10317            antenna: selection_value("antenna"),
10318            scan: selection_value("scan"),
10319            observation: selection_value("observation"),
10320            array: selection_value("array"),
10321            timerange: selection_value("timerange"),
10322            uvrange: None,
10323            correlation: None,
10324            intent: None,
10325            msselect: selection_value("msselect"),
10326            feed: None,
10327            listunfl: self.listunfl_enabled(),
10328            cachesize_mb: None,
10329        };
10330        Ok((ms_path, options))
10331    }
10332
10333    fn current_imager_summary_request(
10334        &self,
10335    ) -> Result<(PathBuf, MeasurementSetSummaryOptions), String> {
10336        let ms_path = self
10337            .field_text("ms")
10338            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
10339            .map(PathBuf::from)
10340            .ok_or_else(|| {
10341                "Enter a MeasurementSet path to populate the summary tabs.".to_string()
10342            })?;
10343        let selection_value =
10344            |id: &str| self.field_text(id).filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty());
10345        let options = MeasurementSetSummaryOptions {
10346            verbose: self.verbose_enabled(),
10347            selectdata: true,
10348            field: selection_value("field"),
10349            spw: selection_value("spw"),
10350            antenna: None,
10351            scan: None,
10352            observation: None,
10353            array: None,
10354            timerange: None,
10355            uvrange: None,
10356            correlation: imager_summary_correlation_selector(self.field_text("polarization")),
10357            intent: None,
10358            msselect: None,
10359            feed: None,
10360            listunfl: self.listunfl_enabled(),
10361            cachesize_mb: None,
10362        };
10363        Ok((ms_path, options))
10364    }
10365
10366    fn current_calibrate_selection_spec(&self) -> MsSelectionSpec {
10367        let selection_value =
10368            |id: &str| self.field_text(id).filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty());
10369        MsSelectionSpec {
10370            selectdata: self.bool_field_value("selectdata").unwrap_or(true),
10371            field: selection_value("field"),
10372            spw: selection_value("spw"),
10373            timerange: selection_value("timerange"),
10374            uvrange: None,
10375            antenna: selection_value("antenna"),
10376            scan: selection_value("scan"),
10377            correlation: None,
10378            array: selection_value("array"),
10379            observation: selection_value("observation"),
10380            intent: None,
10381            feed: None,
10382            msselect: selection_value("msselect"),
10383        }
10384    }
10385
10386    fn current_calibration_plot_request(&self) -> CalibrationPlotRequest {
10387        CalibrationPlotRequest {
10388            measurement_set_path: self
10389                .field_text("measurement_set")
10390                .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
10391                .map(PathBuf::from),
10392            calibration_table_path: self.current_calibration_plot_table_path(),
10393            selection: self.current_calibrate_selection_spec(),
10394        }
10395    }
10396
10397    fn current_calibration_plot_table_path(&self) -> Option<PathBuf> {
10398        self.first_path_value("table_path")
10399            .or_else(|| self.first_csv_path_value("gaintables"))
10400            .or_else(|| self.first_path_value("fluxscale_input"))
10401            .or_else(|| self.first_csv_path_value("summary_paths"))
10402    }
10403
10404    fn default_calibration_plot_target(&self) -> PlotCatalogTarget {
10405        if self.current_calibration_plot_table_path().is_some() {
10406            PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preferred_workflow_calibration_preset(
10407                WorkflowCalibrationArtifactKind::GainLike,
10408            ))
10409        } else {
10410            PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preferred_workflow_calibration_preset(
10411                WorkflowCalibrationArtifactKind::CorrectedData,
10412            ))
10413        }
10414    }
10415
10416    fn first_path_value(&self, field_id: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
10417        self.field_text(field_id)
10418            .as_deref()
10419            .map(str::trim)
10420            .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
10421            .map(PathBuf::from)
10422    }
10423
10424    fn first_csv_path_value(&self, field_id: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
10425        self.field_text(field_id).and_then(|value| {
10426            value
10427                .split(',')
10428                .map(str::trim)
10429                .find(|entry| !entry.is_empty())
10430                .map(PathBuf::from)
10431        })
10432    }
10433
10434    fn ensure_current_summary_snapshot_if_needed(&mut self) {
10435        if !Self::is_summary_tab(self.active_result_tab) {
10436            return;
10437        }
10438        let (path, options) = if self.is_msexplore_app() {
10439            match self.current_msexplore_summary_request() {
10440                Ok(request) => request,
10441                Err(error) => {
10442                    self.plot_workspace.snapshot = None;
10443                    self.result.structured_error = Some(error);
10444                    return;
10445                }
10446            }
10447        } else if self.app.id == "imager" {
10448            match self.current_imager_summary_request() {
10449                Ok(request) => request,
10450                Err(error) => {
10451                    self.plot_workspace.snapshot = None;
10452                    self.result.structured_error = Some(error);
10453                    return;
10454                }
10455            }
10456        } else if self.app.id == "calibrate" && self.result.structured.is_none() {
10457            match self.current_calibrate_summary_request() {
10458                Ok(request) => request,
10459                Err(error) => {
10460                    self.plot_workspace.snapshot = None;
10461                    self.result.structured_error = Some(error);
10462                    return;
10463                }
10464            }
10465        } else {
10466            return;
10467        };
10468        if let Some(snapshot) = self.plot_workspace.snapshot.as_mut()
10469            && snapshot.path.as_ref() == Some(&path)
10470            && snapshot.options == options
10471        {
10472            snapshot.dirty = false;
10473            self.result.structured_error = None;
10474            return;
10475        }
10476        match MeasurementSet::open(&path)
10477            .map_err(|error| format!("open MeasurementSet {}: {error}", path.display()))
10478            .and_then(|ms| {
10479                MeasurementSetSummary::from_ms_with_options(&ms, &options)
10480                    .map_err(|error| error.to_string())
10481            }) {
10482            Ok(summary) => {
10483                self.record_msexplore_summary_snapshot(summary);
10484                self.result.structured_error = None;
10485            }
10486            Err(error) => {
10487                self.plot_workspace.snapshot = None;
10488                self.result.structured_error = Some(error);
10489            }
10490        }
10491    }
10492
10493    pub(crate) fn prime_idle_summary_for_launch(&mut self) {
10494        self.ensure_current_summary_snapshot_if_needed();
10495    }
10496
10497    fn current_msexplore_plot_payload(&self) -> Result<MsPlotPayload, String> {
10498        let plan = self.build_execution_plan()?;
10499        let spec = build_explore_spec_from_args(plan.arguments)?;
10500        build_msexplore_payload_from_spec(&spec)
10501    }
10502
10503    fn current_imaging_plot_payload(&self) -> Result<ImagingPlotPayload, String> {
10504        let report = self
10505            .current_imaging_report()
10506            .ok_or_else(|| "run imaging first".to_string())?;
10507        let target = self
10508            .current_plot_catalog_target()
10509            .unwrap_or(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(imaging_preferred_diagnostic(
10510                report,
10511            )));
10512        match target {
10513            PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(ImagingDiagnosticKind::ResidualByChannel) => {
10514                let initial = report
10515                    .run
10516                    .channels
10517                    .iter()
10518                    .map(|channel| {
10519                        (
10520                            channel.channel_index,
10521                            channel.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam as f64,
10522                        )
10523                    })
10524                    .collect::<Vec<_>>();
10525                let final_values = report
10526                    .run
10527                    .channels
10528                    .iter()
10529                    .map(|channel| {
10530                        (
10531                            channel.channel_index,
10532                            channel.final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam as f64,
10533                        )
10534                    })
10535                    .collect::<Vec<_>>();
10536                Ok(ImagingPlotPayload::ChannelSeries {
10537                    title: "Residual Peak By Channel".to_string(),
10538                    y_label: "Jy / beam".to_string(),
10539                    series: vec![
10540                        ImagingPlotSeries {
10541                            label: "Initial".to_string(),
10542                            points: initial,
10543                            color_index: 0,
10544                        },
10545                        ImagingPlotSeries {
10546                            label: "Final".to_string(),
10547                            points: final_values,
10548                            color_index: 1,
10549                        },
10550                    ],
10551                })
10552            }
10553            PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(ImagingDiagnosticKind::IterationsByChannel) => {
10554                Ok(ImagingPlotPayload::ChannelSeries {
10555                    title: "Cycle Counts By Channel".to_string(),
10556                    y_label: "Count".to_string(),
10557                    series: vec![
10558                        ImagingPlotSeries {
10559                            label: "Major cycles".to_string(),
10560                            points: report
10561                                .run
10562                                .channels
10563                                .iter()
10564                                .map(|channel| (channel.channel_index, channel.major_cycles as f64))
10565                                .collect(),
10566                            color_index: 2,
10567                        },
10568                        ImagingPlotSeries {
10569                            label: "Minor iterations".to_string(),
10570                            points: report
10571                                .run
10572                                .channels
10573                                .iter()
10574                                .map(|channel| {
10575                                    (channel.channel_index, channel.minor_iterations as f64)
10576                                })
10577                                .collect(),
10578                            color_index: 3,
10579                        },
10580                    ],
10581                })
10582            }
10583            PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(kind) => {
10584                let artifact_kind = match kind {
10585                    ImagingDiagnosticKind::PsfPreview => "psf",
10586                    ImagingDiagnosticKind::ResidualPreview => "residual",
10587                    ImagingDiagnosticKind::ModelPreview => "model",
10588                    ImagingDiagnosticKind::ImagePreview => "image",
10589                    ImagingDiagnosticKind::AlphaPreview => "alpha",
10590                    ImagingDiagnosticKind::ResidualByChannel
10591                    | ImagingDiagnosticKind::IterationsByChannel => unreachable!(),
10592                };
10593                let artifact = report
10594                    .artifacts
10595                    .iter()
10596                    .find(|artifact| artifact.kind == artifact_kind)
10597                    .ok_or_else(|| format!("no artifact recorded for {artifact_kind}"))?;
10598                let preview = artifact
10599                    .preview_png_path
10600                    .as_ref()
10601                    .ok_or_else(|| format!("no preview image available for {}", artifact.label))?;
10602                Ok(ImagingPlotPayload::ArtifactPreview {
10603                    title: artifact.label.clone(),
10604                    image_path: PathBuf::from(preview),
10605                })
10606            }
10607            PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(_)
10608            | PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(_)
10609            | PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot
10610            | PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec => Err("choose an imaging diagnostic".to_string()),
10611        }
10612    }
10613
10614    fn current_plot_payload(&self) -> Result<CurrentPlotPayload, String> {
10615        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
10616            let target = self
10617                .current_plot_catalog_target()
10618                .unwrap_or_else(|| self.default_calibration_plot_target());
10619            let PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset) = target else {
10620                return Err("choose one calibration plot preset".to_string());
10621            };
10622            return build_calibration_plot_payload(
10623                &self.current_calibration_plot_request(),
10624                preset,
10625            )
10626            .map(CurrentPlotPayload::MsPlot)
10627            .map_err(|error| error.to_string());
10628        }
10629        if self.app.id == "imager" {
10630            return self
10631                .current_imaging_plot_payload()
10632                .map(CurrentPlotPayload::Imaging);
10633        }
10634        self.current_msexplore_plot_payload()
10635            .map(CurrentPlotPayload::MsPlot)
10636    }
10637
10638    fn current_plot_spec_key(&self) -> Result<String, String> {
10639        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
10640            let target = self
10641                .current_plot_catalog_target()
10642                .unwrap_or_else(|| self.default_calibration_plot_target());
10643            let mut parts = vec![self.selected_plot_label()];
10644            if let Some(path) = self
10645                .field_text("measurement_set")
10646                .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
10647            {
10648                parts.push(format!("ms={}", path.trim()));
10649            }
10650            if let Some(path) = self.current_calibration_plot_table_path() {
10651                parts.push(format!("table={}", path.display()));
10652            }
10653            let selection = self.current_calibrate_selection_spec();
10654            for (label, value) in [
10655                ("field", selection.field),
10656                ("spw", selection.spw),
10657                ("timerange", selection.timerange),
10658                ("antenna", selection.antenna),
10659                ("scan", selection.scan),
10660                ("observation", selection.observation),
10661                ("array", selection.array),
10662                ("msselect", selection.msselect),
10663            ] {
10664                if let Some(value) = value.filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty()) {
10665                    parts.push(format!("{label}={value}"));
10666                }
10667            }
10668            parts.push(format!("target={target:?}"));
10669            return Ok(parts.join("\u{1f}"));
10670        }
10671        if self.app.id == "imager" {
10672            let report = self
10673                .current_imaging_report()
10674                .ok_or_else(|| "run imaging first".to_string())?;
10675            let target = self
10676                .current_plot_catalog_target()
10677                .unwrap_or(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(imaging_preferred_diagnostic(
10678                    report,
10679                )));
10680            return Ok(format!(
10681                "{}\u{1f}{}\u{1f}{target:?}",
10682                report.request.imagename, report.request.spectral_mode
10683            ));
10684        }
10685        self.build_execution_plan().map(|plan| {
10686            plan.arguments
10687                .iter()
10688                .map(|value| value.to_string_lossy().into_owned())
10689                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
10690                .join("\u{1f}")
10691        })
10692    }
10693
10694    fn pump_plot_panel(&mut self) {
10695        let plot_label = self.selected_plot_label();
10696        let was_pending = self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated;
10697        let Some(panel) = self.plot_workspace.panel.as_mut() else {
10698            return;
10699        };
10700        match panel.renderer.pump() {
10701            Ok(changed) => {
10702                if changed {
10703                    panel.image_size = panel.renderer.image_size();
10704                    self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = false;
10705                    self.plot_workspace.placeholder_protocol = None;
10706                    if matches!(self.result.status_kind, StatusKind::Info)
10707                        && (self.result.status_line.contains("preview")
10708                            || self.result.status_line.contains("Rendering"))
10709                    {
10710                        self.result.status_line = format!("{plot_label} preview ready.");
10711                        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
10712                    }
10713                }
10714                if !changed
10715                    && was_pending
10716                    && panel.renderer.protocol().is_some()
10717                    && matches!(self.result.status_kind, StatusKind::Info)
10718                {
10719                    self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = false;
10720                    self.plot_workspace.placeholder_protocol = None;
10721                    self.result.status_line = format!("{plot_label} preview ready.");
10722                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
10723                }
10724            }
10725            Err(error) => {
10726                panel.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
10727                self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = false;
10728                self.plot_workspace.placeholder_protocol = None;
10729                self.result.status_line = "Plot rendering failed.".to_string();
10730                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
10731            }
10732        }
10733    }
10734
10735    fn build_blank_plot_protocol(&self) -> Option<PanelProtocol> {
10736        let panel = self.plot_workspace.panel.as_ref()?;
10737        let area = panel.request_key.as_ref()?.area;
10738        if area.is_empty() {
10739            return None;
10740        }
10741        let pixel_width = panel
10742            .image_size
10743            .map(|(width, _)| width)
10744            .unwrap_or_else(|| u32::from(area.width.max(1)) * u32::from(panel.font_size.0.max(1)));
10745        let pixel_height = panel
10746            .image_size
10747            .map(|(_, height)| height)
10748            .unwrap_or_else(|| u32::from(area.height.max(1)) * u32::from(panel.font_size.1.max(1)));
10749        let background = plot_theme(self.theme_mode()).background;
10750        let image = RgbaImage::from_pixel(
10751            pixel_width.max(1),
10752            pixel_height.max(1),
10753            image::Rgba([background[0], background[1], background[2], 255]),
10754        );
10755        let picker = terminal_picker();
10756        build_panel_protocol_from_rgba_owned(&picker, Resize::Fit(None), area, image)
10757            .ok()
10758            .map(|prepared| prepared.protocol)
10759    }
10760
10761    fn pump_image_plane_panel(&mut self) {
10762        let context = self
10763            .image_browser_session_state()
10764            .map(|state| image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None));
10765        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
10766            return;
10767        };
10768        let Some(panel) = state.panel.as_mut() else {
10769            return;
10770        };
10771        let stale_count = panel.renderer.take_stale_result_count();
10772        let pump_result = match panel.renderer.pump() {
10773            Ok(changed) => {
10774                if changed {
10775                    panel.image_size = panel.renderer.image_size();
10776                    let request_hash = panel
10777                        .pending_request_key
10778                        .as_ref()
10779                        .map(hashed_render_request_key)
10780                        .or_else(|| panel.display_key.as_ref().map(hashed_render_request_key));
10781                    let queue_depth = panel.renderer.queue_depth();
10782                    let panel_pending = panel.renderer.is_pending();
10783                    if let Some(request_key) = panel.pending_request_key.take() {
10784                        panel.display_key = Some(request_key);
10785                    }
10786                    Ok((request_hash, queue_depth, panel_pending))
10787                } else {
10788                    Ok((
10789                        None,
10790                        panel.renderer.queue_depth(),
10791                        panel.renderer.is_pending(),
10792                    ))
10793                }
10794            }
10795            Err(error) => {
10796                panel.pending_request_key = None;
10797                panel.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
10798                Err(())
10799            }
10800        };
10801        let _ = state;
10802        if stale_count > 0
10803            && let Some(context) = context
10804        {
10805            for _ in 0..stale_count {
10806                self.movie_perf.frame_dropped(
10807                    None,
10808                    context,
10809                    MovieFrameOutcome::StaleRenderDiscarded,
10810                    "panel renderer discarded stale completion",
10811                );
10812            }
10813        }
10814        if let Ok((Some(request_hash), queue_depth, panel_pending)) = pump_result {
10815            self.movie_perf
10816                .plane_render_completed(request_hash, queue_depth, panel_pending);
10817            self.movie_perf.startup_plane_render_completed(
10818                request_hash,
10819                queue_depth,
10820                panel_pending,
10821            );
10822        }
10823    }
10824
10825    fn pump_image_spectrum_panel(&mut self) {
10826        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
10827            return;
10828        };
10829        let Some(panel) = state.spectrum_panel.as_mut() else {
10830            return;
10831        };
10832        let mut startup_render_completed = None::<(u64, usize, bool)>;
10833        match panel.renderer.pump() {
10834            Ok(changed) => {
10835                if changed {
10836                    panel.image_size = panel.renderer.image_size();
10837                    if let Some(request_key) = panel.pending_request_key.take() {
10838                        startup_render_completed = Some((
10839                            hashed_render_request_key(&request_key),
10840                            panel.renderer.queue_depth(),
10841                            panel.renderer.is_pending(),
10842                        ));
10843                        panel.display_key = Some(request_key);
10844                    }
10845                }
10846            }
10847            Err(error) => {
10848                panel.pending_request_key = None;
10849                panel.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
10850            }
10851        }
10852        if let Some((request_hash, queue_depth, panel_pending)) = startup_render_completed {
10853            self.movie_perf.startup_spectrum_render_completed(
10854                request_hash,
10855                queue_depth,
10856                panel_pending,
10857            );
10858        }
10859    }
10860
10861    fn current_image_plane_render_request(
10862        &self,
10863        layout: &UiLayout,
10864        font_size: (u16, u16),
10865    ) -> Option<CurrentImagePlaneRenderRequest> {
10866        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
10867        let split_ratio = self.image_workspace_split_ratio();
10868        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
10869        if !state.raster_plane_active() {
10870            return None;
10871        }
10872        self.image_plane_render_request_for_snapshot(
10873            layout,
10874            font_size,
10875            &state.snapshot,
10876            ImagePlaneRenderRequestOptions {
10877                show_live_reticle: state.show_live_reticle,
10878                colormap: state.plane_colormap,
10879                invert: state.plane_invert,
10880                overlay_markers: &image_plane_overlay_markers(state),
10881                split_ratio,
10882                theme_mode,
10883                render_scale: 1.0,
10884                max_pixel_size: None,
10885            },
10886        )
10887    }
10888
10889    fn current_image_direct_plane_render_request(
10890        &self,
10891        layout: &UiLayout,
10892        font_size: (u16, u16),
10893    ) -> Option<CurrentImagePlaneRenderRequest> {
10894        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
10895        let split_ratio = self.image_workspace_split_ratio();
10896        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
10897        if !state.raster_plane_active() {
10898            return None;
10899        }
10900        self.image_plane_render_request_for_snapshot(
10901            layout,
10902            font_size,
10903            &state.snapshot,
10904            ImagePlaneRenderRequestOptions {
10905                show_live_reticle: state.show_live_reticle,
10906                colormap: state.plane_colormap,
10907                invert: state.plane_invert,
10908                overlay_markers: &image_plane_overlay_markers(state),
10909                split_ratio,
10910                theme_mode,
10911                render_scale: self.current_image_movie_plane_render_scale(),
10912                max_pixel_size: None,
10913            },
10914        )
10915    }
10916
10917    fn image_plane_render_request_for_snapshot(
10918        &self,
10919        layout: &UiLayout,
10920        font_size: (u16, u16),
10921        snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
10922        options: ImagePlaneRenderRequestOptions<'_>,
10923    ) -> Option<CurrentImagePlaneRenderRequest> {
10924        let area = crate::ui::image_plane_canvas_area_for_browser(
10925            layout,
10926            snapshot.profile.is_some(),
10927            options.split_ratio,
10928        );
10929        if area.is_empty() {
10930            return None;
10931        }
10932        let raster = snapshot.plane.clone()?;
10933        let show_live_reticle = options.show_live_reticle && snapshot.region.is_none();
10934        let cursor = show_live_reticle
10935            .then(|| image_plane_sample_cursor(snapshot))
10936            .flatten();
10937        let sampled_shape = image_plane_sampled_shape(snapshot);
10938        let region_overlay_shapes = snapshot
10939            .region
10940            .as_ref()
10941            .map(|region| region.overlay_shapes.clone())
10942            .unwrap_or_default();
10943        let render_signature = image_plane_render_signature(
10944            snapshot,
10945            show_live_reticle,
10946            options.colormap,
10947            options.invert,
10948            options.overlay_markers,
10949            &region_overlay_shapes,
10950        );
10951        let request_key = ImagePlaneRequestKey {
10952            area,
10953            theme_mode: options.theme_mode,
10954            render_signature,
10955        };
10956        let scaled_pixel_width = scaled_movie_render_dimension(
10957            u32::from(area.width.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.0.max(1)),
10958            options.render_scale,
10959        );
10960        let scaled_pixel_height = scaled_movie_render_dimension(
10961            u32::from(area.height.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.1.max(1)),
10962            options.render_scale,
10963        );
10964        let max_pixel_size = combine_render_pixel_caps(
10965            options.max_pixel_size,
10966            adaptive_image_plane_render_pixel_cap(area, font_size, snapshot),
10967        );
10968        let (pixel_width, pixel_height) =
10969            clamp_render_dimensions(scaled_pixel_width, scaled_pixel_height, max_pixel_size);
10970        let cache_key = hashed_render_input_cache_key(&request_key, pixel_width, pixel_height);
10971        Some(CurrentImagePlaneRenderRequest {
10972            request_key,
10973            pixel_width: pixel_width.max(1),
10974            pixel_height: pixel_height.max(1),
10975            input: ImagePlaneRenderInput {
10976                cache_key,
10977                raster,
10978                plane_label: image_plane_frame_label(snapshot),
10979                cursor_sample: cursor,
10980                sampled_shape,
10981                display_axes: snapshot.display_axes.clone(),
10982                probe: snapshot.probe.clone(),
10983                overlay_markers: options.overlay_markers.to_vec(),
10984                region_overlay_shapes,
10985                display_aspect_ratio: image_plane_display_aspect_ratio(snapshot),
10986                colormap: options.colormap,
10987                invert: options.invert,
10988                theme_mode: browser_render_theme(options.theme_mode),
10989            },
10990        })
10991    }
10992
10993    fn current_image_spectrum_render_request(
10994        &self,
10995        layout: &UiLayout,
10996        font_size: (u16, u16),
10997        snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
10998        options: ImageSpectrumRenderRequestOptions<'_>,
10999    ) -> Option<CurrentImageSpectrumRenderRequest> {
11000        let area = crate::ui::image_spectrum_canvas_area(layout, true, options.split_ratio)?;
11001        if area.is_empty() {
11002            return None;
11003        }
11004        let profile = snapshot.profile.clone()?;
11005        let render_signature =
11006            image_spectrum_render_signature(&profile, options.overlay_profiles, options.theme_mode);
11007        let request_key = ImageSpectrumRequestKey {
11008            area,
11009            theme_mode: options.theme_mode,
11010            render_signature,
11011        };
11012        let scaled_pixel_width = scaled_movie_render_dimension(
11013            u32::from(area.width.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.0.max(1)),
11014            options.render_scale,
11015        );
11016        let scaled_pixel_height = scaled_movie_render_dimension(
11017            u32::from(area.height.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.1.max(1)),
11018            options.render_scale,
11019        );
11020        let max_pixel_size = combine_render_pixel_caps(
11021            options.max_pixel_size,
11022            adaptive_image_spectrum_render_pixel_cap(area, font_size, &profile),
11023        );
11024        let (pixel_width, pixel_height) =
11025            clamp_render_dimensions(scaled_pixel_width, scaled_pixel_height, max_pixel_size);
11026        let cache_key = hashed_render_input_cache_key(&request_key, pixel_width, pixel_height);
11027        Some(CurrentImageSpectrumRenderRequest {
11028            request_key,
11029            pixel_width: pixel_width.max(1),
11030            pixel_height: pixel_height.max(1),
11031            input: ImageSpectrumRenderInput {
11032                cache_key,
11033                profile,
11034                overlay_profiles: options.overlay_profiles.to_vec(),
11035                theme_mode: browser_render_theme(options.theme_mode),
11036            },
11037        })
11038    }
11039
11040    fn current_image_movie_plane_render_scale(&self) -> f32 {
11041        self.image_browser_session_state()
11042            .map(image_movie_plane_render_scale_for_state)
11043            .unwrap_or(1.0)
11044    }
11045
11046    fn ensure_image_plane_requested(&mut self, layout: &UiLayout) {
11047        if self.defer_image_plane_render_during_divider_drag() {
11048            return;
11049        }
11050        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
11051            return;
11052        };
11053        if !state.raster_plane_active()
11054            || state.movie.terminal_looping
11055            || state.movie.direct_overlay
11056        {
11057            return;
11058        }
11059        let picker = terminal_picker();
11060        let font_size = state
11061            .panel
11062            .as_ref()
11063            .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
11064            .unwrap_or_else(|| picker.font_size());
11065        let Some(request) = self.current_image_plane_render_request(layout, font_size) else {
11066            return;
11067        };
11068        let mut perf_render_requested =
11069            None::<(u64, u64, MoviePerfContext, usize, bool, MovieFrameOutcome)>;
11070        let mut perf_render_completed = None::<(u64, usize, bool)>;
11071        let mut perf_drop = None::<(Option<u64>, MoviePerfContext, MovieFrameOutcome, String)>;
11072        let mut startup_render_requested = None::<(u64, MoviePerfContext, usize, bool)>;
11073
11074        {
11075            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
11076                return;
11077            };
11078            let request_key_hash = hashed_render_request_key(&request.request_key);
11079            let context = image_movie_perf_context_from_state(
11080                state,
11081                Some(request.request_key.area),
11082                Some((request.pixel_width, request.pixel_height)),
11083                Some(request_key_hash),
11084            );
11085            let frame_seq = state.movie_frame_seq;
11086            let backend_outcome = map_backend_plane_outcome(state.snapshot.backend_timing.as_ref());
11087            let panel = state.panel.get_or_insert_with(new_image_plane_panel_state);
11088            let render_cache_hit = panel
11089                .render_cache
11090                .lock()
11091                .map(|cache| cache.contains_key(&request.input.cache_key))
11092                .unwrap_or(false);
11093            let direct_overlay_cache_hit =
11094                state.movie.playing && state.movie.direct_overlay && render_cache_hit;
11095            let queue_depth = panel.renderer.queue_depth();
11096            let panel_pending = panel.renderer.is_pending();
11097            if panel.display_key == Some(request.request_key.clone()) || direct_overlay_cache_hit {
11098                if let Some(frame_seq) = frame_seq {
11099                    perf_render_requested = Some((
11100                        frame_seq,
11101                        request_key_hash,
11102                        context,
11103                        queue_depth,
11104                        panel_pending,
11105                        MovieFrameOutcome::CacheHitRenderedImage,
11106                    ));
11107                    perf_render_completed = Some((request_key_hash, queue_depth, panel_pending));
11108                }
11109            } else if panel.pending_request_key != Some(request.request_key.clone()) {
11110                if let Some(frame_seq) = frame_seq {
11111                    perf_render_requested = Some((
11112                        frame_seq,
11113                        request_key_hash,
11114                        context,
11115                        queue_depth,
11116                        panel_pending,
11117                        if render_cache_hit {
11118                            MovieFrameOutcome::CacheHitRenderedImage
11119                        } else {
11120                            backend_outcome
11121                        },
11122                    ));
11123                }
11124                let request_result = if state.movie.playing && state.movie.direct_overlay {
11125                    panel.renderer.request_render_only(
11126                        request.request_key.area,
11127                        request.pixel_width,
11128                        request.pixel_height,
11129                        request.input,
11130                    )
11131                } else {
11132                    panel.renderer.request(
11133                        request.request_key.area,
11134                        request.pixel_width,
11135                        request.pixel_height,
11136                        request.input,
11137                    )
11138                };
11139                if let Err(error) = request_result {
11140                    panel.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
11141                    if let Some(frame_seq) = frame_seq {
11142                        perf_drop = Some((
11143                            Some(frame_seq),
11144                            context,
11145                            backend_outcome,
11146                            format!("plane render request failed: {error}"),
11147                        ));
11148                    }
11149                } else {
11150                    startup_render_requested =
11151                        Some((request_key_hash, context, queue_depth, panel_pending));
11152                    panel.pending_request_key = Some(request.request_key);
11153                }
11154            } else if let Some(frame_seq) = frame_seq {
11155                perf_drop = Some((
11156                    Some(frame_seq),
11157                    context,
11158                    MovieFrameOutcome::SkippedDueToPending,
11159                    "plane render already pending for current request".to_string(),
11160                ));
11161                state.movie_frame_seq = None;
11162            }
11163        }
11164
11165        if let Some((frame_seq, request_key_hash, context, queue_depth, panel_pending, outcome)) =
11166            perf_render_requested
11167        {
11168            self.movie_perf.plane_render_requested(
11169                frame_seq,
11170                request_key_hash,
11171                context,
11172                queue_depth,
11173                panel_pending,
11174                outcome,
11175            );
11176        }
11177        if let Some((request_key_hash, queue_depth, panel_pending)) = perf_render_completed {
11178            self.movie_perf
11179                .plane_render_completed(request_key_hash, queue_depth, panel_pending);
11180        }
11181        if let Some((request_key_hash, context, queue_depth, panel_pending)) =
11182            startup_render_requested
11183        {
11184            self.movie_perf.startup_plane_render_requested(
11185                request_key_hash,
11186                context,
11187                queue_depth,
11188                panel_pending,
11189            );
11190        }
11191        if let Some((frame_seq, context, outcome, note)) = perf_drop {
11192            self.movie_perf
11193                .frame_dropped(frame_seq, context, outcome, note);
11194        }
11195    }
11196
11197    fn ensure_image_spectrum_requested(&mut self, layout: &UiLayout) {
11198        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
11199        if self.defer_image_spectrum_render_during_divider_drag() {
11200            return;
11201        }
11202        let split_ratio = self.image_workspace_split_ratio();
11203        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
11204            return;
11205        };
11206        if !state.linked_profile_active() || state.movie.direct_overlay {
11207            return;
11208        }
11209        let overlay_profiles = image_spectrum_overlay_series(state);
11210        let font_size = state
11211            .spectrum_panel
11212            .as_ref()
11213            .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
11214            .unwrap_or_else(|| terminal_picker().font_size());
11215        let snapshot = state.snapshot.clone();
11216        let Some(request) = self.current_image_spectrum_render_request(
11217            layout,
11218            font_size,
11219            &snapshot,
11220            ImageSpectrumRenderRequestOptions {
11221                overlay_profiles: &overlay_profiles,
11222                split_ratio,
11223                theme_mode,
11224                render_scale: 1.0,
11225                max_pixel_size: None,
11226            },
11227        ) else {
11228            return;
11229        };
11230        let startup_render_requested = {
11231            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
11232                return;
11233            };
11234            let request_key_hash = hashed_render_request_key(&request.request_key);
11235            let context = image_movie_perf_context_from_state(
11236                state,
11237                Some(request.request_key.area),
11238                Some((request.pixel_width, request.pixel_height)),
11239                Some(request_key_hash),
11240            );
11241            let panel = state
11242                .spectrum_panel
11243                .get_or_insert_with(new_image_spectrum_panel_state);
11244            let queue_depth = panel.renderer.queue_depth();
11245            let panel_pending = panel.renderer.is_pending();
11246            if panel.display_key == Some(request.request_key.clone())
11247                || panel.pending_request_key == Some(request.request_key.clone())
11248            {
11249                return;
11250            }
11251            // Do not cache cloned PanelProtocol values here: Kitty-backed protocols
11252            // transmit only once, so replaying a clone can produce blank frames.
11253            if let Err(error) = panel.renderer.request(
11254                request.request_key.area,
11255                request.pixel_width,
11256                request.pixel_height,
11257                request.input,
11258            ) {
11259                panel.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
11260                return;
11261            }
11262            panel.pending_request_key = Some(request.request_key);
11263            Some((request_key_hash, context, queue_depth, panel_pending))
11264        };
11265        if let Some((request_key_hash, context, queue_depth, panel_pending)) =
11266            startup_render_requested
11267        {
11268            self.movie_perf.startup_spectrum_render_requested(
11269                request_key_hash,
11270                context,
11271                queue_depth,
11272                panel_pending,
11273            );
11274        }
11275    }
11276
11277    fn advance_image_movie(&mut self) {
11278        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state() else {
11279            return;
11280        };
11281        if !state.movie.playing || state.movie.terminal_looping || !state.movie_available() {
11282            return;
11283        }
11284        let now = Instant::now();
11285        if state
11286            .movie
11287            .last_advanced_at
11288            .is_some_and(|last| now.duration_since(last) < state.movie.frame_interval)
11289        {
11290            return;
11291        }
11292        let Some((axis, index, length)) = state
11293            .selected_non_display_axis_state()
11294            .map(|axis_state| (axis_state.axis, axis_state.index, axis_state.length))
11295        else {
11296            self.stop_image_movie(false, "movie axis unavailable");
11297            return;
11298        };
11299        let delta = if index + 1 < length {
11300            1
11301        } else {
11302            -((length.saturating_sub(1)) as i32)
11303        };
11304        let target_index = if delta > 0 {
11305            index.saturating_add(1)
11306        } else {
11307            0
11308        };
11309        let frame_context = MoviePerfContext {
11310            axis: Some(axis),
11311            axis_index: Some(target_index.min(length.saturating_sub(1))),
11312            axis_length: Some(length),
11313            render_request_key_hash: None,
11314            canvas_cell_size: Some((state.viewport.width, state.viewport.height)),
11315            canvas_pixel_size: Some((
11316                u32::from(state.viewport.plane_pixel_width),
11317                u32::from(state.viewport.plane_pixel_height),
11318            )),
11319            raster_mode: state.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Raster,
11320            direct_overlay: state.movie.direct_overlay,
11321            terminal_looping: state.movie.terminal_looping,
11322            requested_fps_milli: Some((state.movie.fps * 1000.0).round() as u64),
11323        };
11324        let frame_seq = self.movie_perf.begin_frame(frame_context);
11325        if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
11326            state.movie.last_advanced_at = Some(now);
11327            state.movie_frame_seq = frame_seq;
11328        }
11329        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta });
11330    }
11331
11332    fn ensure_plot_requested(&mut self, layout: &UiLayout) {
11333        if !self.result_tab_uses_plot_workspace() {
11334            return;
11335        }
11336        let Some(area) = crate::ui::plot_canvas_area(layout) else {
11337            return;
11338        };
11339        if area.is_empty() {
11340            return;
11341        }
11342        let spec_key = match self.current_plot_spec_key() {
11343            Ok(key) => key,
11344            Err(error) => {
11345                self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = false;
11346                self.result.status_line = "Plot payload unavailable.".to_string();
11347                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
11348                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
11349                return;
11350            }
11351        };
11352        let snapshot_generation = self
11353            .plot_workspace
11354            .snapshot
11355            .as_ref()
11356            .map(|snapshot| snapshot.generation)
11357            .unwrap_or_default();
11358        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
11359        let request_key = PlotRequestKey {
11360            area,
11361            theme_mode,
11362            snapshot_generation,
11363            plot_signature: self.selected_plot_label(),
11364            spec_key,
11365        };
11366        if self
11367            .plot_workspace
11368            .panel
11369            .as_ref()
11370            .is_some_and(|panel| panel.request_key == Some(request_key.clone()))
11371        {
11372            return;
11373        }
11374
11375        let payload = match self.current_plot_payload() {
11376            Ok(payload) => payload,
11377            Err(error) => {
11378                self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = false;
11379                self.result.status_line = "Plot payload unavailable.".to_string();
11380                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
11381                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
11382                return;
11383            }
11384        };
11385
11386        let panel = self.plot_workspace.panel.get_or_insert_with(|| {
11387            let picker = terminal_picker();
11388            let font_size = picker.font_size();
11389            let renderer = PanelRenderer::new(picker, Resize::Fit(None), |job| {
11390                render_plot_image(job.max_pixel_width, job.max_pixel_height, &job.input)
11391            })
11392            .expect("panel renderer");
11393            PlotPanelState {
11394                renderer,
11395                font_size,
11396                request_key: None,
11397                last_error: None,
11398                image_size: None,
11399            }
11400        });
11401        if panel.request_key == Some(request_key.clone()) {
11402            return;
11403        }
11404
11405        let pixel_width = u32::from(area.width.max(1)) * u32::from(panel.font_size.0.max(1));
11406        let pixel_height = u32::from(area.height.max(1)) * u32::from(panel.font_size.1.max(1));
11407        if let Err(error) = panel.renderer.request(
11408            area,
11409            pixel_width.max(1),
11410            pixel_height.max(1),
11411            match payload {
11412                CurrentPlotPayload::MsPlot(payload) => {
11413                    PlotRenderInput::MsExplore(MsExplorePlotRenderInput {
11414                        payload,
11415                        theme_mode,
11416                        terminal_cell_px: panel.font_size,
11417                    })
11418                }
11419                CurrentPlotPayload::Imaging(payload) => {
11420                    PlotRenderInput::Imaging(ImagingPlotRenderInput {
11421                        payload,
11422                        theme_mode,
11423                    })
11424                }
11425            },
11426        ) {
11427            panel.last_error = Some(error.to_string());
11428            self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated = false;
11429            self.result.status_line = "Failed to queue plot render.".to_string();
11430            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
11431            return;
11432        }
11433        panel.request_key = Some(request_key);
11434    }
11435
11436    pub(crate) fn plot_protocol(&self) -> Option<&PanelProtocol> {
11437        self.plot_workspace
11438            .panel
11439            .as_ref()
11440            .and_then(|panel| panel.renderer.protocol())
11441    }
11442
11443    pub(crate) fn plot_display_protocol(&self) -> Option<&PanelProtocol> {
11444        self.plot_protocol()
11445            .or(self.plot_workspace.placeholder_protocol.as_ref())
11446    }
11447
11448    pub(crate) fn plot_pending(&self) -> bool {
11449        self.plot_workspace.preview_invalidated
11450            || self
11451                .plot_workspace
11452                .panel
11453                .as_ref()
11454                .is_some_and(|panel| panel.renderer.is_pending())
11455    }
11456
11457    pub(crate) fn plot_last_error(&self) -> Option<&str> {
11458        self.plot_workspace
11459            .panel
11460            .as_ref()
11461            .and_then(|panel| panel.last_error.as_deref())
11462    }
11463
11464    pub(crate) fn image_plane_protocol(&self) -> Option<&PanelProtocol> {
11465        self.image_browser_session_state()?
11466            .panel
11467            .as_ref()
11468            .and_then(|panel| {
11469                panel
11470                    .movie_protocol
11471                    .as_ref()
11472                    .or_else(|| panel.renderer.protocol())
11473            })
11474    }
11475
11476    pub(crate) fn image_plane_pending(&self) -> bool {
11477        self.image_browser_session_state()
11478            .and_then(|state| state.panel.as_ref())
11479            .is_some_and(|panel| panel.renderer.is_pending())
11480    }
11481
11482    pub(crate) fn image_plane_last_error(&self) -> Option<&str> {
11483        self.image_browser_session_state()?
11484            .panel
11485            .as_ref()
11486            .and_then(|panel| panel.last_error.as_deref())
11487    }
11488
11489    pub(crate) fn current_direct_image_movie_bundle_info(
11490        &self,
11491        layout: &UiLayout,
11492    ) -> Option<ImageDirectMovieBundleInfo> {
11493        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
11494        if !state.movie.playing || !state.raster_plane_active() || !state.movie_available() {
11495            return None;
11496        }
11497        let axis_state = state.selected_non_display_axis_state()?;
11498        let split_ratio = self.image_workspace_split_ratio();
11499        let theme_mode = self.theme_mode();
11500        let plane_font_size = state
11501            .panel
11502            .as_ref()
11503            .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
11504            .unwrap_or_else(|| terminal_picker().font_size());
11505        let plane_request = self.image_plane_render_request_for_snapshot(
11506            layout,
11507            plane_font_size,
11508            &state.snapshot,
11509            ImagePlaneRenderRequestOptions {
11510                show_live_reticle: state.show_live_reticle,
11511                colormap: state.plane_colormap,
11512                invert: state.plane_invert,
11513                overlay_markers: &image_plane_overlay_markers(state),
11514                split_ratio,
11515                theme_mode,
11516                render_scale: 1.0,
11517                max_pixel_size: None,
11518            },
11519        )?;
11520        let mut surface_requests = vec![ImageMovieSurfaceRequest {
11521            kind: ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Plane,
11522            request_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&plane_request.request_key),
11523            cell_size: (
11524                plane_request.request_key.area.width,
11525                plane_request.request_key.area.height,
11526            ),
11527            pixel_size: (plane_request.pixel_width, plane_request.pixel_height),
11528            payload: DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Plane(plane_request.input.clone()),
11529        }];
11530        let mut surfaces = vec![ImageDirectMovieSurfaceInfo {
11531            kind: ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Plane,
11532            canvas: plane_request.request_key.area,
11533            request_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&plane_request.request_key),
11534            pixel_size: (plane_request.pixel_width, plane_request.pixel_height),
11535        }];
11536        if state.linked_profile_active() {
11537            let spectrum_font_size = state
11538                .spectrum_panel
11539                .as_ref()
11540                .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
11541                .unwrap_or_else(|| terminal_picker().font_size());
11542            let overlay_profiles = image_spectrum_overlay_series(state);
11543            if let Some(spectrum_request) = self.current_image_spectrum_render_request(
11544                layout,
11545                spectrum_font_size,
11546                &state.snapshot,
11547                ImageSpectrumRenderRequestOptions {
11548                    overlay_profiles: &overlay_profiles,
11549                    split_ratio,
11550                    theme_mode,
11551                    render_scale: 1.0,
11552                    max_pixel_size: None,
11553                },
11554            ) {
11555                surface_requests.push(ImageMovieSurfaceRequest {
11556                    kind: ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum,
11557                    request_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&spectrum_request.request_key),
11558                    cell_size: (
11559                        spectrum_request.request_key.area.width,
11560                        spectrum_request.request_key.area.height,
11561                    ),
11562                    pixel_size: (spectrum_request.pixel_width, spectrum_request.pixel_height),
11563                    payload: DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Spectrum(
11564                        spectrum_request.input.clone(),
11565                    ),
11566                });
11567                surfaces.push(ImageDirectMovieSurfaceInfo {
11568                    kind: ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum,
11569                    canvas: spectrum_request.request_key.area,
11570                    request_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&spectrum_request.request_key),
11571                    pixel_size: (spectrum_request.pixel_width, spectrum_request.pixel_height),
11572                });
11573            }
11574        }
11575
11576        let movie_key = image_movie_animation_signature(
11577            &state.snapshot,
11578            state.show_live_reticle,
11579            state.plane_colormap,
11580            state.plane_invert,
11581            axis_state.axis,
11582            theme_mode,
11583        );
11584        let prepared = state
11585            .direct_movie_engine
11586            .prepare_bundle(&ImageMovieBundleRequest {
11587                occurrence: ImageMovieOccurrence {
11588                    generation: movie_key,
11589                    movie_key,
11590                    axis: axis_state.axis,
11591                    axis_index: axis_state.index,
11592                    axis_length: axis_state.length,
11593                },
11594                requested_fps: state.movie.fps,
11595                surfaces: surface_requests,
11596            });
11597        Some(ImageDirectMovieBundleInfo {
11598            movie_key,
11599            axis: axis_state.axis,
11600            axis_index: axis_state.index,
11601            axis_length: axis_state.length,
11602            fps: state.movie.fps,
11603            surfaces,
11604            prepared,
11605        })
11606    }
11607
11608    pub(crate) fn current_direct_image_movie_bundle(
11609        &mut self,
11610        layout: &UiLayout,
11611    ) -> Option<ImageDirectMovieBundle> {
11612        let info = self.current_direct_image_movie_bundle_info(layout)?;
11613        let state = self.image_browser_session_state_mut()?;
11614        let (rendered, cache_hit) = state
11615            .direct_movie_engine
11616            .render_or_get_cached(
11617                &info.prepared,
11618                &mut |_, pixel_size: (u32, u32), payload: &DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload| {
11619                    match payload {
11620                        DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Plane(input) => {
11621                            render_image_plane_image(pixel_size.0, pixel_size.1, input)
11622                                .map(|image| image.to_rgb8())
11623                        }
11624                        DirectImageMovieSurfacePayload::Spectrum(input) => {
11625                            render_image_spectrum_image(pixel_size.0, pixel_size.1, input)
11626                                .map(|image| image.to_rgb8())
11627                        }
11628                    }
11629                },
11630            )
11631            .ok()?;
11632        Some(ImageDirectMovieBundle {
11633            rendered,
11634            cache_hit,
11635        })
11636    }
11637
11638    pub(crate) fn current_direct_image_movie_frame_info(
11639        &self,
11640        layout: &UiLayout,
11641    ) -> Option<ImageDirectMovieFrameInfo> {
11642        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
11643        if !state.movie.playing || !state.raster_plane_active() || !state.movie_available() {
11644            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
11645                "direct frame unavailable: playing={} raster_active={} movie_available={} active_view={:?} plane_mode={:?}",
11646                state.movie.playing,
11647                state.raster_plane_active(),
11648                state.movie_available(),
11649                state.snapshot.active_view,
11650                state.plane_mode
11651            ));
11652            return None;
11653        }
11654        let Some(panel) = state.panel.as_ref() else {
11655            crate::movie_debug_log("direct frame unavailable: no panel state");
11656            return None;
11657        };
11658        let Some(request) = self.current_image_direct_plane_render_request(layout, panel.font_size)
11659        else {
11660            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
11661                "direct frame unavailable: no render request area={}x{} font={}x{}",
11662                layout.result_content.width,
11663                layout.result_content.height,
11664                panel.font_size.0,
11665                panel.font_size.1
11666            ));
11667            return None;
11668        };
11669        let Some(axis_state) = state.selected_non_display_axis_state() else {
11670            crate::movie_debug_log("direct frame unavailable: no selected non-display axis");
11671            return None;
11672        };
11673        Some(ImageDirectMovieFrameInfo {
11674            movie_key: image_movie_animation_signature(
11675                &state.snapshot,
11676                state.show_live_reticle,
11677                state.plane_colormap,
11678                state.plane_invert,
11679                axis_state.axis,
11680                self.theme_mode(),
11681            ),
11682            canvas: request.request_key.area,
11683            axis: axis_state.axis,
11684            axis_index: axis_state.index,
11685            axis_length: axis_state.length,
11686            fps: state.movie.fps,
11687            render_request_key_hash: hashed_render_request_key(&request.request_key),
11688        })
11689    }
11690
11691    pub(crate) fn current_direct_image_movie_frame(
11692        &self,
11693        layout: &UiLayout,
11694    ) -> Option<ImageDirectMovieFrame> {
11695        let frame_info = self.current_direct_image_movie_frame_info(layout)?;
11696        let state = self.image_browser_session_state()?;
11697        let panel = state.panel.as_ref()?;
11698        let request = self.current_image_direct_plane_render_request(layout, panel.font_size)?;
11699        let axis_state = state.selected_non_display_axis_state()?;
11700        let display_key_matches = panel.display_key.as_ref() == Some(&request.request_key);
11701        let rendered_image = panel
11702            .render_cache
11703            .lock()
11704            .ok()
11705            .and_then(|mut cache| cache.get(&request.input.cache_key))
11706            .map(DynamicImage::ImageRgb8)
11707            .map(|image| image.to_rgba8())
11708            .or_else(|| {
11709                if panel.display_key.as_ref() == Some(&request.request_key) {
11710                    panel.renderer.rendered_image().and_then(|image| {
11711                        (image.width() == request.pixel_width
11712                            && image.height() == request.pixel_height)
11713                            .then(|| image.clone())
11714                    })
11715                } else {
11716                    None
11717                }
11718            })
11719            .or_else(|| {
11720                match render_image_plane_image(
11721                    request.pixel_width,
11722                    request.pixel_height,
11723                    &request.input,
11724                ) {
11725                    Ok(image) => Some(image.to_rgba8()),
11726                    Err(error) => {
11727                        crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
11728                            "direct frame render error axis={} index={} request={}x{}: {}",
11729                            axis_state.axis,
11730                            axis_state.index,
11731                            request.pixel_width,
11732                            request.pixel_height,
11733                            error
11734                        ));
11735                        None
11736                    }
11737                }
11738            });
11739        let Some(rendered_image) = rendered_image else {
11740            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
11741                "direct frame unavailable: render failed axis={} index={} request={}x{} display_key_match={}",
11742                axis_state.axis,
11743                axis_state.index,
11744                request.pixel_width,
11745                request.pixel_height,
11746                display_key_matches
11747            ));
11748            return None;
11749        };
11750        if crate::movie_debug_enabled() {
11751            let image_hash = {
11752                let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
11753                rendered_image.as_raw().hash(&mut hasher);
11754                hasher.finish()
11755            };
11756            crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
11757                "direct frame ready axis={} index={} len={} request={}x{} image_hash={} display_key_match={} panel_pending={}",
11758                axis_state.axis,
11759                axis_state.index,
11760                axis_state.length,
11761                request.pixel_width,
11762                request.pixel_height,
11763                image_hash,
11764                display_key_matches,
11765                panel.renderer.is_pending()
11766            ));
11767        }
11768        Some(ImageDirectMovieFrame {
11769            movie_key: frame_info.movie_key,
11770            canvas: frame_info.canvas,
11771            axis: frame_info.axis,
11772            axis_index: frame_info.axis_index,
11773            axis_length: frame_info.axis_length,
11774            fps: frame_info.fps,
11775            render_request_key_hash: frame_info.render_request_key_hash,
11776            rendered_image,
11777        })
11778    }
11779
11780    pub(crate) fn set_image_movie_terminal_looping(&mut self, looping: bool) {
11781        let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
11782            return;
11783        };
11784        state.movie.terminal_looping = looping;
11785        crate::movie_debug_log(format!(
11786            "set terminal looping={} playing={} axis_state={}",
11787            looping,
11788            state.movie.playing,
11789            state
11790                .selected_non_display_axis_state()
11791                .map(|axis| format!(
11792                    "axis={} index={} len={}",
11793                    axis.axis, axis.index, axis.length
11794                ))
11795                .unwrap_or_else(|| "none".to_string())
11796        ));
11797        if !looping {
11798            state.movie.last_advanced_at = Some(Instant::now());
11799        }
11800    }
11801
11802    pub(crate) fn set_image_movie_direct_overlay(&mut self, active: bool) {
11803        let Some(context) = ({
11804            let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() else {
11805                return;
11806            };
11807            if state.movie.direct_overlay == active {
11808                return;
11809            }
11810            state.movie.direct_overlay = active;
11811            if !active {
11812                state.movie.last_advanced_at = Some(Instant::now());
11813            }
11814            Some(image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None))
11815        }) else {
11816            return;
11817        };
11818        self.movie_perf.direct_overlay_changed(context, active);
11819    }
11820
11821    pub(crate) fn sync_image_non_display_axis_index(&mut self, axis: usize, index: usize) {
11822        let current_index = self
11823            .image_browser_session_state()
11824            .and_then(|state| {
11825                state
11826                    .snapshot
11827                    .non_display_axes
11828                    .iter()
11829                    .find(|axis_state| axis_state.axis == axis)
11830                    .map(|axis_state| axis_state.index)
11831            })
11832            .unwrap_or(index);
11833        let delta = index as i32 - current_index as i32;
11834        if delta != 0 {
11835            self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::StepImageNonDisplayAxis { axis, delta });
11836        }
11837    }
11838
11839    pub(crate) fn image_spectrum_protocol(&self) -> Option<&PanelProtocol> {
11840        self.image_browser_session_state()?
11841            .spectrum_panel
11842            .as_ref()
11843            .and_then(|panel| {
11844                panel
11845                    .movie_protocol
11846                    .as_ref()
11847                    .or_else(|| panel.renderer.protocol())
11848            })
11849    }
11850
11851    pub(crate) fn image_spectrum_pending(&self) -> bool {
11852        self.image_browser_session_state()
11853            .and_then(|state| state.spectrum_panel.as_ref())
11854            .is_some_and(|panel| panel.renderer.is_pending())
11855    }
11856
11857    pub(crate) fn image_spectrum_last_error(&self) -> Option<&str> {
11858        self.image_browser_session_state()?
11859            .spectrum_panel
11860            .as_ref()
11861            .and_then(|panel| panel.last_error.as_deref())
11862    }
11863
11864    pub(crate) fn image_plane_has_linked_profile(&self) -> bool {
11865        self.image_browser_session_state()
11866            .is_some_and(ImageBrowserSessionState::spectrum_workspace_visible)
11867    }
11868
11869    pub(crate) fn image_profile_title_line(&self) -> Option<String> {
11870        let profile = self
11871            .image_browser_session_state()?
11872            .snapshot
11873            .profile
11874            .as_ref()?;
11875        let kind = if profile.coord_type.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Spectral") {
11876            "Spectrum"
11877        } else {
11878            "Profile"
11879        };
11880        let axis_label = format_profile_axis_label(profile);
11881        let selected = profile
11882            .samples
11883            .get(profile.selected_sample_index)
11884            .map(|sample| format_profile_selected_label(sample, &profile.value_unit))
11885            .unwrap_or_else(|| "<none>".to_string());
11886        Some(format!("{kind}: {axis_label}  Selected: {selected}"))
11887    }
11888
11889    pub(crate) fn plot_focus(&self) -> PlotPaneFocus {
11890        self.plot_workspace.focus
11891    }
11892
11893    pub(crate) fn plot_catalog_rows(&self) -> Vec<PlotCatalogRowView> {
11894        let selected = self.current_plot_catalog_target();
11895        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
11896            let selected_preset = match selected {
11897                Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset)) => Some(preset),
11898                _ => None,
11899            };
11900            return workflow_calibration_catalog_entries(selected_preset)
11901                .into_iter()
11902                .map(|entry| PlotCatalogRowView {
11903                    target: PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(entry.target),
11904                    label: entry.label,
11905                    selected: entry.selected,
11906                })
11907                .collect();
11908        }
11909        if self.app.id == "imager" {
11910            let Some(report) = self.current_imaging_report() else {
11911                return Vec::new();
11912            };
11913            let selected_kind = match selected {
11914                Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(kind)) => kind,
11915                _ => imaging_preferred_diagnostic(report),
11916            };
11917            return imaging_catalog_entries(report, selected_kind)
11918                .into_iter()
11919                .map(|entry| PlotCatalogRowView {
11920                    target: PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(entry.target),
11921                    label: entry.label,
11922                    selected: entry.selected,
11923                })
11924                .collect();
11925        }
11926        let mut rows = Vec::new();
11927        match selected {
11928            Some(PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec) => rows.push(PlotCatalogRowView {
11929                target: PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec,
11930                label: self.selected_plot_label(),
11931                selected: true,
11932            }),
11933            Some(PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot) => rows.push(PlotCatalogRowView {
11934                target: PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot,
11935                label: self.selected_plot_label(),
11936                selected: true,
11937            }),
11938            _ => {}
11939        }
11940        rows.extend(
11941            MsPlotPreset::ALL
11942                .into_iter()
11943                .map(|preset| PlotCatalogRowView {
11944                    target: PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(preset),
11945                    label: preset.display_name().to_string(),
11946                    selected: selected == Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(preset)),
11947                }),
11948        );
11949        rows
11950    }
11951
11952    pub(crate) fn plot_control_rows(&self) -> Vec<PlotControlRowView> {
11953        let mut rows = Vec::new();
11954        let catalog = if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
11955            vec![
11956                (PlotControlTarget::Refresh, "Refresh Preview"),
11957                (PlotControlTarget::ExportPng, "Export PNG"),
11958                (PlotControlTarget::ExportPdf, "Export PDF"),
11959            ]
11960        } else if self.app.id == "imager" {
11961            vec![
11962                (PlotControlTarget::Refresh, "Refresh Preview"),
11963                (PlotControlTarget::ExportPng, "Export PNG"),
11964            ]
11965        } else {
11966            vec![
11967                (PlotControlTarget::Refresh, "Refresh Preview"),
11968                (PlotControlTarget::CopyCli, "Copy CLI"),
11969                (PlotControlTarget::ExportPng, "Export PNG"),
11970                (PlotControlTarget::ExportPdf, "Export PDF"),
11971            ]
11972        };
11973        for (target, label) in catalog {
11974            rows.push(PlotControlRowView {
11975                target,
11976                text: label.to_string(),
11977                selected: false,
11978            });
11979        }
11980        if let Some(row) = rows.get_mut(self.plot_workspace.selected_control) {
11981            row.selected = true;
11982        }
11983        rows
11984    }
11985
11986    pub(crate) fn plot_dirty_banner(&self) -> Option<&'static str> {
11987        None
11988    }
11989
11990    fn scroll_active_plot_workspace(&mut self, delta: i16) {
11991        match self.plot_workspace.focus {
11992            PlotPaneFocus::Catalog => {
11993                let rows = self.plot_catalog_rows();
11994                if rows.is_empty() {
11995                    return;
11996                }
11997                let current = rows.iter().position(|row| row.selected).unwrap_or(0) as i16;
11998                let next = (current + delta).clamp(0, rows.len() as i16 - 1) as usize;
11999                self.apply_plot_catalog_target(rows[next].target);
12000            }
12001            PlotPaneFocus::Controls => {
12002                let row_count = self.plot_control_rows().len() as i16;
12003                let next = (self.plot_workspace.selected_control as i16 + delta)
12004                    .clamp(0, row_count.saturating_sub(1));
12005                self.plot_workspace.selected_control = next as usize;
12006            }
12007            PlotPaneFocus::Canvas => {}
12008        }
12009    }
12010
12011    fn activate_plot_workspace_selection(&mut self) {
12012        match self.plot_workspace.focus {
12013            PlotPaneFocus::Catalog => {}
12014            PlotPaneFocus::Canvas => {}
12015            PlotPaneFocus::Controls => {
12016                let Some(target) = self
12017                    .plot_control_rows()
12018                    .get(self.plot_workspace.selected_control)
12019                    .map(|row| row.target)
12020                else {
12021                    return;
12022                };
12023                match target {
12024                    PlotControlTarget::Refresh => self.clear_plot_render_cache(),
12025                    PlotControlTarget::CopyCli => self.copy_current_plot_cli(),
12026                    PlotControlTarget::ExportPng => self.export_current_plot(MsExportFormat::Png),
12027                    PlotControlTarget::ExportPdf => self.export_current_plot(MsExportFormat::Pdf),
12028                }
12029            }
12030        }
12031    }
12032
12033    fn commit_plot_or_field_edit(&mut self, edit_state: EditState) {
12034        match edit_state.target {
12035            EditTarget::FormField(field_index) => {
12036                if let Some(field) = self.fields.get_mut(field_index) {
12037                    field.set_text(edit_state.buffer);
12038                    self.mark_plot_snapshot_dirty();
12039                }
12040                self.apply_live_image_view_parameters_if_needed(field_index);
12041            }
12042            EditTarget::RenameImageRegionDefinition => {
12043                let new_name = edit_state.buffer.trim();
12044                if new_name.is_empty() {
12045                    self.result.status_line = "Saved region name cannot be empty.".to_string();
12046                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
12047                } else if let Some(name) = self
12048                    .image_browser_session_state()
12049                    .and_then(|state| state.selected_saved_region_name())
12050                    .map(str::to_string)
12051                {
12052                    self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::RenameImageRegionDefinition {
12053                        name,
12054                        new_name: new_name.to_string(),
12055                    });
12056                    self.result.status_line = format!("Renaming saved region to {new_name}...");
12057                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
12058                } else {
12059                    self.result.status_line = "No saved region selected.".to_string();
12060                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
12061                }
12062            }
12063        }
12064    }
12065
12066    fn copy_current_plot_cli(&mut self) {
12067        if matches!(self.app.id.as_str(), "calibrate" | "imager") {
12068            self.result.status_line =
12069                "Copy CLI is not available for this diagnostic workspace.".to_string();
12070            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
12071            return;
12072        }
12073        match self.build_current_msexplore_plot_cli(MsExportFormat::Png) {
12074            Ok(cli) => self.copy_text_to_clipboard(cli, "plot CLI"),
12075            Err(error) => {
12076                self.result.status_line = "Copy plot CLI failed.".to_string();
