12077                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
12078                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
12079            }
12080        }
12081    }
12082
12083    fn export_current_plot(&mut self, format: MsExportFormat) {
12084        let payload = match self.current_plot_payload() {
12085            Ok(payload) => payload,
12086            Err(error) => {
12087                self.result.status_line = "Plot export failed.".to_string();
12088                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
12089                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
12090                return;
12091            }
12092        };
12093        let output_path = self.current_plot_output_path(format);
12094        let width = self.current_plot_export_width();
12095        let height = self.current_plot_export_height();
12096        let export_result = match payload {
12097            CurrentPlotPayload::MsPlot(payload) => export_msexplore_plot(
12098                &payload,
12099                plot_theme(self.theme_mode()),
12100                &output_path,
12101                format,
12102                width,
12103                height,
12104            ),
12105            CurrentPlotPayload::Imaging(payload) => match format {
12106                MsExportFormat::Png => render_plot_image(
12107                    width,
12108                    height,
12109                    &PlotRenderInput::Imaging(ImagingPlotRenderInput {
12110                        payload,
12111                        theme_mode: self.theme_mode(),
12112                    }),
12113                )
12114                .and_then(|image| image.save(&output_path).map_err(|error| error.to_string())),
12115                MsExportFormat::Pdf => {
12116                    Err("PDF export is not available for imaging diagnostics yet.".to_string())
12117                }
12118                MsExportFormat::Txt => {
12119                    Err("Text export is not available for imaging diagnostics.".to_string())
12120                }
12121            },
12122        };
12123        match export_result {
12124            Ok(()) => {
12125                self.result.status_line = format!("Saved {}.", output_path.display());
12126                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
12127            }
12128            Err(error) => {
12129                self.result.status_line = "Plot export failed.".to_string();
12130                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
12131                self.result.stderr = format!("{error}\n");
12132            }
12133        }
12134    }
12135
12136    fn current_plot_output_path(&self, format: MsExportFormat) -> PathBuf {
12137        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
12138            let mut path = self
12139                .field_text("output")
12140                .as_deref()
12141                .map(str::trim)
12142                .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
12143                .map(PathBuf::from)
12144                .unwrap_or_else(|| {
12145                    let slug = self
12146                        .selected_plot_label()
12147                        .to_ascii_lowercase()
12148                        .replace(':', "")
12149                        .replace(['/', ' '], "-");
12150                    PathBuf::from(format!("calibrate-{slug}.{}", format.extension()))
12151                });
12152            path.set_extension(format.extension());
12153            return path;
12154        }
12155        if self.app.id == "imager" {
12156            let slug = self
12157                .selected_plot_label()
12158                .to_ascii_lowercase()
12159                .replace(':', "")
12160                .replace(['/', ' '], "-");
12161            return PathBuf::from(format!("imager-{slug}.{}", format.extension()));
12162        }
12163        self.current_msexplore_output_path(format)
12164    }
12165
12166    fn current_plot_export_width(&self) -> u32 {
12167        if matches!(self.app.id.as_str(), "calibrate" | "imager") {
12168            return 1600;
12169        }
12170        self.current_msexplore_export_width()
12171    }
12172
12173    fn current_plot_export_height(&self) -> u32 {
12174        if matches!(self.app.id.as_str(), "calibrate" | "imager") {
12175            return 900;
12176        }
12177        self.current_msexplore_export_height()
12178    }
12179
12180    fn current_msexplore_output_path(&self, format: MsExportFormat) -> PathBuf {
12181        let configured_path = self.field_text("plot_output").unwrap_or_default();
12182        let trimmed = configured_path.trim();
12183        let mut path = if trimmed.is_empty() {
12184            PathBuf::from(format!("msexplore-plot.{}", format.extension()))
12185        } else {
12186            PathBuf::from(trimmed)
12187        };
12188        path.set_extension(format.extension());
12189        path
12190    }
12191
12192    fn current_msexplore_export_width(&self) -> u32 {
12193        self.field_text("plot_width")
12194            .and_then(|value| value.trim().parse::<u32>().ok())
12195            .filter(|value| *value > 0)
12196            .unwrap_or(1600)
12197    }
12198
12199    fn current_msexplore_export_height(&self) -> u32 {
12200        self.field_text("plot_height")
12201            .and_then(|value| value.trim().parse::<u32>().ok())
12202            .filter(|value| *value > 0)
12203            .unwrap_or(900)
12204    }
12205
12206    fn build_current_msexplore_plot_cli(&self, format: MsExportFormat) -> Result<String, String> {
12207        let mut args = self.build_execution_plan()?.arguments;
12208        let output_path = self.current_msexplore_output_path(format);
12209        if !args.iter().any(|value| value == "--plot-output") {
12210            args.push(OsString::from("--plot-output"));
12211            args.push(output_path.into_os_string());
12212        }
12213        if !args.iter().any(|value| value == "--plot-format") {
12214            args.push(OsString::from("--plot-format"));
12215            args.push(OsString::from(format.extension()));
12216        }
12217        let rendered_args = args
12218            .iter()
12219            .map(|value| shell_quote(&value.to_string_lossy()))
12220            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
12221        Ok(format!("msexplore {}", rendered_args.join(" ")))
12222    }
12223
12224    fn current_plot_catalog_target(&self) -> Option<PlotCatalogTarget> {
12225        if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
12226            return Some(
12227                self.plot_workspace
12228                    .selected_catalog_target
12229                    .unwrap_or_else(|| self.default_calibration_plot_target()),
12230            );
12231        }
12232        if self.app.id == "imager" {
12233            return self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target;
12234        }
12235        if self
12236            .field_text("page_spec")
12237            .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
12238        {
12239            return Some(PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec);
12240        }
12241        if let Some(preset) = self
12242            .field_text("preset")
12243            .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
12244            .and_then(|value| MsPlotPreset::parse(&value).ok())
12245        {
12246            return Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(preset));
12247        }
12248        if self
12249            .field_text("x_axis")
12250            .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
12251            && self
12252                .field_text("y_axis")
12253                .is_some_and(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
12254        {
12255            return Some(PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot);
12256        }
12257        None
12258    }
12259
12260    fn apply_plot_catalog_target(&mut self, target: PlotCatalogTarget) {
12261        match target {
12262            PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset) => {
12263                self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
12264                    Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset));
12265                self.clear_plot_render_cache();
12266            }
12267            PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(kind) => {
12268                self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
12269                    Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Imaging(kind));
12270                self.clear_plot_render_cache();
12271            }
12272            PlotCatalogTarget::Preset(preset) => self.apply_msexplore_preset(preset),
12273            PlotCatalogTarget::CustomPlot | PlotCatalogTarget::PageSpec => {}
12274        }
12275    }
12276
12277    fn apply_msexplore_preset(&mut self, preset: MsPlotPreset) {
12278        if !self.is_msexplore_app() {
12279            return;
12280        }
12281        if let Err(error) = self.apply_startup_text_value("preset", preset.as_str().to_string()) {
12282            self.result.status_line =
12283                format!("Could not select {}: {error}", preset.display_name());
12284            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
12285            return;
12286        }
12287        for (id, value) in [
12288            ("page_spec", ""),
12289            ("x_axis", ""),
12290            ("y_axis", ""),
12291            ("y_axis2", ""),
12292        ] {
12293            if let Err(error) = self.apply_startup_text_value(id, value.to_string()) {
12294                self.result.status_line = format!(
12295                    "Selected {}, but could not reset {id}: {error}",
12296                    preset.display_name()
12297                );
12298                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
12299                return;
12300            }
12301        }
12302        self.plot_workspace.focus = PlotPaneFocus::Catalog;
12303        self.plot_workspace.selected_control = 0;
12304        self.clear_plot_render_cache();
12305        self.result.status_line =
12306            format!("Selected {}. Rendering preview...", preset.display_name());
12307        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
12308    }
12309
12310    fn build_execution_plan(&self) -> Result<ExecutionPlan, String> {
12311        let schema = self
12312            .schema
12313            .as_ref()
12314            .ok_or_else(|| "missing command schema".to_string())?;
12315
12316        let mut arguments = Vec::<OsString>::new();
12317        append_hidden_default_arguments(schema, &mut arguments)?;
12318        let force_selectdata = self.selection_inputs_present();
12319        let calibrate_mode = if self.app.id == "calibrate" {
12320            self.field_text("mode")
12321                .unwrap_or_else(|| "apply".to_string())
12322        } else {
12323            String::new()
12324        };
12325        for field in &self.fields {
12326            if field.schema.id == "selectdata" {
12327                continue;
12328            }
12329            if self.app.id == "calibrate"
12330                && !calibrate_argument_applies_to_mode(field.schema.id.as_str(), &calibrate_mode)
12331            {
12332                continue;
12333            }
12334            field.append_arguments(&mut arguments)?;
12335        }
12336        let include_selectdata = self.app.id != "calibrate"
12337            || calibrate_argument_applies_to_mode("selectdata", &calibrate_mode);
12338        if include_selectdata {
12339            self.append_effective_selectdata_argument(&mut arguments, force_selectdata)?;
12340        }
12341
12342        let output = self.field_text("output");
12343        let listfile = self.field_text("listfile");
12344        if output.as_deref().is_some_and(|value| !value.is_empty())
12345            && listfile.as_deref().is_some_and(|value| !value.is_empty())
12346        {
12347            return Err("Choose either --output or --listfile, not both.".to_string());
12348        }
12349
12350        let file_output_path = output
12351            .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
12352            .or_else(|| listfile.filter(|value| !value.is_empty()));
12353
12354        if let Some(managed_output) = &schema.managed_output {
12355            inject_managed_arguments(&mut arguments, managed_output);
12356        }
12357
12358        Ok(ExecutionPlan {
12359            command: self.app.resolve_command()?,
12360            arguments,
12361            renderer: schema
12362                .managed_output
12363                .as_ref()
12364                .map(|value| value.renderer.clone()),
12365            file_output_path,
12366        })
12367    }
12368
12369    fn commit_edit_buffer(&mut self) {
12370        let Some(edit_state) = self.edit_state.take() else {
12371            return;
12372        };
12373        self.commit_plot_or_field_edit(edit_state);
12374    }
12375
12376    fn field_text(&self, id: &str) -> Option<String> {
12377        self.fields
12378            .iter()
12379            .find(|field| field.schema.id == id)
12380            .and_then(|field| field.text_value())
12381    }
12382
12383    fn non_empty_field_text(&self, id: &str) -> Option<String> {
12384        self.field_text(id).filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
12385    }
12386
12387    fn split_csv_field(&self, id: &str) -> Vec<String> {
12388        self.non_empty_field_text(id)
12389            .into_iter()
12390            .flat_map(|value| {
12391                value
12392                    .split(',')
12393                    .map(str::trim)
12394                    .filter(|item| !item.is_empty())
12395                    .map(ToString::to_string)
12396                    .collect::<Vec<_>>()
12397            })
12398            .collect()
12399    }
12400
12401    fn split_semicolon_field(&self, id: &str) -> Vec<String> {
12402        self.non_empty_field_text(id)
12403            .into_iter()
12404            .flat_map(|value| {
12405                value
12406                    .split(';')
12407                    .map(|item| item.trim().to_string())
12408                    .collect::<Vec<_>>()
12409            })
12410            .collect()
12411    }
12412
12413    fn workflow_chain_setting_values(&self, kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind) -> Vec<String> {
12414        let len = self.split_csv_field("gaintables").len();
12415        let mut values = match kind {
12416            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => self.split_semicolon_field("gainfield"),
12417            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => self.split_semicolon_field("interp"),
12418            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => self.split_semicolon_field("spwmap"),
12419            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => self.split_csv_field("calwt"),
12420        };
12421        values.resize(len, String::new());
12422        values
12423    }
12424
12425    fn workflow_chain_setting_raw_value(
12426        &self,
12427        entry: usize,
12428        kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind,
12429    ) -> String {
12430        match self
12431            .workflow_chain_entries()
12432            .get(entry)
12433            .map(|record| &record.source)
12434        {
12435            Some(WorkflowChainEntrySource::DirectTable) => self
12436                .workflow_chain_setting_values(kind)
12437                .get(entry)
12438                .cloned()
12439                .unwrap_or_default(),
12440            Some(WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibrarySpec { spec, .. }) => {
12441                workflow_callib_setting_raw_value(spec, kind)
12442            }
12443            _ => String::new(),
12444        }
12445    }
12446
12447    fn set_workflow_chain_setting_value(
12448        &mut self,
12449        entry: usize,
12450        kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind,
12451        value: String,
12452    ) {
12453        let len = self.split_csv_field("gaintables").len();
12454        if entry >= len {
12455            return;
12456        }
12457        let field_id = match kind {
12458            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => "gainfield",
12459            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => "interp",
12460            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => "spwmap",
12461            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => "calwt",
12462        };
12463        let separator = match kind {
12464            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => ",",
12465            _ => ";",
12466        };
12467        let mut values = self.workflow_chain_setting_values(kind);
12468        if values.len() < len {
12469            values.resize(len, String::new());
12470        }
12471        values[entry] = value.trim().to_string();
12472        while values.last().is_some_and(|item| item.is_empty()) {
12473            values.pop();
12474        }
12475        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value(field_id, values.join(separator));
12476    }
12477
12478    fn set_workflow_callib_setting_value(
12479        &mut self,
12480        entry: usize,
12481        callib_path: &Path,
12482        spec_index: usize,
12483        kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind,
12484        value: String,
12485    ) -> Result<(), String> {
12486        let mut specs =
12487            load_apply_specs_from_callib(callib_path).map_err(|error| error.to_string())?;
12488        let Some(spec) = specs.get_mut(spec_index) else {
12489            return Err(format!(
12490                "callibrary entry {} no longer exists in {}",
12491                spec_index + 1,
12492                callib_path.display()
12493            ));
12494        };
12495        match kind {
12496            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => {
12497                spec.gainfield = parse_workflow_gainfield_value(&value)?;
12498            }
12499            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => {
12500                spec.interp = parse_workflow_interp_value(&value)?;
12501            }
12502            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => {
12503                spec.spwmap = parse_workflow_spwmap_value(&value)?;
12504            }
12505            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => {
12506                spec.calwt = parse_workflow_calwt_value(&value)?;
12507            }
12508        }
12509        save_apply_specs_to_callib(callib_path, &specs).map_err(|error| error.to_string())?;
12510        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind);
12511        Ok(())
12512    }
12513
12514    fn apply_workflow_chain_setting_value(
12515        &mut self,
12516        entry: usize,
12517        kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind,
12518        value: String,
12519    ) -> Result<(), String> {
12520        let Some(source) = self
12521            .workflow_chain_entries()
12522            .get(entry)
12523            .map(|record| record.source.clone())
12524        else {
12525            return Err("workflow chain entry is no longer available".to_string());
12526        };
12527        match source {
12528            WorkflowChainEntrySource::DirectTable => {
12529                self.set_workflow_chain_setting_value(entry, kind, value);
12530                Ok(())
12531            }
12532            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibrarySpec {
12533                callib_path,
12534                spec_index,
12535                ..
12536            } => {
12537                self.set_workflow_callib_setting_value(entry, &callib_path, spec_index, kind, value)
12538            }
12539            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryFile { .. } => {
12540                Err("select a callibrary entry to edit its policies".to_string())
12541            }
12542            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryError { .. } => {
12543                Err("fix the callibrary parse error before editing entries".to_string())
12544            }
12545        }
12546    }
12547
12548    fn workflow_chain_setting_records(&self, entry: usize) -> Vec<WorkflowChainSettingRecord> {
12549        [
12550            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield,
12551            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp,
12552            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap,
12553            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt,
12554        ]
12555        .into_iter()
12556        .map(|kind| {
12557            let value = self.workflow_chain_setting_display_value(entry, kind);
12558            WorkflowChainSettingRecord {
12559                entry,
12560                kind,
12561                text: render_workflow_detail_display(&WorkflowDetailDisplay {
12562                    label: kind.label().to_string(),
12563                    value,
12564                    indent: 2,
12565                }),
12566            }
12567        })
12568        .collect()
12569    }
12570
12571    fn workflow_chain_setting_display_value(
12572        &self,
12573        entry: usize,
12574        kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind,
12575    ) -> String {
12576        let value = self.workflow_chain_setting_raw_value(entry, kind);
12577        if value.is_empty() {
12578            match kind {
12579                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => "<default>".to_string(),
12580                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => "nearest".to_string(),
12581                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => "<identity>".to_string(),
12582                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => "false".to_string(),
12583            }
12584        } else {
12585            value
12586        }
12587    }
12588
12589    fn workflow_run_snapshots(&self) -> Vec<WorkflowRunSnapshot> {
12590        self.history_entries
12591            .iter()
12592            .filter_map(|entry| {
12593                entry.stage.map(|stage| WorkflowRunSnapshot {
12594                    stage_id: stage.key(),
12595                    sequence: entry.sequence,
12596                })
12597            })
12598            .collect()
12599    }
12600
12601    fn workflow_product_snapshots(&self) -> Vec<WorkflowProductSnapshot> {
12602        self.workflow_products
12603            .iter()
12604            .map(|product| WorkflowProductSnapshot {
12605                stage_id: product.stage.key(),
12606                revision: product.revision,
12607                status: product.status,
12608                dependency_revisions: product.dependency_revisions.clone(),
12609            })
12610            .collect()
12611    }
12612
12613    fn workflow_stage_states(&self) -> Vec<WorkflowStageState> {
12614        workflow_stage_states(
12615            &self.workflow_run_snapshots(),
12616            &self.workflow_product_snapshots(),
12617            self.non_empty_field_text("measurement_set").is_some(),
12618        )
12619    }
12620
12621    fn workflow_stage_state(&self, stage: WorkflowStageId) -> Option<WorkflowStageState> {
12622        self.workflow_stage_states()
12623            .into_iter()
12624            .find(|state| state.id == stage.key())
12625    }
12626
12627    fn active_workflow_dependency_revisions(&self) -> BTreeMap<&'static str, usize> {
12628        let mut revisions = BTreeMap::new();
12629        for product in self
12630            .workflow_products
12631            .iter()
12632            .filter(|product| product.status == WorkflowProductStatus::Active)
12633        {
12634            revisions
12635                .entry(product.stage.key())
12636                .and_modify(|current: &mut usize| *current = (*current).max(product.revision))
12637                .or_insert(product.revision);
12638        }
12639        revisions
12640    }
12641
12642    fn current_workflow_stage(&self) -> WorkflowStageId {
12643        WorkflowStageId::from_mode(
12644            self.field_text("mode")
12645                .as_deref()
12646                .unwrap_or(WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset.cli_mode()),
12647        )
12648    }
12649
12650    fn set_current_workflow_stage(&mut self, stage: WorkflowStageId) {
12651        let previous_stage = self.current_workflow_stage();
12652        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("mode", stage.cli_mode().to_string());
12653        self.ensure_workflow_stage_defaults(Some(previous_stage), stage);
12654        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage);
12655    }
12656
12657    fn ensure_workflow_stage_defaults(
12658        &mut self,
12659        previous_stage: Option<WorkflowStageId>,
12660        stage: WorkflowStageId,
12661    ) {
12662        match stage {
12663            WorkflowStageId::SolveGain
12664            | WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass
12665            | WorkflowStageId::FluxScale => {
12666                let current_output = self.non_empty_field_text("out_table");
12667                let previous_suggestion = previous_stage
12668                    .and_then(|previous| self.workflow_suggested_output_table_path(previous));
12669                let should_update = current_output.is_none()
12670                    || matches!(
12671                        (&current_output, &previous_suggestion),
12672                        (Some(current), Some(previous)) if current == previous
12673                    );
12674                if should_update
12675                    && let Some(path) = self.workflow_suggested_output_table_path(stage)
12676                {
12677                    let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("out_table", path);
12678                }
12679            }
12680            WorkflowStageId::InspectResults => {
12681                if self.current_calibration_plot_table_path().is_none()
12682                    && let Some(path) = self.workflow_latest_inspectable_product_path()
12683                {
12684                    self.apply_inspection_defaults_for_path(path);
12685                }
12686            }
12687            WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset | WorkflowStageId::Apply => {}
12688        }
12689
12690        if stage == WorkflowStageId::FluxScale
12691            && self.non_empty_field_text("fluxscale_input").is_none()
12692            && let Some(path) = self.workflow_latest_stage_product_path(WorkflowStageId::SolveGain)
12693        {
12694            let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("fluxscale_input", path);
12695        }
12696    }
12697
12698    fn workflow_suggested_output_table_path(&self, stage: WorkflowStageId) -> Option<String> {
12699        let base_path = match stage {
12700            WorkflowStageId::FluxScale => self
12701                .non_empty_field_text("fluxscale_input")
12702                .map(PathBuf::from)
12703                .or_else(|| {
12704                    self.non_empty_field_text("measurement_set")
12705                        .map(PathBuf::from)
12706                }),
12707            WorkflowStageId::SolveGain | WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass => self
12708                .non_empty_field_text("measurement_set")
12709                .map(PathBuf::from),
12710            WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset
12711            | WorkflowStageId::Apply
12712            | WorkflowStageId::InspectResults => None,
12713        }?;
12714        suggested_output_table_path(stage, &base_path)
12715    }
12716
12717    fn workflow_latest_stage_product_path(&self, stage: WorkflowStageId) -> Option<String> {
12718        self.workflow_products
12719            .iter()
12720            .filter(|product| {
12721                product.stage == stage && product.status == WorkflowProductStatus::Active
12722            })
12723            .max_by_key(|product| product.revision)
12724            .map(|product| product.path.display().to_string())
12725    }
12726
12727    fn workflow_latest_inspectable_product_path(&self) -> Option<String> {
12728        self.workflow_products
12729            .iter()
12730            .filter(|product| {
12731                product.status == WorkflowProductStatus::Active
12732                    && matches!(
12733                        product.stage,
12734                        WorkflowStageId::SolveGain
12735                            | WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass
12736                            | WorkflowStageId::FluxScale
12737                    )
12738            })
12739            .max_by_key(|product| product.run_sequence)
12740            .map(|product| product.path.display().to_string())
12741    }
12742
12743    fn workflow_stage_row_text(&self, stage: WorkflowStageId) -> String {
12744        let selected = self.current_workflow_stage() == stage;
12745        let Some(state) = self.workflow_stage_state(stage) else {
12746            return render_workflow_stage_display(&WorkflowStageDisplay {
12747                label: stage.label().to_string(),
12748                status: crate::workflow::WorkflowStageStatus::Blocked,
12749                latest_revision: None,
12750                stale_revisions: 0,
12751                run_count: 0,
12752                recommended: false,
12753                selected,
12754            });
12755        };
12756        render_workflow_stage_display(&WorkflowStageDisplay {
12757            label: stage.label().to_string(),
12758            status: state.status,
12759            latest_revision: state.latest_revision,
12760            stale_revisions: state.stale_revisions,
12761            run_count: state.run_count,
12762            recommended: state.recommended,
12763            selected,
12764        })
12765    }
12766
12767    fn workflow_chain_entries(&self) -> Vec<WorkflowChainEntryRecord> {
12768        workflow_chain_entries(
12769            &self.split_csv_field("gaintables"),
12770            self.non_empty_field_text("callib").as_deref(),
12771        )
12772    }
12773
12774    fn workflow_products_section_index(&self) -> usize {
12775        self.sections
12776            .iter()
12777            .position(|section| section.name == "Products")
12778            .unwrap_or(0)
12779    }
12780
12781    fn select_workflow_chain_entry(&mut self, index: usize) {
12782        let Some(entry) = self.workflow_chain_entries().get(index).cloned() else {
12783            return;
12784        };
12785        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index);
12786        match entry.source {
12787            WorkflowChainEntrySource::DirectTable => {
12788                if let Some(path) = entry.inspect_path {
12789                    let path_text = path.display().to_string();
12790                    let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("table_path", path_text.clone());
12791                    let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("summary_paths", path_text.clone());
12792                    let preset = self
12793                        .workflow_products
12794                        .iter()
12795                        .find(|product| product.path == path)
12796                        .and_then(|product| {
12797                            workflow_preferred_diagnostic_preset_for_stage(product.stage)
12798                        })
12799                        .unwrap_or_else(|| {
12800                            preferred_workflow_calibration_preset(
12801                                WorkflowCalibrationArtifactKind::GainLike,
12802                            )
12803                        });
12804                    self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
12805                        Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset));
12806                    self.clear_plot_render_cache();
12807                    self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
12808                    self.result.status_line = format!(
12809                        "Selected chain entry: {}. Enter inspects it. Delete removes it. Ctrl-K/Ctrl-J reorder.",
12810                        path.display()
12811                    );
12812                }
12813            }
12814            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryFile { path } => {
12815                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Products);
12816                self.result.status_line = format!(
12817                    "Selected callibrary file: {}. Delete removes it.",
12818                    path.display()
12819                );
12820            }
12821            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibrarySpec { callib_path, .. } => {
12822                if let Some(path) = entry.inspect_path {
12823                    let path_text = path.display().to_string();
12824                    let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("table_path", path_text.clone());
12825                    let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("summary_paths", path_text.clone());
12826                    let preset = self
12827                        .workflow_products
12828                        .iter()
12829                        .find(|product| product.path == path)
12830                        .and_then(|product| {
12831                            workflow_preferred_diagnostic_preset_for_stage(product.stage)
12832                        })
12833                        .unwrap_or_else(|| {
12834                            preferred_workflow_calibration_preset(
12835                                WorkflowCalibrationArtifactKind::GainLike,
12836                            )
12837                        });
12838                    self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
12839                        Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset));
12840                    self.clear_plot_render_cache();
12841                    self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Diagnostics);
12842                    self.result.status_line = format!(
12843                        "Selected callibrary entry from {}: {}. Enter inspects it. Chain settings edit the file.",
12844                        callib_path.display(),
12845                        path.display()
12846                    );
12847                }
12848            }
12849            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryError { path, message } => {
12850                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Products);
12851                self.result.status_line =
12852                    format!("Callibrary parse error for {}: {}", path.display(), message);
12853                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
12854                return;
12855            }
12856        }
12857        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
12858    }
12859
12860    fn remove_workflow_chain_entry(&mut self, index: usize) {
12861        let entries = self.workflow_chain_entries();
12862        let Some(entry) = entries.get(index).cloned() else {
12863            return;
12864        };
12865        match entry.source {
12866            WorkflowChainEntrySource::DirectTable => {}
12867            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryFile { .. } => {
12868                let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("callib", String::new());
12869                self.result.status_line = "Removed callibrary entry.".to_string();
12870                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
12871                self.selected_form = FormSelection::Section(self.workflow_products_section_index());
12872                self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Products);
12873                return;
12874            }
12875            WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibrarySpec { callib_path, .. }
12876            | WorkflowChainEntrySource::CallibraryError {
12877                path: callib_path, ..
12878            } => {
12879                self.result.status_line = format!(
12880                    "Callibrary entries are managed by {}. Clear or replace the callibrary file to change them.",
12881                    callib_path.display()
12882                );
12883                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
12884                return;
12885            }
12886        }
12887        let mut gaintables = self.split_csv_field("gaintables");
12888        if index < gaintables.len() {
12889            let removed = gaintables.remove(index);
12890            let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("gaintables", gaintables.join(","));
12891            for kind in [
12892                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield,
12893                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp,
12894                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap,
12895                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt,
12896            ] {
12897                let mut values = self.workflow_chain_setting_values(kind);
12898                if index < values.len() {
12899                    values.remove(index);
12900                }
12901                let separator = if kind == WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt {
12902                    ","
12903                } else {
12904                    ";"
12905                };
12906                let field_id = match kind {
12907                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => "gainfield",
12908                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => "interp",
12909                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => "spwmap",
12910                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => "calwt",
12911                };
12912                while values.last().is_some_and(|item| item.is_empty()) {
12913                    values.pop();
12914                }
12915                let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value(field_id, values.join(separator));
12916            }
12917            self.result.status_line = format!("Removed chain entry: {removed}.");
12918            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
12919        }
12920
12921        let updated_entries = self.workflow_chain_entries();
12922        if updated_entries.is_empty() {
12923            self.selected_form = FormSelection::Section(self.workflow_products_section_index());
12924            self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Products);
12925        } else {
12926            self.select_workflow_chain_entry(index.min(updated_entries.len().saturating_sub(1)));
12927        }
12928    }
12929
12930    fn move_selected_workflow_chain_entry(&mut self, forward: bool) {
12931        let FormSelection::WorkflowChainEntry(index) = self.selected_form else {
12932            return;
12933        };
12934        let entries = self.workflow_chain_entries();
12935        if !matches!(
12936            entries.get(index).map(|entry| &entry.source),
12937            Some(WorkflowChainEntrySource::DirectTable)
12938        ) {
12939            self.result.status_line =
12940                "Only direct calibration-table chain entries can be reordered.".to_string();
12941            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
12942            return;
12943        }
12944        let mut gaintables = self.split_csv_field("gaintables");
12945        if index >= gaintables.len() || gaintables.len() < 2 {
12946            return;
12947        }
12948        let target = if forward {
12949            (index + 1).min(gaintables.len() - 1)
12950        } else {
12951            index.saturating_sub(1)
12952        };
12953        if target == index {
12954            return;
12955        }
12956        gaintables.swap(index, target);
12957        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("gaintables", gaintables.join(","));
12958        for kind in [
12959            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield,
12960            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp,
12961            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap,
12962            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt,
12963        ] {
12964            let mut values = self.workflow_chain_setting_values(kind);
12965            if target < values.len() && index < values.len() {
12966                values.swap(index, target);
12967                let separator = if kind == WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt {
12968                    ","
12969                } else {
12970                    ";"
12971                };
12972                let field_id = match kind {
12973                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield => "gainfield",
12974                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => "interp",
12975                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap => "spwmap",
12976                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => "calwt",
12977                };
12978                while values.last().is_some_and(|item| item.is_empty()) {
12979                    values.pop();
12980                }
12981                let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value(field_id, values.join(separator));
12982            }
12983        }
12984        self.select_workflow_chain_entry(target);
12985        self.result.status_line = if forward {
12986            "Moved chain entry down.".to_string()
12987        } else {
12988            "Moved chain entry up.".to_string()
12989        };
12990        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
12991    }
12992
12993    fn promote_selected_workflow_product(&mut self) {
12994        let FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index) = self.selected_form else {
12995            return;
12996        };
12997        let Some(product) = self.workflow_products.get(index).cloned() else {
12998            return;
12999        };
13000        if !matches!(
13001            product.stage,
13002            WorkflowStageId::SolveGain
13003                | WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass
13004                | WorkflowStageId::FluxScale
13005        ) {
13006            self.result.status_line =
13007                "Selected workflow product cannot be promoted into the apply chain.".to_string();
13008            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13009            return;
13010        }
13011
13012        let product_path = product.path.display().to_string();
13013        let mut gaintables = self.split_csv_field("gaintables");
13014        if let Some(existing_index) = gaintables.iter().position(|path| path == &product_path) {
13015            self.select_workflow_chain_entry(existing_index);
13016            self.result.status_line = format!(
13017                "Workflow product already in chain: {}.",
13018                product.path.display()
13019            );
13020            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
13021            return;
13022        }
13023
13024        if self.non_empty_field_text("callib").is_some() {
13025            let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("callib", String::new());
13026        }
13027
13028        let replacement_index = gaintables.iter().position(|path| {
13029            let candidate = PathBuf::from(path);
13030            self.workflow_products
13031                .iter()
13032                .any(|record| record.path == candidate && record.stage == product.stage)
13033        });
13034
13035        let target_index = if let Some(index) = replacement_index {
13036            gaintables[index] = product_path.clone();
13037            index
13038        } else {
13039            gaintables.push(product_path.clone());
13040            gaintables.len() - 1
13041        };
13042
13043        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("gaintables", gaintables.join(","));
13044        if replacement_index.is_none() {
13045            for kind in [
13046                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield,
13047                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp,
13048                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap,
13049                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt,
13050            ] {
13051                let default = match kind {
13052                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => "nearest".to_string(),
13053                    WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => "false".to_string(),
13054                    _ => String::new(),
13055                };
13056                self.set_workflow_chain_setting_value(target_index, kind, default);
13057            }
13058        }
13059        self.select_workflow_chain_entry(target_index);
13060        self.result.status_line = if replacement_index.is_some() {
13061            format!(
13062                "Promoted workflow product into chain, replacing the prior {} table.",
13063                product.stage.label()
13064            )
13065        } else {
13066            format!(
13067                "Promoted workflow product into chain: {}.",
13068                product.path.display()
13069            )
13070        };
13071        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
13072    }
13073
13074    fn promote_latest_workflow_product_from_current_report(&mut self) -> bool {
13075        let Some(report) = self.current_calibration_report() else {
13076            return false;
13077        };
13078        let Some(stage) = workflow_stage_from_report(report) else {
13079            return false;
13080        };
13081        if !matches!(
13082            stage,
13083            WorkflowStageId::SolveGain
13084                | WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass
13085                | WorkflowStageId::FluxScale
13086        ) {
13087            return false;
13088        }
13089
13090        let product_path = match report {
13091            ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveGain(report) => &report.output_table,
13092            ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveBandpass(report) => &report.output_table,
13093            ManagedCalibrationOutput::FluxScale(report) => &report.output_table,
13094            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Gencal(report) => &report.output_table,
13095            ManagedCalibrationOutput::Apply(_)
13096            | ManagedCalibrationOutput::ContinuumSubtract(_)
13097            | ManagedCalibrationOutput::ExportCorrectedData(_)
13098            | ManagedCalibrationOutput::Summary(_)
13099            | ManagedCalibrationOutput::PlanApply(_)
13100            | ManagedCalibrationOutput::Stats(_) => return false,
13101        };
13102
13103        let Some(index) =
13104            self.workflow_products
13105                .iter()
13106                .enumerate()
13107                .rev()
13108                .find_map(|(index, product)| {
13109                    (product.stage == stage && product.path == *product_path).then_some(index)
13110                })
13111        else {
13112            return false;
13113        };
13114
13115        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index);
13116        self.promote_selected_workflow_product();
13117        true
13118    }
13119
13120    fn append_workflow_chain_path(&mut self, path: String) {
13121        let path = path.trim().to_string();
13122        if path.is_empty() {
13123            return;
13124        }
13125        let mut gaintables = self.split_csv_field("gaintables");
13126        if let Some(existing_index) = gaintables.iter().position(|candidate| candidate == &path) {
13127            self.select_workflow_chain_entry(existing_index);
13128            self.result.status_line = format!("Chain already contains {path}.");
13129            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
13130            return;
13131        }
13132        if self.non_empty_field_text("callib").is_some() {
13133            let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("callib", String::new());
13134        }
13135        gaintables.push(path.clone());
13136        let index = gaintables.len() - 1;
13137        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("gaintables", gaintables.join(","));
13138        for kind in [
13139            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Gainfield,
13140            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp,
13141            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Spwmap,
13142            WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt,
13143        ] {
13144            let default = match kind {
13145                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Interp => "nearest".to_string(),
13146                WorkflowChainSettingKind::Calwt => "false".to_string(),
13147                _ => String::new(),
13148            };
13149            self.set_workflow_chain_setting_value(index, kind, default);
13150        }
13151        self.select_workflow_chain_entry(index);
13152        self.result.status_line = format!("Added chain entry: {path}.");
13153        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
13154    }
13155
13156    fn set_workflow_callibrary_path(&mut self, path: String) {
13157        let path = path.trim().to_string();
13158        if path.is_empty() {
13159            return;
13160        }
13161        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("gaintables", String::new());
13162        for field_id in ["gainfield", "interp", "spwmap", "calwt"] {
13163            let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value(field_id, String::new());
13164        }
13165        let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("callib", path.clone());
13166        self.select_workflow_chain_entry(0);
13167        self.result.status_line = format!("Using callibrary: {path}.");
13168        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
13169    }
13170
13171    fn select_workflow_product(&mut self, index: usize) {
13172        let Some(product) = self.workflow_products.get(index).cloned() else {
13173            return;
13174        };
13175        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProduct(index);
13176        let product_path = product.path.display().to_string();
13177        match product.stage {
13178            WorkflowStageId::SolveGain
13179            | WorkflowStageId::SolveBandpass
13180            | WorkflowStageId::FluxScale => {
13181                let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("table_path", product_path.clone());
13182                let _ = self.apply_startup_text_value("summary_paths", product_path.clone());
13183                if let Some(preset) = workflow_preferred_diagnostic_preset_for_stage(product.stage)
13184                {
13185                    self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
13186                        Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset));
13187                }
13188            }
13189            WorkflowStageId::Apply => {
13190                if let Some(preset) = workflow_preferred_diagnostic_preset_for_stage(product.stage)
13191                {
13192                    self.plot_workspace.selected_catalog_target =
13193                        Some(PlotCatalogTarget::Calibration(preset));
13194                }
13195            }
13196            WorkflowStageId::InspectDataset | WorkflowStageId::InspectResults => {}
13197        }
13198        self.clear_plot_render_cache();
13199        self.activate_result_tab(if self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow {
13200            ResultTab::Diagnostics
13201        } else {
13202            ResultTab::Overview
13203        });
13204        self.result.status_line = format!(
13205            "Selected workflow product: {}. Enter inspects it. Shift-P promotes it into the chain.",
13206            product.path.display()
13207        );
13208        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
13209    }
13210
13211    fn activate_workflow_product_action(&mut self, kind: WorkflowProductActionKind) {
13212        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowProductAction(kind);
13213        match kind {
13214            WorkflowProductActionKind::AddSolvedProduct => {
13215                let entries = self.workflow_product_picker_entries();
13216                if entries.is_empty() {
13217                    self.result.status_line =
13218                        "No solved products available to add to the chain yet.".to_string();
13219                    self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13220                    return;
13221                }
13222                self.open_choice_picker_target(
13223                    ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowProductAction(kind),
13224                    "Add Solved Product to Chain".to_string(),
13225                    entries,
13226                    String::new(),
13227                );
13228            }
13229            WorkflowProductActionKind::ImportChainTable => {
13230                let start_hint = self
13231                    .non_empty_field_text("table_path")
13232                    .or_else(|| self.non_empty_field_text("measurement_set"));
13233                let start = chooser_start_path(start_hint.as_deref());
13234                self.open_path_chooser_target(PathChooserTarget::WorkflowImportChainTable, start);
13235            }
13236            WorkflowProductActionKind::ChooseCallibrary => {
13237                let start_hint = self
13238                    .non_empty_field_text("callib")
13239                    .or_else(|| self.non_empty_field_text("measurement_set"));
13240                let start = chooser_start_path(start_hint.as_deref());
13241                self.open_path_chooser_target(PathChooserTarget::WorkflowChooseCallibrary, start);
13242            }
13243        }
13244    }
13245
13246    fn activate_workflow_chain_setting(&mut self, entry: usize, kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind) {
13247        self.selected_form = FormSelection::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind);
13248        self.open_workflow_chain_setting_picker(entry, kind);
13249    }
13250
13251    fn open_workflow_chain_setting_picker(&mut self, entry: usize, kind: WorkflowChainSettingKind) {
13252        let entries = self.workflow_chain_setting_picker_entries(kind);
13253        let current = self.workflow_chain_setting_raw_value(entry, kind);
13254        self.open_choice_picker_target(
13255            ChoicePickerTarget::WorkflowChainSetting(entry, kind),
13256            format!("Choose chain entry {} {}", entry + 1, kind.label()),
13257            entries,
13258            current,
13259        );
13260    }
13261
13262    fn default_plot_result_tab(&self) -> ResultTab {
13263        match self.app.shell_kind() {
13264            AppShellKind::Workflow => ResultTab::Diagnostics,
13265            _ => ResultTab::Plots,
13266        }
13267    }
13268
13269    pub(crate) fn result_tab_uses_plot_workspace(&self) -> bool {
13270        matches!(
13271            self.active_result_tab,
13272            ResultTab::Plots | ResultTab::Diagnostics
13273        )
13274    }
13275
13276    fn current_image_browser_parameters(&self) -> ImageBrowserParameters {
13277        ImageBrowserParameters {
13278            blc: self.field_text("blc").unwrap_or_default(),
13279            trc: self.field_text("trc").unwrap_or_default(),
13280            inc: self.field_text("inc").unwrap_or_default(),
13281            stretch: self
13282                .field_text("stretch")
13283                .unwrap_or_else(|| "percentile99".into()),
13284            autoscale: self
13285                .field_text("autoscale")
13286                .unwrap_or_else(|| "per_plane".into()),
13287            clip_low: self.field_text("clip_low").unwrap_or_default(),
13288            clip_high: self.field_text("clip_high").unwrap_or_default(),
13289        }
13290    }
13291
13292    fn sync_image_parameter_fields(&mut self, parameters: &ImageBrowserParameters) {
13293        sync_image_parameter_fields(&mut self.fields, parameters);
13294    }
13295
13296    fn apply_live_image_view_parameters_if_needed(&mut self, field_index: usize) {
13297        let Some(field) = self.fields.get(field_index) else {
13298            return;
13299        };
13300        if !IMEXPLORE_LIVE_PARAMETER_FIELD_IDS.contains(&field.schema.id.as_str()) {
13301            return;
13302        }
13303        if !self
13304            .browser_session()
13305            .is_some_and(|session| session.kind() == BrowserAppKind::Image)
13306        {
13307            return;
13308        }
13309        if field.schema.id == "fps" {
13310            self.apply_live_image_movie_fps();
13311            return;
13312        }
13313        self.send_browser_command(BrowserRequest::SetImageViewParameters {
13314            parameters: self.current_image_browser_parameters(),
13315        });
13316    }
13317
13318    fn current_image_movie_fps(&self) -> f64 {
13319        self.field_text("fps")
13320            .and_then(|value| parse_image_movie_fps(&value).ok())
13321            .unwrap_or(IMAGE_MOVIE_DEFAULT_FPS)
13322    }
13323
13324    fn apply_live_image_movie_fps(&mut self) {
13325        let fps_text = self.field_text("fps").unwrap_or_else(|| "1".into());
13326        let Ok(fps) = parse_image_movie_fps(&fps_text) else {
13327            self.result.status_line = "FPS must be a positive number.".into();
13328            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13329            return;
13330        };
13331        let context = self
13332            .image_browser_session_state()
13333            .map(|state| image_movie_perf_context_from_state(state, None, None, None))
13334            .unwrap_or_else(|| MoviePerfContext {
13335                requested_fps_milli: Some((fps * 1000.0).round() as u64),
13336                ..MoviePerfContext::default()
13337            });
13338        if let Some(state) = self.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
13339            state.movie.set_fps(fps);
13340        }
13341        self.result.status_line =
13342            format!("Movie FPS set to {}.", trim_float_text(format!("{fps:.3}")));
13343        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
13344        self.movie_perf.fps_changed(context);
13345    }
13346
13347    fn bool_field_value(&self, id: &str) -> Option<bool> {
13348        self.fields
13349            .iter()
13350            .find(|field| field.schema.id == id)
13351            .and_then(|field| match &field.value {
13352                FormValue::Toggle(value) => Some(*value),
13353                _ => None,
13354            })
13355    }
13356
13357    fn verbose_enabled(&self) -> bool {
13358        self.bool_field_value("verbose").unwrap_or(true)
13359    }
13360
13361    fn listunfl_enabled(&self) -> bool {
13362        self.bool_field_value("listunfl").unwrap_or(false)
13363    }
13364
13365    fn visible_result_tabs(&self) -> &'static [ResultTab] {
13366        const CALIBRATION_LEGACY: [ResultTab; 4] = [
13367            ResultTab::Overview,
13368            ResultTab::Plots,
13369            ResultTab::Stdout,
13370            ResultTab::Stderr,
13371        ];
13372        const BROWSER: [ResultTab; 7] = [
13373            ResultTab::Overview,
13374            ResultTab::Structure,
13375            ResultTab::Content,
13376            ResultTab::Inspector,
13377            ResultTab::History,
13378            ResultTab::Stdout,
13379            ResultTab::Stderr,
13380        ];
13381        const INSPECT: [ResultTab; 6] = [
13382            ResultTab::Overview,
13383            ResultTab::Data,
13384            ResultTab::Plots,
13385            ResultTab::History,
13386            ResultTab::Stdout,
13387            ResultTab::Stderr,
13388        ];
13389        const WORKFLOW: [ResultTab; 7] = [
13390            ResultTab::Overview,
13391            ResultTab::Data,
13392            ResultTab::Products,
13393            ResultTab::Diagnostics,
13394            ResultTab::History,
13395            ResultTab::Stdout,
13396            ResultTab::Stderr,
13397        ];
13398        if self.current_calibration_report().is_some() {
13399            return if self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow {
13400                &WORKFLOW
13401            } else {
13402                &CALIBRATION_LEGACY
13403            };
13404        }
13405        match self.app.shell_kind() {
13406            AppShellKind::Inspect => &INSPECT,
13407            AppShellKind::Workflow => &WORKFLOW,
13408            AppShellKind::Browser => &BROWSER,
13409        }
13410    }
13411
13412    fn sync_result_tab_visibility(&mut self) {
13413        if !self.visible_result_tabs().contains(&self.active_result_tab) {
13414            self.clear_output_selection_for_target(OutputPane::Result);
13415            self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
13416        }
13417    }
13418
13419    fn selection_inputs_present(&self) -> bool {
13420        self.fields.iter().any(|field| {
13421            field.schema.group == "Selection"
13422                && field.schema.id != "selectdata"
13423                && match &field.value {
13424                    FormValue::Text(value) => !value.trim().is_empty(),
13425                    FormValue::Choice { value, .. } => !value.trim().is_empty(),
13426                    FormValue::Toggle(_) => false,
13427                }
13428        })
13429    }
13430
13431    fn append_effective_selectdata_argument(
13432        &self,
13433        arguments: &mut Vec<OsString>,
13434        force_selectdata: bool,
13435    ) -> Result<(), String> {
13436        let Some(field) = self
13437            .fields
13438            .iter()
13439            .find(|field| field.schema.id == "selectdata")
13440        else {
13441            return Ok(());
13442        };
13443        let FormValue::Toggle(raw_value) = &field.value else {
13444            return Err("internal selectdata field mismatch".to_string());
13445        };
13446        let effective = *raw_value || force_selectdata;
13447        let UiArgumentParser::Toggle {
13448            true_flags,
13449            false_flags,
13450        } = &field.schema.parser
13451        else {
13452            return Err("internal selectdata parser mismatch".to_string());
13453        };
13454        match (effective, true_flags.first(), false_flags.first()) {
13455            (true, Some(flag), _) => arguments.push(OsString::from(flag)),
13456            (false, _, Some(flag)) => arguments.push(OsString::from(flag)),
13457            _ => {}
13458        }
13459        Ok(())
13460    }
13461
13462    fn cancel_current(&mut self) {
13463        if let Some(session) = self.browser_session.take() {
13464            let _ = session.cancel();
13465            self.result.status_line = "Browser session closed.".to_string();
13466            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Info;
13467            self.pane_focus = PaneFocus::Parameters;
13468            return;
13469        }
13470
13471        let Some(running) = self.running.as_mut() else {
13472            return;
13473        };
13474        if running.cancel_requested {
13475            return;
13476        }
13477        match running.process.cancel() {
13478            Ok(()) => {
13479                running.cancel_requested = true;
13480                self.result.status_line = format!("Cancel requested for {}...", self.app.id);
13481                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13482            }
13483            Err(error) => {
13484                self.result.status_line = "Failed to cancel running command.".to_string();
13485                self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
13486                self.result.stderr.push_str(&format!("{error}\n"));
13487                self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Stderr;
13488            }
13489        }
13490    }
13491
13492    fn finish_execution(&mut self, exit_code: Option<i32>, success: bool) {
13493        let Some(running) = self.running.take() else {
13494            return;
13495        };
13496        self.result.exit_code = exit_code;
13497        self.result.file_output_path = running.file_output_path.clone();
13498
13499        if running.cancel_requested {
13500            self.result.status_line = "Execution canceled.".to_string();
13501            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13502            self.result.structured = None;
13503            self.result.structured_error = Some(
13504                "The child process was canceled before a structured result was available."
13505                    .to_string(),
13506            );
13507            self.active_result_tab = if !self.result.stderr.is_empty() {
13508                ResultTab::Stderr
13509            } else {
13510                ResultTab::Stdout
13511            };
13512            self.record_history_entry(
13513                None,
13514                "Canceled".to_string(),
13515                StatusKind::Warning,
13516                vec!["The child process was canceled before completion.".to_string()],
13517            );
13518            return;
13519        }
13520
13521        if success {
13522            self.result.status_line = "Execution completed successfully.".to_string();
13523            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Ok;
13524            if let Some(path) = running.file_output_path {
13525                self.result.structured = None;
13526                self.result.structured_error = None;
13527                self.result.file_output_path = Some(path);
13528                self.active_result_tab = ResultTab::Overview;
13529                return;
13530            }
13531
13532            if matches!(
13533                running.renderer.as_deref(),
13534                Some("measurementset-summary-v1")
13535            ) {
13536                match serde_json::from_str::<MeasurementSetSummary>(&self.result.stdout) {
13537                    Ok(summary) => {
13538                        self.record_plot_snapshot(summary.clone());
13539                        self.result.structured =
13540                            Some(StructuredResult::MeasurementSetSummary(Box::new(summary)));
13541                        self.result.structured_error = None;
13542                        self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Overview);
13543                        self.record_history_entry(
13544                            None,
13545                            "Inspect Dataset".to_string(),
13546                            StatusKind::Ok,
13547                            vec!["MeasurementSet summary refreshed.".to_string()],
13548                        );
13549                    }
13550                    Err(error) => {
13551                        self.result.structured = None;
13552                        self.result.structured_error =
13553                            Some(format!("Failed to parse structured output: {error}"));
13554                        self.result.status_line =
13555                            "Execution completed, but structured rendering failed.".to_string();
13556                        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13557                        self.active_result_tab = if !self.result.stdout.is_empty() {
13558                            ResultTab::Stdout
13559                        } else {
13560                            ResultTab::Stderr
13561                        };
13562                    }
13563                }
13564            } else if matches!(running.renderer.as_deref(), Some("calibration-report-v1")) {
13565                match serde_json::from_str::<ManagedCalibrationOutput>(&self.result.stdout) {
13566                    Ok(report) => {
13567                        let history_entry =
13568                            Self::calibration_history_entry(&report, self.next_history_sequence());
13569                        self.record_calibration_products(&report, history_entry.sequence);
13570                        self.history_entries.push(history_entry);
13571                        self.result.structured =
13572                            Some(StructuredResult::Calibration(Box::new(report)));
13573                        self.result.structured_error = None;
13574                        self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Overview);
13575                        if let Some(report) = self.current_calibration_report().cloned() {
13576                            self.apply_workflow_post_run_guidance(&report);
13577                        }
13578                    }
13579                    Err(error) => {
13580                        self.result.structured = None;
13581                        self.result.structured_error =
13582                            Some(format!("Failed to parse structured output: {error}"));
13583                        self.result.status_line =
13584                            "Execution completed, but structured rendering failed.".to_string();
13585                        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13586                        self.active_result_tab = if !self.result.stdout.is_empty() {
13587                            ResultTab::Stdout
13588                        } else {
13589                            ResultTab::Stderr
13590                        };
13591                    }
13592                }
13593            } else if matches!(running.renderer.as_deref(), Some("imager-run-v1")) {
13594                match serde_json::from_str::<ManagedImagingOutput>(&self.result.stdout) {
13595                    Ok(report) => {
13596                        self.record_history_entry(
13597                            None,
13598                            "Imaging Run".to_string(),
13599                            StatusKind::Ok,
13600                            imaging_history_details(&report),
13601                        );
13602                        self.result.structured =
13603                            Some(StructuredResult::Imaging(Box::new(report.clone())));
13604                        self.result.structured_error = None;
13605                        self.activate_result_tab(ResultTab::Overview);
13606                        self.apply_imaging_post_run_guidance(&report);
13607                    }
13608                    Err(error) => {
13609                        self.result.structured = None;
13610                        self.result.structured_error =
13611                            Some(format!("Failed to parse structured output: {error}"));
13612                        self.result.status_line =
13613                            "Execution completed, but structured rendering failed.".to_string();
13614                        self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Warning;
13615                        self.active_result_tab = if !self.result.stdout.is_empty() {
13616                            ResultTab::Stdout
13617                        } else {
13618                            ResultTab::Stderr
13619                        };
13620                    }
13621                }
13622            } else {
13623                self.activate_result_tab(if !self.result.stdout.is_empty() {
13624                    ResultTab::Stdout
13625                } else {
13626                    ResultTab::Overview
13627                });
13628                self.record_history_entry(
13629                    None,
13630                    "Command".to_string(),
13631                    StatusKind::Ok,
13632                    vec![self.result.status_line.clone()],
13633                );
13634            }
13635        } else {
13636            self.result.status_line = "Execution failed.".to_string();
13637            self.result.status_kind = StatusKind::Error;
13638            self.result.structured = None;
13639            self.result.structured_error = None;
13640            self.activate_result_tab(if !self.result.stderr.is_empty() {
13641                ResultTab::Stderr
13642            } else {
13643                ResultTab::Stdout
13644            });
13645            self.record_history_entry(
13646                None,
13647                "Command Failed".to_string(),
13648                StatusKind::Error,
13649                vec![self.result.status_line.clone()],
13650            );
13651        }
13652    }
13653
13654    fn overview_lines(&self) -> Vec<String> {
13655        if let Some(report) = self.current_imaging_report() {
13656            return build_imaging_overview_lines(report);
13657        }
13658        if let Some(summary) = self.current_structured_summary() {
13659            let mut lines = Vec::new();
13660            lines.push("MeasurementSet".to_string());
13661            lines.push(format!(
13662                "Path: {}",
13663                summary
13664                    .measurement_set
13665                    .path
13666                    .clone()
13667                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "<in-memory>".to_string())
13668            ));
13669            lines.push(format!(
13670                "Rows: {}   Observations: {}   Fields: {}   SPWs: {}   Antennas: {}",
13671                summary.measurement_set.row_count,
13672                summary.measurement_set.observation_count,
13673                summary.measurement_set.field_count,
13674                summary.measurement_set.spectral_window_count,
13675                summary.measurement_set.antenna_count
13676            ));
13677            lines.push(format!(
13678                "Time range: {} -> {}",
13679                format_optional_mjd_timestamp(summary.measurement_set.start_mjd_seconds),
13680                format_optional_mjd_timestamp(summary.measurement_set.end_mjd_seconds)
13681            ));
13682            lines.push(String::new());
13683            lines.push("Badges".to_string());
13684            lines.push(format!(
13685                "MS_VERSION={}  TimeRef={}  Sources={}  DDIDs={}",
13686                format_optional_float(summary.measurement_set.ms_version),
13687                summary
13688                    .measurement_set
13689                    .time_reference
13690                    .clone()
13691                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string()),
13692                summary.measurement_set.source_count,
13693                summary.measurement_set.data_description_count
13694            ));
13695            lines.push(String::new());
13696            lines.push("Current tabs".to_string());
13697            let tab_labels = self
13698                .visible_result_tabs()
13699                .iter()
13700                .map(|tab| tab.label())
13701                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
13702                .join(", ");
13703            lines.push(format!(
13704                "Use [ and ] or click the tab strip to switch between {tab_labels}."
13705            ));
13706            return lines;
13707        }
13708
13709        if self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Workflow {
13710            return render_workflow_overview_lines(&WorkflowOverviewDisplay {
13711                dataset_path: self
13712                    .non_empty_field_text("measurement_set")
13713                    .or_else(|| self.non_empty_field_text("ms")),
13714                recommended_stage: self
13715                    .current_calibration_report()
13716                    .and_then(|_| {
13717                        self.workflow_stage_states()
13718                            .into_iter()
13719                            .find(|state| state.recommended)
13720                            .and_then(|state| WorkflowStageId::from_key(state.id))
13721                            .map(|stage| stage.label().to_string())
13722                    }),
13723                selected_stage: if self.app.id == "imager" {
13724                    self.field_text("deconvolver")
13725                        .unwrap_or_else(|| "hogbom".to_string())
13726                } else {
13727                    self.current_workflow_stage().label().to_string()
13728                },
13729                active_products: self
13730                    .current_imaging_report()
13731                    .map(|report| report.artifacts.iter().filter(|artifact| artifact.exists).count())
13732                    .unwrap_or_else(|| {
13733                        self.workflow_products
13734                            .iter()
13735                            .filter(|product| product.status == WorkflowProductStatus::Active)
13736                            .count()
13737                    }),
13738                stale_products: 0,
13739                total_products: self
13740                    .current_imaging_report()
13741                    .map(|report| report.artifacts.len())
13742                    .unwrap_or_else(|| self.workflow_products.len()),
13743                guidance:
13744                    "Use Context for dataset/selection, Products for revisions, Stages for the ordered workflow, and Diagnostics for recommended plots/stats."
13745                        .to_string(),
13746                latest_run_lines: self
13747                    .current_calibration_report()
13748                    .map(build_calibration_overview_lines)
13749                    .or_else(|| self.current_imaging_report().map(build_imaging_overview_lines))
13750                    .unwrap_or_default(),
13751            });
13752        }
13753
13754        if self.app.shell_kind() == AppShellKind::Inspect {
13755            return render_inspect_overview_lines(&InspectOverviewDisplay {
13756                dataset_path: self.non_empty_field_text("ms_path"),
13757                current_view: self.selected_summary_view.label().to_string(),
13758                current_plot: Some(self.selected_plot_label()),
13759                tab_labels: self
13760                    .visible_result_tabs()
13761                    .iter()
13762                    .map(|tab| tab.label().to_string())
13763                    .collect(),
13764                guidance:
13765                    "Use Context for dataset selection, Views for summary tables, and Plots for the current interactive preset."
13766                        .to_string(),
13767            });
13768        }
13769        if let Some(path) = &self.result.file_output_path {
13770            return vec![
13771                "Overview".to_string(),
13772                format!("Output written to: {path}"),
13773                "Switch to Stdout or Stderr if the command emitted terminal output.".to_string(),
13774            ];
13775        }
13776
13777        if self.running.is_some() {
13778            return vec![
13779                "Overview".to_string(),
13780                "The process is still running.".to_string(),
13781                "Structured result tabs will populate when the command exits.".to_string(),
13782            ];
13783        }
13784
13785        if let Some(session) = self.browser_session() {
13786            return render_browser_overview_lines(&BrowserOverviewDisplay {
13787                root_path: session.root_path.clone(),
13788                active_view: session.active_tab().label().to_string(),
13789                shell_tab: session.active_tab().shell_result_tab().label().to_string(),
13790                status: session.status_line().to_string(),
13791                browser_kind: self.app.browser_kind().map(|kind| match kind {
13792                    BrowserAppKind::Table => "table".to_string(),
13793                    BrowserAppKind::Image => "image".to_string(),
13794                }),
13795                guidance:
13796                    "Use Structure and Content to inspect the selected browser view, and Inspector for the live value trail."
13797                        .to_string(),
13798            });
13799        }
13800
13801        if let Some(error) = &self.result.structured_error {
13802            return vec![
13803                "Overview".to_string(),
13804                error.clone(),
13805                "Switch to Stdout or Stderr for raw process output.".to_string(),
13806            ];
13807        }
13808
13809        vec![
13810            "Overview".to_string(),
13811            "No structured result available yet.".to_string(),
13812        ]
13813    }
13814}
13815
13816fn build_calibration_overview_lines(report: &ManagedCalibrationOutput) -> Vec<String> {
13817    match report {
13818        ManagedCalibrationOutput::Apply(report) => vec![
13819            "Calibration Apply".to_string(),
13820            format!(
13821                "MS: {}",
13822                report
13823                    .plan
13824                    .measurement_set_path
13825                    .as_ref()
13826                    .map(|path| path.display().to_string())
13827                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "<in-memory>".to_string())
13828            ),
13829            format!(
13830                "Rows selected: {}   Rows updated: {}   Tables: {}",
13831                report.plan.selected_row_count,
13832                report.updated_row_count,
13833                report.plan.calibration_tables.len()
13834            ),
13835            format!(
