13836                "Created CORRECTED_DATA: {}   Wrote MS: {}",
13837                yes_no(report.created_corrected_data_column),
13838                yes_no(report.wrote_measurement_set)
13839            ),
13840            format!(
13841                "Flagged rows: {}   Flagged samples: {}",
13842                report.flagged_row_count, report.flagged_sample_count
13843            ),
13844            format!(
13845                "Timing: total={}  planning={}  save={}",
13846                format_duration_ns(report.timings.total_ns),
13847                format_duration_ns(report.timings.planning_ns),
13848                format_duration_ns(report.timings.save_ns)
13849            ),
13850        ],
13851        ManagedCalibrationOutput::ExportCorrectedData(report) => vec![
13852            "Corrected Data Export".to_string(),
13853            format!("Input MS: {}", report.input_ms.display()),
13854            format!("Output MS: {}", report.output_ms.display()),
13855            format!(
13856                "Rows: {}   Copied: {} -> {}",
13857                report.row_count, report.source_column, report.output_column
13858            ),
13859        ],
13860        ManagedCalibrationOutput::ContinuumSubtract(report) => vec![
13861            "Continuum Subtraction".to_string(),
13862            format!("Input MS: {}", report.input_ms.display()),
13863            format!("Output MS: {}", report.output_ms.display()),
13864            format!(
13865                "Rows: {}   Fitted rows: {}   Skipped fits: {}",
13866                report.row_count, report.fitted_row_count, report.skipped_fit_count
13867            ),
13868            format!(
13869                "Source: {}   Output: {}   Fit order: {}",
13870                report.source_column, report.output_column, report.fit_order
13871            ),
13872        ],
13873        ManagedCalibrationOutput::Summary(summaries) => {
13874            let mut lines = vec![
13875                "Calibration Table Summary".to_string(),
13876                format!("Tables: {}", summaries.len()),
13877            ];
13878            for summary in summaries.iter().take(4) {
13879                lines.push(format!(
13880                    "{}  rows={}  family={:?}  subtype={}",
13881                    summary.path.display(),
13882                    summary.row_count,
13883                    summary.parameter_family,
13884                    summary.table_subtype
13885                ));
13886            }
13887            if summaries.len() > 4 {
13888                lines.push(format!("… {} more tables", summaries.len() - 4));
13889            }
13890            lines
13891        }
13892        ManagedCalibrationOutput::PlanApply(plan) => vec![
13893            "Calibration Apply Plan".to_string(),
13894            format!(
13895                "MS: {}",
13896                plan.measurement_set_path
13897                    .as_ref()
13898                    .map(|path| path.display().to_string())
13899                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "<in-memory>".to_string())
13900            ),
13901            format!(
13902                "Rows selected: {}   Tables: {}   Requires CORRECTED_DATA: {}",
13903                plan.selected_row_count,
13904                plan.calibration_tables.len(),
13905                yes_no(plan.requires_corrected_data_column)
13906            ),
13907            format!(
13908                "Fields: {}   SPWs: {}   DDIDs: {}",
13909                plan.selected_field_ids.len(),
13910                plan.selected_data_spw_ids.len(),
13911                plan.selected_data_desc_ids.len()
13912            ),
13913        ],
13914        ManagedCalibrationOutput::Stats(report) => vec![
13915            "Calibration Stats".to_string(),
13916            format!("Table: {}", report.path.display()),
13917            format!(
13918                "Axis: {:?}   Column: {}   Rows: {}",
13919                report.axis,
13920                report.datacolumn.as_deref().unwrap_or("default"),
13921                report.row_count
13922            ),
13923            format!(
13924                "Points: {}   Flagged: {}   Total: {}",
13925                report.global.npts, report.global.flagged_npts, report.global.total_npts
13926            ),
13927            format!(
13928                "Mean: {:.6}   Median: {:.6}   RMS: {:.6}",
13929                report.global.mean, report.global.median, report.global.rms
13930            ),
13931        ],
13932        ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveGain(report) => vec![
13933            "Gain Solve".to_string(),
13934            format!("Output: {}", report.output_table.display()),
13935            format!(
13936                "Type: {:?}   RefAnt: {}   Rows: {}",
13937                report.gain_type, report.refant_antenna_id, report.solution_row_count
13938            ),
13939            format!(
13940                "Fields: {}   SPWs: {}",
13941                report.field_ids.len(),
13942                report.spectral_window_ids.len()
13943            ),
13944        ],
13945        ManagedCalibrationOutput::SolveBandpass(report) => vec![
13946            "Bandpass Solve".to_string(),
13947            format!("Output: {}", report.output_table.display()),
13948            format!(
13949                "Subtype: {}   RefAnt: {}   Rows: {}",
13950                report.table_subtype, report.refant_antenna_id, report.solution_row_count
13951            ),
13952            format!(
13953                "SPWs: {}   Channels/row: {}",
13954                report.spectral_window_ids.len(),
13955                report.channel_count
13956            ),
13957        ],
13958        ManagedCalibrationOutput::FluxScale(report) => vec![
13959            "Fluxscale".to_string(),
13960            format!("Output: {}", report.output_table.display()),
13961            format!(
13962                "Transfer fields: {}   SPWs: {}",
13963                report.fields.len(),
13964                report.spw_ids.len()
13965            ),
13966        ],
13967        ManagedCalibrationOutput::Gencal(report) => vec![
13968            "Prior Calibration".to_string(),
13969            format!("Output: {}", report.output_table.display()),
13970            format!(
13971                "Type: {:?}   Subtype: {}   Rows: {}",
13972                report.caltype, report.table_subtype, report.row_count
13973            ),
13974            format!(
13975                "Antennas: {}   SPWs: {}",
13976                report.antenna_ids.len(),
13977                report.spectral_window_ids.len()
13978            ),
13979        ],
13980    }
13981}
13982
13983fn build_imaging_overview_lines(report: &ManagedImagingOutput) -> Vec<String> {
13984    let mut lines = vec![
13985        "Imaging Run".to_string(),
13986        format!("MS: {}", report.request.measurement_set),
13987        format!("Image Prefix: {}", report.request.imagename),
13988        format!(
13989            "Mode: {}   Deconvolver: {}   Weighting: {}",
13990            report.request.spectral_mode, report.request.deconvolver, report.request.weighting
13991        ),
13992        format!(
13993            "W-term: {}   Dirty Only: {}   Gridded Samples: {}",
13994            report.request.w_term_mode,
13995            yes_no(report.request.dirty_only),
13996            report.run.gridded_samples
13997        ),
13998        format!(
13999            "Major Cycles: {}   Minor Iterations: {}   Stop: {}",
14000            report.run.major_cycles,
14001            report.run.minor_iterations,
14002            report.run.clean_stop_reason.as_deref().unwrap_or("n/a")
14003        ),
14004    ];
14005    if !report.run.channels.is_empty() {
14006        lines.push(format!(
14007            "Cube planes: {}   Taylor terms: {}",
14008            report.run.channels.len(),
14009            report.request.nterms
14010        ));
14011    }
14012    if !report.run.warnings.is_empty() {
14013        lines.push(String::new());
14014        lines.push("Warnings".to_string());
14015        lines.extend(
14016            report
14017                .run
14018                .warnings
14019                .iter()
14020                .take(4)
14021                .map(|warning| format!("  {warning}")),
14022        );
14023        if report.run.warnings.len() > 4 {
14024            lines.push(format!(
14025                "  … {} more warnings",
14026                report.run.warnings.len() - 4
14027            ));
14028        }
14029    }
14030    lines.push(String::new());
14031    lines.push(format!(
14032        "Frontend timing: {}",
14033        render_managed_stage_timing_summary(&report.run.frontend_timings)
14034    ));
14035    lines.push(format!(
14036        "Core timing: {}",
14037        render_managed_stage_timing_summary(&report.run.stage_timings)
14038    ));
14039    lines
14040}
14041
14042fn imaging_history_details(report: &ManagedImagingOutput) -> Vec<String> {
14043    let mut details = vec![
14044        format!("prefix={}", report.request.imagename),
14045        format!("specmode={}", report.request.spectral_mode),
14046        format!("weighting={}", report.request.weighting),
14047        format!("deconvolver={}", report.request.deconvolver),
14048        format!("gridded_samples={}", report.run.gridded_samples),
14049        format!("major_cycles={}", report.run.major_cycles),
14050        format!("minor_iterations={}", report.run.minor_iterations),
14051    ];
14052    if let Some(stop) = &report.run.clean_stop_reason {
14053        details.push(format!("stop={stop}"));
14054    }
14055    if !report.run.channels.is_empty() {
14056        details.push(format!("channels={}", report.run.channels.len()));
14057    }
14058    details
14059}
14060
14061fn render_managed_stage_timing_summary(timings: &ManagedImagingStageTimings) -> String {
14062    timings
14063        .values_ns
14064        .iter()
14065        .take(4)
14066        .map(|(label, ns)| format!("{label}={}", format_duration_ns(*ns)))
14067        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
14068        .join("  ")
14069}
14070
14071fn calibrate_argument_applies_to_mode(field_id: &str, mode: &str) -> bool {
14072    match field_id {
14073        "mode" | "format" | "output" | "overwrite" => true,
14074        "selectdata" => matches!(
14075            mode,
14076            "apply" | "continuum_subtract" | "solve_gain" | "solve_bandpass"
14077        ),
14078        "measurement_set" => {
14079            matches!(
14080                mode,
14081                "apply"
14082                    | "export_corrected_data"
14083                    | "continuum_subtract"
14084                    | "solve_gain"
14085                    | "solve_bandpass"
14086            )
14087        }
14088        "output_measurement_set" => matches!(mode, "export_corrected_data" | "continuum_subtract"),
14089        "gaintables" | "callib" | "gainfield" | "interp" | "spwmap" | "parang" | "field"
14090        | "spw" | "antenna" | "scan" | "observation" | "array" | "timerange" | "msselect" => {
14091            matches!(
14092                mode,
14093                "apply" | "continuum_subtract" | "solve_gain" | "solve_bandpass"
14094            )
14095        }
14096        "apply_mode" | "calwt" => mode == "apply",
14097        "summary_paths" => mode == "summary",
14098        "table_path" | "stats_axis" | "use_flags" => mode == "stats",
14099        "fit_spw" | "fit_order" => mode == "continuum_subtract",
14100        "stats_datacolumn" => matches!(mode, "stats" | "continuum_subtract"),
14101        "out_table" | "refant" => matches!(mode, "solve_gain" | "solve_bandpass"),
14102        "gain_type" | "solve_mode" | "solint" | "gain_combine" | "gain_model_source"
14103        | "min_snr" => mode == "solve_gain",
14104        "smodel" => matches!(mode, "solve_gain" | "solve_bandpass"),
14105        "solnorm" => matches!(mode, "solve_gain" | "solve_bandpass"),
14106        "bandpass_combine" | "bandtype" => mode == "solve_bandpass",
14107        "fluxscale_input" | "reference_fields" | "transfer_fields" | "refspwmap"
14108        | "gainthreshold" | "incremental" => mode == "fluxscale",
14109        _ => true,
14110    }
14111}
14112
14113fn append_hidden_default_arguments(
14114    schema: &UiCommandSchema,
14115    arguments: &mut Vec<OsString>,
14116) -> Result<(), String> {
14117    for argument in schema
14118        .arguments
14119        .iter()
14120        .filter(|argument| argument.hidden_in_tui)
14121        .filter(|argument| !matches!(argument.parser, UiArgumentParser::Action { .. }))
14122    {
14123        let value = argument.default.as_deref().unwrap_or_default().trim();
14124        if value.is_empty() {
14125            if argument.required {
14126                return Err(format!("{} is required.", argument.label));
14127            }
14128            continue;
14129        }
14130        match &argument.parser {
14131            UiArgumentParser::Positional { .. } => {
14132                arguments.push(path_argument_value(
14133                    argument.value_kind == UiValueKind::Path,
14134                    value,
14135                ));
14136            }
14137            UiArgumentParser::Option { flags, .. } => {
14138                let Some(flag) = flags.first() else {
14139                    continue;
14140                };
14141                arguments.push(OsString::from(flag));
14142                arguments.push(path_argument_value(
14143                    argument.value_kind == UiValueKind::Path,
14144                    value,
14145                ));
14146            }
14147            UiArgumentParser::Toggle {
14148                true_flags,
14149                false_flags,
14150            } => {
14151                let enabled = argument.default_bool().unwrap_or(false);
14152                match (enabled, true_flags.first(), false_flags.first()) {
14153                    (true, Some(flag), _) => arguments.push(OsString::from(flag)),
14154                    (false, _, Some(flag)) => arguments.push(OsString::from(flag)),
14155                    _ => {}
14156                }
14157            }
14158            UiArgumentParser::Action { .. } => {}
14159        }
14160    }
14161    Ok(())
14162}
14163
14164fn yes_no(value: bool) -> &'static str {
14165    if value { "yes" } else { "no" }
14166}
14167
14168fn format_duration_ns(value: u64) -> String {
14169    if value >= 1_000_000_000 {
14170        format!("{:.3}s", value as f64 / 1_000_000_000.0)
14171    } else if value >= 1_000_000 {
14172        format!("{:.3}ms", value as f64 / 1_000_000.0)
14173    } else if value >= 1_000 {
14174        format!("{:.3}us", value as f64 / 1_000.0)
14175    } else {
14176        format!("{value}ns")
14177    }
14178}
14179
14180fn spinner_frames(theme_mode: ThemeMode) -> &'static [&'static str] {
14181    match theme_mode {
14182        ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => DENSE_SPINNER_FRAMES,
14183        ThemeMode::RichPanel => RICH_SPINNER_FRAMES,
14184    }
14185}
14186
14187fn browser_render_theme(theme_mode: ThemeMode) -> BrowserRenderTheme {
14188    match theme_mode {
14189        ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => BrowserRenderTheme::DenseAnsi,
14190        ThemeMode::RichPanel => BrowserRenderTheme::RichPanel,
14191    }
14192}
14193
14194fn seed_app_field_defaults(app_id: &str, fields: &mut [FormField]) {
14195    if app_id != "msexplore" {
14196        return;
14197    }
14198    if let Some(field) = fields
14199        .iter_mut()
14200        .find(|field| field.schema.id == "showlegend")
14201    {
14202        let _ = field.apply_toggle_value(true);
14203    }
14204    if let Some(field) = fields
14205        .iter_mut()
14206        .find(|field| field.schema.id == "legendposition")
14207    {
14208        let _ = field.apply_text_value("exteriorRight".to_string());
14209    }
14210}
14211
14212impl FormField {
14213    fn from_schema(schema: &UiArgumentSchema) -> Option<Self> {
14214        if schema.hidden_in_tui || matches!(schema.parser, UiArgumentParser::Action { .. }) {
14215            return None;
14216        }
14217
14218        let value = match &schema.parser {
14219            UiArgumentParser::Positional { .. } => {
14220                FormValue::Text(schema.default.clone().unwrap_or_default())
14221            }
14222            UiArgumentParser::Option { choices, .. } => {
14223                if choices.is_empty() {
14224                    FormValue::Text(schema.default.clone().unwrap_or_default())
14225                } else {
14226                    FormValue::Choice {
14227                        value: schema.default.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
14228                        choices: choices.clone(),
14229                    }
14230                }
14231            }
14232            UiArgumentParser::Toggle { .. } => {
14233                FormValue::Toggle(schema.default_bool().unwrap_or(false))
14234            }
14235            UiArgumentParser::Action { .. } => return None,
14236        };
14237
14238        Some(Self {
14239            schema: schema.clone(),
14240            value,
14241        })
14242    }
14243
14244    fn render_line(&self, edit_state: Option<&EditState>, field_index: usize) -> String {
14245        let value = match (&self.value, edit_state) {
14246            (_, Some(edit_state)) if edit_state.target == EditTarget::FormField(field_index) => {
14247                format!("{}|", edit_state.buffer)
14248            }
14249            (FormValue::Text(value), _) if value.trim().is_empty() && self.schema.required => {
14250                "<required>".to_string()
14251            }
14252            (FormValue::Text(value), _) if value.trim().is_empty() => "<empty>".to_string(),
14253            (FormValue::Text(value), _) => value.clone(),
14254            (FormValue::Toggle(value), _) => {
14255                if *value {
14256                    "[x]".to_string()
14257                } else {
14258                    "[ ]".to_string()
14259                }
14260            }
14261            (FormValue::Choice { value, .. }, _)
14262                if value.trim().is_empty() && self.schema.required =>
14263            {
14264                "<required>".to_string()
14265            }
14266            (FormValue::Choice { value, .. }, _) if value.trim().is_empty() => {
14267                "<empty>".to_string()
14268            }
14269            (FormValue::Choice { value, .. }, _) => value.clone(),
14270        };
14271        let mut rendered = format!("{:<18} {}", self.schema.label, value);
14272        if self.is_path() {
14273            rendered.push_str(BROWSE_SUFFIX);
14274        }
14275        rendered
14276    }
14277
14278    fn is_path(&self) -> bool {
14279        self.schema.value_kind == UiValueKind::Path
14280    }
14281
14282    fn append_arguments(&self, arguments: &mut Vec<OsString>) -> Result<(), String> {
14283        match (&self.schema.parser, &self.value) {
14284            (UiArgumentParser::Positional { .. }, FormValue::Text(value)) => {
14285                if self.schema.required && value.trim().is_empty() {
14286                    return Err(format!("{} is required.", self.schema.label));
14287                }
14288                if !value.trim().is_empty() {
14289                    arguments.push(path_argument_value(self.is_path(), value));
14290                }
14291            }
14292            (UiArgumentParser::Option { flags, .. }, FormValue::Text(value)) => {
14293                if !value.trim().is_empty() {
14294                    arguments.push(OsString::from(&flags[0]));
14295                    arguments.push(path_argument_value(self.is_path(), value));
14296                }
14297            }
14298            (UiArgumentParser::Option { flags, .. }, FormValue::Choice { value, .. }) => {
14299                if self.schema.required && value.trim().is_empty() {
14300                    return Err(format!("{} is required.", self.schema.label));
14301                }
14302                if !value.trim().is_empty() {
14303                    arguments.push(OsString::from(&flags[0]));
14304                    arguments.push(OsString::from(value));
14305                }
14306            }
14307            (
14308                UiArgumentParser::Toggle {
14309                    true_flags,
14310                    false_flags,
14311                },
14312                FormValue::Toggle(value),
14313            ) => match (*value, true_flags.first(), false_flags.first()) {
14314                (true, Some(flag), _) => arguments.push(OsString::from(flag)),
14315                (false, _, Some(flag)) => arguments.push(OsString::from(flag)),
14316                _ => {}
14317            },
14318            _ => return Err(format!("internal argument mismatch for {}", self.schema.id)),
14319        }
14320        Ok(())
14321    }
14322
14323    fn cycle_choice(&mut self, forward: bool) {
14324        let FormValue::Choice { value, choices } = &mut self.value else {
14325            return;
14326        };
14327        if choices.is_empty() {
14328            return;
14329        }
14330        if value.trim().is_empty() {
14331            *value = if forward {
14332                choices[0].clone()
14333            } else {
14334                choices[choices.len() - 1].clone()
14335            };
14336            return;
14337        }
14338        let position = choices
14339            .iter()
14340            .position(|choice| choice == value)
14341            .unwrap_or(0);
14342        let next = if forward {
14343            (position + 1) % choices.len()
14344        } else if position == 0 {
14345            choices.len() - 1
14346        } else {
14347            position - 1
14348        };
14349        *value = choices[next].clone();
14350    }
14351
14352    fn toggle(&mut self) {
14353        if let FormValue::Toggle(value) = &mut self.value {
14354            *value = !*value;
14355        }
14356    }
14357
14358    fn set_text(&mut self, value: String) {
14359        let _ = self.apply_text_value(value);
14360    }
14361
14362    fn apply_text_value(&mut self, value: String) -> Result<(), String> {
14363        match &mut self.value {
14364            FormValue::Text(current) => {
14365                *current = value;
14366                Ok(())
14367            }
14368            FormValue::Choice {
14369                value: current,
14370                choices,
14371            } => {
14372                if value.trim().is_empty() && !self.schema.required {
14373                    *current = String::new();
14374                    return Ok(());
14375                }
14376                if !choices.is_empty() && !choices.iter().any(|choice| choice == &value) {
14377                    return Err(format!(
14378                        "{} expects one of: {}",
14379                        self.schema.label,
14380                        choices.join(", ")
14381                    ));
14382                }
14383                *current = value;
14384                Ok(())
14385            }
14386            FormValue::Toggle(_) => {
14387                Err(format!("{} does not accept text input", self.schema.label))
14388            }
14389        }
14390    }
14391
14392    fn apply_toggle_value(&mut self, value: bool) -> Result<(), String> {
14393        match &mut self.value {
14394            FormValue::Toggle(current) => {
14395                *current = value;
14396                Ok(())
14397            }
14398            _ => Err(format!("{} is not a toggle", self.schema.label)),
14399        }
14400    }
14401
14402    fn text_value(&self) -> Option<String> {
14403        match &self.value {
14404            FormValue::Text(value) => Some(value.clone()),
14405            FormValue::Choice { value, .. } => Some(value.clone()),
14406            FormValue::Toggle(_) => None,
14407        }
14408    }
14409}
14410
14411fn build_sections(app: &RegistryApp, fields: &[FormField]) -> Vec<FormSection> {
14412    match app.shell_kind() {
14413        AppShellKind::Inspect => build_inspect_sections(&app.id, fields),
14414        AppShellKind::Workflow => build_workflow_sections(&app.id, fields),
14415        AppShellKind::Browser => build_browser_sections(app.browser_kind(), fields),
14416    }
14417}
14418
14419fn build_inspect_sections(app_id: &str, fields: &[FormField]) -> Vec<FormSection> {
14420    if app_id != "msexplore" {
14421        return build_browser_sections(None, fields);
14422    }
14423    let context_ids = [
14424        "ms_path",
14425        "selectdata",
14426        "field",
14427        "spw",
14428        "antenna",
14429        "baseline",
14430        "scan",
14431        "observation",
14432        "array",
14433        "timerange",
14434        "uvrange",
14435        "correlation",
14436        "intent",
14437        "feed",
14438        "taql",
14439    ];
14440    let view_ids = [
14441        "preset",
14442        "page_spec",
14443        "x_axis",
14444        "y_axis",
14445        "y_axis2",
14446        "data_column",
14447        "color_by",
14448        "avgchannel",
14449        "avgtime",
14450        "avgscan",
14451        "avgfield",
14452        "avgbaseline",
14453        "avgantenna",
14454        "avgspw",
14455        "scalar",
14456        "freqframe",
14457        "restfreq",
14458        "veldef",
14459        "iteraxis",
14460        "gridrows",
14461        "gridcols",
14462        "xselfscale",
14463        "yselfscale",
14464        "xsharedaxis",
14465        "ysharedaxis",
14466        "title",
14467        "xlabel",
14468        "ylabel",
14469        "showlegend",
14470        "legendposition",
14471        "showmajorgrid",
14472        "showminorgrid",
14473        "headeritems",
14474        "max_points",
14475    ];
14476    let context = collect_field_items(fields, &context_ids);
14477    let views = SummaryDataView::ALL
14478        .into_iter()
14479        .map(StaticFormItem::SummaryView)
14480        .chain(collect_field_items(fields, &view_ids))
14481        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14482    let used = context_ids
14483        .into_iter()
14484        .chain(view_ids)
14485        .collect::<std::collections::HashSet<_>>();
14486    let controls = fields
14487        .iter()
14488        .enumerate()
14489        .filter(|(_, field)| !used.contains(field.schema.id.as_str()))
14490        .map(|(index, _)| StaticFormItem::Field(index))
14491        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14492    vec![
14493        FormSection {
14494            name: "Context".to_string(),
14495            content: FormSectionContent::Items(context),
14496            collapsed: false,
14497        },
14498        FormSection {
14499            name: "Views".to_string(),
14500            content: FormSectionContent::Items(views),
14501            collapsed: false,
14502        },
14503        FormSection {
14504            name: "Controls".to_string(),
14505            content: FormSectionContent::Items(controls),
14506            collapsed: true,
14507        },
14508    ]
14509}
14510
14511fn build_workflow_sections(app_id: &str, fields: &[FormField]) -> Vec<FormSection> {
14512    if app_id == "imager" {
14513        let context_ids = [
14514            "ms",
14515            "datacolumn",
14516            "field",
14517            "phasecenter_field",
14518            "phasecenter",
14519            "ddid",
14520            "spw",
14521            "channel_start",
14522            "channel_count",
14523            "polarization",
14524        ];
14525        let product_ids = ["imagename", "write_preview_pngs"];
14526        let stage_ids = [
14527            "specmode",
14528            "start",
14529            "width",
14530            "outframe",
14531            "veltype",
14532            "interpolation",
14533            "restfreq",
14534            "restoringbeam",
14535            "perchanweightdensity",
14536            "dirty_only",
14537            "niter",
14538            "threshold_jy",
14539            "deconvolver",
14540            "nterms",
14541            "scales",
14542            "smallscalebias",
14543            "weighting",
14544            "robust",
14545            "uvtaper",
14546            "gridder",
14547            "wprojplanes",
14548            "usepointing",
14549            "write_pb",
14550            "pbcor",
14551            "pblimit",
14552            "wterm",
14553        ];
14554        let stage_parameters = fields
14555            .iter()
14556            .enumerate()
14557            .filter(|(_, field)| field.schema.group == "Stage Parameters")
14558            .map(|(index, _)| StaticFormItem::Field(index))
14559            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14560        return vec![
14561            FormSection {
14562                name: "Context".to_string(),
14563                content: FormSectionContent::Items(collect_field_items(fields, &context_ids)),
14564                collapsed: false,
14565            },
14566            FormSection {
14567                name: "Products".to_string(),
14568                content: FormSectionContent::Items(collect_field_items(fields, &product_ids)),
14569                collapsed: false,
14570            },
14571            FormSection {
14572                name: "Stages".to_string(),
14573                content: FormSectionContent::Items(collect_field_items(fields, &stage_ids)),
14574                collapsed: false,
14575            },
14576            FormSection {
14577                name: "Stage Parameters".to_string(),
14578                content: FormSectionContent::Items(stage_parameters),
14579                collapsed: false,
14580            },
14581        ];
14582    }
14583    if app_id != "calibrate" {
14584        return build_browser_sections(None, fields);
14585    }
14586    let context_ids = [
14587        "measurement_set",
14588        "selectdata",
14589        "field",
14590        "refant",
14591        "reference_fields",
14592        "transfer_fields",
14593        "spw",
14594        "antenna",
14595        "scan",
14596        "observation",
14597        "array",
14598        "timerange",
14599        "msselect",
14600        "parang",
14601    ];
14602    let product_ids: [&str; 0] = [];
14603    let workflow_owned_ids = [
14604        "gaintables",
14605        "callib",
14606        "gainfield",
14607        "interp",
14608        "spwmap",
14609        "calwt",
14610    ];
14611    let stage_param_excluded = context_ids
14612        .into_iter()
14613        .chain(product_ids)
14614        .chain(workflow_owned_ids)
14615        .chain(["mode"])
14616        .collect::<std::collections::HashSet<_>>();
14617    let context = collect_field_items(fields, &context_ids);
14618    let products = collect_field_items(fields, &product_ids);
14619    let stages = WorkflowStageId::ALL
14620        .into_iter()
14621        .map(StaticFormItem::WorkflowStage)
14622        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14623    let stage_parameters = fields
14624        .iter()
14625        .enumerate()
14626        .filter(|(_, field)| !stage_param_excluded.contains(field.schema.id.as_str()))
14627        .map(|(index, _)| StaticFormItem::Field(index))
14628        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14629    vec![
14630        FormSection {
14631            name: "Context".to_string(),
14632            content: FormSectionContent::Items(context),
14633            collapsed: false,
14634        },
14635        FormSection {
14636            name: "Products".to_string(),
14637            content: FormSectionContent::Items(products),
14638            collapsed: false,
14639        },
14640        FormSection {
14641            name: "Stages".to_string(),
14642            content: FormSectionContent::Items(stages),
14643            collapsed: false,
14644        },
14645        FormSection {
14646            name: "Stage Parameters".to_string(),
14647            content: FormSectionContent::Items(stage_parameters),
14648            collapsed: false,
14649        },
14650    ]
14651}
14652
14653fn build_browser_sections(kind: Option<BrowserAppKind>, fields: &[FormField]) -> Vec<FormSection> {
14654    let context = fields
14655        .iter()
14656        .enumerate()
14657        .filter(|(_, field)| field.schema.value_kind == UiValueKind::Path)
14658        .map(|(index, _)| StaticFormItem::Field(index))
14659        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14660    let views = kind
14661        .map(|kind| match kind {
14662            BrowserAppKind::Table => BrowserTab::TABLE_ALL
14663                .into_iter()
14664                .map(StaticFormItem::BrowserView)
14665                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
14666            BrowserAppKind::Image => BrowserTab::IMAGE_ALL
14667                .into_iter()
14668                .map(StaticFormItem::BrowserView)
14669                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
14670        })
14671        .unwrap_or_default();
14672    let tools = fields
14673        .iter()
14674        .enumerate()
14675        .filter(|(_, field)| field.schema.value_kind != UiValueKind::Path)
14676        .map(|(index, _)| StaticFormItem::Field(index))
14677        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14678    vec![
14679        FormSection {
14680            name: "Context".to_string(),
14681            content: FormSectionContent::Items(context),
14682            collapsed: false,
14683        },
14684        FormSection {
14685            name: "Views".to_string(),
14686            content: FormSectionContent::Items(views),
14687            collapsed: false,
14688        },
14689        FormSection {
14690            name: "Tools".to_string(),
14691            content: FormSectionContent::Items(tools),
14692            collapsed: true,
14693        },
14694    ]
14695}
14696
14697fn collect_field_items(fields: &[FormField], ids: &[&str]) -> Vec<StaticFormItem> {
14698    ids.iter()
14699        .filter_map(|id| {
14700            fields
14701                .iter()
14702                .position(|field| field.schema.id == *id)
14703                .map(StaticFormItem::Field)
14704        })
14705        .collect()
14706}
14707
14708fn initial_form_selection(
14709    sections: &[FormSection],
14710    fields: &[FormField],
14711    show_advanced: bool,
14712) -> FormSelection {
14713    for (section_index, section) in sections.iter().enumerate() {
14714        let visible_items = match &section.content {
14715            FormSectionContent::Items(items) => items
14716                .iter()
14717                .copied()
14718                .filter(|item| match item {
14719                    StaticFormItem::Field(index) => {
14720                        show_advanced || !fields[*index].schema.advanced
14721                    }
14722                    StaticFormItem::SummaryView(_)
14723                    | StaticFormItem::BrowserView(_)
14724                    | StaticFormItem::WorkflowStage(_) => true,
14725                })
14726                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
14727        };
14728        if visible_items.is_empty() {
14729            continue;
14730        }
14731        if section.collapsed {
14732            return FormSelection::Section(section_index);
14733        }
14734        return match visible_items[0] {
14735            StaticFormItem::Field(index) => FormSelection::Field(index),
14736            StaticFormItem::SummaryView(view) => FormSelection::SummaryView(view),
14737            StaticFormItem::BrowserView(view) => FormSelection::BrowserView(view),
14738            StaticFormItem::WorkflowStage(stage) => FormSelection::WorkflowStage(stage),
14739        };
14740    }
14741    FormSelection::Section(0)
14742}
14743
14744fn default_summary_view_for_app(app_id: &str) -> SummaryDataView {
14745    match app_id {
14746        "calibrate" | "imager" => SummaryDataView::Fields,
14747        _ => SummaryDataView::Observations,
14748    }
14749}
14750
14751fn popup_index_at(list_area: Rect, column: u16, row: u16, item_count: usize) -> Option<usize> {
14752    if !rect_contains(list_area, column, row) {
14753        return None;
14754    }
14755    let index = row.saturating_sub(list_area.y) as usize;
14756    (index < item_count).then_some(index)
14757}
14758
14759fn dynamic_field_picker_entries(app: &AppState, field_id: &str) -> Option<Vec<ChoicePickerEntry>> {
14760    match field_id {
14761        "field" => {
14762            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14763            Some(
14764                summary
14765                    .fields
14766                    .iter()
14767                    .map(|field| ChoicePickerEntry {
14768                        value: field.field_id.to_string(),
14769                        label: format!("{}  {}", field.field_id, field.name),
14770                    })
14771                    .collect(),
14772            )
14773        }
14774        "spw" => {
14775            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14776            Some(
14777                summary
14778                    .spectral_windows
14779                    .iter()
14780                    .map(|spw| ChoicePickerEntry {
14781                        value: spw.spectral_window_id.to_string(),
14782                        label: format!(
14783                            "{}  {}  {:.6} GHz",
14784                            spw.spectral_window_id,
14785                            spw.name,
14786                            spw.center_frequency_hz / 1.0e9
14787                        ),
14788                    })
14789                    .collect(),
14790            )
14791        }
14792        "antenna" => {
14793            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14794            Some(
14795                summary
14796                    .antennas
14797                    .iter()
14798                    .map(|antenna| ChoicePickerEntry {
14799                        value: antenna.name.clone(),
14800                        label: format!(
14801                            "{}  {} ({})",
14802                            antenna.antenna_id, antenna.name, antenna.station
14803                        ),
14804                    })
14805                    .collect(),
14806            )
14807        }
14808        "refant" => {
14809            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14810            Some(
14811                summary
14812                    .antennas
14813                    .iter()
14814                    .map(|antenna| ChoicePickerEntry {
14815                        value: antenna.name.clone(),
14816                        label: format!("{} ({})", antenna.name, antenna.station),
14817                    })
14818                    .collect(),
14819            )
14820        }
14821        "scan" => {
14822            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14823            let mut seen = HashSet::new();
14824            Some(
14825                summary
14826                    .scans
14827                    .iter()
14828                    .filter(|scan| seen.insert(scan.scan_number))
14829                    .map(|scan| ChoicePickerEntry {
14830                        value: scan.scan_number.to_string(),
14831                        label: format!(
14832                            "{}  field={}  {}",
14833                            scan.scan_number, scan.field_id, scan.field_name
14834                        ),
14835                    })
14836                    .collect(),
14837            )
14838        }
14839        "observation" => {
14840            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14841            Some(
14842                summary
14843                    .observations
14844                    .iter()
14845                    .map(|observation| ChoicePickerEntry {
14846                        value: observation.observation_id.to_string(),
14847                        label: format!(
14848                            "{}  {}  {}",
14849                            observation.observation_id,
14850                            observation.telescope_name,
14851                            observation.project
14852                        ),
14853                    })
14854                    .collect(),
14855            )
14856        }
14857        "array" => {
14858            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14859            let arrays = summary
14860                .scans
14861                .iter()
14862                .map(|scan| scan.array_id)
14863                .collect::<BTreeSet<_>>();
14864            Some(
14865                arrays
14866                    .into_iter()
14867                    .map(|array_id| ChoicePickerEntry {
14868                        value: array_id.to_string(),
14869                        label: format!("Array {array_id}"),
14870                    })
14871                    .collect(),
14872            )
14873        }
14874        "intent" => {
14875            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14876            let intents = summary
14877                .scans
14878                .iter()
14879                .flat_map(|scan| scan.scan_intents.iter().cloned())
14880                .collect::<BTreeSet<_>>();
14881            Some(
14882                intents
14883                    .into_iter()
14884                    .map(|intent| ChoicePickerEntry {
14885                        value: intent.clone(),
14886                        label: intent,
14887                    })
14888                    .collect(),
14889            )
14890        }
14891        "reference_fields" | "transfer_fields" => {
14892            let summary = app.current_structured_summary()?;
14893            Some(
14894                summary
14895                    .fields
14896                    .iter()
14897                    .map(|field| ChoicePickerEntry {
14898                        value: field.name.clone(),
14899                        label: format!("{}  {}", field.field_id, field.name),
14900                    })
14901                    .collect(),
14902            )
14903        }
14904        "gaintables" | "summary_paths" | "table_path" | "fluxscale_input" => {
14905            let entries = app
14906                .workflow_products
14907                .iter()
14908                .filter(|product| product.stage != WorkflowStageId::Apply)
14909                .map(|product| ChoicePickerEntry {
14910                    value: product.path.display().to_string(),
14911                    label: format!(
14912                        "r{}  {}  [{} | {}]",
14913                        product.revision,
14914                        product.path.display(),
14915                        product.family,
14916                        product.status.label()
14917                    ),
14918                })
14919                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14920            (!entries.is_empty()).then_some(entries)
14921        }
14922        _ => None,
14923    }
14924}
14925
14926fn inject_managed_arguments(arguments: &mut Vec<OsString>, managed_output: &UiManagedOutputSchema) {
14927    for argument in &managed_output.inject_arguments {
14928        arguments.push(OsString::from(&argument.flag));
14929        arguments.push(OsString::from(&argument.value));
14930    }
14931}
14932
14933fn raw_lines(label: &str, text: &str) -> Vec<String> {
14934    if text.trim().is_empty() {
14935        vec![format!("No {label} output.")]
14936    } else {
14937        text.lines().map(ToString::to_string).collect()
14938    }
14939}
14940
14941fn build_observations_table(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary) -> TableView {
14942    let header_cells = vec![
14943        "Obs".to_string(),
14944        "Telescope".to_string(),
14945        "Observer".to_string(),
14946        "Project".to_string(),
14947        "Start".to_string(),
14948        "End".to_string(),
14949    ];
14950    let mut widths = header_cells
14951        .iter()
14952        .map(|cell| cell.chars().count())
14953        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14954    let row_cells = summary
14955        .observations
14956        .iter()
14957        .map(|observation| {
14958            let cells = vec![
14959                observation.observation_id.to_string(),
14960                truncate(&observation.telescope_name, 10),
14961                truncate(&observation.observer, 10),
14962                truncate(&observation.project, 12),
14963                format_optional_mjd_timestamp(observation.start_mjd_seconds),
14964                format_optional_mjd_timestamp(observation.end_mjd_seconds),
14965            ];
14966            for (index, cell) in cells.iter().enumerate() {
14967                widths[index] = widths[index].max(cell.chars().count());
14968            }
14969            cells
14970        })
14971        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14972    let rows = row_cells
14973        .iter()
14974        .map(|cells| format_columns(cells, &widths))
14975        .collect();
14976    TableView {
14977        header: format_columns(&header_cells, &widths),
14978        rows,
14979    }
14980}
14981
14982fn build_scans_table(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary, listunfl: bool) -> TableView {
14983    let rows = summary
14984        .scans
14985        .iter()
14986        .map(|scan| {
14987            let start = MvTime::from_mjd_seconds(scan.start_mjd_seconds).format_dmy(1);
14988            let end = MvTime::from_mjd_seconds(scan.end_mjd_seconds).format_time(1);
14989            let field_names = if scan.field_names.is_empty() {
14990                scan.field_name.clone()
14991            } else {
14992                scan.field_names.join(",")
14993            };
14994            let intents = if scan.scan_intents.is_empty() {
14995                "-".to_string()
14996            } else {
14997                scan.scan_intents.join(",")
14998            };
14999            if listunfl {
15000                format!(
15001                    "{:<3} {:<3} {:<23} {:<10} {:<4} {:<4} {:<18} {:<7} {:<8} {:<7} {:<8} {}",
15002                    scan.observation_id,
15003                    scan.array_id,
15004                    start,
15005                    end,
15006                    scan.scan_number,
15007                    scan.field_id,
15008                    truncate(&field_names, 18),
15009                    scan.row_count,
15010                    format_float_compact(scan.unflagged_row_count.unwrap_or(0.0), 2),
15011                    format_i32_list(&scan.spectral_window_ids),
15012                    format_float_list(&scan.mean_interval_seconds_by_spw, 2),
15013                    truncate(&intents, 28),
15014                )
15015            } else {
15016                format!(
15017                    "{:<3} {:<3} {:<23} {:<10} {:<4} {:<4} {:<20} {:<7} {:<7} {:<8} {}",
15018                    scan.observation_id,
15019                    scan.array_id,
15020                    start,
15021                    end,
15022                    scan.scan_number,
15023                    scan.field_id,
15024                    truncate(&field_names, 20),
15025                    scan.row_count,
15026                    format_i32_list(&scan.spectral_window_ids),
15027                    format_float_list(&scan.mean_interval_seconds_by_spw, 2),
15028                    truncate(&intents, 32),
15029                )
15030            }
15031        })
15032        .collect();
15033    let header = if listunfl {
15034        format!(
15035            "{:<3} {:<3} {:<23} {:<10} {:<4} {:<4} {:<18} {:<7} {:<8} {:<7} {:<8} {}",
15036            "Obs",
15037            "Arr",
15038            "Start",
15039            "End",
15040            "Scan",
15041            "Fld",
15042            "Field",
15043            "Rows",
15044            "nUnfl",
15045            "Spws",
15046            "Int(s)",
15047            "Intent"
15048        )
15049    } else {
15050        format!(
15051            "{:<3} {:<3} {:<23} {:<10} {:<4} {:<4} {:<20} {:<7} {:<7} {:<8} {}",
15052            "Obs",
15053            "Arr",
15054            "Start",
15055            "End",
15056            "Scan",
15057            "Fld",
15058            "Field",
15059            "Rows",
15060            "Spws",
15061            "Int(s)",
15062            "Intent"
15063        )
15064    };
15065    TableView { header, rows }
15066}
15067
15068fn build_fields_table(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary, listunfl: bool) -> TableView {
15069    let rows = summary
15070        .fields
15071        .iter()
15072        .map(|field| {
15073            let ra = MvAngle::from_radians(field.phase_direction_radians[0])
15074                .normalized(0.0)
15075                .format_time(6);
15076            let dec = MvAngle::from_radians(field.phase_direction_radians[1]).format_angle_dig2(5);
15077            if listunfl {
15078                format!(
15079                    "{:<5} {:<5} {:<20} {:<16} {:<16} {:<14} {:<6} {:<7} {}",
15080                    field.field_id,
15081                    truncate(&field.code, 5),
15082                    truncate(&field.name, 20),
15083                    ra,
15084                    dec,
15085                    truncate(field.direction_reference.as_deref().unwrap_or("?"), 14),
15086                    field.source_id,
15087                    field.row_count,
15088                    format_float_compact(field.unflagged_row_count.unwrap_or(0.0), 2),
15089                )
15090            } else {
15091                format!(
15092                    "{:<5} {:<5} {:<20} {:<16} {:<16} {:<14} {:<6} {}",
15093                    field.field_id,
15094                    truncate(&field.code, 5),
15095                    truncate(&field.name, 20),
15096                    ra,
15097                    dec,
15098                    truncate(field.direction_reference.as_deref().unwrap_or("?"), 14),
15099                    field.source_id,
15100                    field.row_count,
15101                )
15102            }
15103        })
15104        .collect();
15105    let header = if listunfl {
15106        format!(
15107            "{:<5} {:<5} {:<20} {:<16} {:<16} {:<14} {:<6} {:<7} {}",
15108            "ID", "Code", "Name", "RA", "Dec", "Epoch", "SrcId", "nRows", "nUnflRows"
15109        )
15110    } else {
15111        format!(
15112            "{:<5} {:<5} {:<20} {:<16} {:<16} {:<14} {:<6} {}",
15113            "ID", "Code", "Name", "RA", "Dec", "Epoch", "SrcId", "nRows"
15114        )
15115    };
15116    TableView { header, rows }
15117}
15118
15119fn build_spws_table(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary) -> TableView {
15120    let rows = summary
15121        .spectral_windows
15122        .iter()
15123        .map(|spw| {
15124            format!(
15125                "{:<5} {:<8} {:<6} {:<7} {:<11} {:<12} {:<11} {:<12} {}",
15126                spw.spectral_window_id,
15127                truncate(&spw_display_name(spw.name.as_str()), 8),
15128                spw.num_channels,
15129                truncate(spw.frame.as_deref().unwrap_or("unknown"), 7),
15130                format!("{:.3}", spw.first_channel_frequency_hz / 1.0e6),
15131                format!("{:.3}", spw.channel_width_hz / 1.0e3),
15132                format!("{:.1}", spw.total_bandwidth_hz / 1.0e3),
15133                format!("{:.4}", spw.center_frequency_hz / 1.0e6),
15134                join_corrs(&spw.correlation_types),
15135            )
15136        })
15137        .collect();
15138    TableView {
15139        header: format!(
15140            "{:<5} {:<8} {:<6} {:<7} {:<11} {:<12} {:<11} {:<12} {}",
15141            "SpwID",
15142            "Name",
15143            "#Chans",
15144            "Frame",
15145            "Ch0(MHz)",
15146            "ChanWid(kHz)",
15147            "TotBW(kHz)",
15148            "CtrFreq(MHz)",
15149            "Corrs"
15150        ),
15151        rows,
15152    }
15153}
15154
15155fn build_sources_table(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary) -> TableView {
15156    let rows = summary
15157        .sources
15158        .iter()
15159        .map(|source| {
15160            format!(
15161                "{:<5} {:<20} {:<5} {:<14} {}",
15162                source.source_id,
15163                truncate(&source.name, 20),
15164                if source.spectral_window_id < 0 {
15165                    "any".to_string()
15166                } else {
15167                    source.spectral_window_id.to_string()
15168                },
15169                source
15170                    .rest_frequency_hz
15171                    .map(|value| format!("{:.6}", value / 1.0e6))
15172                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "-".to_string()),
15173                source
15174                    .system_velocity_m_s
15175                    .map(|value| format_float_compact(value / 1.0e3, 3))
15176                    .unwrap_or_else(|| "-".to_string()),
15177            )
15178        })
15179        .collect();
15180    TableView {
15181        header: format!(
15182            "{:<5} {:<20} {:<5} {:<14} {}",
15183            "ID", "Name", "SpwId", "RestFreq(MHz)", "SysVel(km/s)"
15184        ),
15185        rows,
15186    }
15187}
15188
15189fn build_antennas_table(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary) -> TableView {
15190    let rows = summary
15191        .antennas
15192        .iter()
15193        .map(|antenna| {
15194            format!(
15195                "{:<4} {:<6} {:<10} {:>5.1} {:<14} {:<13} {:>9.1} {:>9.1} {:>10.1} {:>14.3} {:>14.3} {:>14.3}",
15196                antenna.antenna_id,
15197                truncate(&antenna.name, 6),
15198                truncate(&antenna.station, 10),
15199                antenna.dish_diameter_m,
15200                MvAngle::from_radians(antenna.longitude_radians).format_angle(1),
15201                MvAngle::from_radians(antenna.latitude_radians).format_angle_dig2(1),
15202                antenna.offset_from_observatory_m[0],
15203                antenna.offset_from_observatory_m[1],
15204                antenna.offset_from_observatory_m[2],
15205                antenna.position_m[0],
15206                antenna.position_m[1],
15207                antenna.position_m[2],
15208            )
15209        })
15210        .collect();
15211    TableView {
15212        header: format!(
15213            "{:<4} {:<6} {:<10} {:<5} {:<14} {:<13} {:>9} {:>9} {:>10} {:>14} {:>14} {:>14}",
15214            "ID",
15215            "Name",
15216            "Station",
15217            "Diam.",
15218            "Long.",
15219            "Lat.",
15220            "East",
15221            "North",
15222            "Elev",
15223            "ITRF x",
15224            "ITRF y",
15225            "ITRF z"
15226        ),
15227        rows,
15228    }
15229}
15230
15231fn build_compact_antenna_lines(summary: &MeasurementSetSummary) -> Vec<String> {
15232    let mut lines = vec![format!(
15233        "Antennas: {} 'name'='station'",
15234        summary.antennas.len()
15235    )];
15236    if summary.antennas.is_empty() {
15237        return lines;
15238    }
15239    let mut line = String::new();
15240    let mut first_id = summary.antennas[0].antenna_id;
15241    let mut last_id = summary.antennas[0].antenna_id;
15242    let max_id = summary
15243        .antennas
15244        .iter()
15245        .map(|antenna| antenna.antenna_id)
15246        .max()
15247        .unwrap_or(first_id);
15248
15249    for antenna in &summary.antennas {
15250        let fragment = format!("'{}'='{}'", antenna.name, antenna.station);
15251        let mut candidate = line.clone();
15252        if !candidate.is_empty() {
15253            candidate.push_str(", ");
15254        }
15255        candidate.push_str(&fragment);
15256        if candidate.len() > 55 && !line.is_empty() {
15257            lines.push(format!("ID={first_id}-{last_id}: {line}"));
15258            line = fragment;
15259            first_id = antenna.antenna_id;
15260        } else {
15261            line = candidate;
15262        }
15263        last_id = antenna.antenna_id;
15264        if antenna.antenna_id == max_id {
15265            lines.push(format!("ID={first_id}-{last_id}: {line}"));
15266        }
15267    }
15268    lines
15269}
15270
15271fn format_optional_float(value: Option<f64>) -> String {
15272    value
15273        .map(|value| format!("{value:.3}"))
15274        .unwrap_or_else(|| "n/a".to_string())
15275}
15276
15277fn format_optional_mjd_timestamp(value: Option<f64>) -> String {
15278    value
15279        .map(|value| MvTime::from_mjd_seconds(value).format_dmy(1))
15280        .unwrap_or_else(|| "n/a".to_string())
15281}
15282
15283fn format_float_compact(value: f64, decimals: usize) -> String {
15284    let mut text = format!("{value:.decimals$}");
15285    while text.contains('.') && text.ends_with('0') {
15286        text.pop();
15287    }
15288    if text.ends_with('.') {
15289        text.pop();
15290    }
15291    text
15292}
15293
15294fn format_i32_list(values: &[i32]) -> String {
15295    format!(
15296        "[{}]",
15297        values
15298            .iter()
15299            .map(i32::to_string)
15300            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
15301            .join(",")
15302    )
15303}
15304
15305fn format_float_list(values: &[f64], decimals: usize) -> String {
15306    format!(
15307        "[{}]",
15308        values
15309            .iter()
15310            .map(|value| format_float_compact(*value, decimals))
15311            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
15312            .join(",")
15313    )
15314}
15315
15316fn join_corrs(values: &[String]) -> String {
15317    values
15318        .iter()
15319        .map(|value| format!("{value:<4}"))
15320        .collect::<String>()
15321        .trim_end()
15322        .to_string()
15323}
15324
15325impl VisibleTextLine {
15326    fn plain(text: String) -> Self {
15327        let roles = text.chars().map(|_| VisibleTextRole::Plain).collect();
15328        Self { text, roles }
15329    }
15330
15331    fn table_header(text: String) -> Self {
15332        let roles = text.chars().map(|_| VisibleTextRole::TableHeader).collect();
15333        Self { text, roles }
15334    }
15335}
15336
15337fn rect_contains(rect: Rect, column: u16, row: u16) -> bool {
15338    column >= rect.x
15339        && column < rect.x.saturating_add(rect.width)
15340        && row >= rect.y
15341        && row < rect.y.saturating_add(rect.height)
15342}
15343
15344fn result_text_area(layout: &UiLayout) -> Rect {
15345    Rect {
15346        x: layout.result_content.x,
15347        y: layout.result_content.y,
15348        width: layout
15349            .result_content
15350            .width
15351            .saturating_sub(if layout.result_scrollbar.is_some() {
15352                1
15353            } else {
15354                0
15355            }),
15356        height: layout.result_content.height.saturating_sub(
15357            if layout.result_hscrollbar.is_some() {
15358                1
15359            } else {
15360                0
15361            },
15362        ),
15363    }
15364}
15365
15366fn left_output_area(app: &AppState, layout: &UiLayout) -> Option<Rect> {
15367    if app.browser_is_active()
15368        && !app.browser_uses_parameter_pane()
15369        && layout.form_inner.width > 0
15370        && layout.form_inner.height > 0
15371    {
15372        Some(layout.form_inner)
15373    } else {
15374        None
15375    }
15376}
15377
15378fn normalize_selection(selection: OutputSelection) -> (usize, usize, usize, usize) {
15379    (
15380        selection.anchor.row.min(selection.cursor.row),
15381        selection.anchor.row.max(selection.cursor.row),
15382        selection.anchor.col.min(selection.cursor.col),
15383        selection.anchor.col.max(selection.cursor.col),
15384    )
15385}
15386
15387fn clamp_point_to_buffer(buffer: &VisibleTextBuffer, column: u16, row: u16) -> BufferPoint {
15388    let relative_row = row.saturating_sub(buffer.area.y) as usize;
15389    let row = relative_row.min(buffer.lines.len().saturating_sub(1));
15390    let line_len = buffer
15391        .lines
15392        .get(row)
15393        .map(|line| line.text.chars().count())
15394        .unwrap_or(0);
15395    let relative_col = column.saturating_sub(buffer.area.x) as usize;
15396    let col = if line_len == 0 {
15397        0
15398    } else {
15399        relative_col.min(line_len.saturating_sub(1))
15400    };
15401    BufferPoint { row, col }
15402}
15403
15404fn extract_selected_text(buffer: &VisibleTextBuffer, selection: OutputSelection) -> String {
15405    let (row_start, row_end, col_start, col_end) = normalize_selection(selection);
15406    (row_start..=row_end)
15407        .filter_map(|row| buffer.lines.get(row))
15408        .map(|line| {
15409            slice_chars(&line.text, col_start, col_end.saturating_add(1))
15410                .trim_end_matches(' ')
15411                .to_string()
15412        })
15413        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
15414        .join("\n")
15415}
15416
15417fn browser_cells_visible_line(raw_line: &str) -> VisibleTextLine {
15418    if !raw_line.contains('|') {
15419        return VisibleTextLine::plain(raw_line.to_string());
15420    }
15421
15422    let is_header = raw_line.trim_start().starts_with("row ");
15423    let mut text = String::new();
15424    let mut roles = Vec::new();
15425    for (index, segment) in raw_line.split('|').enumerate() {
15426        if index > 0 {
15427            text.push('│');
15428            roles.push(VisibleTextRole::BrowserSeparator);
15429        }
15430        let (visible, role) = if let Some(selected) = strip_browser_selection_markers(segment) {
15431            (selected, VisibleTextRole::BrowserSelectedCell)
15432        } else if is_header {
15433            (segment.to_string(), VisibleTextRole::TableHeader)
15434        } else {
15435            (segment.to_string(), VisibleTextRole::Plain)
15436        };
15437        roles.extend(visible.chars().map(|_| role));
15438        text.push_str(&visible);
15439    }
15440    VisibleTextLine { text, roles }
15441}
15442
15443fn image_browser_visible_line(
15444    raw_line: &str,
15445    plane_view: bool,
15446    offset: usize,
15447    width: usize,
15448) -> VisibleTextLine {
15449    let line = if plane_view {
15450        image_plane_visible_line(raw_line)
15451    } else {
15452        VisibleTextLine::plain(raw_line.to_string())
15453    };
15454    slice_visible_line(&line, offset, width)
15455}
15456
15457fn image_plane_visible_line(raw_line: &str) -> VisibleTextLine {
15458    let mut text = String::new();
15459    let mut roles = Vec::new();
15460    let mut in_selected_cell = false;
15461
15462    for ch in raw_line.chars() {
15463        if ch == '[' {
15464            in_selected_cell = true;
15465        }
15466        let role = if in_selected_cell {
15467            VisibleTextRole::BrowserSelectedCell
15468        } else {
15469            VisibleTextRole::Plain
15470        };
15471        text.push(ch);
15472        roles.push(role);
15473        if ch == ']' {
15474            in_selected_cell = false;
15475        }
15476    }
15477
15478    VisibleTextLine { text, roles }
15479}
15480
15481fn strip_browser_selection_markers(segment: &str) -> Option<String> {
15482    let mut chars = segment.chars().collect::<Vec<_>>();
15483    let first = chars
15484        .iter()
15485        .position(|character| !character.is_whitespace())?;
15486    let last = chars
15487        .iter()
15488        .rposition(|character| !character.is_whitespace())?;
15489    if chars[first] != '>' || chars[last] != '<' {
15490        return None;
15491    }
15492    chars[first] = ' ';
15493    chars[last] = ' ';
15494    Some(chars.into_iter().collect())
15495}
15496
15497fn slice_visible_text(text: &str, offset: usize, width: usize) -> String {
15498    if width == 0 {
15499        return String::new();
15500    }
15501    text.chars().skip(offset).take(width).collect()
15502}
15503
15504fn slice_visible_line(line: &VisibleTextLine, offset: usize, width: usize) -> VisibleTextLine {
15505    if width == 0 {
15506        return VisibleTextLine::plain(String::new());
15507    }
15508
15509    let chars = line.text.chars().collect::<Vec<_>>();
15510    if offset >= chars.len() {
15511        return VisibleTextLine::plain(String::new());
15512    }
15513
15514    let remaining = chars.len() - offset;
15515    if remaining <= width {
15516        return VisibleTextLine {
15517            text: chars[offset..].iter().collect(),
15518            roles: line.roles[offset..].to_vec(),
15519        };
15520    }
15521
15522    VisibleTextLine {
15523        text: chars[offset..offset + width].iter().collect(),
15524        roles: line.roles[offset..offset + width].to_vec(),
15525    }
15526}
15527
15528fn image_browser_content_width(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> usize {
15529    snapshot
15530        .content_lines
15531        .iter()
15532        .map(|line| line.chars().count())
15533        .max()
15534        .unwrap_or(0)
15535}
15536
15537fn sync_image_parameter_fields(fields: &mut [FormField], parameters: &ImageBrowserParameters) {
15538    for (id, value) in [
15539        ("blc", parameters.blc.as_str()),
15540        ("trc", parameters.trc.as_str()),
15541        ("inc", parameters.inc.as_str()),
15542        ("stretch", parameters.stretch.as_str()),
15543        ("autoscale", parameters.autoscale.as_str()),
15544        ("clip_low", parameters.clip_low.as_str()),
15545        ("clip_high", parameters.clip_high.as_str()),
15546    ] {
15547        if let Some(field) = fields.iter_mut().find(|field| field.schema.id == id) {
15548            let _ = field.apply_text_value(value.to_string());
15549        }
15550    }
15551}
15552
15553fn parse_image_movie_fps(text: &str) -> Result<f64, String> {
15554    let trimmed = text.trim();
15555    if trimmed.is_empty() {
15556        return Ok(IMAGE_MOVIE_DEFAULT_FPS);
15557    }
15558    let fps = trimmed
15559        .parse::<f64>()
15560        .map_err(|_| "FPS must be a positive number.".to_string())?;
15561    if !fps.is_finite() || fps <= 0.0 {
15562        return Err("FPS must be a positive number.".to_string());
15563    }
15564    Ok(fps)
15565}
15566
15567fn movie_stop_input_ignored_for_debug() -> bool {
15568    std::env::var_os("CASARS_IMEXPLORE_IGNORE_MOVIE_STOP_INPUT").is_some()
15569}
15570
15571fn movie_input_fully_ignored_for_debug() -> bool {
15572    std::env::var_os("CASARS_IMEXPLORE_IGNORE_ALL_INPUT").is_some()
15573}
15574
15575fn kitty_protocol_response_char(key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<char> {
15576    match key_event.code {
15577        KeyCode::Char(ch) => Some(ch),
15578        _ => None,
15579    }
15580}
15581
15582fn kitty_protocol_response_image_not_found(response: &str) -> Option<(u32, Option<u32>)> {
15583    let response = response.strip_suffix('\\').unwrap_or(response);
15584    let payload = response.strip_prefix("_G")?;
15585    let (fields, status) = payload.split_once(';')?;
15586    if !status.starts_with("ENOENT:") {
15587        return None;
15588    }
15589    let mut image_id = None;
15590    let mut placement_id = None;
15591    for field in fields.split(',') {
15592        if let Some(raw) = field.strip_prefix("i=") {
15593            image_id = raw.parse::<u32>().ok();
15594        } else if let Some(raw) = field.strip_prefix("p=") {
15595            placement_id = raw.parse::<u32>().ok();
15596        }
15597    }
15598    image_id.map(|id| (id, placement_id))
15599}
15600
15601fn image_plane_column_count(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> Option<usize> {
15602    let header = snapshot.content_lines.first()?;
15603    let pipe_index = header.find('|')?;
15604    let right_width = header.get(pipe_index + 1..)?.chars().count();
15605    let stride = IMAGE_PLANE_CELL_WIDTH + 1;
15606    Some(right_width / stride)
15607}
15608
15609fn image_plane_header_pixel(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot, column: usize) -> Option<usize> {
15610    let header = snapshot.content_lines.first()?;
15611    let pipe_index = header.find('|')?;
15612    let stride = IMAGE_PLANE_CELL_WIDTH + 1;
15613    let start = pipe_index
15614        .checked_add(2)?
15615        .checked_add(column.checked_mul(stride)?)?;
15616    let text = slice_chars(header, start, start + IMAGE_PLANE_CELL_WIDTH);
15617    text.trim().parse::<usize>().ok()
15618}
15619
15620fn image_plane_selected_span(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
15621    for line in snapshot.content_lines.iter().skip(1) {
15622        let Some(start) = line.find('[') else {
15623            continue;
15624        };
15625        let Some(end) = line[start..].find(']').map(|offset| start + offset + 1) else {
15626            continue;
15627        };
15628        return Some((start, end));
15629    }
15630
15631    None
15632}
15633
15634fn image_plane_sample_cursor(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
15635    let cursor = snapshot.plane_cursor.as_ref()?;
15636    Some((cursor.sampled_x, cursor.sampled_y))
15637}
15638
15639fn image_plane_sampled_shape(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
15640    let display_x = snapshot.display_axes.first()?;
15641    let display_y = snapshot.display_axes.get(1)?;
15642    if display_x.sampled_len == 0 || display_y.sampled_len == 0 {
15643        return None;
15644    }
15645    Some((display_x.sampled_len, display_y.sampled_len))
15646}
15647
15648fn scaled_movie_render_dimension(dimension: u32, render_scale: f32) -> u32 {
15649    let dimension = dimension.max(1);
15650    if render_scale >= 0.999 {
15651        return dimension;
15652    }
15653    let scaled = ((dimension as f32) * render_scale).round().max(1.0) as u32;
15654    if dimension <= 64 {
15655        scaled.min(dimension).max(1)
15656    } else {
15657        scaled.max(64).min(dimension)
15658    }
15659}
15660
15661fn image_movie_plane_render_scale_for_state(state: &ImageBrowserSessionState) -> f32 {
15662    if !state.movie.playing {
15663        return 1.0;
15664    }
15665    let Some(axis_len) = state
15666        .selected_non_display_axis_state()
15667        .map(|axis| axis.length)
15668        .filter(|length| *length > 1)
15669    else {
15670        return 1.0;
15671    };
15672    let pixel_width = u64::from(state.viewport.plane_pixel_width.max(1));
15673    let pixel_height = u64::from(state.viewport.plane_pixel_height.max(1));
15674    let bytes_per_frame = pixel_width.saturating_mul(pixel_height).saturating_mul(4);
15675    let total_bytes = bytes_per_frame.saturating_mul(axis_len as u64);
15676    let target_bytes = configured_image_movie_target_resident_bytes();
15677    if total_bytes <= target_bytes || target_bytes == 0 {
15678        return 1.0;
15679    }
15680    ((target_bytes as f64 / total_bytes as f64).sqrt() as f32)
15681        .clamp(IMAGE_MOVIE_MIN_RENDER_SCALE, 1.0)
15682}
15683
15684fn configured_image_movie_target_resident_bytes() -> u64 {
15685    std::env::var("CASARS_IMEXPLORE_MOVIE_TARGET_RESIDENT_MB")
15686        .ok()
15687        .and_then(|value| value.parse::<u64>().ok())
15688        .map(|mb| mb.saturating_mul(1024 * 1024))
15689        .unwrap_or(IMAGE_MOVIE_TARGET_RESIDENT_BYTES)
15690}
15691
15692fn clamp_render_dimensions(
15693    pixel_width: u32,
15694    pixel_height: u32,
15695    max_pixel_size: Option<(u32, u32)>,
15696) -> (u32, u32) {
15697    let Some((max_width, max_height)) = max_pixel_size else {
15698        return (pixel_width.max(1), pixel_height.max(1));
15699    };
15700    let pixel_width = pixel_width.max(1);
15701    let pixel_height = pixel_height.max(1);
15702    if pixel_width <= max_width && pixel_height <= max_height {
15703        return (pixel_width, pixel_height);
15704    }
15705    let width_scale = (max_width.max(1) as f32) / (pixel_width as f32);
15706    let height_scale = (max_height.max(1) as f32) / (pixel_height as f32);
15707    let scale = width_scale.min(height_scale).min(1.0);
15708    (
15709        ((pixel_width as f32) * scale).round().max(1.0) as u32,
15710        ((pixel_height as f32) * scale).round().max(1.0) as u32,
15711    )
15712}
15713
15714fn combine_render_pixel_caps(
15715    primary: Option<(u32, u32)>,
15716    secondary: Option<(u32, u32)>,
15717) -> Option<(u32, u32)> {
15718    match (primary, secondary) {
15719        (Some((left_width, left_height)), Some((right_width, right_height))) => Some((
15720            left_width.min(right_width).max(1),
15721            left_height.min(right_height).max(1),
15722        )),
15723        (Some(cap), None) | (None, Some(cap)) => Some((cap.0.max(1), cap.1.max(1))),
15724        (None, None) => None,
15725    }
15726}
15727
15728fn adaptive_image_plane_render_pixel_cap(
15729    area: Rect,
15730    font_size: (u16, u16),
15731    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
15732) -> Option<(u32, u32)> {
15733    if area.is_empty() {
15734        return None;
15735    }
15736    let full_width = u32::from(area.width.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.0.max(1));
15737    let full_height = u32::from(area.height.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.1.max(1));
15738    let layout = image_plane_layout(
15739        full_width,
15740        full_height,
15741        image_plane_display_aspect_ratio(snapshot),
15742        snapshot.display_axes.len() >= 2,
15743    );
15744    if layout.image.width == 0 || layout.image.height == 0 {
15745        return None;
15746    }
15747    let (sampled_width, sampled_height) = image_plane_sampled_shape(snapshot).or_else(|| {
15748        snapshot
15749            .plane
15750            .as_ref()
15751            .map(|raster| (raster.width.max(1), raster.height.max(1)))
15752    })?;
15753    let target_image_width = plane_target_dimension(
15754        (sampled_width as u32).saturating_mul(IMAGE_PLANE_TARGET_PIXELS_PER_SAMPLE),
15755        IMAGE_PLANE_MIN_TARGET_IMAGE_PIXELS,
15756        layout.image.width.max(1),
15757    );
15758    let target_image_height = plane_target_dimension(
15759        (sampled_height as u32).saturating_mul(IMAGE_PLANE_TARGET_PIXELS_PER_SAMPLE),
15760        IMAGE_PLANE_MIN_TARGET_IMAGE_PIXELS,
15761        layout.image.height.max(1),
15762    );
15763    let width_scale = target_image_width as f32 / layout.image.width.max(1) as f32;
15764    let height_scale = target_image_height as f32 / layout.image.height.max(1) as f32;
15765    let scale = width_scale.min(height_scale).min(1.0);
15766    if scale >= 0.999 {
15767        return None;
15768    }
15769    Some((
15770        ((full_width as f32) * scale).round().max(1.0) as u32,
15771        ((full_height as f32) * scale).round().max(1.0) as u32,
15772    ))
15773}
15774
15775fn adaptive_image_spectrum_render_pixel_cap(
15776    area: Rect,
15777    font_size: (u16, u16),
15778    profile: &ImageProfilePayload,
15779) -> Option<(u32, u32)> {
15780    if area.is_empty() {
15781        return None;
15782    }
15783    let full_width = u32::from(area.width.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.0.max(1));
15784    let full_height = u32::from(area.height.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.1.max(1));
15785    let layout = image_spectrum_layout(full_width, full_height);
15786    if layout.plot.width == 0 || layout.plot.height == 0 {
15787        return None;
15788    }
15789    let target_plot_width = plane_target_dimension(
15790        (profile.samples.len() as u32)
15791            .max(1)
15792            .saturating_mul(IMAGE_SPECTRUM_TARGET_PIXELS_PER_SAMPLE),
15793        IMAGE_SPECTRUM_MIN_TARGET_PLOT_WIDTH,
15794        layout.plot.width.max(1),
15795    );
15796    let target_plot_height = layout
15797        .plot
15798        .height
15799        .clamp(1, IMAGE_SPECTRUM_TARGET_PLOT_HEIGHT);
15800    let width_scale = target_plot_width as f32 / layout.plot.width.max(1) as f32;
15801    let height_scale = target_plot_height as f32 / layout.plot.height.max(1) as f32;
15802    let scale = width_scale.min(height_scale).min(1.0);
15803    if scale >= 0.999 {
15804        return None;
15805    }
15806    Some((
15807        ((full_width as f32) * scale).round().max(1.0) as u32,
15808        ((full_height as f32) * scale).round().max(1.0) as u32,
15809    ))
15810}
15811
15812fn plane_target_dimension(desired: u32, min_target: u32, max_target: u32) -> u32 {
15813    let max_target = max_target.max(1);
15814    let min_target = min_target.min(max_target);
15815    desired.clamp(min_target, max_target)
15816}
15817
15818fn image_movie_content_signature(
15819    state: &ImageBrowserSessionState,
15820    layout: &UiLayout,
15821    theme_mode: ThemeMode,
15822    split_ratio: f32,
15823    plane_font_size: (u16, u16),
15824    spectrum_font_size: Option<(u16, u16)>,
15825    spectrum_visible: bool,
15826) -> u64 {
15827    let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
15828    state.snapshot_generation.hash(&mut hasher);
15829    state.selected_non_display_axis.hash(&mut hasher);
15830    state
15831        .selected_non_display_axis_state()
15832        .map(|axis| axis.axis)
15833        .hash(&mut hasher);
15834    state.viewport.width.hash(&mut hasher);
15835    state.viewport.height.hash(&mut hasher);
15836    state.viewport.inspector_height.hash(&mut hasher);
15837    state.viewport.plane_pixel_width.hash(&mut hasher);
15838    state.viewport.plane_pixel_height.hash(&mut hasher);
15839    split_ratio.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
15840    spectrum_visible.hash(&mut hasher);
15841    plane_font_size.hash(&mut hasher);
15842    spectrum_font_size.hash(&mut hasher);
15843    result_text_area(layout).hash(&mut hasher);
15844    crate::ui::image_plane_canvas_area_for_browser(layout, spectrum_visible, split_ratio)
15845        .hash(&mut hasher);
15846    crate::ui::image_spectrum_canvas_area(layout, spectrum_visible, split_ratio).hash(&mut hasher);
15847    match theme_mode {
15848        ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => 0u8,
15849        ThemeMode::RichPanel => 1u8,
15850    }
15851    .hash(&mut hasher);
15852    hasher.finish()
15853}
15854
15855fn image_movie_preview_indices(
15856    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
15857    movie_axis: usize,
15858    axis_index: usize,
15859) -> Vec<usize> {
15860    snapshot
15861        .non_display_axes
15862        .iter()
15863        .map(|axis| {
15864            if axis.axis == movie_axis {
15865                axis_index.min(axis.length.saturating_sub(1))
15866            } else {
15867                axis.index
15868            }
15869        })
15870        .collect()
15871}
15872
15873fn build_image_movie_preview_request(
15874    spec: &ImageMovieSchedulerSpec,
15875    axis_index: usize,
15876) -> ImageBrowserPreviewRequest {
15877    ImageBrowserPreviewRequest {
15878        viewport: spec.viewport,
15879        parameters: spec.parameters.clone(),
15880        plane_content_mode: spec.plane_content_mode,
15881        non_display_indices: image_movie_preview_indices(
15882            &spec.snapshot,
15883            spec.movie_axis,
15884            axis_index,
15885        ),
15886        include_profile: spec.spectrum_visible,
15887    }
15888}
15889
15890pub(crate) fn image_movie_lookahead_occurrences(
15891    requested_fps: f64,
15892    axis_length: usize,
15893    render_worker_count: usize,
15894    protocol_worker_count: usize,
15895) -> usize {
15896    let frame_interval = Duration::from_secs_f64(1.0 / requested_fps.max(0.001));
15897    let horizon = Duration::from_millis(150).max(frame_interval.mul_f64(1.5));
15898    let frame_count = ((horizon.as_secs_f64() / frame_interval.as_secs_f64()).ceil() as usize)
15899        .clamp(1, IMAGE_MOVIE_RENDER_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY.max(1));
15900    let worker_hint = render_worker_count.max(protocol_worker_count).clamp(1, 2);
15901    frame_count
15902        .max(worker_hint)
15903        .min(axis_length.max(1))
