15904        .min(IMAGE_MOVIE_RENDER_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY.max(1))
15905}
15906
15907#[cfg_attr(not(test), allow(dead_code))]
15908pub(crate) fn image_movie_presentation_lookahead_occurrences(
15909    requested_fps: f64,
15910    axis_length: usize,
15911    protocol_worker_count: usize,
15912) -> usize {
15913    let frame_interval = Duration::from_secs_f64(1.0 / requested_fps.max(0.001));
15914    let horizon = Duration::from_millis(150).max(frame_interval.mul_f64(1.5));
15915    let frame_count = ((horizon.as_secs_f64() / frame_interval.as_secs_f64()).ceil() as usize)
15916        .clamp(1, IMAGE_MOVIE_PROTOCOL_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY.max(1));
15917    let worker_hint = protocol_worker_count.clamp(1, 2);
15918    frame_count
15919        .max(worker_hint)
15920        .min(axis_length.max(1))
15921        .min(IMAGE_MOVIE_PROTOCOL_POOL_QUEUE_CAPACITY.max(1))
15922}
15923
15924fn image_plane_overlay_markers(state: &ImageBrowserSessionState) -> Vec<ImagePlaneOverlayMarker> {
15925    image_plane_overlay_markers_for_snapshot(&state.snapshot, &state.pinned_probes)
15926}
15927
15928fn image_plane_overlay_markers_for_snapshot(
15929    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
15930    pinned_probes: &[ImagePinnedProbe],
15931) -> Vec<ImagePlaneOverlayMarker> {
15932    pinned_probes
15933        .iter()
15934        .enumerate()
15935        .filter_map(|(color_index, probe)| {
15936            image_pinned_probe_sample_from_snapshot(snapshot, probe).map(|sample| {
15937                ImagePlaneOverlayMarker {
15938                    sample,
15939                    color_index,
15940                }
15941            })
15942        })
15943        .collect()
15944}
15945
15946fn image_spectrum_overlay_series(
15947    state: &ImageBrowserSessionState,
15948) -> Vec<ImageSpectrumOverlaySeries> {
15949    image_spectrum_overlay_series_for_pinned(&state.pinned_probes)
15950}
15951
15952fn image_spectrum_overlay_series_for_pinned(
15953    pinned_probes: &[ImagePinnedProbe],
15954) -> Vec<ImageSpectrumOverlaySeries> {
15955    pinned_probes
15956        .iter()
15957        .enumerate()
15958        .filter_map(|(color_index, probe)| {
15959            probe
15960                .profile
15961                .clone()
15962                .map(|profile| ImageSpectrumOverlaySeries {
15963                    label: probe.label.clone(),
15964                    profile,
15965                    color_index,
15966                })
15967        })
15968        .collect()
15969}
15970
15971fn image_plane_render_signature(
15972    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
15973    show_live_reticle: bool,
15974    colormap: ImagePlaneColormap,
15975    invert: bool,
15976    overlay_markers: &[ImagePlaneOverlayMarker],
15977    region_overlay_shapes: &[casars_imagebrowser_protocol::ImageRegionOverlayShapeState],
15978) -> u64 {
15979    let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
15980    snapshot.parameters.blc.hash(&mut hasher);
15981    snapshot.parameters.trc.hash(&mut hasher);
15982    snapshot.parameters.inc.hash(&mut hasher);
15983    snapshot.parameters.stretch.hash(&mut hasher);
15984    snapshot.parameters.autoscale.hash(&mut hasher);
15985    snapshot.parameters.clip_low.hash(&mut hasher);
15986    snapshot.parameters.clip_high.hash(&mut hasher);
15987    show_live_reticle.hash(&mut hasher);
15988    match colormap {
15989        ImagePlaneColormap::Grayscale => 0u8,
15990        ImagePlaneColormap::Viridis => 1u8,
15991        ImagePlaneColormap::Inferno => 2u8,
15992    }
15993    .hash(&mut hasher);
15994    invert.hash(&mut hasher);
15995    if let Some(cursor) = snapshot.plane_cursor.as_ref() {
15996        cursor.sampled_x.hash(&mut hasher);
15997        cursor.sampled_y.hash(&mut hasher);
15998        cursor.pixel_x.hash(&mut hasher);
15999        cursor.pixel_y.hash(&mut hasher);
16000    }
16001    for axis in &snapshot.non_display_axes {
16002        axis.axis.hash(&mut hasher);
16003        axis.index.hash(&mut hasher);
16004        axis.pixel.hash(&mut hasher);
16005    }
16006    if let Some(plane) = snapshot.plane.as_ref() {
16007        plane.width.hash(&mut hasher);
16008        plane.height.hash(&mut hasher);
16009        plane.clip_min.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
16010        plane.clip_max.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
16011        plane.data_min.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
16012        plane.data_max.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
16013        plane.masked_or_non_finite_count.hash(&mut hasher);
16014        plane.no_finite_values.hash(&mut hasher);
16015        plane.value_unit.hash(&mut hasher);
16016        plane.pixels_u8.hash(&mut hasher);
16017    }
16018    image_plane_frame_label(snapshot).hash(&mut hasher);
16019    for marker in overlay_markers {
16020        marker.color_index.hash(&mut hasher);
16021        marker.sample.hash(&mut hasher);
16022    }
16023    for shape in region_overlay_shapes {
16024        shape.closed.hash(&mut hasher);
16025        for vertex in &shape.vertices {
16026            vertex.sampled_x.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
16027            vertex.sampled_y.to_bits().hash(&mut hasher);
16028        }
16029    }
16030    hasher.finish()
16031}
16032
16033fn image_plane_frame_label(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> Option<String> {
16034    let labels = snapshot
16035        .non_display_axes
16036        .iter()
16037        .map(|axis| {
16038            format!(
16039                "{} {}/{}",
16040                axis.label,
16041                axis.index,
16042                axis.length.saturating_sub(1)
16043            )
16044        })
16045        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
16046    (!labels.is_empty()).then(|| labels.join(" | "))
16047}
16048
16049fn image_movie_animation_signature(
16050    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16051    show_live_reticle: bool,
16052    colormap: ImagePlaneColormap,
16053    invert: bool,
16054    movie_axis: usize,
16055    theme_mode: ThemeMode,
16056) -> u64 {
16057    let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
16058    snapshot.parameters.blc.hash(&mut hasher);
16059    snapshot.parameters.trc.hash(&mut hasher);
16060    snapshot.parameters.inc.hash(&mut hasher);
16061    snapshot.parameters.stretch.hash(&mut hasher);
16062    snapshot.parameters.autoscale.hash(&mut hasher);
16063    snapshot.parameters.clip_low.hash(&mut hasher);
16064    snapshot.parameters.clip_high.hash(&mut hasher);
16065    movie_axis.hash(&mut hasher);
16066    show_live_reticle.hash(&mut hasher);
16067    match theme_mode {
16068        ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => 0u8,
16069        ThemeMode::RichPanel => 1u8,
16070    }
16071    .hash(&mut hasher);
16072    match colormap {
16073        ImagePlaneColormap::Grayscale => 0u8,
16074        ImagePlaneColormap::Viridis => 1u8,
16075        ImagePlaneColormap::Inferno => 2u8,
16076    }
16077    .hash(&mut hasher);
16078    invert.hash(&mut hasher);
16079    for axis in &snapshot.display_axes {
16080        axis.axis.hash(&mut hasher);
16081        axis.name.hash(&mut hasher);
16082        axis.unit.hash(&mut hasher);
16083        axis.blc.hash(&mut hasher);
16084        axis.trc.hash(&mut hasher);
16085        axis.inc.hash(&mut hasher);
16086        axis.sampled_len.hash(&mut hasher);
16087        axis.world_increment.map(f64::to_bits).hash(&mut hasher);
16088    }
16089    // Keep the direct-movie overlay key stable across ordinary frame stepping. Interactive
16090    // cursor and region edits already stop movie playback, so they should not invalidate the
16091    // cached terminal overlay while the movie is running.
16092    hasher.finish()
16093}
16094
16095fn hashed_render_request_key<T>(key: &T) -> u64
16096where
16097    T: Hash,
16098{
16099    let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
16100    key.hash(&mut hasher);
16101    hasher.finish()
16102}
16103
16104fn hashed_render_input_cache_key<T>(key: &T, pixel_width: u32, pixel_height: u32) -> u64
16105where
16106    T: Hash,
16107{
16108    let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
16109    key.hash(&mut hasher);
16110    pixel_width.hash(&mut hasher);
16111    pixel_height.hash(&mut hasher);
16112    hasher.finish()
16113}
16114
16115fn hashed_movie_occurrence_key(key: MovieOccurrenceKey) -> u64 {
16116    hashed_render_request_key(&key)
16117}
16118
16119fn image_spectrum_render_signature(
16120    profile: &ImageProfilePayload,
16121    overlay_profiles: &[ImageSpectrumOverlaySeries],
16122    theme_mode: ThemeMode,
16123) -> u64 {
16124    let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();
16125    match theme_mode {
16126        ThemeMode::DenseAnsi => 0u8,
16127        ThemeMode::RichPanel => 1u8,
16128    }
16129    .hash(&mut hasher);
16130    hash_profile_payload(&mut hasher, profile);
16131    overlay_profiles.len().hash(&mut hasher);
16132    for overlay in overlay_profiles {
16133        overlay.label.hash(&mut hasher);
16134        overlay.color_index.hash(&mut hasher);
16135        hash_profile_payload(&mut hasher, &overlay.profile);
16136    }
16137    hasher.finish()
16138}
16139
16140fn hash_profile_payload(hasher: &mut DefaultHasher, profile: &ImageProfilePayload) {
16141    profile.axis.hash(hasher);
16142    profile.axis_name.hash(hasher);
16143    profile.coord_type.hash(hasher);
16144    profile.axis_unit.hash(hasher);
16145    profile.value_unit.hash(hasher);
16146    profile.selected_sample_index.hash(hasher);
16147    profile.samples.len().hash(hasher);
16148    for sample in &profile.samples {
16149        sample.sample_index.hash(hasher);
16150        sample.pixel_index.hash(hasher);
16151        sample.value.to_bits().hash(hasher);
16152        sample.masked.hash(hasher);
16153        sample.finite.hash(hasher);
16154        if let Some(world_axis) = sample.world_axis.as_ref() {
16155            world_axis.name.hash(hasher);
16156            world_axis.unit.hash(hasher);
16157            world_axis.value.to_bits().hash(hasher);
16158        } else {
16159            0u8.hash(hasher);
16160        }
16161    }
16162}
16163
16164fn image_pinned_probe_sample_from_snapshot(
16165    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16166    probe: &ImagePinnedProbe,
16167) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
16168    let display_x = snapshot.display_axes.first()?;
16169    let display_y = snapshot.display_axes.get(1)?;
16170    if probe.plane_pixel.0 < display_x.blc
16171        || probe.plane_pixel.0 > display_x.trc
16172        || probe.plane_pixel.1 < display_y.blc
16173        || probe.plane_pixel.1 > display_y.trc
16174    {
16175        return None;
16176    }
16177    let sample_x = sample_index_for_pixel(probe.plane_pixel.0, display_x.blc, display_x.inc);
16178    let sample_y = sample_index_for_pixel(probe.plane_pixel.1, display_y.blc, display_y.inc);
16179    (sample_x < display_x.sampled_len && sample_y < display_y.sampled_len)
16180        .then_some((sample_x, sample_y))
16181}
16182
16183fn image_raster_click_target(
16184    state: &ImageBrowserSessionState,
16185    column: u16,
16186    row: u16,
16187    canvas: Rect,
16188) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
16189    let font_size = state
16190        .panel
16191        .as_ref()
16192        .map(|panel| panel.font_size)
16193        .unwrap_or((1, 1));
16194    let draw_rect = image_plane_draw_rect(canvas, &state.snapshot, font_size)?;
16195    if !rect_contains(draw_rect, column, row) {
16196        return None;
16197    }
16198    let display_x = state.snapshot.display_axes.first()?;
16199    let display_y = state.snapshot.display_axes.get(1)?;
16200    if display_x.sampled_len == 0 || display_y.sampled_len == 0 {
16201        return None;
16202    }
16203    let relative_x = usize::from(column.saturating_sub(draw_rect.x));
16204    let relative_y = usize::from(row.saturating_sub(draw_rect.y));
16205    let sampled_x = image_click_sample_index(
16206        relative_x,
16207        usize::from(draw_rect.width.max(1)),
16208        display_x.sampled_len,
16209    );
16210    let sampled_y = image_click_sample_index(
16211        relative_y,
16212        usize::from(draw_rect.height.max(1)),
16213        display_y.sampled_len,
16214    );
16215    Some((
16216        display_x.blc + sampled_x * display_x.inc,
16217        display_y.blc + sampled_y * display_y.inc,
16218    ))
16219}
16220
16221pub(crate) fn image_plane_draw_rect(
16222    canvas: Rect,
16223    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16224    font_size: (u16, u16),
16225) -> Option<Rect> {
16226    if canvas.is_empty() {
16227        return None;
16228    }
16229    let font_width = u32::from(font_size.0.max(1));
16230    let font_height = u32::from(font_size.1.max(1));
16231    let geometry = image_plane_layout(
16232        u32::from(canvas.width.max(1)) * font_width,
16233        u32::from(canvas.height.max(1)) * font_height,
16234        image_plane_display_aspect_ratio(snapshot),
16235        snapshot.display_axes.len() >= 2,
16236    )
16237    .image;
16238    let start_x = geometry.x / font_width;
16239    let start_y = geometry.y / font_height;
16240    let end_x = div_ceil_u32(geometry.x + geometry.width, font_width);
16241    let end_y = div_ceil_u32(geometry.y + geometry.height, font_height);
16242    Some(Rect {
16243        x: canvas.x.saturating_add(start_x as u16),
16244        y: canvas.y.saturating_add(start_y as u16),
16245        width: (end_x.saturating_sub(start_x)).min(u32::from(canvas.width)) as u16,
16246        height: (end_y.saturating_sub(start_y)).min(u32::from(canvas.height)) as u16,
16247    })
16248}
16249
16250pub(crate) fn image_spectrum_plot_rect(canvas: Rect, font_size: (u16, u16)) -> Option<Rect> {
16251    if canvas.is_empty() {
16252        return None;
16253    }
16254    let font_width = u32::from(font_size.0.max(1));
16255    let font_height = u32::from(font_size.1.max(1));
16256    let plot = image_spectrum_layout(
16257        u32::from(canvas.width.max(1)) * font_width,
16258        u32::from(canvas.height.max(1)) * font_height,
16259    )
16260    .plot;
16261    let start_x = plot.x / font_width;
16262    let start_y = plot.y / font_height;
16263    let end_x = div_ceil_u32(plot.x + plot.width, font_width);
16264    let end_y = div_ceil_u32(plot.y + plot.height, font_height);
16265    Some(Rect {
16266        x: canvas.x.saturating_add(start_x as u16),
16267        y: canvas.y.saturating_add(start_y as u16),
16268        width: (end_x.saturating_sub(start_x)).min(u32::from(canvas.width)) as u16,
16269        height: (end_y.saturating_sub(start_y)).min(u32::from(canvas.height)) as u16,
16270    })
16271}
16272
16273fn image_click_sample_index(relative: usize, draw_len: usize, sampled_len: usize) -> usize {
16274    if draw_len == 0 || sampled_len == 0 {
16275        return 0;
16276    }
16277    let numerator = (relative.saturating_mul(2).saturating_add(1)).saturating_mul(sampled_len);
16278    (numerator / draw_len.saturating_mul(2)).min(sampled_len.saturating_sub(1))
16279}
16280
16281fn sample_index_for_pixel(pixel: usize, blc: usize, inc: usize) -> usize {
16282    pixel.saturating_sub(blc) / inc.max(1)
16283}
16284
16285fn div_ceil_u32(value: u32, divisor: u32) -> u32 {
16286    value.div_ceil(divisor.max(1))
16287}
16288
16289fn image_plane_display_aspect_ratio(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> Option<f64> {
16290    let x = snapshot.display_axes.first()?;
16291    let y = snapshot.display_axes.get(1)?;
16292    let x_span = x.trc.saturating_sub(x.blc).saturating_add(1).max(1) as f64;
16293    let y_span = y.trc.saturating_sub(y.blc).saturating_add(1).max(1) as f64;
16294    let (x_scale, y_scale) = image_plane_axis_scales(x, y);
16295    let aspect = (x_span * x_scale) / (y_span * y_scale);
16296    (aspect.is_finite() && aspect > 0.0).then_some(aspect)
16297}
16298
16299fn image_plane_axis_scales(x: &ImageDisplayAxisState, y: &ImageDisplayAxisState) -> (f64, f64) {
16300    if is_direction_display_axis(&x.name) && is_direction_display_axis(&y.name) {
16301        return (
16302            x.world_increment
16303                .map(|increment| angular_increment_arcseconds(increment).value().abs())
16304                .filter(|value| *value > 0.0)
16305                .unwrap_or(1.0),
16306            y.world_increment
16307                .map(|increment| angular_increment_arcseconds(increment).value().abs())
16308                .filter(|value| *value > 0.0)
16309                .unwrap_or(1.0),
16310        );
16311    }
16312    if !x.unit.is_empty() && x.unit == y.unit {
16313        return (
16314            x.world_increment
16315                .map(f64::abs)
16316                .filter(|value| *value > 0.0)
16317                .unwrap_or(1.0),
16318            y.world_increment
16319                .map(f64::abs)
16320                .filter(|value| *value > 0.0)
16321                .unwrap_or(1.0),
16322        );
16323    }
16324    (1.0, 1.0)
16325}
16326
16327fn is_direction_display_axis(name: &str) -> bool {
16328    name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Right Ascension")
16329        || name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("RA")
16330        || name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Declination")
16331        || name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("DEC")
16332}
16333
16334fn image_movie_perf_context_from_state(
16335    state: &ImageBrowserSessionState,
16336    canvas: Option<Rect>,
16337    canvas_pixels: Option<(u32, u32)>,
16338    render_request_key_hash: Option<u64>,
16339) -> MoviePerfContext {
16340    let axis_state = state.selected_non_display_axis_state();
16341    MoviePerfContext {
16342        axis: axis_state.map(|axis| axis.axis),
16343        axis_index: axis_state.map(|axis| axis.index),
16344        axis_length: axis_state.map(|axis| axis.length),
16345        render_request_key_hash,
16346        canvas_cell_size: canvas.map(|area| (area.width, area.height)),
16347        canvas_pixel_size: canvas_pixels,
16348        raster_mode: state.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Raster,
16349        direct_overlay: state.movie.direct_overlay,
16350        terminal_looping: state.movie.terminal_looping,
16351        requested_fps_milli: Some((state.movie.fps * 1000.0).round() as u64),
16352    }
16353}
16354
16355fn image_startup_perf_context(
16356    width: u16,
16357    height: u16,
16358    plane_pixel_width: u16,
16359    plane_pixel_height: u16,
16360) -> MoviePerfContext {
16361    MoviePerfContext {
16362        axis: None,
16363        axis_index: None,
16364        axis_length: None,
16365        render_request_key_hash: None,
16366        canvas_cell_size: Some((width, height)),
16367        canvas_pixel_size: Some((
16368            u32::from(plane_pixel_width.max(1)),
16369            u32::from(plane_pixel_height.max(1)),
16370        )),
16371        raster_mode: true,
16372        direct_overlay: false,
16373        terminal_looping: false,
16374        requested_fps_milli: Some((IMAGE_MOVIE_DEFAULT_FPS * 1000.0).round() as u64),
16375    }
16376}
16377
16378fn image_movie_perf_context_from_snapshot(
16379    state: &ImageBrowserSessionState,
16380    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16381    render_request_key_hash: Option<u64>,
16382) -> MoviePerfContext {
16383    let axis_state = snapshot
16384        .non_display_axes
16385        .get(state.selected_non_display_axis)
16386        .or_else(|| snapshot.non_display_axes.first());
16387    MoviePerfContext {
16388        axis: axis_state.map(|axis| axis.axis),
16389        axis_index: axis_state.map(|axis| axis.index),
16390        axis_length: axis_state.map(|axis| axis.length),
16391        render_request_key_hash,
16392        canvas_cell_size: Some((state.viewport.width, state.viewport.height)),
16393        canvas_pixel_size: Some((
16394            u32::from(state.viewport.plane_pixel_width),
16395            u32::from(state.viewport.plane_pixel_height),
16396        )),
16397        raster_mode: state.plane_mode == ImagePlaneMode::Raster,
16398        direct_overlay: state.movie.direct_overlay,
16399        terminal_looping: state.movie.terminal_looping,
16400        requested_fps_milli: Some((state.movie.fps * 1000.0).round() as u64),
16401    }
16402}
16403
16404fn map_backend_timing(timing: &ImageBackendTimingState) -> BackendTimingBreakdown {
16405    BackendTimingBreakdown {
16406        cached_plane_lookup_ns: timing.cached_plane_lookup_ns,
16407        plane_extract_ns: timing.plane_extract_ns,
16408        stat_collection_ns: timing.stat_collection_ns,
16409        histogram_ns: timing.histogram_ns,
16410        rasterize_ns: timing.rasterize_ns,
16411        total_plane_ns: timing.total_plane_ns,
16412        profile_cache_hits: timing.profile_cache_hits,
16413        profile_cache_misses: timing.profile_cache_misses,
16414        profile_extract_total_ns: timing.profile_extract_total_ns,
16415    }
16416}
16417
16418fn map_backend_plane_outcome(timing: Option<&ImageBackendTimingState>) -> MovieFrameOutcome {
16419    match timing.map(|timing| timing.plane_cache_result) {
16420        Some(ImageBackendPlaneCacheResult::Hit | ImageBackendPlaneCacheResult::PrefetchHit) => {
16421            MovieFrameOutcome::CacheHitBackendPlane
16422        }
16423        _ => MovieFrameOutcome::CacheMiss,
16424    }
16425}
16426
16427fn image_zoom_parameters(
16428    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16429    zoom_in: bool,
16430) -> Option<ImageBrowserParameters> {
16431    if snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane || snapshot.display_axes.len() < 2 {
16432        return None;
16433    }
16434    let (mut blc, mut trc, inc) = image_snapshot_window(snapshot)?;
16435    let cursor = snapshot.plane_cursor.as_ref();
16436    for (display_index, axis_state) in snapshot.display_axes.iter().take(2).enumerate() {
16437        let axis = axis_state.axis;
16438        let full_len = *snapshot.shape.get(axis)?;
16439        let span = trc[axis].saturating_sub(blc[axis]).saturating_add(1).max(1);
16440        let target_span = if zoom_in {
16441            span.div_ceil(2).max(1)
16442        } else {
16443            span.saturating_mul(2).min(full_len.max(1))
16444        };
16445        let center_pixel = match (display_index, cursor) {
16446            (0, Some(cursor)) => cursor.pixel_x,
16447            (1, Some(cursor)) => cursor.pixel_y,
16448            _ => blc[axis].saturating_add(span / 2),
16449        }
16450        .min(full_len.saturating_sub(1));
16451        let new_blc = centered_window_start(center_pixel, target_span, full_len);
16452        blc[axis] = new_blc;
16453        trc[axis] = new_blc.saturating_add(target_span.saturating_sub(1));
16454    }
16455    Some(ImageBrowserParameters {
16456        blc: format_usize_axis_list(&blc),
16457        trc: format_usize_axis_list(&trc),
16458        inc: format_usize_axis_list(&inc),
16459        stretch: snapshot.parameters.stretch.clone(),
16460        autoscale: snapshot.parameters.autoscale.clone(),
16461        clip_low: snapshot.parameters.clip_low.clone(),
16462        clip_high: snapshot.parameters.clip_high.clone(),
16463    })
16464}
16465
16466fn image_pan_parameters(
16467    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16468    dx: i32,
16469    dy: i32,
16470) -> Option<ImageBrowserParameters> {
16471    if snapshot.active_view != ImageBrowserView::Plane || snapshot.display_axes.len() < 2 {
16472        return None;
16473    }
16474    let (mut blc, mut trc, inc) = image_snapshot_window(snapshot)?;
16475    for (display_index, axis_state) in snapshot.display_axes.iter().take(2).enumerate() {
16476        let axis = axis_state.axis;
16477        let full_len = *snapshot.shape.get(axis)?;
16478        let span = trc[axis].saturating_sub(blc[axis]).saturating_add(1).max(1);
16479        let step = (span / 6).max(1) as i32;
16480        let delta = match display_index {
16481            0 => dx.saturating_mul(step),
16482            1 => dy.saturating_mul(step),
16483            _ => 0,
16484        };
16485        let max_start = full_len.saturating_sub(span);
16486        let new_blc = (blc[axis] as i32 + delta).clamp(0, max_start as i32) as usize;
16487        blc[axis] = new_blc;
16488        trc[axis] = new_blc.saturating_add(span.saturating_sub(1));
16489    }
16490    Some(ImageBrowserParameters {
16491        blc: format_usize_axis_list(&blc),
16492        trc: format_usize_axis_list(&trc),
16493        inc: format_usize_axis_list(&inc),
16494        stretch: snapshot.parameters.stretch.clone(),
16495        autoscale: snapshot.parameters.autoscale.clone(),
16496        clip_low: snapshot.parameters.clip_low.clone(),
16497        clip_high: snapshot.parameters.clip_high.clone(),
16498    })
16499}
16500
16501fn image_snapshot_window(
16502    snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot,
16503) -> Option<(Vec<usize>, Vec<usize>, Vec<usize>)> {
16504    let shape_len = snapshot.shape.len();
16505    let blc = parse_usize_axis_list(&snapshot.parameters.blc, shape_len)?;
16506    let trc = parse_usize_axis_list(&snapshot.parameters.trc, shape_len)?;
16507    let inc = parse_usize_axis_list(&snapshot.parameters.inc, shape_len)?;
16508    Some((blc, trc, inc))
16509}
16510
16511fn parse_usize_axis_list(text: &str, expected_len: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
16512    let values = text
16513        .split(|ch: char| ch == ',' || ch.is_whitespace())
16514        .filter(|part| !part.is_empty())
16515        .map(|part| part.parse::<usize>().ok())
16516        .collect::<Option<Vec<_>>>()?;
16517    (values.len() == expected_len).then_some(values)
16518}
16519
16520fn format_usize_axis_list(values: &[usize]) -> String {
16521    values
16522        .iter()
16523        .map(ToString::to_string)
16524        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
16525        .join(",")
16526}
16527
16528fn centered_window_start(center: usize, span: usize, full_len: usize) -> usize {
16529    let span = span.clamp(1, full_len.max(1));
16530    center
16531        .saturating_sub(span / 2)
16532        .min(full_len.saturating_sub(span))
16533}
16534
16535fn image_browser_max_hscroll(snapshot: &ImageBrowserSnapshot, viewport_width: u16) -> usize {
16536    let viewport_width = usize::from(viewport_width);
16537    image_browser_content_width(snapshot).saturating_sub(viewport_width)
16538}
16539
16540fn image_plane_visible_width(state: &ImageBrowserSessionState) -> usize {
16541    let viewport_width = usize::from(state.viewport.width.max(1));
16542    let needs_vscroll =
16543        state.snapshot.navigation.total_items > state.snapshot.navigation.viewport_items;
16544    viewport_width.saturating_sub(usize::from(needs_vscroll))
16545}
16546
16547fn keep_image_plane_selection_visible(state: &mut ImageBrowserSessionState) {
16548    if !state.spreadsheet_plane_active() {
16549        return;
16550    }
16551
16552    let Some((selected_start, selected_end)) = image_plane_selected_span(&state.snapshot) else {
16553        return;
16554    };
16555    let visible_width = image_plane_visible_width(state);
16556    if visible_width == 0 {
16557        return;
16558    }
16559
16560    let current = usize::from(state.hscroll);
16561    let max_scroll = image_browser_max_hscroll(&state.snapshot, state.viewport.width);
16562    let next = if selected_start < current {
16563        selected_start
16564    } else if selected_end > current.saturating_add(visible_width) {
16565        selected_end.saturating_sub(visible_width)
16566    } else {
16567        current
16568    };
16569    state.hscroll = next.min(max_scroll).min(u16::MAX as usize) as u16;
16570}
16571
16572fn slice_chars(text: &str, start: usize, end: usize) -> String {
16573    text.chars()
16574        .skip(start)
16575        .take(end.saturating_sub(start))
16576        .collect()
16577}
16578
16579fn is_browser_copy_modifier(modifiers: KeyModifiers) -> bool {
16580    modifiers == KeyModifiers::SUPER || modifiers == (KeyModifiers::CONTROL | KeyModifiers::SHIFT)
16581}
16582
16583fn copyable_browser_text(inspector: &BrowserInspectorSnapshot) -> (String, &'static str) {
16584    match &inspector.node {
16585        BrowserValueNode::Undefined => ("<undefined>".to_string(), "undefined value"),
16586        BrowserValueNode::Scalar { value } => (render_browser_scalar(value), "value"),
16587        BrowserValueNode::TableRef { resolved_path, .. } => (resolved_path.clone(), "table path"),
16588        BrowserValueNode::Array {
16589            shape,
16590            total_elements,
16591            elements,
16592            ..
16593        } if elements.len() == *total_elements => (
16594            format!(
16595                "[{}]",
16596                elements
16597                    .iter()
16598                    .map(|element| render_browser_scalar(&element.value))
16599                    .collect::<Vec<_>>()
16600                    .join(", ")
16601            ),
16602            if shape.len() > 1 {
16603                "array value"
16604            } else {
16605                "value"
16606            },
16607        ),
16608        _ => (
16609            inspector.rendered_lines.join("\n").trim().to_string(),
16610            "inspector view",
16611        ),
16612    }
16613}
16614
16615fn render_image_probe(probe: &casars_imagebrowser_protocol::ImageBrowserProbe) -> String {
16616    let mut lines = vec![
16617        format!("value: {}", probe.value),
16618        format!(
16619            "pixel: {}",
16620            probe
16621                .pixel_indices
16622                .iter()
16623                .map(|value| value.to_string())
16624                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
16625                .join(", ")
16626        ),
16627    ];
16628    if probe.masked {
16629        lines.push("masked: true".to_string());
16630    }
16631    if !probe.finite {
16632        lines.push("finite: false".to_string());
16633    }
16634    for axis in &probe.world_axes {
16635        lines.push(format!(
16636            "{}: {}",
16637            axis.name,
16638            format_world_axis_probe_value(&axis.name, &axis.unit, axis.value)
16639        ));
16640    }
16641    lines.join("\n")
16642}
16643
16644fn format_world_axis_probe_value(axis_name: &str, unit: &str, value: f64) -> String {
16645    if axis_name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Right Ascension") || axis_name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("RA") {
16646        return format_right_ascension_labeled(value, 6);
16647    }
16648    if axis_name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Declination") || axis_name.eq_ignore_ascii_case("DEC") {
16649        return format_declination_labeled(value, 5);
16650    }
16651    if unit.is_empty() {
16652        format!("{value} unitless")
16653    } else {
16654        format_numeric_value_with_unit(value, unit)
16655    }
16656}
16657
16658fn format_numeric_value_with_unit(value: f64, unit: &str) -> String {
16659    format_quantity_auto(value, unit, 6).unwrap_or_else(|| format!("{value} {unit}"))
16660}
16661
16662fn format_profile_axis_label(profile: &ImageProfilePayload) -> String {
16663    let unit = frequency_display_unit_for_profile(profile)
16664        .map(str::to_string)
16665        .unwrap_or_else(|| profile.axis_unit.clone());
16666    if unit.is_empty() {
16667        profile.axis_name.clone()
16668    } else {
16669        format!("{} [{unit}]", profile.axis_name)
16670    }
16671}
16672
16673fn frequency_display_unit_for_profile(profile: &ImageProfilePayload) -> Option<&'static str> {
16674    let axis_unit = profile.axis_unit.as_str();
16675    let hz = Unit::new("Hz").ok()?;
16676    let axis = Unit::new(axis_unit).ok()?;
16677    if !axis.conformant(&hz) {
16678        return None;
16679    }
16680    let max_abs_hz = profile
16681        .samples
16682        .iter()
16683        .filter_map(|sample| {
16684            sample
16685                .world_axis
16686                .as_ref()
16687                .filter(|axis| axis.unit == axis_unit)
16688                .and_then(|axis| Quantity::new(axis.value, axis_unit).ok())
16689                .and_then(|quantity| quantity.get_value_in(&hz).ok())
16690                .map(f64::abs)
16691        })
16692        .fold(0.0, f64::max);
16693    Some(if max_abs_hz >= 1e9 {
16694        "GHz"
16695    } else if max_abs_hz >= 1e6 {
16696        "MHz"
16697    } else if max_abs_hz >= 1e3 {
16698        "kHz"
16699    } else {
16700        "Hz"
16701    })
16702}
16703
16704fn format_profile_selected_label(
16705    sample: &casars_imagebrowser_protocol::ImageProfileSampleState,
16706    value_unit: &str,
16707) -> String {
16708    let world = sample
16709        .world_axis
16710        .as_ref()
16711        .map(|axis| format_world_axis_probe_value(&axis.name, &axis.unit, axis.value))
16712        .unwrap_or_else(|| format!("pixel {}", sample.pixel_index));
16713    let value = if sample.masked {
16714        "masked".to_string()
16715    } else if sample.finite && sample.value.is_finite() {
16716        if value_unit.is_empty() {
16717            format!("{:.6e}", sample.value)
16718        } else {
16719            format!("{:.6e} {value_unit}", sample.value)
16720        }
16721    } else {
16722        sample.value.to_string()
16723    };
16724    format!("{world} -> {value}")
16725}
16726
16727fn format_quantity_auto(value: f64, unit: &str, decimals: usize) -> Option<String> {
16728    let quantity = Quantity::new(value, unit).ok()?;
16729    let scaled = quantity.auto_scaled().ok()?;
16730    if scaled.unit().name().is_empty() {
16731        Some(trim_float_text(format!("{:.*}", decimals, scaled.value())))
16732    } else {
16733        Some(format!(
16734            "{} {}",
16735            trim_float_text(format!("{:.*}", decimals, scaled.value())),
16736            scaled.unit().name()
16737        ))
16738    }
16739}
16740
16741fn trim_float_text(mut text: String) -> String {
16742    while text.contains('.') && text.ends_with('0') {
16743        text.pop();
16744    }
16745    if text.ends_with('.') {
16746        text.pop();
16747    }
16748    if text == "-0" { "0".into() } else { text }
16749}
16750
16751fn render_browser_scalar(value: &BrowserScalarValue) -> String {
16752    match value {
16753        BrowserScalarValue::Bool(value) => value.to_string(),
16754        BrowserScalarValue::UInt8(value) => value.to_string(),
16755        BrowserScalarValue::UInt16(value) => value.to_string(),
16756        BrowserScalarValue::UInt32(value) => value.to_string(),
16757        BrowserScalarValue::Int16(value) => value.to_string(),
16758        BrowserScalarValue::Int32(value) => value.to_string(),
16759        BrowserScalarValue::Int64(value) => value.to_string(),
16760        BrowserScalarValue::Float32(value) => format_browser_float(f64::from(*value)),
16761        BrowserScalarValue::Float64(value) => format_browser_float(*value),
16762        BrowserScalarValue::Complex32(value) => render_complex32(value),
16763        BrowserScalarValue::Complex64(value) => render_complex64(value),
16764        BrowserScalarValue::String(value) => format!("{value:?}"),
16765    }
16766}
16767
16768fn render_complex32(value: &BrowserComplex32Value) -> String {
16769    format!(
16770        "{}{:+}i",
16771        format_browser_float(f64::from(value.re)),
16772        f64::from(value.im)
16773    )
16774}
16775
16776fn render_complex64(value: &BrowserComplex64Value) -> String {
16777    format!("{}{:+}i", format_browser_float(value.re), value.im)
16778}
16779
16780fn format_browser_float(value: f64) -> String {
16781    if value.is_finite() && value.fract() == 0.0 {
16782        format!("{value:.1}")
16783    } else {
16784        let rendered = format!("{value:.15}");
16785        rendered
16786            .trim_end_matches('0')
16787            .trim_end_matches('.')
16788            .to_string()
16789    }
16790}
16791
16792fn spw_display_name(name: &str) -> String {
16793    if name.is_empty() {
16794        "none".to_string()
16795    } else {
16796        name.to_string()
16797    }
16798}
16799
16800fn truncate(value: &str, width: usize) -> String {
16801    if value.chars().count() <= width {
16802        return value.to_string();
16803    }
16804    if width <= 3 {
16805        return ".".repeat(width);
16806    }
16807    let mut truncated = value.chars().take(width - 3).collect::<String>();
16808    truncated.push_str("...");
16809    truncated
16810}
16811
16812fn format_columns(cells: &[String], widths: &[usize]) -> String {
16813    let mut line = String::new();
16814    for (index, cell) in cells.iter().enumerate() {
16815        if index > 0 {
16816            line.push(' ');
16817        }
16818        line.push_str(cell);
16819        let padding = widths[index].saturating_sub(cell.chars().count());
16820        if padding > 0 {
16821            line.push_str(&" ".repeat(padding));
16822        }
16823    }
16824    line
16825}
16826
16827fn scrollbar_thumb_length(
16828    track_length: usize,
16829    content_length: usize,
16830    viewport_length: usize,
16831) -> usize {
16832    if track_length == 0 || content_length == 0 {
16833        return 1;
16834    }
16835    let thumb = (track_length * viewport_length).div_ceil(content_length);
16836    thumb.clamp(1, track_length)
16837}
16838
16839fn chooser_start_path(value: Option<&str>) -> PathBuf {
16840    let cwd = std::env::current_dir().unwrap_or_else(|_| PathBuf::from("."));
16841    let Some(raw) = value.map(str::trim).filter(|value| !value.is_empty()) else {
16842        return cwd;
16843    };
16844    let candidate = expand_tilde_path(raw);
16845    let candidate = if candidate.is_absolute() {
16846        candidate
16847    } else {
16848        cwd.join(candidate)
16849    };
16850    if candidate.exists() {
16851        return candidate;
16852    }
16853    candidate
16854        .ancestors()
16855        .find(|path| path.exists())
16856        .map(Path::to_path_buf)
16857        .unwrap_or(cwd)
16858}
16859
16860fn path_argument_value(is_path: bool, value: &str) -> OsString {
16861    if is_path {
16862        expand_tilde_path(value.trim()).into_os_string()
16863    } else {
16864        OsString::from(value)
16865    }
16866}
16867
16868fn expand_tilde_path(raw: &str) -> PathBuf {
16869    expand_tilde_path_with_home(raw, home_dir_path())
16870}
16871
16872fn expand_tilde_path_with_home(raw: &str, home: Option<&Path>) -> PathBuf {
16873    if raw == "~" {
16874        return home
16875            .map(Path::to_path_buf)
16876            .unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(raw));
16877    }
16878    if let Some(rest) = raw.strip_prefix("~/") {
16879        if let Some(home) = home {
16880            return home.join(rest);
16881        }
16882    }
16883    PathBuf::from(raw)
16884}
16885
16886fn home_dir_path() -> Option<&'static Path> {
16887    static HOME: std::sync::OnceLock<Option<PathBuf>> = std::sync::OnceLock::new();
16888    HOME.get_or_init(|| std::env::var_os("HOME").map(PathBuf::from))
16889        .as_deref()
16890}
16891
16892fn absolute_display_path(path: &Path) -> String {
16893    path.canonicalize()
16894        .unwrap_or_else(|_| {
16895            if path.is_absolute() {
16896                path.to_path_buf()
16897            } else {
16898                std::env::current_dir()
16899                    .unwrap_or_else(|_| PathBuf::from("."))
16900                    .join(path)
16901            }
16902        })
16903        .display()
16904        .to_string()
16905}
16906
16907fn chooser_visible_start(selected: usize, total: usize, visible_height: usize) -> usize {
16908    if total == 0 || visible_height == 0 || total <= visible_height {
16909        return 0;
16910    }
16911    let half = visible_height / 2;
16912    selected
16913        .saturating_sub(half)
16914        .min(total.saturating_sub(visible_height))
16915}
16916
16917fn chooser_input_from_key(key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<ExplorerInput> {
16918    if !(key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT) {
16919        return None;
16920    }
16921    Some(match key_event.code {
16922        KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k') => ExplorerInput::Up,
16923        KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j') => ExplorerInput::Down,
16924        KeyCode::Left | KeyCode::Backspace | KeyCode::Char('h') => ExplorerInput::Left,
16925        KeyCode::Right | KeyCode::Char('l') => ExplorerInput::Right,
16926        KeyCode::Home => ExplorerInput::Home,
16927        KeyCode::End => ExplorerInput::End,
16928        KeyCode::PageUp => ExplorerInput::PageUp,
16929        KeyCode::PageDown => ExplorerInput::PageDown,
16930        _ => return None,
16931    })
16932}
16933
16934fn resolve_parameter_action(key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<ParameterAction> {
16935    match key_event.code {
16936        KeyCode::Char('P') if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT => {
16937            Some(ParameterAction::PromoteWorkflowProduct)
16938        }
16939        KeyCode::Char('k') if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::CONTROL => {
16940            Some(ParameterAction::MoveUp)
16941        }
16942        KeyCode::Char('j') if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::CONTROL => {
16943            Some(ParameterAction::MoveDown)
16944        }
16945        KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k')
16946            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
16947        {
16948            Some(ParameterAction::SelectPrevious)
16949        }
16950        KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j')
16951            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
16952        {
16953            Some(ParameterAction::SelectNext)
16954        }
16955        KeyCode::Left if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(ParameterAction::ChoicePrevious),
16956        KeyCode::Right if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(ParameterAction::ChoiceNext),
16957        KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => {
16958            Some(ParameterAction::Activate)
16959        }
16960        KeyCode::Delete if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(ParameterAction::Delete),
16961        _ => None,
16962    }
16963}
16964
16965fn resolve_result_action(key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<ResultAction> {
16966    match key_event.code {
16967        KeyCode::Left | KeyCode::Char('h')
16968            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
16969        {
16970            Some(ResultAction::ScrollHorizontal(-HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_STEP))
16971        }
16972        KeyCode::Right | KeyCode::Char('l')
16973            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
16974        {
16975            Some(ResultAction::ScrollHorizontal(HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_STEP))
16976        }
16977        KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k')
16978            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
16979        {
16980            Some(ResultAction::Scroll(-1))
16981        }
16982        KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j')
16983            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
16984        {
16985            Some(ResultAction::Scroll(1))
16986        }
16987        KeyCode::PageUp if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(ResultAction::Scroll(-10)),
16988        KeyCode::PageDown if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(ResultAction::Scroll(10)),
16989        KeyCode::Left if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::CONTROL => {
16990            Some(ResultAction::ScrollHorizontal(-HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_STEP))
16991        }
16992        KeyCode::Right if key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::CONTROL => {
16993            Some(ResultAction::ScrollHorizontal(HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_STEP))
16994        }
16995        _ => None,
16996    }
16997}
16998
16999fn resolve_browser_action(key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<BrowserAction> {
17000    match key_event.code {
17001        KeyCode::Left | KeyCode::Char('h')
17002            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
17003        {
17004            Some(BrowserAction::MoveLeft)
17005        }
17006        KeyCode::Right | KeyCode::Char('l')
17007            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
17008        {
17009            Some(BrowserAction::MoveRight)
17010        }
17011        KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k')
17012            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
17013        {
17014            Some(BrowserAction::MoveUp)
17015        }
17016        KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j')
17017            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
17018        {
17019            Some(BrowserAction::MoveDown)
17020        }
17021        KeyCode::PageUp if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(BrowserAction::PageUp),
17022        KeyCode::PageDown if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(BrowserAction::PageDown),
17023        KeyCode::Enter if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(BrowserAction::Activate),
17024        KeyCode::Backspace if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(BrowserAction::Back),
17025        KeyCode::Esc if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(BrowserAction::Escape),
17026        _ => None,
17027    }
17028}
17029
17030fn resolve_edit_action(key_event: KeyEvent) -> Option<EditAction> {
17031    match key_event.code {
17032        KeyCode::Esc if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(EditAction::Cancel),
17033        KeyCode::Enter if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(EditAction::Commit),
17034        KeyCode::Backspace if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() => Some(EditAction::DeleteBackward),
17035        KeyCode::Char(character)
17036            if key_event.modifiers.is_empty() || key_event.modifiers == KeyModifiers::SHIFT =>
17037        {
17038            Some(EditAction::Insert(character))
17039        }
17040        _ => None,
17041    }
17042}
17043
17044fn browser_main_content_lines(snapshot: &BrowserSnapshot) -> Vec<String> {
17045    let mut lines = snapshot.content_lines.clone();
17046    let Some(inspector) = snapshot.inspector.as_ref() else {
17047        return lines;
17048    };
17049    let inspector_lines = &inspector.rendered_lines;
17050    if inspector_lines.is_empty() || lines.len() < inspector_lines.len() {
17051        return lines;
17052    }
17053    if lines.ends_with(inspector_lines) {
17054        let new_len = lines.len().saturating_sub(inspector_lines.len());
17055        lines.truncate(new_len);
17056        if lines.last().is_some_and(String::is_empty) {
17057            lines.pop();
17058        }
17059    }
17060    lines
17061}
17062
17063fn browser_inspector_lines(inspector: &BrowserInspectorSnapshot) -> Vec<String> {
17064    let mut lines = vec![inspector.title.clone()];
17065    if !inspector.trail.is_empty() {
17066        lines.push(format!(
17067            "Path: {}",
17068            inspector
17069                .trail
17070                .iter()
17071                .map(|entry| entry.label.as_str())
17072                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
17073                .join(" / ")
17074        ));
17075    }
17076    if !lines.is_empty() {
17077        lines.push(String::new());
17078    }
17079    lines.extend(inspector.rendered_lines.iter().cloned());
17080    lines
17081}
17082
17083fn shell_quote(value: &str) -> String {
17084    if value.is_empty() {
17085        "''".to_string()
17086    } else if value
17087        .chars()
17088        .all(|character| character.is_ascii_alphanumeric() || "/._-:=~".contains(character))
17089    {
17090        value.to_string()
17091    } else {
17092        format!("'{}'", value.replace('\'', "'\"'\"'"))
17093    }
17094}
17095
17096#[cfg(test)]
17097mod tests {
17098    use casa_images::ImageMovieSurfaceKind;
17099    use casa_ms::ui_schema::UiCommandSchema;
17100    use casars_imagebrowser_protocol::{
17101        ImageBrowserAxisValue, ImageBrowserCapabilities, ImageBrowserFocus, ImageBrowserParameters,
17102        ImageBrowserSnapshot, ImageBrowserView, ImageBrowserViewport, ImageDisplayAxisState,
17103        ImageNavigationMetrics, ImageNonDisplayAxisState, ImagePlaneCursorState, ImagePlaneRaster,
17104        ImageProfilePayload, ImageProfileSampleState,
17105    };
17106    use casars_imager::command_schema as imager_command_schema;
17107    use ratatui::layout::Rect;
17108
17109    use super::{
17110        AppState, BrowserSession, BrowserSessionKind, ConfigStore, FormField, FormSectionContent,
17111        ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode, ImageBrowserSessionState, ImageMovieState, ImagePlaneColormap,
17112        ImagePlaneMode, StaticFormItem, append_hidden_default_arguments, build_workflow_sections,
17113        centered_window_start, expand_tilde_path_with_home, image_pan_parameters,
17114        image_plane_draw_rect, image_zoom_parameters, new_direct_image_movie_engine,
17115    };
17116    use std::{
17117        ffi::OsString,
17118        path::{Path, PathBuf},
17119        time::Duration,
17120    };
17121
17122    #[test]
17123    fn expands_bare_tilde_to_home() {
17124        assert_eq!(
17125            expand_tilde_path_with_home("~", Some(Path::new("/tmp/home"))),
17126            PathBuf::from("/tmp/home")
17127        );
17128    }
17129
17130    #[test]
17131    fn expands_tilde_slash_to_home_relative_path() {
17132        assert_eq!(
17133            expand_tilde_path_with_home("~/data/file.ms", Some(Path::new("/tmp/home"))),
17134            PathBuf::from("/tmp/home/data/file.ms")
17135        );
17136    }
17137
17138    #[test]
17139    fn leaves_non_tilde_paths_unchanged() {
17140        assert_eq!(
17141            expand_tilde_path_with_home("./relative/path", Some(Path::new("/tmp/home"))),
17142            PathBuf::from("./relative/path")
17143        );
17144    }
17145
17146    #[test]
17147    fn test_idle_timeout_is_unchanged_without_tarpaulin() {
17148        let timeout = Duration::from_secs(60);
17149        assert_eq!(AppState::test_idle_timeout(timeout, false), timeout);
17150    }
17151
17152    #[test]
17153    fn test_idle_timeout_extends_under_tarpaulin() {
17154        let timeout = Duration::from_secs(60);
17155        assert_eq!(
17156            AppState::test_idle_timeout(timeout, true),
17157            Duration::from_secs(300)
17158        );
17159    }
17160
17161    #[test]
17162    fn llvm_profile_file_marks_tarpaulin_context_for_waits() {
17163        let _guard = crate::test_env_lock();
17164        let original_tarpaulin = std::env::var_os("TARPAULIN");
17165        let original_llvm_profile = std::env::var_os("LLVM_PROFILE_FILE");
17166
17167        unsafe {
17168            std::env::remove_var("TARPAULIN");
17169            std::env::remove_var("LLVM_PROFILE_FILE");
17170        }
17171        assert!(!AppState::under_tarpaulin_for_test());
17172
17173        unsafe {
17174            std::env::set_var("LLVM_PROFILE_FILE", "target/tarpaulin/%p.profraw");
17175        }
17176        assert!(AppState::under_tarpaulin_for_test());
17177
17178        unsafe {
17179            match original_tarpaulin {
17180                Some(value) => std::env::set_var("TARPAULIN", value),
17181                None => std::env::remove_var("TARPAULIN"),
17182            }
17183            match original_llvm_profile {
17184                Some(value) => std::env::set_var("LLVM_PROFILE_FILE", value),
17185                None => std::env::remove_var("LLVM_PROFILE_FILE"),
17186            }
17187        }
17188    }
17189
17190    fn plane_snapshot() -> ImageBrowserSnapshot {
17191        ImageBrowserSnapshot {
17192            status_line: "ready".into(),
17193            active_view: ImageBrowserView::Plane,
17194            focus: ImageBrowserFocus::Content,
17195            shape: vec![256, 256, 30],
17196            parameters: ImageBrowserParameters {
17197                blc: "0,0,0".into(),
17198                trc: "255,255,29".into(),
17199                inc: "1,1,1".into(),
17200                stretch: "percentile99".into(),
17201                autoscale: "per_plane".into(),
17202                clip_low: String::new(),
17203                clip_high: String::new(),
17204            },
17205            inspector_lines: vec!["Shape: [256, 256, 30]".into()],
17206            content_lines: Vec::new(),
17207            navigation: ImageNavigationMetrics {
17208                selected_index: 0,
17209                total_items: 0,
17210                viewport_items: 0,
17211            },
17212            plane: None,
17213            probe: None,
17214            profile: None,
17215            display_axes: vec![
17216                ImageDisplayAxisState {
17217                    axis: 0,
17218                    name: "Right Ascension".into(),
17219                    unit: "rad".into(),
17220                    blc: 0,
17221                    trc: 255,
17222                    inc: 1,
17223                    sampled_len: 256,
17224                    world_increment: Some(-1.0e-4),
17225                },
17226                ImageDisplayAxisState {
17227                    axis: 1,
17228                    name: "Declination".into(),
17229                    unit: "rad".into(),
17230                    blc: 0,
17231                    trc: 255,
17232                    inc: 1,
17233                    sampled_len: 256,
17234                    world_increment: Some(1.0e-4),
17235                },
17236            ],
17237            plane_cursor: Some(ImagePlaneCursorState {
17238                sampled_x: 128,
17239                sampled_y: 128,
17240                pixel_x: 128,
17241                pixel_y: 128,
17242            }),
17243            non_display_axes: Vec::new(),
17244            region: None,
17245            saved_region_names: Vec::new(),
17246            active_region_definition_name: None,
17247            mask_names: Vec::new(),
17248            default_mask_name: None,
17249            backend_timing: None,
17250            capabilities: ImageBrowserCapabilities {
17251                renderable_plane: true,
17252                world_coords_available: true,
17253                pixel_only_mode: false,
17254                non_display_axis_selectors: false,

17261    fn plane_raster() -> ImagePlaneRaster {

17263            width: 16,

17267            clip_max: 1.0,
17268            data_min: 0.0,
17269            data_max: 1.0,
17270            value_unit: "Jy/beam".into(),
17271            histogram_bins: vec![8; 16],
17272            masked_or_non_finite_count: 0,
17273            no_finite_values: false,
17274        }

17277    fn spectrum_profile() -> ImageProfilePayload {
17278        ImageProfilePayload {
17279            axis: 2,
17280            axis_name: "Frequency".into(),
17281            axis_unit: "Hz".into(),
17282            value_unit: "Jy/beam".into(),
17283            coord_type: "Spectral".into(),
17284            selected_sample_index: 1,
17285            samples: vec![
17286                ImageProfileSampleState {
17287                    sample_index: 0,
17288                    pixel_index: 0,
17289                    value: 0.25,
17290                    masked: false,
17291                    finite: true,
17292                    world_axis: Some(ImageBrowserAxisValue {
17293                        name: "Frequency".into(),
17294                        unit: "Hz".into(),
17295                        value: 1.420e9,
17296                    }),
17297                },
17298                ImageProfileSampleState {
17299                    sample_index: 1,
17300                    pixel_index: 1,
17301                    value: 0.5,
17302                    masked: false,
17303                    finite: true,
17304                    world_axis: Some(ImageBrowserAxisValue {
17305                        name: "Frequency".into(),
17306                        unit: "Hz".into(),
17307                        value: 1.421e9,
17308                    }),
17309                },
17310                ImageProfileSampleState {
17311                    sample_index: 2,
17312                    pixel_index: 2,
17313                    value: 0.1,
17314                    masked: false,
17315                    finite: true,
17316                    world_axis: Some(ImageBrowserAxisValue {
17317                        name: "Frequency".into(),
17318                        unit: "Hz".into(),
17319                        value: 1.422e9,
17320                    }),
17321                },
17322            ],
17323        }
17324    }
17325
17326    fn spectrum_profile_with_selected(selected_sample_index: usize) -> ImageProfilePayload {
17327        let mut profile = spectrum_profile();
17328        profile.selected_sample_index = selected_sample_index.min(profile.samples.len() - 1);
17329        profile
17330    }
17331
17332    fn image_test_app(snapshot: ImageBrowserSnapshot) -> AppState {
17333        let temp = tempfile::tempdir().expect("tempdir");
17334        let schema = crate::registry::imexplore_app()
17335            .load_schema()
17336            .expect("load imexplore schema");
17337        let config = ConfigStore::load_for_tests(temp.path().join("casars.toml"));
17338        let mut app =
17339            AppState::from_schema_with_config(crate::registry::imexplore_app(), schema, config);
17340        app.browser_session = Some(BrowserSession {
17341            root_path: "test.image".into(),
17342            kind: BrowserSessionKind::Image(Box::new(ImageBrowserSessionState {
17343                client: crate::browser_client::ImageBrowserClient::for_test(),
17344                snapshot,
17345                viewport: ImageBrowserViewport::with_plane_pixels(160, 48, 0, 1280, 768),
17346                hscroll: 0,
17347                left_pane_mode: ImageBrowserLeftPaneMode::Live,
17348                selected_saved_region_index: 0,
17349                selected_mask_index: 0,
17350                selected_non_display_axis: 0,
17351                pinned_probes: Vec::new(),
17352                selected_pinned_probe_id: None,
17353                next_pinned_probe_id: 1,
17354                restoring_selected_pinned_probe: false,
17355                show_live_reticle: true,
17356                plane_mode: ImagePlaneMode::Raster,
17357                plane_colormap: ImagePlaneColormap::Grayscale,
17358                plane_invert: false,
17359                panel: None,
17360                spectrum_panel: None,
17361                snapshot_generation: 1,
17362                movie: ImageMovieState::with_fps(10.0),
17363                movie_scheduler: None,
17364                movie_frame_seq: None,
17365                direct_movie_engine: new_direct_image_movie_engine(),
17366            })),
17367        });
17368        app
17369    }
17370
17371    #[test]
17372    fn centered_window_start_clamps_to_image_bounds() {
17373        assert_eq!(centered_window_start(5, 16, 256), 0);
17374        assert_eq!(centered_window_start(250, 32, 256), 224);
17375        assert_eq!(centered_window_start(128, 64, 256), 96);
17376    }
17377
17378    #[test]
17379    fn zoom_in_parameters_center_on_plane_cursor() {
17380        let snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17381        let parameters = image_zoom_parameters(&snapshot, true).expect("zoom parameters");
17382        assert_eq!(parameters.blc, "64,64,0");
17383        assert_eq!(parameters.trc, "191,191,29");
17384        assert_eq!(parameters.inc, "1,1,1");
17385    }
17386
17387    #[test]
17388    fn pan_parameters_shift_window_without_touching_non_display_axes() {
17389        let mut snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17390        snapshot.parameters = ImageBrowserParameters {
17391            blc: "64,64,7".into(),
17392            trc: "191,191,7".into(),
17393            inc: "1,1,1".into(),
17394            stretch: "percentile99".into(),
17395            autoscale: "per_plane".into(),
17396            clip_low: String::new(),
17397            clip_high: String::new(),
17398        };
17399        let parameters = image_pan_parameters(&snapshot, 1, -1).expect("pan parameters");
17400        assert_eq!(parameters.blc, "85,43,7");
17401        assert_eq!(parameters.trc, "212,170,7");
17402        assert_eq!(parameters.inc, "1,1,1");
17403    }
17404
17405    #[test]
17406    fn image_plane_draw_rect_reserves_space_for_axis_annotations() {
17407        let snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17408        let rect = image_plane_draw_rect(
17409            Rect {
17410                x: 0,
17411                y: 0,
17412                width: 80,
17413                height: 40,
17414            },
17415            &snapshot,
17416            (8, 16),
17417        )
17418        .expect("plane draw rect");
17419        assert!(rect.x > 0);
17420        assert!(rect.height < 40);
17421    }
17422
17423    #[test]
17424    fn direct_movie_bundle_info_maps_plane_and_spectrum_surfaces() {
17425        let mut snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17426        snapshot.plane = Some(plane_raster());
17427        snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile());
17428        snapshot.non_display_axes = vec![ImageNonDisplayAxisState {
17429            axis: 2,
17430            label: "Frequency".into(),
17431            index: 17,
17432            length: 63,
17433            pixel: 17,
17434        }];
17435        let mut app = image_test_app(snapshot);
17436        if let Some(state) = app.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
17437            state.movie.playing = true;
17438        }
17439        let layout = crate::ui::compute_layout(Rect::new(0, 0, 180, 52), &app);
17440
17441        let info = app
17442            .current_direct_image_movie_bundle_info(&layout)
17443            .expect("direct movie bundle info");
17444
17445        assert_eq!(info.axis_index, 17);
17446        assert_eq!(info.surfaces.len(), 2);
17447        assert!(info.surface(ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Plane).is_some());
17448        assert!(info.surface(ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum).is_some());
17449    }
17450
17451    #[test]
17452    fn image_render_requests_scale_down_large_surface_pixels_to_content_budget() {
17453        let mut snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17454        snapshot.plane = Some(plane_raster());
17455        snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile());
17456        snapshot.non_display_axes = vec![ImageNonDisplayAxisState {
17457            axis: 2,
17458            label: "Frequency".into(),
17459            index: 17,
17460            length: 63,
17461            pixel: 17,
17462        }];
17463        let app = image_test_app(snapshot);
17464        let layout = crate::ui::compute_layout(Rect::new(0, 0, 240, 80), &app);
17465        let font_size = app.image_plane_font_size_for_test();
17466        let plane_canvas = crate::ui::image_plane_canvas_area_for_browser(&layout, true, 0.75);
17467        let spectrum_canvas =
17468            crate::ui::image_spectrum_canvas_area(&layout, true, 0.75).expect("spectrum canvas");
17469        let full_plane_pixels = (
17470            u32::from(plane_canvas.width.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.0.max(1)),
17471            u32::from(plane_canvas.height.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.1.max(1)),
17472        );
17473        let full_spectrum_pixels = (
17474            u32::from(spectrum_canvas.width.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.0.max(1)),
17475            u32::from(spectrum_canvas.height.max(1)) * u32::from(font_size.1.max(1)),
17476        );
17477
17478        let plane_pixels = app
17479            .image_plane_render_pixels_for_test(&layout, font_size)
17480            .expect("plane render pixels");
17481        let spectrum_pixels = app
17482            .image_spectrum_render_pixels_for_test(&layout)
17483            .expect("spectrum render pixels");
17484
17485        assert!(plane_pixels.0 < full_plane_pixels.0);
17486        assert!(plane_pixels.1 < full_plane_pixels.1);
17487        assert!(spectrum_pixels.0 < full_spectrum_pixels.0);
17488        assert!(spectrum_pixels.1 < full_spectrum_pixels.1);
17489    }
17490
17491    #[test]
17492    fn direct_movie_bundle_cache_warms_on_repeat_request() {
17493        let mut snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17494        snapshot.plane = Some(plane_raster());
17495        snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile());
17496        snapshot.non_display_axes = vec![ImageNonDisplayAxisState {
17497            axis: 2,
17498            label: "Frequency".into(),
17499            index: 9,
17500            length: 32,
17501            pixel: 9,
17502        }];
17503        let mut app = image_test_app(snapshot);
17504        if let Some(state) = app.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
17505            state.movie.playing = true;
17506        }
17507        let layout = crate::ui::compute_layout(Rect::new(0, 0, 180, 52), &app);
17508
17509        let first = app
17510            .current_direct_image_movie_bundle(&layout)
17511            .expect("first direct movie bundle");
17512        let second = app
17513            .current_direct_image_movie_bundle(&layout)
17514            .expect("second direct movie bundle");
17515
17516        assert!(!first.cache_hit);
17517        assert!(second.cache_hit);
17518        assert_eq!(
17519            first.rendered.surfaces.len(),
17520            second.rendered.surfaces.len()
17521        );
17522    }
17523
17524    #[test]
17525    fn direct_movie_spectrum_bitmap_changes_with_selected_channel() {
17526        let mut snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17527        snapshot.plane = Some(plane_raster());
17528        snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile_with_selected(0));
17529        snapshot.non_display_axes = vec![ImageNonDisplayAxisState {
17530            axis: 2,
17531            label: "Frequency".into(),
17532            index: 0,
17533            length: 3,
17534            pixel: 0,
17535        }];
17536        let mut app = image_test_app(snapshot);
17537        if let Some(state) = app.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
17538            state.movie.playing = true;
17539        }
17540        let layout = crate::ui::compute_layout(Rect::new(0, 0, 180, 52), &app);
17541
17542        let first = app
17543            .current_direct_image_movie_bundle(&layout)
17544            .expect("first direct movie bundle");
17545        let first_spectrum = first
17546            .rendered
17547            .surfaces
17548            .iter()
17549            .find(|surface| surface.spec.kind == ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum)
17550            .expect("spectrum surface")
17551            .bitmap
17552            .clone();
17553
17554        if let Some(state) = app.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
17555            state.snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile_with_selected(2));
17556            state.snapshot.non_display_axes[0].index = 2;
17557            state.snapshot.non_display_axes[0].pixel = 2;
17558        }
17559
17560        let second = app
17561            .current_direct_image_movie_bundle(&layout)
17562            .expect("second direct movie bundle");
17563        let second_spectrum = second
17564            .rendered
17565            .surfaces
17566            .iter()
17567            .find(|surface| surface.spec.kind == ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum)
17568            .expect("spectrum surface")
17569            .bitmap
17570            .clone();
17571
17572        assert_ne!(first_spectrum.as_raw(), second_spectrum.as_raw());
17573    }
17574
17575    #[test]
17576    fn scheduled_movie_bundle_spectrum_bitmap_changes_with_selected_channel() {
17577        let mut snapshot = plane_snapshot();
17578        snapshot.plane = Some(plane_raster());
17579        snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile_with_selected(0));
17580        snapshot.non_display_axes = vec![ImageNonDisplayAxisState {
17581            axis: 2,
17582            label: "Frequency".into(),
17583            index: 0,
17584            length: 3,
17585            pixel: 0,
17586        }];
17587        let mut app = image_test_app(snapshot.clone());
17588        if let Some(state) = app.image_browser_session_state_mut() {
17589            state.movie.playing = true;
17590        }
17591        let layout = crate::ui::compute_layout(Rect::new(0, 0, 180, 52), &app);
17592        let spec = app
17593            .current_image_movie_scheduler_spec(&layout)
17594            .expect("movie scheduler spec");
17595
17596        let first = app
17597            .build_movie_prepared_bundle(
17598                &layout,
17599                &spec,
17600                super::MovieOccurrenceKey {
17601                    generation: 1,
17602                    movie_axis: 2,
17603                    axis_index: 0,
17604                },
17605                snapshot.clone(),
17606            )
17607            .expect("first movie bundle");
17608        let first_spectrum = first
17609            .rendered
17610            .surfaces
17611            .iter()
17612            .find(|surface| surface.spec.kind == ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum)
17613            .expect("spectrum surface")
17614            .bitmap
17615            .clone();
17616
17617        snapshot.profile = Some(spectrum_profile_with_selected(2));
17618        snapshot.non_display_axes[0].index = 2;
17619        snapshot.non_display_axes[0].pixel = 2;
17620
17621        let second = app
17622            .build_movie_prepared_bundle(
17623                &layout,
17624                &spec,
17625                super::MovieOccurrenceKey {
17626                    generation: 1,
17627                    movie_axis: 2,
17628                    axis_index: 2,
17629                },
17630                snapshot,
17631            )
17632            .expect("second movie bundle");
17633        let second_spectrum = second
17634            .rendered
17635            .surfaces
17636            .iter()
17637            .find(|surface| surface.spec.kind == ImageMovieSurfaceKind::Spectrum)
17638            .expect("spectrum surface")
17639            .bitmap
17640            .clone();
17641
17642        assert_ne!(first_spectrum.as_raw(), second_spectrum.as_raw());
17643    }
17644
17645    #[test]
17646    fn imager_stage_parameters_exclude_meta_arguments() {
17647        let schema = imager_command_schema("casars-imager");
17648        let fields = schema
17649            .arguments
17650            .iter()
17651            .filter_map(FormField::from_schema)
17652            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
17653        let sections = build_workflow_sections("imager", &fields);
17654        let stages = sections
17655            .iter()
17656            .find(|section| section.name == "Stages")
17657            .expect("stages section");
17658        let FormSectionContent::Items(stage_items) = &stages.content;
17659        let stage_ids = stage_items
17660            .iter()
17661            .map(|item| match item {
17662                StaticFormItem::Field(index) => fields[*index].schema.id.as_str(),
17663                other => panic!("unexpected stages item: {other:?}"),
17664            })
17665            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
17666        let stage_parameters = sections
17667            .iter()
17668            .find(|section| section.name == "Stage Parameters")
17669            .expect("stage parameters section");
17670        let FormSectionContent::Items(items) = &stage_parameters.content;
17671        let ids = items
17672            .iter()
17673            .map(|item| match item {
17674                StaticFormItem::Field(index) => fields[*index].schema.id.as_str(),
17675                other => panic!("unexpected stage-parameters item: {other:?}"),
17676            })
17677            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
17678        assert!(stage_ids.contains(&"dirty_only"));
17679        assert!(stage_ids.contains(&"niter"));
17680        assert!(stage_ids.contains(&"threshold_jy"));
17681        assert!(ids.contains(&"imsize"));
17682        assert!(!ids.contains(&"ui_schema"));
17683        assert!(!ids.contains(&"help"));
17684    }
17685
17686    #[test]
17687    fn hidden_default_arguments_are_invoked_without_form_fields() {
17688        let schema: UiCommandSchema = serde_json::from_value(serde_json::json!({
17689            "schema_version": 1,
17690            "command_id": "applycal",
17691            "invocation_name": "calibrate",
17692            "display_name": "Applycal",
17693            "category": "Calibration",
17694            "summary": "Apply calibration.",
17695            "usage": "calibrate --mode apply --ms <input.ms>",
17696            "arguments": [
17697                {
17698                    "id": "mode",
17699                    "label": "Mode",
17700                    "order": 0,
17701                    "parser": {
17702                        "kind": "option",
17703                        "flags": ["--mode"],
17704                        "metavar": "MODE",
17705                        "choices": ["apply"]
17706                    },
17707                    "value_kind": "choice",
17708                    "required": false,
17709                    "default": "apply",
17710                    "help": "",
17711                    "group": "Mode",
17712                    "advanced": true,
17713                    "hidden_in_tui": true
17714                },
17715                {
17716                    "id": "ui_schema",
17717                    "label": "UI schema",
17718                    "order": 1,
17719                    "parser": {
17720                        "kind": "action",
17721                        "flags": ["--ui-schema"],
17722                        "action": "ui_schema"
17723                    },
17724                    "value_kind": "bool",
17725                    "required": false,
17726                    "default": null,
17727                    "help": "",
17728                    "group": "Meta",
17729                    "advanced": true,
17730                    "hidden_in_tui": true
17731                }
17732            ],
17733            "managed_output": null
17734        }))
17735        .expect("schema");
17736        let fields = schema
17737            .arguments
17738            .iter()
17739            .filter_map(FormField::from_schema)
17740            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
17741        let mut arguments = Vec::new();
17742
17743        append_hidden_default_arguments(&schema, &mut arguments).expect("hidden defaults");
17744
17745        assert!(fields.is_empty());
17746        assert_eq!(
17747            arguments,
17748            vec![OsString::from("--mode"), OsString::from("apply")]
17749        );
17750    }
17751
17752    #[test]
17753    fn hidden_default_positionals_are_invoked_before_visible_fields() {
17754        let schema = crate::registry::imhead_app()
17755            .load_schema()
17756            .expect("imhead schema");
17757        let fields = schema
17758            .arguments
17759            .iter()
17760            .filter_map(FormField::from_schema)
17761            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
17762        let mut arguments = Vec::new();
17763
17764        append_hidden_default_arguments(&schema, &mut arguments).expect("hidden defaults");
17765
17766        assert!(
17767            fields
17768                .iter()
17769                .any(|field| field.schema.id.as_str() == "image_path")
17770        );
17771        assert_eq!(arguments, vec![OsString::from("imhead")]);
17772    }
17773}
